english: Your Attack level is used to determine how likely you are to hit your target in melee combat. A higher Attack level will give you a better chance to hit.
translation: 你的攻击等级用于决定你在近战中击中目标的几率。更高的攻击等级将为你提供更高的命中率。

english: Additionally, a higher Attack level will allow you to wield more powerful weapons. A weapon with a higher Attack bonus will give you more accuracy in combat.
translation: 此外，更高的攻击等级将允许你使用更强大的武器。具有更高攻击加成的武器将为你提供更高的战斗准确率。

english: You can select your Attack style from the Combat Options side panel. Different enemies are weaker or stronger against different Attack styles, so choose carefully.
translation: 你可以从战斗选项面板选择你的攻击风格。不同敌人对不同攻击风格的抗性或弱点不同，请谨慎选择。

english: As with any skill, you will restore <Num0> missing Hitpoint every minute, but the best way of recovering Hitpoints is by eating food.
translation: 与任何技能一样，你每分钟会恢复<Num0>点缺失的生命值，但恢复生命值的最佳方式是进食。

english: Mining allows you to get various minerals from the world, for use in other skills; primarily Smithing.
translation: 采矿技能让你从世界中获取各种矿物，用于其他技能，主要是锻造。

english: To mine a rock, simply interact with it while holding a pickaxe you have the level to use and you'll start mining it. Eventually, you'll collect the ore and the rock will deplete. Low level rocks will replenish themselves fairly quickly, but higher level ones will take longer and longer to come back.
translation: 要开采岩石，只需手持符合等级要求的镐子与岩石互动，即可开始开采。最终你会收集到矿石，岩石会枯竭。低级岩石会相当快地再生，但高级岩石需要更长时间才能再生。

english: At higher mining levels, you'll have an increased chance of successfully mining a rock. You'll also be able to use more powerful pickaxes, which decrease the amount of time between mining attempts.
translation: 随着采矿等级的提升，你成功开采矿石的几率也会增加。此外你还能使用更强力的镐子，这会缩短每次开采尝试之间的时间间隔。

english: Note that while most pickaxes have an Attack level requirement to equip them, you're still able to use them from within your inventory if you have the required Mining level.
translation: 请注意，虽然大多数镐子有攻击等级要求才能装备，但如果有所需的采矿等级，仍可从物品栏中直接使用。

english: Your Strength level determines your max hit in combat. Whenever you hit your opponent, you will deal a random amount of damage up to your max hit.
translation: 你的力量等级决定你在战斗中的最大伤害。每当你击中敌人时，你将造成随机伤害，最高可达你的最大伤害。

english: Most weapons have a Strength bonus that will also increase your max hit. You can view your Strength bonus (and all of your equipment's stats) by selecting 'View equipment stats' under the Worn Equipment side panel.
translation: 大多数武器都有力量加成，这也会增加你的最大伤害。你可以通过在装备面板下选择查看装备属性来查看你的力量加成 (以及所有装备的属性)。

english: Agility both increases the rate at which your Run Energy replenishes while not running and decreases the rate at which it drains while you run.
translation: 敏捷既能提高你在非奔跑状态下跑步值的恢复速度，也能降低你在奔跑时跑步值的消耗速度。

english: You will also gain access to useful shortcuts across Gielinor; these are marked with a green arrow on your map.
translation: 你还将获得穿越基利诺尔的捷径权限，这些捷径在你的地图上以绿色箭头标记。

english: In order to train your Agility skill, you will need an Agility course; these are a series of obstacles that reward experience upon completion.
translation: 为了训练你的敏捷技能，你需要前往敏捷训练场。训练场有一系列的障碍，在完成后会给予经验值奖励。

english: Smithing lets you convert raw ores into useful metals, then use those metals to make your own weapons and armour.
translation: 锻造技能让你将矿石转化为金属锭，然后使用这些金属锭可制作你自己的武器和盔甲。

english: To smelt ores, simply take the mix of ores you need to any furnace and you'll be able to convert them into bars.
translation: 要冶炼矿石，只需将所需矿石带到任何熔炉，你就可以将它们转化为金属锭。

english: Once you have your bars, grab a hammer and take them to an anvil. Bigger items will need more bars to make.
translation: 准备好金属锭后，带上锤子前往铁砧即可制作。制作大型物品需要消耗更多的金属锭。

english: As you advance your Smithing level, you'll be able to make make more gear out of higher quality metals.
translation: 随着你提升锻造等级，你将能够用更高质量的金属制作更多装备。

english: Your Defence level determines how likely you are to block enemy attacks. The chances of this happening increase with your level, but be careful; you are never guaranteed to block every attack!
translation: 你的防御等级决定你格挡敌人攻击的可能性，而格挡几率随你的等级增加。但要小心，你从不保证能格挡每一次攻击！

english: Additionally, a higher Defence level will allow you to equip more powerful shields and armour. As well as giving you better defensive stats, some armour will also increase your Attack or Strength bonuses as well.
translation: 此外，更高的防御等级将让你能够装备更强大的盾牌和盔甲。除了提供更好的防御属性外，一些盔甲还会增加你的攻击或力量加成。

english: Herblore allows you to make potions with herbs and ingredients found across Gielinor.
translation: 草药学让你可以用基利诺尔各地发现的草药和材料制作药水。

english: To make a potion, you first need to clean a grimy herb, then combine it with a vial of water to make an unfinished potion. You can then add the secondary ingredient(s) to complete the potion.
translation: 要制作药水，你首先需要清洗未清洗的草药，然后将其与水瓶结合制成未完成的药水。然后你可以添加次要材料来完成药水。

english: Fishing allows you to gather fish at various points across Gielinor. Typically, these will be indicated by moving bubbles on the surface of the water.
translation: 钓鱼技能让你可在基利诺尔各地的钓鱼点钓鱼。通常这些钓鱼点会以水面上的移动气泡标示。

english: Different fish require different equipment to catch; for instance, you need a fishing net to catch shrimp, but a fishing rod and bait to catch sardines.
translation: 不同鱼类需要不同装备才能捕获。例如你需要渔网来捕捞虾，但需要鱼竿和鱼饵来钓沙丁鱼。

english: As your Fishing level increases, you'll gain access to more varieties of fish to catch, as well as having a higher chance of successfully catching fish when you try.
translation: 随着钓鱼等级提高，你可捕获的鱼类种类也会增加，同时提高捕鱼成功率。

english: Your Ranged level determines how accurate you are with ranged weapons, as well as how much damage they do. A higher Ranged level will result in more hits that do more damage.
translation: 远程等级决定使用远程武器的准确度和造成的伤害量。更高的远程等级将提高命中率并增加伤害。

english: Most ranged weapons will need a specific kind of ammunition to go with them; for instance, bows will need arrows and crossbows will need bolts.
translation: 大多数远程武器需要特定类型的弹药。例如弓需要箭，弩需要弩箭。

english: As your Ranged level increases, you will also get access to more powerful weapons and ammunition. Typically, each ranged weapon can only handle ammo up to a certain level; for instance, an oak bow can only fire bronze, iron or steel arrows, but not mithril.
translation: 随着你的远程等级提高，你还将解锁更强大的武器和弹药。通常，每种远程武器只能使用特定等级及以下的弹药。例如橡木弓只能发射青铜、铁或钢箭，但不能发射秘银箭。

english: Thieving lets you steal items from various people and stalls. Be careful, as people won't take too kindly to you going through their pockets, and might call the guards on you, or may take matters into their own hands.
translation: 偷窃技能让你从各种人和摊位偷窃物品。要小心，因为人们不会太喜欢你翻他们的口袋，可能会叫守卫来抓你，或者可能会亲自动手。

english: As your Thieving level increases, the odds of you successfully stealing from your target will increase. You will also gain access to more lucrative targets with more valuable loot.
translation: 随着你的偷窃等级提高，你成功从目标偷窃的几率会增加。你还将可以偷窃收益更高的目标和更有价值的战利品。

english: Cooking is a skill that lets you make all kinds of delicious food that will typically restore your Hitpoints, amongst providing other benefits.
translation: 烹饪是一项技能，让你制作各种美味食物，通常能恢复你的生命值，同时提供其他益处。

english: At its most basic, Cooking can be done by simply taking raw meats and fish to either a fire or a range. You'll get better results overall if you use a range, though.
translation: 最基础的烹饪方式，只需将生肉或生鱼带到火或炉灶旁即可进行。不过，如果你使用炉灶，总体效果会更好。

english: Some foods will require you to prepare your ingredients before you can cook them. For example, you first need to mix flour and water into a dough before you can bake them into bread.
translation: 有些食物需要你在烹饪前准备材料。例如，你需要先将面粉和水混合成面团，然后才能将其烤成面包。

english: As your Cooking level increases, you'll get access to an increasing list of recipes. You'll also find that you accidentally burn your food less of the time as well.
translation: 随着你的烹饪等级提高，你将解锁越来越多的食谱。你还会发现你意外烧焦食物的几率也会降低。

english: Prayer allows you to access different prayers, available from the Prayer side panel. Each prayer offers a different powerful benefit.
translation: 祈祷技能让你可以使用不同的祈祷，可从祈祷面板启用。每个祈祷提供不同的强大增益效果。

english: Using prayers will drain your prayer points over time. Once you run out of prayer points, you will be unable to use any prayers. You can restore your prayer points by praying at an altar.
translation: 启用祈祷会随时间消耗祈祷值。祈祷值耗尽后，你将无法使用任何祈祷。你可以通过在祭坛祷告来恢复祈祷值。

english: Some pieces of equipment will grant you a Prayer bonus, which will reduce the rate at which your prayer points are drained.
translation: 某些装备会提供祈祷加成，这将降低祈祷值消耗速度。

english: The most common way to increase your Prayer level is to offer the remains of the enemies you kill. Burying their bones and scattering their ashes will award you Prayer experience.
translation: 提高祈祷等级最常见的方式是供奉被击杀敌人的遗骨。埋葬骨头或撒播骨灰可获得祈祷经验值。

english: Crafting is a wide-ranging skill that allows you to create various pieces of armour, jewellery, equipment and more.
translation: 制作是一项广泛的技能，让你可以制作各种盔甲、首饰、装备等。

english: To craft armour out of animal hides, you'll typically first need to take the hides to a tanner to get them tanned, then combine them with a needle and thread, which can be acquired from certain crafting shops in the world.
translation: 要用动物皮制作盔甲，你通常首先需要将兽皮带到鞣皮师那里鞣制，然后用针和线缝合，针线可以从世界上某些制作商店获得。

english: To make pottery, you'll need to obtain some soft clay, obtained by adding water to clay. You can then use a pottery wheel to shape the clay into an unfired item, which you can then finish in a pottery oven.
translation: 要制作陶器，你需要获得一些软粘土，通过向粘土加水制成。然后你可以使用陶轮将粘土塑造成未烧制的陶器，然后在陶器烤箱中烧制完成。

english: To make jewellery, you'll need to first get a crafting mould. You can then take that mould and some gold or silver bars to a furnace to craft your jewellery. At higher crafting levels, you can cut gems and mould them simultaneously to create jewellery which you can enchant!
translation: 要制作首饰，你首先需要获得一个制作模具。然后你可以将模具和一些金锭或银锭带到熔炉制作你的首饰。在更高的制作等级，你可以切割宝石并同时塑形以制作可以附魔的首饰！

english: Firemaking is a skill that allows you to make fires. To do so, simply use a tinderbox on a set of logs and you'll attempt to light them on fire.
translation: 生火是一项让你可以点燃火堆的技能。要生火的话只需对原木使用火绒盒，你就可以尝试点燃它们。

english: Higher Firemaking levels will allow you to burn logs that grant more experience, as well as allowing you to burn them quicker.
translation: 更高的生火等级将让你可以点燃给予更多经验的原木和更快地点燃它们。

english: Magic grants you access to a wide variety of spells. To cast each spell, you will need a specific set of runes. You can see the runes required by inspecting the spell in either the spellbook side-panel, or in their tab in this guide.
translation: 魔法技能让你可以使用多种多样的法术。施放每个法术都需要特定的符石。你可通过法术书面板或本指南中的标签查看施放每个法术所需的符石。

english: Click the spells in this guide to see the required runes to cast each spell.  By opening the spellbook icon on the spellbook side-panel, you can see what each spell does by moving your mouse over its icon.
translation: 点击本指南中的法术可查看施放该法术所需的符石。打开法术书面板上的法术书图标，将鼠标悬停在法术图标上即可查看每个法术的效果。

english: You can use certain pieces of equipment to replace runes in order to cast spells. For instance, an equipped staff of air counts as an infinite supply of air runes.
translation: 某些装备可替代某些符石来施放法术。例如，装备风元素法杖相当于提供无限供应的风符石。

english: Staves can also be used to auto-cast certain offensive spells in combat; to enable this, equip your staff, go to the Combat Options side panel, and select one of the 'Spell' options.
translation: 法杖还可在战斗中自动施放某些攻击性法术。要启用此功能，请装备法杖，前往战斗选项面板，选择''法术''选项之一。

english: Fletching allows you to create various ranged weapons, as well as ammunition to go with them.
translation: 制箭允许你制作各种远程武器，以及与之配套的弹药。

english: Making bows requires bowstring, which can be made from flax at a spinning wheel. You can use a knife on some logs to carve an unfinished bow, then add the bowstring to complete the weapon.
translation: 制作弓需要弓弦，弓弦可以在纺车上用亚麻制作。你可以用刀在一些原木上削出未完成的弓，然后装上弓弦来完成武器。

english: To create arrows, you'll first need to carve logs into arrow shafts with a knife, then tip the arrow shafts with feathers. Finally, you'll need to add some arrow heads.
translation: 要制作箭，你首先需要用刀将原木削成箭杆，然后用羽毛给箭杆装上羽饰。最后，你需要装上一些箭头。

english: To make bolts, you only need to combine unfinished bolts with feathers. You can also chisel gemstones down into bolt tips, with each gemstone being able to top a different bolt.
translation: 要制作弩箭，你只需要将未完成的弩箭与羽毛组合。你也可以将宝石凿成弩箭头，每种宝石可以用于不同类型的弩箭。

english: Woodcutting allows you to chop down trees to obtain logs. Most trees in the game can be chopped down with an axe.
translation: 伐木技能让你砍伐树木以获得原木。游戏中的大多数树木都可以用斧头砍伐。

english: Increasing your Woodcutting level will give you a higher chance of successfully chopping a tree. You'll also gain access to more trees to cut down.
translation: 提高伐木等级将增加成功砍伐树木的几率，还将解锁更多可砍伐的树木。

english: In addition to this, higher Woodcutting levels grant access to more powerful axes, which also increase the chance of chopping trees. Note that you can still use an axe in your inventory if you have the Woodcutting level for it, even if you don't have the Attack level to equip it.
translation: 除此之外，更高的伐木等级可让你使用更强大的斧头，这也增加砍伐树木的几率。请注意，即使没有装备所需的攻击等级，只要有足够的伐木等级，仍可在物品栏中直接使用斧头。

english: Runecraft is the skill that allows you to convert essences into runes, which you can use to cast spells.
translation: 符石制作是让你将精华转化为符石的技能，你可以使用这些符石来施放法术。

english: To create runes, you'll first need some essence and a talisman of the rune you want to make. You can use the talisman to both locate and access the runic altar, which is where the runes are crafted.
translation: 要制作符石，你首先需要一些精华和对应符石的护符。你可以使用护符来定位并进入符文祭坛，符石就是在那里制作的。

english: Higher Runecraft levels will allow you to craft more kinds of runes. At higher levels, you'll also be able to make multiple runes per essence.
translation: 更高的符石制作等级将让你可以制作更多种类的符石。随着等级的提升，你还能从每块精华中制作出多个符石。

english: Slayer is a skill that lets you fight increasingly dangerous and lucrative monsters. Some monsters can only be fought if you have a high enough Slayer level.
translation: 杀戮者是一项让你与越来越危险且奖励更丰厚的怪物战斗的技能。有些怪物只有达到足够的杀戮者等级才能击杀。

english: To get started with Slayer, you'll first need a Slayer task, which can be obtained from a Slayer Master. You can then kill the assigned target to get Slayer experience.
translation: 要开始训练杀戮者技能，你首先需要从杀戮大师获得杀戮任务，然后击杀指定目标来获得杀戮者经验。

english: Once you've completed five tasks, you can start earning reward points, which can be used to skip or block tasks you don't want, or purchase various items and benefits like extended tasks.
translation: 完成五个任务后，你就可以开始赚取奖励点数。这些点数可用于跳过或屏蔽你不想要的任务，或购买各种物品和特权，例如增加任务的目标数量。

english: Farming allows you to grow various flowers, vegetables, trees, herbs and more in farming patches across Gielinor.
translation: 农业技能让你可以在基利诺尔各地的种植地种植各种花卉、蔬菜、树木、草药等。

english: To get started, you'll need some seeds and a seed dibber, as well as a rake to de-weed the patch you want to use.
translation: 你需要一些种子和一个种植锥来开始种植，以及一个耙子来为你想使用的种植地除草。

english: Once you've cleared the patch, you can add your seed to it. You can also optionally water it with a watering can or add a bucket of compost to decrease the chances of your plant becoming diseased.
translation: 清理完种植地后，即可播下种子。你也可以选择用浇水壶浇水，或施加一桶堆肥，以降低植物染病的几率。

english: It'll take a while for your plant to grow, so feel free to explore the world and come back to it later!
translation: 你的植物需要一段时间才能生长，所以你可以随意探索世界，稍后再回来查看！

english: Once your plant has grown, you might need another tool to collect the harvest. For instance, you'll need a spade to dig up potatoes.
translation: 植物成熟后，你可能需要其他工具来收获作物。例如挖土豆就需要用到铲子。

english: If you're worried about your crops becoming diseased, most crops can be protected by the nearby gardeners, but they'll want specific produce in return.
translation: 如果你担心作物染病，大多数作物可以由附近的园丁保护，但他们想要特定的农产品作为回报。

english: As your Farming level increases, you'll gain access to more crops to grow, as well as obtaining greater yields when harvesting.
translation: 随着你的农业等级提高，你将获得种植更多种类作物的权限，并在收获时获得更高产量。

english: Construction gives you access to your very owned Player-Owned House. To get started, you'll need to buy a house from an Estate agent.
translation: 建筑技能让你拥有自己的玩家专属房屋。要开始学习这门技能，你需要先从地产经纪人那里购买一所房屋。

english: Once you have a house, you'll need to build furniture. Most furniture can be built with planks, which can be obtained via taking logs to a sawmill.
translation: 拥有房屋后你需要建造家具，大多数家具可用木板建造。木板可通过将原木送到锯木厂加工获得。

english: To build furniture, grab a hammer and a saw, enter your house in build mode, select a hotspot and select the furniture you want to build.
translation: 要建造家具，请拿起锤子和锯子并以建造模式进入你的房子，选择一个热点并选择你想建造的家具。

english: As your Construction level increases, you'll be able to build bigger houses, gain access to more kinds of room in your house, and be able to build fancier furniture.
translation: 随着你的建筑等级提高，你将能够建造更大的房子，获得建造更多种类房间的权限，并能够建造更华丽的家具。

english: Hunter lets you track and catch a wide variety of wildlife, granting access to various unique materials in the process.
translation: 猎人技能让你追踪和捕捉各种野生动物，在此过程中获得各种独特材料。

english: Each animal you can hunt will typically be found in a specfic locale, and will require different gear. Make sure you come prepared!
translation: 你可以狩猎的每种动物通常出现在特定地点，并需要不同的装备。确保你做好充分准备！

english: As your Hunter level improves, not only will you be able to hunt a wider variety of creatures, but you'll also be able to maintain more traps simultaneously, and they will successfully trap creatures more often.
translation: 随着你的狩猎等级提高，你不仅能狩猎更多种类的生物，还能同时设置更多陷阱，并且陷阱成功捕捉生物的几率也会提高。

english: Toggle Building mode on and off, allowing construction within your house.
translation: 切换建造模式的开启和关闭，允许在房屋内进行建造。

english: Toggle teleport location inside (on) or outside (off) of the house.
translation: 切换传送位置在房屋内部 (开启) 或外部 (关闭)。

english: Toggle Building mode by default when teleport inside the house.
translation: 传送至房屋内部时默认开启建造模式。

english: Render house doors as initially closed.
translation: 将房屋门渲染为初始关闭状态。

english: Render house doors as initially open.
translation: 将房屋门渲染为初始开启状态。

english: You may ignore users by using the button below, or by right-clicking on a message from them and selecting to add them to your ignore list.
translation: 你可以使用下方按钮忽略用户，或右键点击他们的消息并选择将其添加到忽略列表。

english: You may add friends by using the button below, or by right-clicking on a message from them and selecting to add them as a friend.
translation: 你可以使用下方按钮添加好友，或右键点击他们的消息并选择将其添加为好友。

english: When active your character will automatically fight back if attacked.
translation: 激活后，你的角色在受到攻击时会自动反击。

english: Retainer: Traps a vampyre juvenile or juvinate provided they have <Num0>% or less hitpoints remaining. (<Num1>%)
translation: 束缚者：可困住新生吸血鬼或成熟吸血鬼，前提是他们的剩余生命值为<Num0>%或更低。 (<Num1>%)

english: Power of Death: Reduce all melee damage you receive by <Num0>% for the next minute while the staff remains equipped. Stacks with Protect from Melee. (<Num1>%)
translation: 死亡之力：法杖装备期间，接下来一分钟内你受到的所有近战伤害降低<Num0>%。可与保护近战叠加。 (<Num1>%)

english: Rampage: Drain your Attack, Defence, Ranged & Magic levels by <Num0>%, while increasing your Strength by <Num1> levels, plus <Num2>% of the drained levels. (<Num3>%)
translation: 狂暴：降低你<Num0>%的攻击、防御、远程和魔法等级，同时提升你的力量等级<Num1>级，再加上被降低等级的<Num2>%。 (<Num3>%)

english: Lumber Up: Increase your Woodcutting level by <Num0>. (<Num1>%)
translation: 伐木提升：提升你的伐木等级<Num0>级。 (<Num1>%)

english: Rock Knocker: Increase your Mining level by <Num0>. (<Num1>%)
translation: 矿石敲击：提升你的采矿等级<Num0>级。 (<Num1>%)

english: Puncture: Deal two quick slashes with <Num0>% increased accuracy and <Num1>% increased damage. (<Num2>%)
translation: 穿刺：进行两次快速挥砍，准确率提高<Num0>%，伤害提高<Num1>%。 (<Num2>%)

english: Backstab: Deal an attack with greatly increased accuracy on unsuspecting targets and that lowers your target's Defence level by the damage dealt. (<Num0>%)
translation: 背刺：对毫无防备的目标发动攻击，准确率大幅提升，并根据造成的伤害降低目标的防御等级。 (<Num0>%)

english: Sanctuary: Temporarily increase your Defence level by <Num0>. (<Num1>%)
translation: 庇护所：暂时提升你的防御等级<Num0>级。 (<Num1>%)

english: Cleave: Deal a powerful attack that inflicts <Num0>% more damage. (<Num1>%)
translation: 劈砍：发动强力攻击，造成<Num0>%额外伤害。 (<Num1>%)

english: Cleave: Deal a powerful attack that inflicts <Num0>% more damage with <Num1>% increased accuracy and increased speed. (<Num2>%)
translation: 劈砍：发动强力攻击，造成<Num0>%额外伤害，准确率提高<Num1>%，速度加快。 (<Num2>%)

english: Sever: Deal a slash with increased accuracy that prevents your target from using protection prayers for <Num0> seconds if it successfully hits. (<Num1>%)
translation: 斩断：发动准确率更高的挥砍，若成功命中，可阻止目标使用保护祈祷<Num0>秒。 (<Num1>%)

english: Weaken: Temporarily drain your target's Attack, Strength and Defence by <Num0>%. Is twice as effective against demons. (<Num1>%)
translation: 虚弱：暂时降低目标<Num0>%的攻击、力量和防御等级。对恶魔效果加倍。 (<Num1>%)

english: Liquify: Deal an attack with double the chance of hitting that boosts your Strength, Attack and Defence levels by <Num0>% of the damage dealt. Can only be used underwater. (<Num1>%)
translation: 液化：发动命中几率翻倍的攻击，并根据造成伤害的<Num0>%提升你的力量、攻击和防御等级。只能在水下使用。 (<Num1>%)

english: Powerstab: Hit up to fourteen enemies surrounding you. (<Num0>%)
translation: 强力刺击：可命中周围最多十四个敌人。 (<Num0>%)

english: The Judgement: Deal an attack that inflicts <Num0>% more damage with double accuracy. (<Num1>%)
translation: 审判：发动准确率翻倍的攻击，造成<Num0>%额外伤害。 (<Num1>%)

english: Warstrike: Deal an attack, with double accuracy, that inflicts <Num0>% more damage and drains one of your target's combat stats by the damage dealt. (<Num1>%)
translation: 战争打击：发动准确率翻倍的攻击，造成<Num0>%额外伤害，并根据造成的伤害降低目标的一项战斗属性。 (<Num1>%)

english: Healing Blade: Deal an attack that inflicts <Num0>% more damage with double accuracy, while restoring your Hitpoints and Prayer by <Num1>% and <Num2>% of the damage dealt respectively. (<Num3>%)
translation: 治愈之刃：发动准确率翻倍的攻击，造成<Num0>%额外伤害，同时根据造成伤害分别恢复你<Num1>%的生命值和<Num2>%的祈祷值。 (<Num3>%)

english: Ice Cleave: Deal an attack that inflicts <Num0>% more damage with double accuracy and freezes your target for <Num1> seconds if it successfully hits. (<Num2>%)
translation: 冰霜劈砍：发动准确率翻倍的攻击，造成<Num0>%额外伤害，若成功命中可冻结目标<Num1>秒。 (<Num2>%)

english: Blood Sacrifice: Deal an attack that inflicts <Num0>% more damage with double accuracy and marks your target for a blood sacrifice. Targets marked for a blood sacrifice will be hit for <Num1> damage after a short delay, unless they move away. If they are hit, you'll also be healed for the damage dealt. (<Num2>%)
translation: 血之献祭：发动准确率翻倍的攻击，造成<Num0>%额外伤害，并标记目标进行血之献祭。被标记的目标将在短暂延迟后受到<Num1>点伤害，除非他们离开。若他们受到伤害，你也将根据造成的伤害获得治疗。 (<Num2>%)

english: Saradomin's Lightning: Call upon Saradomin's power to perform an attack that inflicts <Num0>% more melee damage and <Num1>-<Num2> extra magic damage. (<Num3>%)
translation: 萨拉多明的闪电：召唤萨拉多明的力量发动攻击，造成<Num0>%额外近战伤害和<Num1>-<Num2>点额外魔法伤害。 (<Num3>%)

english: Saradomin's Lightning: Call upon Saradomin's power to perform an attack with <Num0>% higher max hit. (<Num1>%)
translation: 萨拉多明的闪电：召唤萨拉多明的力量发动攻击，最大命中率提高<Num0>%。 (<Num1>%)

english: Shatter: Increase damage by <Num0>% and accuracy by <Num1>% for one hit. (<Num2>%)
translation: 粉碎：一次攻击的伤害提高<Num0>%，准确率提高<Num1>%。 (<Num2>%)

english: Shatter: Increase damage by <Num0>% and accuracy by <Num1>% for one hit, treats your target's defence as if it was reduced to <Num2>%. (<Num3>%)
translation: 粉碎：一次攻击的伤害提高<Num0>%，准确率提高<Num1>%，并将目标的防御视为降低至<Num2>%。 (<Num3>%)

english: Favour of the War God: Deal an attack which hits through Protect from Melee and siphons Prayer points equal to the damage dealt. (<Num0>%)
translation: 战神恩宠：发动可穿透保护近战的攻击，并吸取等同于造成伤害的祈祷值。 (<Num0>%)

english: Impale: Deal an attack with <Num0>% increased Attack and Strength, but with a slower speed. (<Num1>%)
translation: 穿刺：发动攻击，攻击和力量提高<Num0>%，但速度较慢。 (<Num1>%)

english: Quick Smash: Deal an extra attack instantly. (<Num0>%)
translation: 快速砸击：立即发动一次额外攻击。 (<Num0>%)

english: Energy Drain: Deal an attack with <Num0>% increased accuracy that siphons <Num1>% of your target's run energy. (<Num2>%)

english: Binding Tentacle: Bind your target for <Num0> seconds and increase the chance of them being poisoned. (<Num1>%)

english: Penance: Deal an attack that inflicts <Num0>% more damage per prayer point that you have used. (<Num1>%)
translation: 忏悔：根据你已使用的祈祷值，每次攻击造成<Num0>%额外伤害。 (<Num1>%)

english: Powershot: Deal an attack that is guaranteed to hit your target. (<Num0>%)
translation: 强力射击：发动必定命中的攻击。 (<Num0>%)

english: Snapshot: Fire two arrows within quick succession, but with reduced accuracy. (<Num0>%)
translation: 速射：快速连续射出两支箭，但准确率降低。 (<Num0>%)

english: Soulshot: Deal an attack that is guaranteed to hit your target and lowers your target's Magic level by the damage dealt. (<Num0>%)
translation: 灵魂射击：发动必定命中的攻击，并根据造成的伤害降低目标的魔法等级。 (<Num0>%)

english: Snipe: Deal an attack with greatly increased accuracy on unsuspecting targets and that lowers your target's Defence level by the damage dealt. (<Num0>%)
translation: 狙击：对毫无防备的目标发动准确率大幅提升的攻击，并根据造成的伤害降低目标的防御等级。 (<Num0>%)

english: Armadyl Eye: Deal an attack with double accuracy, also doubles the base activation chance of enchanted bolt effects. (<Num0>%)

english: To mine a rock, simply interact with it while holding a pickaxe you have the level to use and you'll start mining it. Eventually, you'll collect the ore and the rock will deplete. Low-level rocks will replenish themselves fairly quickly, but higher-level ones will take longer and longer to come back.

来自大多数来源的常规伤害。

english: Regular damage variant shown when you deal your maximum damage. Most damage hitsplats have a highlighted max hit version.
translation: 当你造成最大伤害时显示的常规伤害变体。大多数伤害数字都有高亮显示的最大伤害版本。
未命中/格挡 - 未造成伤害。

english: Members: Boat damage - Shows damage to a boat.
translation: 会员：船只伤害 - 显示对船只造成的伤害。

english: Members: Shield damage - Shows damage to a boss' shield or that a player was protected from an attack. Example: The Hueycoatl's tail shield.
translation: 会员：护盾伤害 - 显示对Boss护盾造成的伤害，或表示玩家被保护免受攻击。示例：休伊科特尔的尾盾。

english: Members: Armour damage - Shows damage to a boss' armour. Example: Zalcano's armour.
translation: 会员：盔甲伤害 - 显示对Boss盔甲造成的伤害。示例：扎尔卡诺的盔甲。

english: Members: Poise damage - Shows damage to a boss' poise, usually used to transition a boss to another phase. Example: The Wardens in the Tombs of Amascut.
translation: 会员：强韧伤害 - 显示对Boss强韧值造成的伤害，通常用于使Boss进入下一阶段。示例：阿玛斯库特之墓中的典狱长。

english: Members: Corrosion damage - Deals damage reduced by armour. May also apply a corrosion status effect, dealing damage in regular intervals. Example: Shellbane gryphon.
translation: 会员：腐蚀伤害 - 造成的伤害会被盔甲减免。也可能施加腐蚀状态效果，定期造成伤害。示例：壳祸狮鹫。

english: Members: Poison - Hitpoint damage dealt in regular intervals, decreasing in potency over time. Can be cured with an anti-poison effect.
translation: 会员：中毒 - 定期造成生命值伤害，毒性随时间减弱。可通过解毒效果治愈。

english: Members: Venom - A more powerful form of Poison. Can be cured with mutliple anti-poison effects or a single anti-venom effect.
translation: 会员：剧毒 - 一种更强力的中毒效果。可通过多次解毒效果或单次抗毒效果治愈。

english: Members: Bleed damage - Hitpoint damage dealt in regular intervals. Some types of bleed are more potent while moving. Can be cured with an anti-bleed effect. Example: Custodian Stalkers.
translation: 会员：流血伤害 - 定期造成生命值伤害。某些类型的流血在移动时效果更强。可通过止血效果治愈。示例：守卫追踪者。

english: Members: Burn damage - Hitpoint damage dealt in regular intervals. Stacks up to . Example: Burning Claws special attack.
translation: 会员：灼烧伤害 - 定期造成生命值伤害。最多可叠加至层。示例：燃烧之爪战技。

english: Members: Burn damage - Hitpoint damage dealt in regular intervals. Stacks up to <5>. Example: Burning Claws special attack.
translation: 会员：灼烧伤害 - 定期造成生命值伤害。最多可叠加至层。示例：燃烧之爪战技。

english: Members: Disease stat drain - Drains a stat in regular intervals. Can be reduced/ cured with a cure disease effect. Example: Zogres in Jiggig.
translation: 会员：疾病属性流失 - 定期降低某项属性。可通过治愈疾病效果减轻或治愈。示例：吉吉格的佐格雷食人魔。

english: Members: Disease stat drain - Drains a stat in regular intervals. Can be reduced/cured with a cure disease effect. Example: Zogres in Jiggig.
translation: 会员：疾病属性流失 - 定期降低某项属性。可通过治愈疾病效果减轻或治愈。示例：吉吉格的佐格雷食人魔。

english: Members: Disease damage - If the stat being drained by an active Disease reaches 1, you start taking Hitpoint damage instead. Can be reduced/cured with a cure disease effect.
translation: 会员：疾病伤害 - 若被活动疾病流失的属性降至1，你将开始受到生命值伤害而非属性流失。可通过治愈疾病效果减轻或治愈。

english: Members: Disease damage - If the stat being drained by an active Disease reaches <Num0>, you start taking Hitpoint damage instead. Can be reduced/cured with a cure disease effect.
translation: 会员：疾病伤害 - 若被活动疾病流失的属性降至<Num0>，你将开始受到生命值伤害而非属性流失。可通过治愈疾病效果减轻或治愈。

english: Members: Doom - Shows amount of Doom stacks. A certain amount instantly kills the player. Example: The Fortis Colosseum Doom modifier.
translation: 会员：厄运 - 显示厄运叠加层数。达到一定层数将立即杀死玩家。示例：福蒂斯竞技场的厄运修正。

english: Members: Healing from certain sources. Example: The Blood Moon in Neypotzli.
translation: 会员：来自特定来源的治疗。示例：内波茨利的血月。

english: Members: Prayer drain - Shows drain to a player's Prayer. Example: Frost Nagua in the Ruins of Tapoyauik.
translation: 会员：信仰流失 - 显示玩家祈祷值的流失。示例：塔波约伊克废墟中的霜冻那伽。

english: Members: Corruption - Drains Prayer points over time. Examples: Corruption spells and the Phantom Muspah encounter.
translation: 会员：腐化 - 随时间流失祈祷值。示例：腐化法术及幻影穆斯潘遭遇战。

english: Members: Cold - Drains warmth. Example: The cold in the Wintertodt encounter.
translation: 会员：寒冷 - 流失温暖值。示例：冬将军遭遇战中的寒冷效果。

english: Members: Charge - Shows something is being charged. Example: Totems in The Nightmare of Ashihama encounter.
translation: 会员：充能 - 显示某物正在充能。示例：阿希哈玛梦魇遭遇战中的图腾。

english: Members: Uncharge - Shows charge is being removed from something. Example: Totems in the Nightmare of Ashihama encounter.
translation: 会员：退能 - 显示某物的充能正在被移除。示例：阿希哈玛梦魇遭遇战中的图腾。

english: Members: Alternate charge - Shows something is being charged. Example: Kephri's shield restore in the Tombs of Amascut.
translation: 会员：充能 (变体) - 显示某物正在充能。示例：阿玛斯库特之墓中凯芙利的护盾恢复。

english: Members: Alternate uncharge - Shows charge is being removed from something. Example: Crocodiles draining the Palm of Resourcefulness in the Tombs of Amascut.
translation: 会员：退能 (变体) - 显示某物的充能正在被移除。示例：阿玛斯库特之墓中鳄鱼吸取机智之掌的充能。

english: Members: Sanity drain - Shows sanity lost form certain sources. Example: Lost Souls in the Whisperer encounter.
translation: 会员：理智流失 - 显示来自特定来源的理智损失。示例：低语者遭遇战中的迷失之魂。

english: Members: Sanity Gain - Shows sanity gained form certain sources. Example: Corrupted Seeds in the Whisperer encounter.
translation: 会员：理智恢复 - 显示来自特定来源的理智恢复。示例：低语者遭遇战中的腐化种子。

english: Level <Num0> Farming allows you to make a scarecrow and place it in a flower patch. Scarecrows ward sweetcorn from being attacked by birds, which helps to prevent disease. How to make a scarecrow: <Num1>. Fill an empty sack with straw from a bale. <Num2>. Drive the hay sack onto a bronze spear. <Num3>. Place a watermelon on top as a head. <Num4>. Stand the scarecrow in an empty flower patch.
translation:
级农业让你可以制作稻草人并将其放置在花卉种植地。稻草人可驱赶鸟类，防止甜玉米被攻击，这有助于预防疾病。
如何制作稻草人：
. 用干草捆中的稻草填满空袋子。
. 将装满稻草的袋子套在青铜长矛上。

. 将稻草人立在空的花卉种植地中。

english: Level <Num0> Farming allows you to make a scarecrow and place it in a flower patch. Scarecrows ward sweetcorn from being attacked by birds, which helps to prevent disease.  How to make a scarecrow: <Num1>. Fill an empty sack with straw from a bale. <Num2>. Drive the hay sack onto a bronze spear. <Num3>. Place a watermelon on top as a head. <Num4>. Stand the scarecrow in an empty flower patch.
translation: 农业等级<Num0>允许你制作稻草人并将其放置在花卉种植地。稻草人可以保护甜玉米免受鸟类攻击，有助于防止病害。制作稻草人的方法：<Num1>. 用草捆中的干草填满空袋子。<Num2>. 将干草袋套在青铜长矛上。<Num3>. 在顶部放一个西瓜作为头部。<Num4>. 将稻草人立在空的花卉种植地中。

english: You must complete the Pandemonium quest to unlock the Sailing skill.
translation: 你必须完成潘德莫尼姆任务才能解锁航海技能。

english: Sailing gives you the ability to captain a boat and sail the seas of Gielinor. Out at sea, you'll find all kinds of things to do. You can salvage shipwrecks for sunken treasure, test yourself in Barracuda Trials, or explore uncharted islands, to name but a few possibilities.
translation: 航海技能让你能够驾驶船只航行于基利诺尔的海洋。在海上你会发现各种各样的事情可做。你可以打捞沉船寻找沉没的宝藏，在梭鱼试炼中测试自己，或探索未知岛屿等等。

english: As your Sailing level increases, you'll be able to own more boats, build better facilities on your boats, hire more crewmates, dock at more locations, and much more!
translation: 随着你的航海等级提高，你将能够拥有更多船只，在船上建造更好的设施，雇佣更多船员，在更多地点停靠等等！

english: The Men, Chickens and Goblins near Lumbridge are suitable targets to fight.
translation: 仑桥镇附近的男人、鸡和哥布林是适合战斗的目标。

english: Cows and Farmers around Lumbridge are suitable targets to fight.

translation: 农夫可以在鸡舍周围找到。

english: Barbarians can be found in their village, especially in the pub.
translation: 野蛮人可以在他们的村庄找到，尤其是在酒馆里。

english: The Barbarians south of Edgeville are suitable targets to fight.
translation: 边陲镇以南的野蛮人是适合战斗的目标。

english: To get to Barbarian Village, travel north to Varrock then travel West, use the world map to navigate if you get lost.
translation: 要前往野蛮人聚落，先向北前往维洛克城然后向西行进，如果迷路可以使用世界地图导航。

english: Watch out for Gunthor the Brave!
Visit the Stronghold of Security while you are there for additional rewards, more variety in monsters and to learn how to keep your account secure.
translation: 在那里前往安全要塞以获得额外奖励、遭遇更多种类的怪物并学习如何保护你的账户安全。

english: Train your Strength to level <Num0> by fighting nearby monsters!
translation: 通过和附近怪物战斗将你的力量训练到<Num0>级！

translation: 确保你的战斗风格设置为提供力量经验值。

translation: 奶牛会掉落各种可用于训练其他技能的物品。

english: You can find Al Kharid warriors in the Al Kharid palace court yard.
translation: 你可以在阿尔卡里德城宫殿庭院找到阿尔卡里德城战士。

english: Al Kharid guards drop a variety of runes and coins.
translation: 阿尔卡里德城守卫会掉落各种符石和金币。

english: Al Kharid guards often attack in groups.
translation: 阿尔卡里德城守卫经常成群攻击。

english: Kebabs are cheap food which can be bought from Karim's kebab shop west of the palace.
translation: 烤肉串是便宜的食物，可以从宫殿西侧的卡里姆烤肉店购买。

english: There is a bank nearby to the south of Karim's kebab shop.
translation: 卡里姆烤肉店南侧附近有一家银行。
点击此处获取更多信息。

english: Make sure to equip your armour, bow and arrows.
translation: 确保装备你的盔甲、弓和箭。

translation: 鸡会掉落生鸡肉，可以烹饪作为食物。

translation: 你射出的箭可以从地面拾取。

translation: 如果箭用完了，可以与仑桥镇杂货店南侧的远程战斗导师交谈。

translation: 使用远程战斗时利用障碍物来避免受到伤害。

translation: 未损坏的箭可以从地面拾取。

translation: 精准模式发射的箭有更高的命中几率。

english: Rapid fires arrows at a faster rate.
translation: 速射模式以更快的速度发射箭。

english: Longrange fires arrows further and gives Defence xp.
translation: 远射模式发射更远的箭并提供防御经验值。

english: Use Ranged armour when fighting monsters that use Magic attacks.
translation: 对抗使用魔法攻击的怪物时使用远程盔甲。

english: The Frogs south of Lumbridge and Wizards west of Lumbridge are suitable targets to fight.
translation: 仑桥镇以南的青蛙和仑桥镇以西的法师是适合战斗的目标。

translation: 如果需要更多食物，你可以在法师塔北侧的德雷诺村钓鱼。

translation: 确保你拥有可以使用的魔法符石。

english: How many gems would you like to cut?
Explore a world three times larger!
Take on a hundred more quests!
All of Gielinor is yours to discover. Brave the heat of the Kharidian Desert, lose yourself in the forests of Tirannwn, delve into the secrets of Great Kourend, and so much more. A vast world awaits!
translation: 整个基利诺尔世界等你探索。勇敢面对卡里迪安沙漠的酷热，沉浸于提拉恩林的茂密森林，探寻大库兰德王国的秘密，还有更多。广阔世界正等待着你！

english: Become the complete, all-round hero and achieve mastery in the members-only skills of Agility, Construction, Farming, Fletching, Herblore, Hunter, Slayer and Thieving. Improve these skills and open up paths to incredible new adventures!
translation: 成为全能英雄，精通会员专属技能：敏捷、建筑、农业、制箭、草药学、狩猎、杀戮和偷窃。提升这些技能，开启通往精彩新冒险的道路！

english: With five times as many quests as a member, you have complete access to the multitude of stories, adventures and personalities that Gielinor offers. Unravel the mysteries of this world and unlock countless members-only rewards along the way!
translation: 作为会员，你可体验五倍数量的任务，尽情探索基利诺尔提供的丰富故事、冒险与人物。揭开这个世界的谜团，沿途解锁无数会员专属奖励！

english: Prove your worth as a warrior by facing off against some of Gielinor's toughest foes. Whether it's the fearsome King Black Dragon, the horrifying Corporeal Beast or the almighty Zulrah, all will fall to your might!
translation: 通过挑战基利诺尔最强大的敌人来证明你作为战士的价值。无论是可怕的黑龙王、恐怖的实体巨兽，还是全能的祖尔拉，都将在你的力量面前倒下！

english: As a member, not only will you have access to a range of additional skills, quests and bosses, but you'll also unlock a variety of other unique content as well. Raids, minigames, combat challenges and all kinds of weapons and armour are just some of the other features on offer. As well as this, members can help decide the future of the game by voting on new content through in-game polls!
translation: 作为会员，你不仅能体验额外技能、任务和Boss，还能解锁各种独特内容。突袭、小游戏、战斗挑战以及各种武器盔甲只是其中一部分。此外，会员还能通过游戏内投票参与新内容的决策，共同决定游戏的未来！

english: Psst! Adventurer! I've got a special offer for you, but you're going to have to trust me. If you give me some gold coins, I'll give you back twice whatever you gave me! How does that sound?
translation: 嘿！冒险者！我这有个特别优惠，但你得相信我。你给我一些金币，我就还你双倍！怎么样？

english: What is the best way to secure your account?
translation: 保护账号安全的最佳方法是什么？

english: A player tells you to search for a video online, click the link in the description and comment on the forum post to win a cash prize. What do you do?
translation: 有个玩家让你搜个视频，点简介里的链接，再在论坛帖子里留言，就能赢现金奖。你该怎么办？

english: You're watching a stream by someone claiming to be Jagex offering double XP. What do you do?
translation: 你在看一个自称是Jagex的人直播，说送双倍经验。你该怎么办？

english: A player trades you some valuable items, provides you a bond, then asks if you want to share your account so he can help you make progress. How do you respond?
translation: 有个玩家交易给你一些值钱的东西，还给了你一张债券，然后问你要不要共享账号，好帮你提升进度。你怎么回应？

english: What should you do if another player messages you recommending a website to purchase items and/or gold?
translation: 如果有玩家发消息推荐你一个网站去买物品或金币，你该怎么办？

english: What should you do if your real-life friend asks for your password so he can check your stats?
translation: 如果你的现实朋友要你的密码，说想看看你的数据，你该怎么办？

english: A player starts asking you about very specific details linked to your account, such as when you created your account, your birthday date, internet provider etc. How should you react?
translation: 有个玩家开始问你关于账号的非常具体的细节，比如你什么时候建的号、你的生日、网络服务商等等。你该怎么反应？

english: You are part way through the Stronghold of Security when you have to answer another question. After you answer the question, you should...
translation: 你在安全要塞里走到一半，又得回答一个问题。回答完问题后，你应该……

english: Whose responsibility is it to keep your account secure?
translation: 保护账号安全是谁的责任？

english: Enables display of the minimenu scrollbar when lots of options are visible.
translation: 启用后，当选项过多时，会显示迷你菜单的滚动条。

english: Hey adventurer! You've been randomly selected for a prize of 1 year of free membership! I'm just going to need some of your account details so I can put it on your account!
translation: 嘿，冒险者！你被随机抽中，获得一年免费会员！我只需要你的一些账号信息，就能把它加到你的账号上！

english: Which of these is an important characteristic of a secure password?
translation: 以下哪项是安全密码的重要特征？

english: Show the Activity Adviser button,hide the Activity Adviser button,Advanced Display Settings,orb
translation: 显示活动顾问按钮，隐藏活动顾问按钮，高级显示设置，宝珠

translation: 启用后，在小地图周围显示活动顾问按钮。

english: You must have data orbs turned on to change this setting.
translation: 你必须开启数据球才能更改此设置。

english: When enabled, shows timers on the Weeping walls.
translation: 启用后，在哭泣者之墙上显示计时器。
击杀弗萨尼的梦魇一次。

english: When enabled, shows the time until your trap will be dismantled. Also shows if your trap has caught something or not.

english: When enabled, shows the amount of water you have availabe in the desert.
translation: 启用后，显示你在沙漠中可用的水量。

english: When enabled, highlight starting locations, footprints and inspect locations for herbiboar hunting.
translation: 启用后，高亮显示草药野猪狩猎的起始位置、足迹和检查点。

translation: 启用后，显示你的大炮还剩多久会损坏。

translation: 启用后，显示你的大炮中还剩多少炮弹。

english: When enabled, a notification will be sent when you are low on cannonballs.
translation: 启用后，当炮弹不足时会发送通知。

english: A notification is sent when your cannon reaches this quantity of remaining cannonballs.
translation: 当大炮中的炮弹剩余数量达到此数值时，会发送通知。

english: When enabled, a notification will be sent when your cannon has run out ammo.
translation: 启用后，当大炮弹药耗尽时会发送通知。

translation: 启用后，被标记的NPC会被高亮显示。

english: When enabled, display the NPC's name above its body.
translation: 启用后，在NPC身体上方显示其名称。

translation: 所有NPC上方显示的文字颜色。

translation: 必须启用NPC头顶名称显示功能，此设置才会生效。

english: Max hits below this threshold will not show max hit hitsplats.

translation: 启用后，显示你的液体肾上腺素战技加成效果还会持续多久。

english:
The Tombs of Amascut can be found in an ancient tomb south of Sophanem.

The Tombs of Amascut is a raid for 1-8 players.

The Tombs of Amascut can scale in difficulty through the use of Invocations. These Invocations change the Raid Level, with a Raid Level of less then 150 considered an Entry raid.

Attack Styles - Magic, Ranged, Melee, Special
Immunities - Poison, Venom
Slayer Categories - None
translation:
阿玛斯库特之墓位于索法尼恩城南部的一座古老墓穴中。

阿玛斯库特之墓是一个 1-8 人的突袭副本。

阿玛斯库特之墓可以通过使用祈祷文来调整难度。这些祈祷文会改变突袭等级，突袭等级低于 150 被视为入门突袭。

攻击风格 - 魔法、远程、近战、战技
免疫 - 毒、剧毒
杀戮类别 - 无
