english: Kill the Abyssal Sire without letting any Scion mature.
translation: 在不让任何幼体成熟的情况下击杀深渊之主。

english: Kill the Abyssal Sire after only stunning him once.
translation: 在只眩晕深渊之主一次的情况下击杀他。

english: Had the lowest contribution in at least five encounters.
translation: 在至少五次遭遇战中贡献最低。

english: Spent at least 30 seconds in Zebak's pool.
translation: 在泽巴克的水池中停留至少30秒。

english: Used the most special attack energy.
translation: 使用了最多的战技能量。

english: Finished the raid with the lowest value loadout.
translation: 以最低价值装备完成突袭。

english: Finished the raid with the highest value loadout.
translation: 以最高价值装备完成突袭。

english: Dropped more than 20 orbs while fighting Akkha.
translation: 在对抗阿卡时掉落超过20个能量球。

english: Kill the Abyssal Sire without being hit by any external tentacles.
translation: 在不被任何外部触手击中的情况下击杀深渊之主。

english: Use the Vengeance spell to reflect the damage from the Abyssal Sire's explosion back to him.
translation: 使用复仇术将深渊之主爆炸造成的伤害反弹给他。

english: Died to a light beam in the Path of Het.
translation: 在赫特之路中被光束击中死亡。

english: Kill the Abyssal Sire without taking damage from any miasma pools.
translation: 在不受到任何瘴气池伤害的情况下击杀深渊之主。

english: Kill the Abyssal Sire without taking damage from the external tentacles, miasma pools, explosion or damage from the Abyssal Sire without praying the appropriate protection prayer.
translation: 在不受到外部触手、瘴气池、爆炸伤害，以及未使用正确保护祈祷时受到深渊之主伤害的情况下击杀他。
造成了最多的魔法伤害。
造成了最多的远程伤害。
造成了最多的近战伤害。

english: Finished off the Wardens on their own.
Limits the overall number of attempts that can be made within the raid to 10. An attempt is failed if every member of the party dies during a challenge.
translation: 将副本内的总尝试次数限制为10次。如果在挑战期间队伍所有成员死亡，则视为一次尝试失败。

english: Sets a 40 minute time limit on the raid. If the time is achieved, the raid level is increased. Otherwise, the raid level is decreased.
translation: 为副本设置40分钟的时间限制。如果在时限内完成，副本等级会提升。否则，副本等级会降低。

english: The quantity of items offered by the helpful spirit will be reduced to 66%.
translation: 乐于助人的灵魂提供的物品数量将减少至66%。

english: Completing a path during the raid will cause other paths to level up, increasing enemy hitpoints and damage. For every two path levels, bosses will gain more potent special attacks.
translation: 在副本中完成一条路线会导致其他路线升级，增加敌人的生命值和伤害。每两级路线，Boss将获得更强大的战技。

english: All paths will level up once upon entering the raid, increasing enemy hitpoints and damage.
translation: 进入副本时所有路线将升级一次，增加敌人的生命值和伤害。

english: All paths will level up twice upon entering the raid, increasing enemy hitpoints and damage further. Bosses will gain more potent special attacks.
translation: 进入副本时所有路线将升级两次，进一步增加敌人的生命值和伤害。Boss将获得更强大的战技。

english: All paths will level up three times upon entering the raid, increasing enemy hitpoints and damage even further. Bosses will gain more potent special attacks.
translation: 进入副本时所有路线将升级三次，进一步增加敌人的生命值和伤害。Boss将获得更强大的战技。

english: Protection prayers will be 10% less effective within the raid.
translation: 在副本中，保护祈祷的效果将降低10%。

english: Prayer is drained by 20% of damage taken.
translation: 祈祷值将因受到的伤害而消耗20%。

english: Food and other healing items will no longer heal you within the raid (with the exception of potions that restore health).
translation: 食物和其他治疗物品在副本中将不再为你恢复生命（恢复生命值的药水除外）。

english: Potions that restore health will no longer have an effect within the raid.
translation: 恢复生命值的药水在副本中将不再有效。

english: All special attacks use 100% of your special attack energy.
translation: 所有战技将消耗100%的战技能量。

english: Kephri will double the number of eggs containing an Agile Scarab during her egg attack.
translation: 凯弗里在蛋攻击期间，含有敏捷圣甲虫的蛋数量将翻倍。

english: During healing phases, Kephri will summon an additional scarab.
translation: 在治疗阶段，凯弗里将额外召唤一只圣甲虫。

english: Kephri's dung special will be twice as potent.
translation: 凯弗里的粪便战技效果将加倍。

english: Kephri will have continuous shield scarab spawns.
translation: 凯弗里将不断生成盾圣甲虫幼体。

english: Kephri's main attack will do significantly more damage and hit a larger area.
translation: 凯弗里的主要攻击将造成显著更高的伤害，并击中更大的范围。

english: Zebak will gain access to blood magic, casting Blood barrage and summoning blood clouds, healing Zebak when they damage players.
translation: 泽巴克将获得血魔法，施放血之弹幕并召唤血云，在伤害玩家时治疗泽巴克。

english: The radius and healing of Zebak's blood magic will be increased.
translation: 泽巴克血魔法的范围和治疗效果将增加。

english: Zebak's blood magic spawns will be split into three and their health is increased.
translation: 泽巴克的血魔法幼体将分裂为三个，并且它们的生命值增加。

english: Kill Kree'arra in a privately rented instance without ever attacking him directly.
translation: 在私人租赁的副本中，从不直接攻击克里阿拉的情况下击杀他。

english: Zebak's acid pools will have increased spread and jugs will be less effective.
translation: 泽巴克的酸液池扩散范围将增加，水罐的效果将降低。

english: Akkha will do two special attacks at once.
translation: 阿卡将同时发动两次战技。

english: Akkha's ranged and magic attacks will also do melee damage to anyone next to him.
translation: 阿卡的远程和魔法攻击也会对靠近他的任何人造成近战伤害。

english: Akkha will randomly swap between attack styles and protection prayers rather than at set intervals.
translation: 阿卡将随机切换攻击风格和保护祈祷，而不是按固定间隔。

english: Akkha's detonate special attack will trigger in more directions, his memory special attack will be faster and his trail special attack will spawn additional orbs.
translation: 阿卡的引爆战技将从更多方向触发，他的记忆战技将更快，他的轨迹战技将生成额外的球体。

english: Finish off Kree'arra whilst all of his bodyguards are dead.
translation: 在克里阿拉的所有护卫都死亡时，终结他。

english: Kill Kree'arra in a privately rented instance without taking any melee damage from the boss or his bodyguards.
translation: 在私人租赁的副本中，不受到Boss或其护卫的任何近战伤害的情况下击杀克里阿拉。

english: The pit at the entrance to Ba-Ba's room will be a lethal fall.
translation: 芭芭房间入口处的坑洞将变成致命坠落。

english: Reach level 5 in the Attack skill.

Train your Attack to level 5 by fighting nearby monsters!|Equip your armour and weapon.|Ensure your combat style is set to provide Attack XP.|Take some food to keep your hitpoints high.|The Men, Chickens and Goblins near Lumbridge are suitable targets to fight.|Chickens drop Raw chicken that can be cooked and used as food.|You can bury bones to gain Prayer experience.
translation: 通过攻击附近的怪物将你的攻击技能训练到5级！|装备你的盔甲和武器。|确保你的战斗风格设置为提供攻击经验值。|带些食物来保持你的生命值。|仑桥镇附近的男子、鸡和哥布林是合适的战斗目标。|鸡会掉落生鸡肉，可以烹饪后用作食物。|你可以埋藏骨头来获得祈祷经验值。

english: Take some food to keep your hitpoints high.|Cows and Farmers around Lumbridge are suitable targets to fight.|Cows drop hides that can be turned into leather for Crafting xp.
translation: 带些食物来保持你的生命值。|仑桥镇附近的牛和农夫是合适的战斗目标。|牛会掉落牛皮，可以制成皮革用于制作经验值。

english: The Barbarians south of Edgeville are suitable targets to fight.|To get to Barbarian Village, travel north to Varrock then travel West, use the world map to navigate if you get lost.|Watch out for Gunthor the Brave!|Visit the Stronghold of Security while you are there for additional rewards, more variety in monsters and to learn how to keep your account secure.
translation: 边陲镇南边的野蛮人是合适的战斗目标。|要前往野蛮人村，向北走到维洛克城，然后向西走，如果迷路可以使用世界地图导航。|小心勇敢的冈索尔！|在那里时，可以顺便参观安全要塞以获得额外奖励、更多种类的怪物，并学习如何保护你的账户安全。

english: Reach level 5 in the Strength skill.

Train your Strength to level 5 by fighting nearby monsters!|Equip your armour and weapon.|Ensure your combat style is set to provide Strength XP.|Take some food to keep your hitpoints high.|The Men, Chickens and Goblins near Lumbridge are suitable targets to fight.|Chickens drop Raw chicken that can be cooked and used as food.|You can bury bones to gain Prayer experience.
translation: 通过攻击附近的怪物将你的力量技能训练到5级！|装备你的盔甲和武器。|确保你的战斗风格设置为提供力量经验值。|带些食物来保持你的生命值。|仑桥镇附近的男子、鸡和哥布林是合适的战斗目标。|鸡会掉落生鸡肉，可以烹饪后用作食物。|你可以埋藏骨头来获得祈祷经验值。

english: The Al Kharid guards in the Al Kharid palace are suitable targets to fight.|Al Kharid is to the east of Lumbridge through the toll gate. Remember to take 10 coins to pass through the Al Kharid gate, you can kill goblins nearby for coins if you forget.|Al Kharid guards drop a variety of runes and coins.|Al Kharid guards often attack in groups.|Kebabs are cheap food which can be bought from Karim's kebab shop west of the palace.|There is a bank nearby to the south of Karim's kebab shop.
translation: 阿尔卡里德城宫殿里的阿尔卡里德守卫是合适的战斗目标。|阿尔卡里德城在仑桥镇东边，需要通过收费站。记得带10个金币通过阿尔卡里德城门，如果忘了，可以杀死附近的哥布林获取金币。|阿尔卡里德守卫会掉落各种符石和金币。|阿尔卡里德守卫经常成群攻击。|烤肉是便宜的食物，可以在宫殿西边的卡里姆烤肉店购买。|卡里姆烤肉店南边附近有一个银行。

english: Reach level 5 in the Defence skill.

Train your Defence trength to level 5 by fighting nearby monsters!|Equip your armour and weapon.|Ensure your combat style is set to provide Defence XP.|Take some food to keep your hitpoints high.|The Men, Chickens and Goblins near Lumbridge are suitable targets to fight.|Chickens drop Raw chicken that can be cooked and used as food.|You can bury bones to gain Prayer experience.
translation: 通过攻击附近的怪物将你的防御技能训练到5级！|装备你的盔甲和武器。|确保你的战斗风格设置为提供防御经验值。|带些食物来保持你的生命值。|仑桥镇附近的男子、鸡和哥布林是合适的战斗目标。|鸡会掉落生鸡肉，可以烹饪后用作食物。|你可以埋藏骨头来获得祈祷经验值。

english: The Scorpions in Al Kharid mine are suitable targets to fight.|Al Kharid is to the east of Lumbridge through the toll gate. Remember to take 10 coins to pass through the Al Kharid gate, you can kill goblins nearby for coins if you forget.|Scorpions have a chance at dropping beginner clues that can be completed for rewards.
translation: 阿尔卡里德矿区的蝎子是合适的战斗目标。|阿尔卡里德城在仑桥镇东边，需要通过收费站。记得带10个金币通过阿尔卡里德城门，如果忘了，可以杀死附近的哥布林获取金币。|蝎子有机会掉落初学者线索卷轴，完成可获得奖励。

english: Reach level 5 in the Magic skill.

Train your Magic to level 5 by fighting nearby monsters!|Make sure to equip your robes and staff.|Ensure you have a spell set that you can use and have the runes for.|If you run out of runes, speak to the magic instructor south of the general store in Lumbridge.|Take some food to keep your hitpoints high.|The Men, Chickens and Goblins near Lumbridge are suitable targets to fight.|Chickens drop Raw chicken which can be cooked and used as food.|You can bury bones to gain Prayer experience.
translation: 通过攻击附近的怪物将你的魔法技能训练到5级！|确保装备你的长袍和法杖。|确保你设置了一个可以使用的法术，并且有相应的符石。|如果符石用完了，可以找仑桥镇杂货店南边的魔法导师交谈。|带些食物来保持你的生命值。|仑桥镇附近的男子、鸡和哥布林是合适的战斗目标。|鸡会掉落生鸡肉，可以烹饪后用作食物。|你可以埋藏骨头来获得祈祷经验值。

english: Ensure you have a spell set that you can use and have the runes for.|Take some food to keep your hitpoints high.|Cows and Farmers around Lumbridge are suitable targets to fight.|Cows drop hides that can be turned into leather for Crafting xp.
translation: 确保你设置了一个可以使用的法术，并且有相应的符石。|带些食物来保持你的生命值。|仑桥镇附近的牛和农夫是合适的战斗目标。|牛会掉落牛皮，可以制成皮革用于制作经验值。

english: Ensure you have a spell set that you can use and have the runes for.|The Frogs in the swamp south of Lumbridge are suitable targets to fight.|Giant Frogs drop big bones which grant more Prayer experience than regular bones.
translation: 确保你设置了一个可以使用的法术，并且有相应的符石。|仑桥镇南边沼泽里的青蛙是合适的战斗目标。|巨型青蛙会掉落大骨头，比普通骨头提供更多祈祷经验值。

english: Reach level 5 in the Ranged skill.

Train your Ranged to level 5 by fighting nearby monsters!|Make sure to equip your armour, bow and arrows.|Take some food to keep your hitpoints high.|The Men, Chickens and Goblins near Lumbridge are suitable targets to fight.|Chickens drop raw chicken which can be cooked for food.|You can bury bones to gain Prayer experience.|Arrows you fire can be picked up from the ground.|If you run out of arrows, speak to the Ranged combat instructor south of the general store in Lumbridge.
translation: 通过攻击附近的怪物将你的远程技能训练到5级！|确保装备你的盔甲、弓和箭。|带些食物来保持你的生命值。|仑桥镇附近的男子、鸡和哥布林是合适的战斗目标。|鸡会掉落生鸡肉，可以烹饪后用作食物。|你可以埋藏骨头来获得祈祷经验值。|你射出的箭可以从地上捡起来。|如果箭用完了，可以找仑桥镇杂货店南边的远程战斗导师交谈。

english: Take some food to keep your hitpoints high.|Cows and Farmers around Lumbridge are suitable targets to fight.|Cows drop hides that can be turned into leather for Crafting xp.|Arrows which don't break can be picked up from the ground.|Accurate fires arrows with a higher chance to hit.|Rapid fires arrows at a faster rate.|Longrange fires arrows further and gives Defence xp.
translation: 带些食物来保持你的生命值。|仑桥镇附近的牛和农夫是合适的战斗目标。|牛会掉落牛皮，可以制成皮革用于制作经验值。|没有损坏的箭可以从地上捡起来。|精准模式射箭命中率更高。|快速模式射箭速度更快。|远射模式射箭距离更远，并提供防御经验值。

english: The Frogs south of Lumbridge and Wizards west of Lumbridge are suitable targets to fight.|Wizards drop an assortment of rune and Magic equipment.|If you need more food you can fish at Draynor Village to the north of the Wizards' Tower.
translation: 仑桥镇南边的青蛙和仑桥镇西边的魔法师是合适的战斗目标。|魔法师会掉落各种符石和魔法装备。|如果你需要更多食物，可以在法师塔北边的德雷诺村钓鱼。

english: Claim 2500 coins from a Grand Exchange clerk to the north-west of Varrock.
translation: 从维洛克城西北边的大交易所职员那里领取2500个金币。

english: Claim 75 iron arrows from Lowe's archery shop in Varrock, east of the fountain.
translation: 从维洛克城喷泉东边的洛威弓箭店领取75支铁箭。

english: Claim 75 iron arrows and a maple shortbow from Lowe's archery shop in Varrock, east of the fountain.
translation: 从维洛克城喷泉东边的洛威弓箭店领取75支铁箭和一把枫木短弓。

english: Claim 150 mind and air runes at Aubury's rune shop in Varrock, south-east of the fountain.
translation: 从维洛克城喷泉东南边的奥布里符石店领取150个心灵符石和风符石。

english: Claim 35 chaos runes at Aubury's rune shop in Varrock, south-east of the fountain.
translation: 从维洛克城喷泉东南边的奥布里符石店领取35个混沌符石。

english: Claim 5 energy potions from the Apothecary in Varrock, south-west of the fountain.
translation: 从维洛克城喷泉西南边的药剂师那里领取5瓶能量药水。

english: Kill Kree'arra by only dealing damage to him with a salamander.
translation: 仅使用蝾螈对克里阿拉造成伤害来击杀他。

english:
- You have an 85% chance to not consume any ammuntion fired (chinchompas excluded).
- You have an 85% chance to not consume runes when casting any spell.
translation:
- 你有85%的几率不消耗任何弹药（不包括 Chinchompas）。
- 施放任何法术时，你有85%的几率不消耗符石。

english:
- Your run energy will never drain whilst running.
- Your hitpoints restore 4 times as quickly.
translation:
- 奔跑时，你的跑动能量永远不会耗尽。
- 你的生命值恢复速度提升至4倍。

english:
- Bones dropped by creatures are automatically buried and award 4x XP, this stacks with any existing XP multipliers.
- Ensouled heads now drop 2 at a time.
- Your prayer drains at 1/2 the speed.
translation:
- 生物掉落的骨头会自动被掩埋，并提供4倍经验值，此效果可与任何现有的经验倍率叠加。
- 附魂头颅现在一次掉落2个。
- 你的祈祷值消耗速度减半。

english:
- You receive 3 times the normal amount of resources from Mining, Fishing, Woodcutting, Harvesting Herbs, Blast Mining and Farming Contracts. These additional resources do not grant bonus XP.
- You receive 3 times as many Molch Pearls from Aerial Fishing.
- Farming cycles occur every 1 minute instead of every 5 minutes.
translation:
- 从采矿、钓鱼、伐木、采集草药、爆破采矿和农业合同中，你获得3倍于正常数量的资源。这些额外资源不提供额外经验值。
- 从空中钓鱼中获得的莫尔奇珍珠数量变为3倍。
- 农业周期变为每1分钟一次，而不是每5分钟一次。

english: - All Wintertodt Crates and resources gathered from Mining, Fishing, Woodcutting, Harvesting Crops and Blast Mining are automatically sent to the bank.
translation: - 所有冬将军的板条箱，以及从采矿、钓鱼、伐木、采集作物和爆破采矿中获得的资源，都会自动存入银行。

english:
- When receiving Slayer tasks you can choose what you are assigned, this allows you to select the same task back-to-back.
- When receiving Farming contracts, you can now choose what you are assigned however, you cannot choose the same contract back-to-back.
translation:
- 接受杀戮任务时，你可以选择被分配的任务，这允许你连续选择相同的任务。
- 接受农业合同时，你现在可以选择被分配的任务，但不能连续选择相同的合同。

english:
- You receive 2x XP in Smithing, Cooking, Firemaking, Herblore, Fletching, Crafting and Construction.
- This stacks with any existing XP multipliers.
translation:
- 你在锻造、烹饪、生火、草药学、制箭、制作和建筑技能中获得2倍经验值。
- 此效果可与任何现有的经验倍率叠加。

english:
- You receive 2x XP in Mining, Fishing, Woodcutting, Hunter, Thieving, Farming and Runecraft.
- This stacks with any existing XP multipliers.
translation:
- 你在采矿、钓鱼、伐木、狩猎、偷窃、农业和符石制作技能中获得2倍经验值。
- 此效果可与任何现有的经验倍率叠加。

english:
- You receive 2x XP in Attack, Strength, Defence, Hitpoints, Magic, Ranged and Prayer.
- This stacks with any existing XP multipliers.
translation:
- 你在攻击、力量、防御、生命值、魔法、远程和祈祷技能中获得2倍经验值。
- 此效果可与任何现有的经验倍率叠加。

english:
- You take 0 damage from the cold, braziers breaking and falling snow at the Wintertodt.
- The Wintertodt's cold aura will no longer interrupt actions which you are doing.
- Wintertodt crates now award 3x more loot.
translation:
- 在冬将军处，你不会受到寒冷、火盆破裂和落雪造成的伤害。
- 冬将军的寒冷光环将不再中断你正在进行的动作。
- 冬将军的板条箱现在奖励3倍战利品。

english:
- You gain 10% increased Accuracy and Damage with Melee, Magic and Ranged when fighting creatures.
- This boost increases to 30% when fighting creatures which are assigned to you as a slayer task.
translation:
- 与生物战斗时，你的近战、魔法和远程攻击获得10%的准确度和伤害加成。
- 当与分配给你的杀戮任务中的生物战斗时，此加成提升至30%。

english:
- Creatures which drop clues now drop them at a 1/10 rate.
- Clue geodes, clue nests and clue bottles are now found 10x more often from all skilling activities from which they can be found.
- All un-started clues are stackable.
- All clues have the lowest number of steps for their tier.
translation:
- 掉落线索的生物现在以1/10的几率掉落。
- 线索晶石、线索鸟巢和线索瓶在所有可获得的技能活动中，发现几率提升10倍。
- 所有未开始的线索卷轴均可堆叠。
- 所有线索卷轴在其等级中拥有最少的步骤数。

english:
- You will now attack slightly more often with all attack styles!
- When attacking with melee, ranged or magic, the delay between your attacks is reduced by 0.6 seconds. This delay will never be less than 0.6 seconds.
- Special attacks with instant attacks such as the Granite Maul or Dragon Throwing axes are unaffected.
translation:
- 你现在使用所有攻击风格的攻击频率都会略微提高！
- 使用近战、远程或魔法攻击时，攻击间隔减少0.6秒。此间隔永远不会低于0.6秒。
- 具有即时攻击效果的战技，例如花岗岩锤或龙投掷斧，不受影响。

english:
- You take 50% less damage from all creatures.
- Your prayer restores at a rate of 1 point every 3.6 seconds.
translation:
- 你从所有生物受到的伤害减少50%。
- 你的祈祷值以每3.6秒恢复1点的速度恢复。

english:
- You gain 2x XP in every skill.
- This stacks with any existing XP multipliers.
translation:
- 你在所有技能中获得2倍经验值。
- 此效果可与任何现有的经验倍率叠加。

english: When enabled, the Special Attack orb button near the minimap can offer to release wind motes. This option will be offered only while you are at the helm of a boat with a wind/gale catcher.
translation: 启用后，小地图附近的战技宝珠按钮可以提供释放风粒子的选项。此选项仅在你位于装有风/狂风收集器的船只舵轮处时提供。

english: Special Attack orb releases wind motes
translation: 战技宝珠释放风之微粒

english: Slide the longest possible distance in a straight line.
translation: 在一条直线上滑行最远的距离。

english: Ba-Ba's sarcophagus energy will deal bonus damage based on how many prayer points you're missing.
translation: 芭芭的石棺能量将根据你缺失的祈祷点数造成额外伤害。
斯库里乌斯食物堆冷却中。

english: When enabled, spontaneous pop-up promotional messages will automatically be blocked.
translation: 启用后，会自动屏蔽弹出的促销信息。

english: Kill Vardorvis in less than 1:15 minutes without a slayer task.
translation: 在没有杀戮任务的情况下，在1分15秒内击杀瓦多维斯。

english: Kill Vardorvis in less than 1:05 without a slayer task.
translation: 在没有杀戮任务的情况下，在1分05秒内击杀瓦多维斯。

english: Kill Vardorvis perfectly 5 times without leaving.
translation: 在不离开的情况下，完美击杀瓦多维斯5次。

english: Kill Vardorvis after surviving for 3 minutes of Vardorvis' max speed, and never leaving the centre 25 tiles.
translation: 在瓦多维斯最大速度下存活3分钟后，且从不离开中心25格的情况下击杀他。

english: Kill Vardorvis with gear worth 2m or less in total.
translation: 使用总价值不超过200万的装备击杀瓦多维斯。

english: Kill the Whisperer in less than 3:00 without a slayer task.
translation: 在没有杀戮任务的情况下，在3分钟内击杀低语者。

english: Kill the Whisperer without taking avoidable damage 5 times without leaving.
translation: 在不离开的情况下，5次击杀低语者且不受到任何可避免的伤害。

english: Kill the Whisperer whilst only being on the Arceuus spellbook.
translation: 仅使用阿西乌斯城法术书的情况下击杀低语者。

english: Kill the Whisperer whilst spending less than 6 seconds in the pre-enrage shadow realm.
translation: 在狂暴前的阴影领域中停留时间少于6秒的情况下击杀低语者。

english: Kill the Leviathan in less than 1:50 without a slayer task.
translation: 在没有杀戮任务的情况下，在1分50秒内击杀利维坦。

english: Kill the Leviathan perfectly 5 times without leaving.
translation: 在不离开的情况下，完美击杀利维坦5次。

english: Kill the Leviathan without stunning the boss more than once.
translation: 在眩晕Boss不超过一次的情况下击杀利维坦。

english: Kill the Leviathan using only Mithril ammunition whilst having no more than 25 Hitpoints throughout the entire fight.
translation: 仅使用秘银弹药，且整场战斗中生命值不超过25点的情况下击杀利维坦。

english: Kill Duke Sucellus in less than 1:00 minutes without a slayer task.
translation: 在没有杀戮任务的情况下，在1分钟内击杀苏塞勒斯公爵。

english: Kill Duke Sucellus in less than 50 seconds without a slayer task.
translation: 在没有杀戮任务的情况下，在50秒内击杀苏塞勒斯公爵。
击杀苏塞勒斯公爵一次。
击杀觉醒的苏塞勒斯公爵。

english: Kill Duke Sucellus without taking any avoidable damage 5 times without leaving.
translation: 在不离开的情况下，5次击杀苏塞勒斯公爵且不受到任何可避免的伤害。

english: Kill Duke Sucellus without taking any avoidable damage, whilst also never running.
translation: 在不受到任何可避免的伤害，且全程不奔跑的情况下击杀苏塞勒斯公爵。

english: Kill Duke Sucellus whilst only attacking the boss on the same tick Duke attacks you.
translation: 仅在公爵攻击你的同一游戏刻攻击他的情况下击杀苏塞勒斯公爵。

english: Finish off Scurrius with a ratbane weapon in a private instance.
translation: 在私人副本中使用灭鼠武器终结斯库里乌斯。

english: Kill Scurrius in a private instance without taking damage from the following attacks: Tail Swipe and Falling Bricks. Pray correctly against the following attacks: Flying Fur and Bolts of Electricity.
translation: 在私人副本中，不受到以下攻击的伤害：尾巴横扫和落石。正确祈祷应对以下攻击：飞毛和闪电箭。

english: Kill 6 Giant Rats within Scurrius' lair in 3 seconds.
translation: 在3秒内于斯库里乌斯的巢穴中击杀6只巨鼠。
古代飞龙盾战技冷却中。

english: When enabled, items which cannot be traded on the Grand Exchange will be shown in the ground items overlay.
translation: 启用后，无法在大交易所交易的物品会显示在地面物品覆盖层中。
地面物品 - 显示不可交易物品

english: When enabled, quest start points for unstarted quests will be highlighted. Quest start points can be NPCs or scenery.
translation: 启用后，未开始任务的任务起点会被高亮显示。任务起点可以是NPC或场景物件。

english: When enabled, only quests that you meet all the requirements for will have their quest start point highlighted.
translation: 启用后，只有你满足所有要求的任务，其任务起点才会被高亮显示。

english: Filter quest start highlights based on requirements
translation: 根据要求过滤任务起始点高亮

english: When enabled, shows the Scurrius food pile eating delay.
translation: 启用后，显示斯库里乌斯食物堆的进食延迟。

english: When enabled, if you have already learnt to cook karambwan properly, but you choose to cook one poorly, you will be asked to confirm your choice. The warning is offered only after you have learnt to cook them properly.
translation: 启用后，如果你已经学会正确烹饪柯蓝旺，但选择将其烹饪失败，系统会要求你确认选择。此警告仅在你学会正确烹饪后才会出现。

english: You must have learnt how to fish and cook karambwan properly.
translation: 你必须先学会如何正确钓鱼和烹饪卡拉姆班鱼。
任务后毒卡拉姆班鱼确认

english: When enabled will send out a notification when a group member completes a combat achievement task.
translation: 启用后，当团队成员完成战斗成就任务时，将发送通知。

english: The minimum combat achievement task tier needed to trigger a grouplan notification message.
translation: 触发团队通知消息所需的最低战斗成就任务等级。

english: Rank required to receive notifications when clan members complete combat achievement tasks.
translation: 接收氏族成员完成战斗成就任务通知所需的职位等级。

english: Minimum combat achievement task tier needed to trigger a clan notification message.
translation: 触发氏族通知消息所需的最低战斗成就任务等级。

english: When enabled, when you retrieve an item from your gravestone, you will auto-equip any items that were equipped when you died.
translation: 启用后，当你从墓碑取回物品时，会自动装备你死亡时已装备的任何物品。

english: Defeat the Eclipse moon by only attacking its clones.
translation: 仅通过攻击月蚀的克隆体来击败它。

english: Javelins leave a temporary pool of molten sand where they land.
translation: 标枪落地处会留下一滩暂时的熔化的沙。

english: Javelins leave a big permanent pool of molten sand where they land.
translation: 标枪落地处会留下一大滩永久的熔化的沙。

english: Javelins leave a very big permanent pool of molten sand where they land.
translation: 标枪落地处会留下一大滩永久的熔化的沙。

english: A swarm of angry bees drifts around the arena.
translation: 一群愤怒的蜜蜂在竞技场周围飘荡。

english: Two swarms of angry bees drift around the arena.
translation: 两群愤怒的蜜蜂在竞技场周围飘荡。

english: Three swarms of angry bees drift around the arena.
translation: 三群愤怒的蜜蜂在竞技场周围飘荡。

english: Enemies explode in a large radius on death.
translation: 敌人死亡时会在一个大范围内爆炸。

english: Damaging energy in a large radius on death and leave behind molten sand.
translation: 死亡时在大范围内释放破坏性能量，并留下熔化的沙。

english: Prayer is drained by 20% of damage received from enemies off-prayer.
translation: 在未开启对应祈祷时，受到的伤害会额外消耗20%的祈祷值。

english: Enemies ignore 33% of your defence and hit an extra 1 damage.
translation: 敌人无视你33%的防御，并额外造成1点伤害。

english: Enemies ignore all defence and hit an extra 6 damage.
translation: 敌人无视所有防御，并额外造成6点伤害。

english: An extra random Fremennik Warbander spawns every wave.
translation: 每波会额外生成一个随机的弗瑞曼尼可战团成员。

english: Healing totems spawn in and aid your enemies.
translation: 治疗图腾会生成并帮助你的敌人。

english: A stack of Doom is gained every time you take damage. Certain death at 15 stacks. Resets each wave.
translation: 每次受到伤害都会获得一层厄运。累积15层时必死无疑。每波重置。

english: Shockwave Colossi always spawn in pairs.
translation: 冲击波巨像总是成对出现。

english: Damaging energy orbits an area slowly.
translation: 破坏性能量缓慢地环绕一个区域。

english: Damaging energy orbits an area quickly and deals more damage.
translation: 破坏性能量快速地环绕一个区域并造成更多伤害。

english: Damaging energy orbits an area very quickly, deals more damage and disables prayer.
translation: 破坏性能量极快地环绕一个区域，造成更多伤害并禁用祈祷。

english: Your range is reduced by 2 tiles with autocast and ranged attacks.
translation: 你的自动施法和远程攻击的射程减少2格。

english: Your maximum HP is reduced by 10% and can no longer be boosted.
translation: 你的最大生命值减少10%，且无法再被提升。

english: Minotaurs can no longer be safespotted.
translation: 牛头怪不再能被安全点攻击。

english: Manticores fire an additional projectile per orb.
translation: 蝎狮每颗宝珠额外发射一枚弹射物。

english: Manticores fire an additional projectile per orb and apply Venom on hit.
translation: 蝎狮每颗宝珠额外发射一枚弹射物，并且命中时附加剧毒效果。

english: Manticores fire an additional projectile per orb, apply Venom and Melee orbs can appear anywhere in the sequence.
translation: 蝎狮每颗宝珠额外发射一枚弹射物，附加剧毒效果，并且近战宝珠可能出现在序列中的任何位置。

english: Defeat a Moon before they start their second special attack.
translation: 在月亮开始第二次战技之前击败它。

english: Open the Reward Chest after defeating all three Moons.
translation: 在击败所有三个月亮后打开奖励箱。

english: Defeat all the Moons in one run while only taking damage from regular attacks.
translation: 在一次挑战中，仅受到普通攻击伤害的情况下击败所有月亮。

english: Defeat a Moon without consuming any supplies.
translation: 在不消耗任何补给品的情况下击败一个月亮。

english: Defeat a Moon using its associated weapon drop.
translation: 使用月亮对应的武器掉落物来击败它。

english: Defeat all three Moons in one run by only attacking with a Dragon Scimitar.
translation: 在一次挑战中，仅使用龙金弯刀攻击来击败所有三个月亮。

english: Defeat all three Moons in one run in under 8 minutes.
translation: 在8分钟内，于一次挑战中击败所有三个月亮。

english: Defeat 30 Moons of Peril bosses without leaving the dungeon.
translation: 在不离开地下城的情况下，击败30个灾厄之月Boss。
击败索尔.赫雷迪特一次。

english: Kill Phosani's Nightmare while only taking damage from husks, power blasts and weakened parasites. Also, without becoming infected by spores or letting a sleepwalker reach Phosani's Nightmare.
translation: 在仅受到空壳、能量冲击和弱化寄生虫伤害，且不被孢子感染或让梦游者到达弗萨尼的梦魇的情况下击杀她。

english: Defeat Sol Heredit using only a Spear, Hasta or Halberd.
translation: 仅使用矛、长枪或戟来击败索尔.赫雷迪特。

english: Defeat Sol Heredit without running during the fight with him.
translation: 在与索尔.赫雷迪特的战斗中不奔跑的情况下击败他。

english: Complete Wave 4 without taking avoidable damage from a Manticore.
translation: 在不受到曼提柯尔任何可避免伤害的情况下完成第4波。

english: Defeat Sol Heredit without taking any damage from his Spear, Shield, Grapple or Triple Attack.
translation: 在不受到索尔.赫雷迪特的矛、盾、抓钩或三重攻击任何伤害的情况下击败他。

english: Defeat Sol Heredit after Fortis Saluting to the North, East, South and West of the arena while he's below 10% Hitpoints.
translation: 在索尔.赫雷迪特生命值低于10%时，向竞技场的北、东、南、西方向进行福尔蒂斯敬礼后击败他。

english: Complete Wave 7 without the Minotaur ever healing other enemies.
translation: 在牛头怪从未治疗其他敌人的情况下完成第7波。

english: Complete Wave 11 with either "Red Flag", "Dynamic Duo", or "Doom II" active.
translation: 在激活“红旗”、“动态双人”或“末日II”的情况下完成第11波。

english: Kill Phosani's Nightmare within 7 minutes and 30 seconds
translation: 在7分30秒内击杀弗萨尼的梦魇。

english: Defeat Sol Heredit with the "Bees! II", "Quartet", and "Solarflare II" modifiers active.
translation: 在激活“蜜蜂！II”、“四重奏”和“太阳耀斑II”修正器的情况下击败索尔.赫雷迪特。

english: Kill a Jaguar Warrior using a Claw-type weapon special attack.
translation: 使用爪类武器的战技击杀一只美洲豹战士。

english: Complete the Colosseum with a total time of 28:00 or less.
translation: 以总时间28分钟或更少完成竞技场。

english: Select whether Report options are shown on other players, if available.
translation: 选择是否在其他玩家身上显示举报选项（如果可用）。

english: When enabled, a Make-X menu will be offered when you make barbarian potions.
translation: 启用后，制作野蛮人药水时会提供制作X数量的菜单。

english: You must complete the Herblore portion of Barbarian Training to access this setting.
translation: 你必须完成野蛮人训练中的草药学部分才能访问此设置。
新手线索卷轴掉落警告

english: When enabled, you will get a message if you do not receive a clue as a drop because you already own one.
translation: 启用后，如果你因为已拥有一个线索卷轴而未获得掉落时，你会收到一条消息。

english: Ba-Ba's baboons will drop banana peels on the floor on death.
translation: 芭芭的狒狒死亡时会在地上掉落香蕉皮。
在6分钟内击杀弗萨尼的梦魇。

english: When enabled, you will automatically destroy empty vials when you drink the last dose of a potion.
translation: 启用后，当你喝下药水的最后一剂时，会自动销毁空瓶。

english: You must have completed the Alfred Grimhand's Barcrawl miniquest to access this setting.
translation: 你必须完成阿尔弗雷德.格林汉德的酒吧巡游迷你任务才能访问此设置。

english: When enabled, you will automatically destroy empty plant pots when planting tree saplings.
translation: 启用后，种植树苗时会自动销毁空花盆。

english: You must complete the Farming portion of Barbarian Training to access this setting.
translation: 你必须完成野蛮人训练中的农业部分才能访问此设置。

english: Kill Phosani's Nightmare while killing every husk and parasite in one hit.
translation: 在一次攻击中击杀每一个空壳和寄生虫的情况下击杀弗萨尼的梦魇。

english: Kill Phosani's Nightmare without her disabling your prayer.
translation: 在弗萨尼的梦魇没有禁用你的祈祷的情况下击杀她。

english: Determines the sounds that will play when the player is hit in combat.
translation: 决定玩家在战斗中被击中时播放的声音。

english: When enabled, the client will use the beta HD graphics.
translation: 启用后，客户端将使用测试版高清图形。

english: Selects the rendering type to use when HD beta is enabled. Choices are full HD or SD (SD mimics non-HD graphics).
translation: 选择启用高清测试版时使用的渲染类型。选项为全高清或标清（标清模拟非高清图形）。

english: You can only change this setting while HD is enabled.
translation: 只有在启用高清模式时才能更改此设置。

english: Kill Phosani's Nightmare without letting a sleepwalker reach her during the desperation phase.
translation: 在绝望阶段不让任何梦游者到达弗萨尼的梦魇的情况下击杀她。

english: The following options control the warning messages for <col=ffffff>teleport tablets</col> that take you to the wilderness. When enabled, you will be shown a warning message when using a teleport tablet to the wilderness.
translation: 以下选项控制前往荒野的<col=ffffff>传送石碑</col>的警告信息。启用后，使用传送石碑前往荒野时会显示警告。
击杀一只被折磨的恶魔。

english: Kill a Tormented Demon whilst their shield is inactive.
translation: 在被折磨的恶魔的护盾未激活时击杀它。

english: Kill two Tormented Demons within 2 seconds.
translation: 在2秒内击杀两只被折磨的恶魔。

english: Kill three Tormented Demons within 3 seconds.
translation: 在3秒内击杀三只被折磨的恶魔。

english: Hit three Tormented Demons within 3 seconds using a ballista or a crossbow.
translation: 在3秒内使用弩炮或弩击中三只被折磨的恶魔。

english: When enabled, shows how long blighted Overload potions will last.
translation: 启用后，显示枯萎的过量药水的持续时间。
死寂模式枯萎超载药水

english: When enabled, a Make-X menu will be offered when you add feathers to darts and bolts.
translation: 启用后，为飞镖和弩箭添加羽毛时会提供制作X数量的菜单。

english: When enabled, cosmetic upgrades such as ornament kits may cause certain items to be protected during a non-PvP death, rather than falling to a grave. Use the 'Items Kept on Death' screen to see how your items will behave.
translation: 启用后，装饰套件等外观升级可能导致某些物品在非玩家对战死亡时受到保护，而非掉落到坟墓中。请使用'死亡时保留的物品'界面查看你的物品将如何运作。

english: Determines the pronouns that will be used when the game refers to the player.
translation: 决定游戏指代玩家时使用的代词。

english: The following options control the warning messages for <col=ffffff>teleport spells</col> that take you to the wilderness. When enabled, you will be shown a warning message when you cast a teleport spell to the wilderness.
translation: 以下选项控制前往荒野的<col=ffffff>传送法术</col>的警告信息。启用后，施放前往荒野的传送法术时会显示警告。

english: Which side the scrollbar should be placed in the chat box.
translation: 聊天框中的滚动条应放置在左侧还是右侧。

english: You can only change this setting while playing in resizable mode.
translation: 只有在可调整大小模式下才能更改此设置。

english:
Mandatory requirements:
- Priest in Peril
- 92 Slayer
translation:
强制要求：
- 危难中的祭司
- 92 杀戮

english: Defeat the Doom of Mokhaiotl at delve level 3.
translation: 在挖掘深度3层击败莫凯奥特之灾。
在10分钟内击杀阿拉克索4次。

english: Kill Araxxor perfectly, without taking damage from Araxxor's Mage & Range attacks, melee attack off prayer, araxyte minions damage, or damage from acid pools.
translation: 完美击杀阿拉克索，不受到其魔法与远程攻击、未正确祈祷时的近战攻击、阿拉克西特仆从的伤害，以及酸液池的伤害。

english: Kill Araxxor perfectly, without hitting it during the enrage phase.
translation: 完美击杀阿拉克索，在狂暴阶段不攻击它。

english: Kill Araxxor without ever having venom or poison immunity.
translation: 在从未拥有毒液或毒素免疫的情况下击杀阿拉克索。

english: Kill Araxxor after destroying six eggs.
translation: 在摧毁六个蛋之后击杀阿拉克索。

english: Kill Araxxor without the boss ever moving.
translation: 在首领从未移动的情况下击杀阿拉克索。

english: Have an Araxyte kill three other Araxytes.
translation: 让一只阿拉克西特杀死另外三只阿拉克西特。
在不离开的情况下击杀阿拉克索10次。

english: When enabled, shows how long the Prayer Regeneration Potion effect will last.
translation: 启用后，显示祈祷恢复药水的效果持续时间。

english: After your run energy has naturally depleted, you will automatically start running again once you have this much energy. Set to 0 to stop auto-enabling.
translation: 在你的奔跑能量自然耗尽后，一旦能量恢复到该数值，你将自动开始奔跑。设置为0可停止自动启用。

english: When enabled, shows how long the Goading Potion effect will last.
translation: 启用后，显示挑衅药水的效果持续时间。

english: Kill the Hueycoatl perfectly 5 times without leaving. To get a perfect kill, you must not take any avoidable damage from the Hueycoatl's lightning attack, tail slam attack or off-prayer projectile attacks.
translation: 在不离开的情况下完美击杀休伊科特尔5次。完美击杀要求不受到休伊科特尔的闪电攻击、尾巴猛击攻击或未正确祈祷的投射物攻击的任何可避免伤害。

english: Kill the Hueycoatl whilst it is vulnerable.
translation: 在休伊科特尔处于易伤状态时击杀它。

english: Kill the Hueycoatl using only dragonbane weaponry.
translation: 仅使用屠龙武器击杀休伊科特尔。

english: Kill the Hueycoatl using only earth spells.
translation: 仅使用土系法术击杀休伊科特尔。

english: Kill the Hueycoatl whilst wearing two pieces of Hueycoatl armour.
translation: 穿着两件休伊科特尔盔甲击杀休伊科特尔。
在2分30秒内击杀休伊科特尔。

english: Kill the Hueycoatl in 2:30 with five or fewer players.
translation: 在2分30秒内，与五名或更少的玩家一起击杀休伊科特尔。

english: Kill the Hueycoatl in 2:30 with three or fewer players.
translation: 在2分30秒内，与三名或更少的玩家一起击杀休伊科特尔。
击杀阿莫克斯利亚特尔一次。
击杀阿莫克斯利亚特尔20次。

english: Kill Amoxliatl in less than 1 minute.
translation: 在1分钟内击杀阿莫克斯利亚特尔。

english: Kill Amoxliatl in less than 30 seconds.
translation: 在30秒内击杀阿莫克斯利亚特尔。

english: Kill Amoxliatl without taking any damage.
translation: 无伤击杀阿莫克斯利亚特尔。

english: Kill Amoxliatl using only glacial temotli as a weapon.
translation: 仅使用冰霜特莫提斧作为武器击杀阿莫克斯利亚特尔。

english: Kill Amoxliatl without losing any prayer points.
translation: 在不损失任何祈祷点的情况下击杀阿莫克斯利亚特尔。

english: Kill Amoxliatl 10 times without leaving her chamber.
translation: 在不离开阿莫克斯利亚特尔密室的情况下连续击杀她10次。

english: Kill Amoxliatl without any of her unstable ice shattering.
translation: 在阿莫克斯利亚特尔的任何不稳定的冰都没有碎裂的情况下击杀她。

english: Enables Tap-to-drop mode. When tapping an item in your inventory, the item tapped will be dropped to the floor.
translation: 启用点击丢弃模式。点击背包中的物品时，该物品将被丢到地上。

english: Enables Single tap mode. The minimenu will open on tap rather than long-press when more than one option is available.
translation: 启用单次点击模式。当有多个选项可用时，点击将打开迷你菜单，而非长按。

english: Tap to enable/disable tile highlighting. Long press to show/hide highlighted tiles.
translation: 点击启用/禁用瓷砖高亮。长按显示/隐藏高亮瓷砖。

english: When active, all walk-here options will be disabled.
translation: 激活时，所有“走到这里”选项将被禁用。

english: When active, disables entity options. Entities include NPCs, items, and objects in the world such as trees and doors.
translation: 激活时，禁用实体选项。实体包括NPC、物品以及世界中的物体，如树木和门。

english: This will open and close the Inventory Tab.
translation: 这将打开和关闭背包标签页。

english: This will open and close the Equipment Tab.
translation: 这将打开和关闭装备标签页。

english: When enabled, your side panel will be transparent.
translation: 启用后，你的侧边面板将变为透明。

english: Modern Layout - Side-panel can be closed by the hotkeys,Modern Layout Side-panel can be closed by the hotkeys,Modern Layout - Side panel can be closed by the hotkeys,Modern Layout Side panel can be closed by the hotkeys,Advanced Display Settings
translation: 现代布局 - 侧面板可通过快捷键关闭，现代布局侧面板可通过快捷键关闭，高级显示设置

english: When enabled, pressing the hotkey assigned to an already open side panel will close it.
translation: 启用后，按下已打开侧面板的热键将关闭该面板。

english: This will open and close the Prayer Tab.
translation: 这将打开和关闭祈祷标签页。

english: Show the remaining XP for a level in the stats panel,Advanced Display Settings
translation: 在状态面板中显示升级所需剩余经验值，高级显示设置

english: When enabled, displays the XP needed to reach the next level when viewing the amount of XP you have in a skill.
translation: 启用后，在查看某项技能的当前经验值时，会显示达到下一级所需的经验值。

english: This will open and close the Spellbook Tab.
translation: 这将打开和关闭法术书标签页。

english: This will open and close the Combat tab.
translation: 这将打开和关闭战斗标签页。

english: This will open and close the Journal Tab.
translation: 这将打开和关闭日志标签页。

english: This will open and close the Stats Tab.
translation: 这将打开和关闭属性标签页。

english: This will open and close the Emotes Tab.
translation: 这将打开和关闭表情标签页。

english: This will open and close the Music Tab.
translation: 这将打开和关闭音乐标签页。

english: This will open and close the Socials Tab.
translation: 这将打开和关闭社交标签页。

english: This will open and close the Friends Tab.
translation: 这将打开和关闭好友标签页。

english: This will open and close the Account Tab.
translation: 这将打开和关闭账户标签页。

english: This will open and close the Settings Tab.
translation: 这将打开和关闭设置标签页。

english: This will open and close the Logout Tab.
translation: 这将打开和关闭登出标签页。

english: Cures any active poison as long as you have the required potion.
translation: 只要你有所需的药水，就能治愈任何活跃的中毒状态。
启用/禁用当前的快速祈祷。

english: When enabled, your next attack will be a special attack, as long as your weapon has one.
translation: 启用后，你的下一次攻击将是战技，只要你的武器有战技可用。

english: Tap to enable/disable ground item editing. Long press to show/hide ground items.
translation: 点击启用/禁用地面物品编辑。长按显示/隐藏地面物品。

english: Tap to enable/disable NPC tagging. Long press to show/hide highlights around tagged NPCs.
translation: 点击启用/禁用NPC标记。长按显示/隐藏已标记NPC周围的高亮。

english: Key bindings will only work with an external keyboard.
translation: 快捷键仅适用于外接键盘。

english: When enabled, shows your assigned hotkeys on the left side of your device.
translation: 启用后，在装置左侧显示你已分配的热键。

english: Hotkeys open side panels on the left
translation: 快捷键在左侧打开侧面板

english: When enabled, blank buttons will be displayed for slots that have no hotkey action assigned.
translation: 启用后，未分配热键操作的插槽会显示空白纽扣。

english: When enabled, tap the ground to place highlights.
translation: 启用后，点击地面即可放置高亮标记。

english: When enabled, highlighted tiles will be shown.
translation: 启用后，高亮的瓷砖将会显示。

english: What type of vibration your device will use, as long as your device supports it.
translation: 你的装置将使用的振动类型（只要你的装置支持）。

english: When enabled, hold shift and right-click an NPC to tag it for highlighting.
translation: 启用后，按住Shift并右键点击NPC可为其添加标记以便高亮显示。

english: When enabled, long press an NPC to tag it for highlighting.
translation: 启用后，长按NPC即可为其添加高亮标记。

english: When enabled, right clicking a player will show a hiscores lookup option in the minimenu.
translation: 启用后，右键点击玩家会在迷你菜单中显示排行榜查询选项。

english: When enabled, long pressing on a player will show a hiscores lookup option in the minimenu.
translation: 启用后，长按玩家会在迷你菜单中显示排行榜查询选项。
排行榜 - 世界内查询

english: When enabled, changes the menu entry under the mouse position when the minimenu is opened.
translation: 启用后，当迷你菜单打开时，会更改鼠标位置下的菜单条目。

english: When enabled, changes the menu entry under the long press position when the minimenu is opened.
translation: 启用后，当迷你菜单打开时，会更改长按位置下的菜单条目。
修改迷你菜单起始位置

english: Determines which menu entry will be under the mouse position when the minimenu is opened.
translation: 决定迷你菜单打开时，鼠标位置下将显示哪个菜单条目。

english: Determines which menu entry will be under the long press position when the minimenu is opened.
translation: 决定迷你菜单打开时，长按位置下会显示哪个菜单条目。

english: Enable 'Modify minimenu start position' to change this setting!
translation: 启用'修改迷你菜单起始位置'才能更改此设置！

english: Increase the spacing between minimenu entries.
translation: 增加迷你菜单条目之间的间距。

english: Use these toggles to disable specific minimenu options.
translation: 使用这些开关来禁用特定的迷你菜单选项。

english: Disables entity options. Entities include NPCs, items, and objects in the world such as trees and doors.
translation: 禁用实体选项。实体包括NPC、物品以及世界中的物体，如树木和门。

english: Disables player options such as trade and follow.
translation: 禁用玩家选项，如交易和跟随。

english: When active, the minimenu reordering button will be displayed on the top-right of the minimenu.
translation: 激活时，迷你菜单重新排序按钮将显示在迷你菜单的右上角。

english: Reset and remove any reordering done to the minimenu across all entitites.
translation: 重置并移除对所有实体迷你菜单所做的任何重新排序。
恢复迷你菜单重新排序

english: When enabled, if you hold shift, your left click option on items in your inventory will default to drop.
translation: 启用后，如果你按住Shift，对背包中物品的左键点击将默认为丢弃。

english: When enabled, your tap option on items in your inventory will default to drop.
translation: 启用后，点击背包中的物品将默认执行丢弃操作。

english: When enabled, shows the relics you have unlocked and any associated buffs on the buff bar.
translation: 启用后，在增益效果栏上显示你已解锁的遗物及其相关增益效果。

english: When enabled, shows your combat mastery paths on the buff bar.
translation: 启用后，在增益效果栏上显示你的战斗精通路径。

english:
- When doing the following activities, all items are processed at once:

- Smelting ores, Smithing bars (does not work with the Superheat item spell) and making Cannonballs.

- Fletching logs, stringing Bows and cutting bolt tips.

- Making headless arrows, regular arrows, bolts, darts, and javelins (capped at 10x the regular amount per action).

- Cleaning herbs and making Potions which do not have a stackable secondary ingredient.

- Cooking food and making Jugs of Wine.

- Crafting leather, uncut gems, glassblowing, jewellery, pottery, Battlestaves and spinning flax or wool.

- Full XP is given for items processed using this Relic.

- There is a 25% chance that you will make an extra product, which will be sent to your Bank if you have space. The additional product will also grant XP.

- Additionally Crafting, Smithing, Herblore, Fletching and Cooking are boosted by +12.
translation:
- 进行以下活动时，所有物品将一次性处理：

- 熔炼矿石、锻造金属锭（不适用于矿石冶炼术法术）和制作炮弹。

- 制箭原木、上弓弦和切割箭羽尖端。

- 制作无头箭、普通箭、弩箭、飞镖和标枪（每次操作上限为常规数量的10倍）。

- 清理草药和制作没有可堆叠副材料的药水。

- 烹饪食物和制作葡萄酒壶。

- 制作皮革、未切割宝石、吹制玻璃、首饰、陶器、战斗法杖以及纺亚麻或羊毛。

- 使用此遗物处理物品可获得全额经验值。

- 你有25%的几率额外制作一个产品，如果你的银行有空间，该产品将被存入银行。额外产品也会提供经验值。

- 此外，制作、锻造、草药学、制箭和烹饪技能等级提升+12。

english:
- This pickaxe will act as a non-degradable variant of the crystal equivalent with no requirements.

- When this item is in your inventory or equipped, you gain the following perks:

- On failing to mine a rock, you will have a separate 50% chance to succeed.

- Items gathered from Mining are automatically sent to your Bank.

- The Echo Pickaxe will cause the rock to not deplete until you have mined 4 ore.

- This buff does stack with the existing Mining Gloves, with a cap of 7 ores from a given node.

You will be able to toggle the following effects on or off for the Pickaxe:

- Collected ores are automatically smelted and grant Smithing XP (regardless of your smithing level).

- Gems gathered from Mining are automatically cut and grant Crafting XP regardless of your Crafting level.
translation:
- 这把镐子将作为水晶镐的等效物品，且不会损耗，无使用要求。

- 当此物品在你的背包或装备中时，你将获得以下增益：

- 当采矿失败时，你有额外的50%几率成功。

- 从采矿中获得的物品会自动存入你的银行。

- 回响镐会使岩石在你开采出4块矿石之前不会枯竭。

- 此增益与现有的采矿手套效果叠加，每个矿点最多可开采7块矿石。

你可以为这把镐子开启或关闭以下效果：

- 采集到的矿石会自动熔炼并获得锻造经验值（无论你的锻造等级如何）。

- 从采矿中获得的宝石会自动切割并获得制作经验值，无论你的制作等级如何。

english:
- This harpoon will act as a non-degradable variant of the crystal equivalent with no requirements.

- When this item is in your inventory or equipped, you gain the following perks:

- On failing to fish a spot, you will have a separate 50% chance to succeed.

- Items gathered from Fishing are automatically sent to your Bank.

- Fish caught have a 50% chance to be automatically cooked, granting Cooking experience regardless of level requirements.

- Attempt to catch fish 1 tick faster.

- It will also work for fish that don't require a harpoon to be caught, and your harpoon can be substituted as a Net, Big Net, Lobster Pot, or any Rod whilst Fishing.

Alongside the Echo harpoon effects you will get the following perks to Hunter:

- Hunter catching will never fail.

- Box traps catch chinchompas faster.

- Chinchompas are doubled when caught, also giving double XP.

- Impling jars no longer break upon opening them.

Lastly, you never burn food when Cooking.
translation:
- 这把鱼叉将作为水晶鱼叉的等效物品，且不会损耗，无使用要求。

- 当此物品在你的背包或装备中时，你将获得以下增益：

- 当在钓鱼点钓鱼失败时，你有额外的50%几率成功。

- 从钓鱼中获得的物品会自动存入你的银行。

- 捕获的鱼有50%的几率被自动烹饪，并获得烹饪经验值，无视等级要求。

- 尝试捕鱼的速度加快1个游戏刻。

- 它也能用于不需要鱼叉捕获的鱼，并且你的鱼叉可以替代网、大网、龙虾笼或任何钓竿进行钓鱼。

除了回响鱼叉的效果外，你还会获得以下狩猎增益：

- 狩猎捕捉永远不会失败。

- 箱式陷阱能更快地捕捉Chinchompas。

- 捕获Chinchompas时数量翻倍，同时获得双倍经验值。

- 打开小精灵罐时，罐子不再破碎。

最后，烹饪时你永远不会烧焦食物。

english:
- This axe will act as a non-degradable variant of the crystal equivalent with no requirements.

- When this item is in your inventory or equipped, you gain the following perks:

- On failing to chop a tree, you will have a separate 50% chance to succeed.

- Items gathered from Woodcutting are automatically sent to your Bank.

You will be able to toggle the following effects on or off for the Axe:

- Automatically burning logs for Firemaking XP (regardless of your Firemaking level).

- Automatically Fletching logs into arrowshafts for Fletching XP (regardless of your Fletching level).

Additionally, you gain the following perks to Firemaking:

- Never fail to make fires with any logs at any Firemaking level.
translation:
- 这把斧头将作为水晶斧的等效物品，且不会损耗，无使用要求。

- 当此物品在你的背包或装备中时，你将获得以下增益：

- 当砍树失败时，你有额外的50%几率成功。

- 从伐木中获得的物品会自动存入你的银行。

你可以为这把斧头开启或关闭以下效果：

- 自动燃烧原木以获得生火经验值（无论你的生火等级如何）。

- 自动将原木制箭成箭杆以获得制箭经验值（无论你的制箭等级如何）。

此外，你还会获得以下生火增益：

- 在任何生火等级下，使用任何原木生火都不会失败。

english:
- This item will allow you to Teleport to any S.T.A.S.H unit and Falo the Bard (Respecting area unlocks).

- It has the ability to teleport you to your current clue step, if you have one. Note - this will not work on clue steps that require you to kill a certain NPC.

- This item ignores wilderness teleport restrictions.

- This item cannot be used to teleport to an area you haven't unlocked.
translation:
- 此物品允许你传送到任何S.T.A.S.H.单元和吟游诗人法洛（需尊重区域解锁）。

- 如果你有当前的线索步骤，它可以传送你到该步骤。注意 - 这不适用于需要你杀死特定NPC的线索步骤。

- 此物品无视荒野传送限制。

- 此物品不能用于传送到你尚未解锁的区域。

english:
- This item will allow you to teleport to any Deposit box, Bank, or Bank chest.

- This item ignores wilderness teleport restrictions.

- This item cannot be used to teleport to an area you haven't unlocked.
translation:
- 此物品允许你传送到任何寄存箱、银行或银行箱。

- 此物品无视荒野传送限制。

- 此物品不能用于传送到你尚未解锁的区域。

english: Show prayer tooltips,tool tips,Advanced Display Settings
translation: 显示祈祷提示，提示，高级显示设置

english: When enabled, hovering over a prayer shows the prayers effect.
translation: 启用后，悬停在祈祷上会显示该祈祷的效果。

english:
- While equipped, Sage's Greaves will grant Agility XP based on your Agility level while you run.

- Completing an Agility course grants two completion count and 25% bonus XP.

- 100% success rate on all Agility checks.

- Marks of Grace will also spawn with 10,000 coins.

- Double Quantity of Pyramid Tops, Hallowed Marks and Agility Vouchers, and Crystal shards (from agility).
translation:
- 装备智者护腿时，奔跑时会根据你的敏捷等级获得敏捷经验值。

- 完成一个敏捷课程可获得两次完成计数和25%的额外经验值。

- 所有敏捷检定100%成功。

- 优雅印记也会伴随10,000金币生成。

- 金字塔顶、神圣印记、敏捷代金券和水晶碎片（来自敏捷）的数量翻倍。

english:
While the Forager's pouch is worn or in your inventory, you gain the following benefits:

- When you gather resources from Woodcutting, Fishing, Mining and Hunter, the pouch will find and store a random grimy herb.

- This herb is limited to any which your Herblore level + 25 can clean. This action also provides a small amount of Herblore XP.

- The pouch will only find herbs it has room to store, but will always attempt to give you a herb you can receive.

- The pouch also functions as a Silklined herb sack, and shares an inventory with it.

Additionally, you gain the following perks to Herblore:
- All items are processed at once.
- Secondary ingredients have a 90% chance to not be consumed, this stacks additively with other sources.
- Potions created will have 4 doses instead of 3.
translation:
当采集者的袋被穿戴或在你的背包中时，你将获得以下好处：

- 当你从伐木、钓鱼、采矿和狩猎收集资源时，袋子会找到并储存一个随机的脏草药。

- 此草药仅限于你的草药学等级+25可以清理的草药。此动作也会提供少量草药学经验值。

- 袋子只会寻找它有空间储存的草药，但总会尝试给你一个你能获得的草药。

- 此袋子也充当丝绸内衬草药袋，并与其共享背包空间。

此外，你还会获得以下草药学增益：
- 所有物品一次性处理。
- 副材料有90%的几率不被消耗，此效果与其他来源叠加。
- 制作的药水将有4剂而不是3剂。

english:
- This item allows full access to the Managing Miscellania feature from anywhere.

- Workers will work for 50% less coins, always have max appeal, produce twice as many resources, and accrue resources every hour instead of every day.
translation:
- 此物品允许你从任何地方完全访问管理米斯凯尼亚功能。

- 工人将只收取50%的费用，始终保持最大吸引力，产出两倍的资源，并且每小时（而非每天）累积资源。

english: Choose another Relic from any tier below this one.
translation: 从下方任何等级中选择另一个遗物。

english:
You gain the following perks when Clue Hunting:

- Sources of clues are now a 1/15 chance.

- Clue Geodes, Clue Nests and Clue Bottles are found 10x more often.

- All Clue Scrolls have the lowest number of steps possible for their tier.

- Emote, Falo and Charlie Clue steps no longer have item requirements.

- Every Clue Scroll casket will roll the max amount of rewards it can give. It can roll the same item more than once. :
- Beginner caskets will roll 3 times.
- Easy caskets will roll 4 times.
- Medium caskets will roll 5 times.
- Hard caskets will roll 6 times.
- Elite caskets will roll 6 times.
- Master caskets will roll 7 times.
translation:
你在线索狩猎时获得以下增益：

- 线索来源现在有1/15的几率掉落。

- 线索晶石、线索鸟巢和线索瓶的发现几率提升10倍。

- 所有线索卷轴在其等级中拥有最少的步骤数。

- 表情、法洛和查理的线索步骤不再需要物品。

- 每个线索卷轴宝箱都会掷出它能给予的最大奖励次数。它可以多次掷出同一物品：
- 初级宝箱掷3次。
- 简单宝箱掷4次。
- 中级宝箱掷5次。
- 困难宝箱掷6次。
- 精英宝箱掷6次。
- 大师宝箱掷7次。

english:
You gain the following perks to Slayer:

- Always on task for all eligible slayer monsters.

- Unlock all Slayer Task perks for free.

- Rune Pouches, Herb Sacks and Looting Bags in the Slayer Point store are all free.

- Skip and block Tasks for free.

- Gain 1000-15,000 bonus Slayer XP for the first time you kill the 100th of each unique Slayer monster, scaled by the monster's Slayer level requirement (XP stated is before multipliers).
translation:
你获得以下杀戮增益：

- 对所有符合条件的杀戮怪物，始终处于任务中。

- 免费解锁所有杀戮任务增益。

- 杀戮点数商店中的符石袋、草药袋和战利品袋全部免费。

- 免费跳过和屏蔽任务。

- 首次杀死每种独特杀戮怪物的第100只时，获得1000-15,000点额外杀戮经验值，具体取决于怪物的杀戮等级要求（所述经验值为倍率前）。

english:
- This item can be used to store any single coordinate, alongside your Hitpoints, Prayer and Special Attack Energy, and teleport back to it at a later date, restoring those stats to what they were.

- This item ignores wilderness teleport restrictions.

- The Crystal of Echoes cannot store coordinates whilst inside an instance.

- There are various other locations this item won't store coordinates in, including quest areas, certain minigames, etc.
translation:
- 此物品可用于存储任何单一坐标，连同你的生命值、祈祷值和战技能量，并在日后传送回该坐标，将这些状态恢复到存储时的数值。

- 此物品无视荒野传送限制。

- 回响水晶不能在副本内存储坐标。

- 还有其他一些位置此物品无法存储坐标，包括任务区域、某些小游戏等。

english:
You gain the following perks to the High and Low Alchemy spells:

- The spells have no rune cost or level requirement.

- Items give 15% more gold, and have a 65% chance to not be consumed.

- When cast on a stack of items, the spells will automatically be recast over time, until the stack is depleted or moved.

You gain the following perks to Prayer:

- 20,000 Coins can be offered at Prayer altars in exchange for Prayer XP equivalent to using a dragon bone. This respects altar XP modifiers. Normal altars have no modifiers.

- All items purchased from some select shops can be noted, provided the item can be noted at all.
- There will be a new button on select shops which toggles this effect.
translation:
你获得以下高等级炼金术和低等级炼金术法术的增益：

- 这些法术没有符石成本或等级要求。

- 物品提供15%更多的金币，并有65%的几率不被消耗。

- 当对一堆物品施放时，法术会随时间自动重复施放，直到堆叠耗尽或移动。

你获得以下祈祷的增益：

- 可以在祈祷祭坛处献祭20,000金币以换取相当于使用龙骨的经验值。此效果尊重祭坛经验倍率。普通祭坛没有倍率。

- 从某些特定商店购买的所有物品都可以被注明，前提是该物品可以被注明。
- 特定商店上将有一个新按钮来切换此效果。

english:
- The Grimoire can be used to freely swap between spellbooks.

- The Grimoire acts as a Book of the dead.

Additionally, when you select this, you will unlock access to all prayers and spells. Regardless of area, quest, or diary requirements.
translation:
- 奥术魔法书可用于在法术书之间自由切换。

- 奥术魔法书充当亡灵之书。

此外，当你选择此项时，你将解锁所有祈祷和法术的访问权限，无论区域、任务或日记要求如何。

english:
- This item can be used to access the Seed Vault from anywhere in the world.

Additionally, you gain the following perks to Farming:

- Crops never die.

- When planting a seed, it has a 75% chance to not be consumed.

- When a seed fully grows, if your Seed Vault has another seed of the same type it will harvest the patch for you, then replant the seed. (Only works whilst online)
translation:
- 此物品可用于从世界任何地方访问种子库。

此外，你获得以下农业增益：

- 作物永远不会死亡。

- 种植种子时，有75%的几率不消耗种子。

- 当种子完全生长后，如果你的种子库中有另一颗同类型的种子，它会为你收获作物，然后重新种植种子。（仅在线时有效）

english:
You gain the following perks to special attacks:

- All special attacks cost 20% and have +100% accuracy.

- For each failed accuracy roll with a special attack, gain 10% Special Attack Energy.

- Whenever you kill an NPC, restore 15% Special Attack Energy.
translation:
你获得以下战技增益：

- 所有战技消耗20%能量，并拥有+100%准确度。

- 每次战技的准确度检定失败，获得10%战技能量。

- 每当你杀死一个NPC，恢复15%战技能量。

english:
You gain the Last Stand perk, which works as follows:

- If damage would reduce you to 0 hp, you are reduced to 1 hp instead.

- Your combat stats are instantly boosted to 255 but begin draining rapidly back down to their base level + 15.

- For the next 16 ticks after this ability is activated, you cannot be reduced to 0 HP.

- When the effect ends, all incoming damage is nullified and the player is healed based on the damage they dealt over the last 16 ticks.

Once this ability is used, it cannot be used again until you die or 3 minutes have passed.
translation:
你获得背水一战增益，效果如下：

- 如果伤害会使你的生命值降至0，则改为降至1点生命值。

- 你的战斗属性瞬间提升至255，但会开始快速下降，直至基础等级+15。

- 在此能力激活后的16个游戏刻内，你无法被降至0生命值。

- 当效果结束时，所有即将到来的伤害被无效化，并根据你在过去16个游戏刻内造成的伤害量治疗玩家。

此能力使用后，在你死亡或3分钟过去之前无法再次使用。

english:
- League XP multiplier is 5x.

- Items from eligible sources will be 2x as common.

- Farming ticks will occur every minute instead of every five minutes.

- Minigame points received are boosted by 4x.

- Run energy is never drained whilst running.

- All clue scrolls will drop as stackable scroll boxes, and clue-step progress is saved between clues.
translation:
- 联盟经验倍率为5倍。

- 符合条件的来源物品掉落率变为2倍。

- 农业刻钟改为每分钟一次，而非每五分钟一次。

- 获得的小游戏点数提升4倍。

- 奔跑时体力值永不耗尽。

- 所有线索卷轴将以可堆叠的卷轴盒形式掉落，且线索步骤进度会在不同线索间保留。

english: - League XP multiplier increased from 5x to 8x.
translation: - 联盟经验倍率从5倍提升至8倍。

english: When enabled, hitsplats caused by damage that you did not deal are tinted.
translation: 启用后，由非你造成的伤害所产生的命中特效会被着色。

english:
- Items from eligible sources will be 5x as common.
- Minigame points received are boosted by 8x.
- League XP multiplier increased from 8x to 12x.
translation:
- 符合条件的来源物品掉落率变为5倍。
- 获得的小游戏点数提升8倍。
- 联盟经验倍率从8倍提升至12倍。

english: There are no passive unlocks for this tier.
translation: 此层级没有被动解锁项。

english: 95% chance to save weapon charges, ammunition, and runes used for spells.
translation: 95% 的几率节省武器充能、弹药和法术符文。

english: Healing from all sources is increased by 20%.
translation: 所有来源的治疗效果提升 20%。

english: Accuracy with all styles is increased by 100%.
translation: 所有风格的命中率提升 100%。

english: Prayer Point gain from all sources is increased by 25%.
translation: 所有来源的祈祷点数获取量提升 25%。

english: Attacks with all styles now have 60% Prayer penetration.
translation: 所有风格的攻击现在拥有 60% 的祈祷穿透。

english: Your chance to generate an echo increases to 20%, and your echoes can generate additional echoes (Up to 8 times in a row).
translation: 产生回响的几率提升至 20%，并且回响可以继续产生额外的回响（最多连续 8 次）。

english: Defeat 10 monsters with a combat level of 100 or more.
translation: 击败 10 只战斗等级 100 或以上的怪物。

english: Defeat a monster with a Slayer requirement of 55 or more.
translation: 击败一只需要杀戮等级 55 或以上的怪物。

english: Defeat TzTok-Jad in the Fight Caves.
translation: 在战斗洞穴中击败特兹托克.贾德。
击败两个不同的回响 Boss。
击败三个不同的回响 Boss。

The Maggot King is a boss found in the far off land of Vampyrium.

Attack Styles - All
translation:
幼虫国王是位于遥远之地 Vampyrium 的一个 Boss。

攻击风格 - 全部

english: Upgrade your ammunition by equipping some Iron arrows.|@control_leftclick_caps on the Iron arrows you may have in your inventory.|The Oak shortbow can use arrows up to steel.|Different arrows have different ranged strengths.|The higher your ranged strength, the more damage you can deal with your bow. You can check your ranged strength by opening the equipment stats interface.
translation: 通过装备一些铁箭来升级你的弹药。|@control_leftclick_caps 你背包里可能有的铁箭。|橡木短弓可以使用最高到钢箭的箭。|不同的箭有不同的远程强度。|你的远程强度越高，用弓造成的伤害就越大。你可以通过打开装备属性界面来查看你的远程强度。

english: @control_leftclick_caps on the Iron arrows in your inventory to equip them.
translation: @control_leftclick_caps 你背包里的铁箭来装备它们。

english: Ensure you have a bow and arrows suitable for your level. The Cows north east of Lumbridge are suitable targets to fight.
translation: 确保你有适合你等级的弓和箭。仑桥镇东北边的牛是合适的战斗目标。

english: Train your Ranged to level 10 by fighting nearby monsters! Ensure you have a bow and arrows suitable for your level.|Take some food to keep your hitpoints high.|The Cows north east of Lumbridge are suitable targets to fight. You can fire arrows over the fence and some other scenery. This means that the cows will not be able to attack you, but you can attack the cow.|If you run out of arrows, speak to the Ranged combat instructor south of the general store in Lumbridge. Arrows you fire can be picked up from the ground.
translation: 通过攻击附近的怪物将你的远程技能训练到10级！确保你有一把适合你等级的弓和箭。|带些食物来保持你的生命值。|仑桥镇东北边的牛是合适的战斗目标。你可以隔着栅栏和其他一些地形射箭。这意味着牛无法攻击到你，但你可以攻击牛。|如果箭用完了，可以找仑桥镇杂货店南边的远程战斗导师交谈。你射出的箭可以从地上捡起来。

english: The Wardens will attack quicker and the obelisk will charge at a faster rate in the second phase of the fight.
translation: 在战斗的第二阶段，典狱长将攻击得更快，方尖碑将以更快的速度充能。

english: Kill Kree'arra 30 times in a privately rented instance without leaving the room.
translation: 在私人租赁的副本中，不离开房间，击杀克里阿拉30次。

english: A cosmetic banner that represents Leagues II - Trailblazer. The banner is held in the main-hand slot.
translation: 一面代表联赛 II - 开拓者的装饰旗帜。这面旗帜装备在主手栏位。

english: A scroll which can be used to unlock the Leagues II - Trailblazer Home Teleport Animation. The scroll is destroyed once it has been used.
translation: 一张可用于解锁联赛 II - 开拓者回家传送动画的卷轴。使用后卷轴会被销毁。

english: A kit which can be attached to any Dragon or Infernal axe, pickaxe or harpoon to recolour it. The tool can be reverted returning the kit at any time.
translation: 一个可以附加到任何龙或地狱斧、镐子或鱼叉上以改变其颜色的工具包。该工具可以随时还原并返还工具包。

english: A globe which can be built into a statue in a PoH hotspot in your League Trophy Room. If the statue is removed the globe material is returned.
translation: 一个可以建造在玩家自宅联赛奖杯室的雕像热点中的地球仪。如果雕像被移除，地球仪材料会被返还。

english: A rug which can be built into a rug hotspot in your PoH League Trophy Room. If the rug is removed the rug material is returned.
translation: 一块可以建造在玩家自宅联赛奖杯室的地毯热点中的地毯。如果地毯被移除，地毯材料会被返还。

english: A set of 6 ornament kits which can be used to recolour your graceful. The recoloured graceful can be reverted returning the kit at any time.
translation: 一套 6 个装饰品工具包，可用于改变你的优雅服饰的颜色。改变颜色后的优雅服饰可以随时还原并返还工具包。

english: A spirit tree scroll from Leagues V - Raging Echoes. Apply it to a spirit tree to transform its appearance.
translation: 一张来自联赛 V - 狂暴回响的灵魂树卷轴。将其应用于灵魂树以改变其外观。

english: A portal nexus scroll from Leagues V - Raging Echoes. Apply it to a crystalline portal nexus to transform its appearance.
translation: 一张来自联赛 V - 狂暴回响的传送枢纽卷轴。将其应用于水晶传送枢纽以改变其外观。
联赛 V 传送枢纽

english: A rug from Leagues V - Raging Echoes. It can be used to build a rug with the colours of the Raging Echoes.
translation: 一块来自联赛 V - 狂暴回响的地毯。可用于建造带有狂暴回响颜色的地毯。

english: A set of curtains from Leagues V - Raging Echoes. They can be used to build a set of curtains with the colours of the Raging Echoes.
translation: 一套来自联赛 V - 狂暴回响的窗帘。可用于建造一套带有狂暴回响颜色的窗帘。

english: A scrying pool scroll from Leagues V - Raging Echoes. Apply it to a scrying pool to transform its appearance.
translation: 一张来自联赛 V - 狂暴回响的占卜池卷轴。将其应用于占卜池以改变其外观。

english: A portal scroll from Leagues V - Raging Echoes. Apply it to a marble portal to transform its appearance.
translation: 一张来自联赛 V - 狂暴回响的传送门卷轴。将其应用于大理石传送门以改变其外观。

english: A home telport scroll from Leagues V - Raging Echoes. Read it to learn of a new way to cast home teleport.
translation: 一张来自联赛 V - 狂暴回响的回家传送卷轴。阅读它以学习一种新的施放回家传送的方式。
联赛 V 回家传送

english: A death scroll from Leagues V - Raging Echoes. Read it to learn of a new way to die with style.
translation: 一张来自联赛 V - 狂暴回响的死亡卷轴。阅读它以学习一种新的死得有型的方式。

english: An ornament kit from Leagues V - Raging Echoes. Apply it to Ahrim's pieces to change their appearance.
translation: 一个来自联赛 V - 狂暴回响的装饰品工具包。将其应用于阿赫里姆的部件以改变其外观。
回响阿赫里姆碎片装饰套件

english: An ornament kit from Leagues V - Raging Echoes. Apply it to Virtus robes to change their appearance.
translation: 一个来自联赛 V - 狂暴回响的装饰品工具包。将其应用于维图斯长袍以改变其外观。
回响维图斯长袍装饰套件

english: An ornament kit from Leagues V - Raging Echoes. Apply it to a Venator Bow to change its appearance.
translation: 一个来自联赛 V - 狂暴回响的装饰品工具包。将其应用于维纳托弓以改变其外观。
回响维纳托弓装饰套件

english: A npc contact scroll from Leagues V - Raging Echoes. Read it to learn of a new way to contact NPCs in style.
translation: 一张来自联赛 V - 狂暴回响的 NPC 联络卷轴。阅读它以学习一种新的有型地联络 NPC 的方式。
联赛 V NPC 联络

english: When enabled, if you use items on a Bank Deposit Box, you will be asked how many of them you wish to deposit. Otherwise all of them will be deposited.
translation: 启用后，当你对银行寄存箱使用物品时，系统会询问你要存入多少数量。否则，所有物品都会被存入。

english:
- You can endlessly gather from Fishing spots, Trees and Mining rocks even if they deplete after your initial interaction.

- Resources gathered from Fishing, Woodcutting and Mining are multiplied by 2.

- XP is granted for all additional resources gathered.
translation:
- 你可以从钓鱼点、树木和采矿岩石中无限采集，即使它们在你初次互动后枯竭。

- 从钓鱼、伐木和采矿中收集的资源数量翻倍。

- 所有额外收集的资源都会获得经验值。

english:
When doing the following Production activities, all items are processed at once:

- smelting ores, Smithing bars and making Cannonballs.

- Fletching logs, stringing Bows, making arrow shafts and cutting bolt tips.

- Making headless arrows, regular arrows, bolts and darts (capped at 10x the regular amount per action).

- Cleaning herbs and making potions which do not have a stackable secondary ingredient.

- Cooking food, making pies or pizzas and making Jugs of Wine.

- Crafting leather, uncut gems, glassblowing, jewellery, pottery, Battlestaves and spinning flax or wool.
translation:
进行以下生产活动时，所有物品将一次性处理：

- 熔炼矿石、锻造金属锭和制作炮弹。

- 制箭原木、上弓弦、制作箭杆和切割箭羽尖端。

- 制作无头箭、普通箭、弩箭和飞镖（每次操作上限为常规数量的10倍）。

- 清理草药和制作没有可堆叠副材料的药水。

- 烹饪食物、制作馅饼或披萨以及制作葡萄酒壶。

- 制作皮革、未切割宝石、吹制玻璃、首饰、陶器、战斗法杖以及纺亚麻或羊毛。

english:
- All non-combat skills are permanently boosted by +12.

- The boost from this Relic does not stack with any other weaker boosts but can be overwritten by a stronger one.

- When using this Relic, skills that are boosted above +12 will over time drain back to the original +12 boost.

- When using this Relic, skills that are drained below +12 will over time restore back to the original +12 boost.
translation:
- 所有非战斗技能永久提升+12。

- 此遗物的增益不与任何其他较弱的增益叠加，但可以被更强的增益覆盖。

- 使用此遗物时，提升超过+12的技能会随时间下降回原始的+12增益。

- 使用此遗物时，下降至低于+12的技能会随时间恢复回原始的+12增益。

english:
- This item will allow you to Teleport to any fairy ring, spirit tree, or tool leprechaun.

- Unlocking this will autocomplete the Tree Gnome Village quest.

- This item ignores wilderness teleport restrictions.

- This item cannot be used to teleport to an area you haven't unlocked.
translation:
- 此物品允许你传送到任何仙女环、灵魂树或工具小妖精。

- 解锁此物品将自动完成地精村庄任务。

- 此物品无视荒野传送限制。

- 此物品不能用于传送到你尚未解锁的区域。

english:
- The following items no longer consume charges when you teleport with them: Master Scroll Book, Ring of Dueling, Ring of Returning, Games Necklace, Amulet of Glory, Skills Necklace, Combat Bracelet, Digsite Pendant, Necklace of Passage, Slayer Ring and Ring of Wealth.

- Upon selecting this Relic you will receive the following items: Ring of Dueling, Ring of Returning, Games Necklace, Skills Necklace, Necklace of Passage and Ring of Wealth.

- This Relic cannot be used to teleport to an area you haven't unlocked.

- If lost these items cannot be reclaimed from the Sage in Lumbridge.

- As this Relic gives you an item it must be unlocked at a Bank.
translation:
- 以下物品在传送时不再消耗充能：大师卷轴书、决斗戒指、回归戒指、游戏项链、荣耀护符、技能项链、战斗手镯、考古挖掘场护符、通行项链、杀戮者戒指和财富戒指。

- 选择此遗物后，你将获得以下物品：决斗戒指、回归戒指、游戏项链、技能项链、通行项链和财富戒指。

- 此遗物不能用于传送到你尚未解锁的区域。

- 如果丢失，这些物品无法从仑桥镇的智者处重新领取。

- 由于此遗物会给予你物品，因此必须在银行解锁。

english:
- Upon selecting this Relic you will receive a Crystal of Memories which when used will teleport you back to the location from where your most recent teleport occurred.

- Your teleport will only be stored if the Crystal of Memories is in your Inventory. You will receive a message in your chatbox if it successfully stored your previous destination.

- The Crystal of Memories will not remember your teleport location if you teleport from an instance.

- There are various other locations this teleport won't save your teleport location, including quest areas, minigames, etc.

- You cannot teleport using the Crystal of Memories whilst you have a follower.

- On death, the Crystal of Memories is destroyed and can be reclaimed from the Sage in Lumbridge.

- As this Relic gives you an item it must be unlocked at a Bank.
translation:
- 选择此遗物后，你将获得一个记忆水晶，使用时会将你传送回最近一次传送发生的位置。

- 只有当记忆水晶在你的背包中时，你的传送位置才会被存储。如果成功存储了你的上一个目的地，你的聊天框中会收到一条消息。

- 如果你从副本中传送，记忆水晶不会记住你的传送位置。

- 还有其他一些位置此传送不会保存你的传送位置，包括任务区域、小游戏等。

- 当你有一个追随者时，你不能使用记忆水晶传送。

- 死亡时，记忆水晶会被摧毁，可以从仑桥镇的智者处重新领取。

- 由于此遗物会给予你物品，因此必须在银行解锁。

english:
- The attack speed of all Ranged weapons is halved (rounded up).

- Your ranged attacks have 100% increased accuracy against creatures and 50% increased accuracy against other players.

- Your Ranged attacks deal 10% more damage.

- You save 90% of your ammunition when firing Ranged weapons. This does not include chinchompas but does include Crystal Bow, Toxic Blowpipe and Craw's Bow charges.
translation:
- 所有远程武器的攻击速度减半（向上取整）。

- 你的远程攻击对生物有100%的额外准确度，对其他玩家有50%的额外准确度。

- 你的远程攻击造成10%的额外伤害。

- 使用远程武器时，你节省90%的弹药。这不包括Chinchompas，但包括水晶弓、有毒的吹箭筒和克劳的弓的充能。

english:
- The attack speed of all melee weapons is halved (rounded up).

- Your melee attacks have 25% increased accuracy.

- You take 15% less damage from all sources.

- Your Hitpoints regenerate at a rate of 4 Hitpoints per minute instead of 1 Hitpoint per minute.
translation:
- 所有近战武器的攻击速度减半（向上取整）。

- 你的近战攻击有25%的额外准确度。

- 你从所有来源受到的伤害减少15%。

- 你的生命值恢复速度变为每分钟4点生命值，而不是每分钟1点。

english:
- The attack speed of all Magic spells and weapons is halved (rounded up).

- With +60 Magic Attack Accuracy (or +20 with Regular or Elite Void Knight Mage Armour) your binding and ice spells ignore accuracy checks against creatures.
Otherwise, your Magic attacks have 125% increased accuracy against creatures and 50% increased accuracy against other players.

- You save 90% of your Runes when casting spells. This includes charges when using powered staves such as the Trident of the Seas, Trident of the Swamp, Sanguinesti Staff and the Enchanted Slayer Staff.
translation:
- 所有魔法法术和武器的攻击速度减半（向上取整）。

- 拥有+60魔法攻击准确度（或使用普通/精英虚空骑士法师盔甲时为+20）时，你的束缚术和冰系法术无视对生物的准确度检定。
否则，你的魔法攻击对生物有125%的额外准确度，对其他玩家有50%的额外准确度。

- 施放法术时，你节省90%的符石。这包括使用充能法杖时的充能，例如海洋三叉戟、沼泽三叉戟、桑格内斯蒂法杖和附魔杀戮者法杖。

english:
- Upon selecting this Relic you will receive an Extradimensional Bag which will act as a second Inventory with 28 slots.

- The Extradimensional Bag can be withdrawn from and deposited into from anywhere.

- The Extradimensional Bag can be opened so that items picked up from the ground will automatically go into it.

- Items can be withdrawn from a Bank directly into the Extradimensional Bag.

- Items cannot be used from within the Extradimensional Bag - they must still be in your Inventory.

- Existing storage items such as a Looting Bags, Herb Sacks and Rune Pouches cannot be stored inside the Extradimensional Bag.

- On death, the Extradimensional Bag is destroyed and can be reclaimed from the Sage in Lumbridge. The contents of the Extradimensional Bag are not destroyed when this happens.

- As this Relic gives you an item it must be unlocked at a Bank.
translation:
- 选择此遗物后，你将获得一个异次元袋，它充当拥有28个格子的第二个背包。

- 异次元袋可以从任何地方存入和取出物品。

- 异次元袋可以打开，以便从地面拾取的物品自动进入其中。

- 物品可以从银行直接存入异次元袋。

- 不能从异次元袋内直接使用物品——它们必须仍在你的背包中。

- 现有的存储物品，如战利品袋、草药袋和符石袋，不能存放在异次元袋内。

- 死亡时，异次元袋会被摧毁，可以从仑桥镇的智者处重新领取。异次元袋内的物品不会因此被摧毁。

- 由于此遗物会给予你物品，因此必须在银行解锁。

english:
- Creatures that drop Clue Scrolls have a 1/15 chance of dropping them. This also applies to Impling Jars.

- Clue Geodes, Clue Nests and Clue Bottles are found 10x more often.

- All Clue Scrolls have the lowest number of steps possible for their tier.

- Every Clue Scroll casket will roll the max amount of rewards it can give. (It can roll the same item more than once) :

- Beginner caskets will roll 3 times.
- Easy caskets will roll 4 times.
- Medium caskets will roll 5 times.
- Hard caskets will roll 6 times.
- Elite caskets will roll 6 times.
- Master caskets will roll 7 times.

- There is a chance when opening a clue casket that you will receive another casket of the same tier. This is more common the lower the casket tier.

- There is also a chance for this additional casket to be upgraded to a tier above the one you opened.
translation:
- 掉落线索卷轴的生物有1/15的几率掉落。这也适用于小精灵罐。

- 线索晶石、线索鸟巢和线索瓶的发现几率提升10倍。

- 所有线索卷轴在其等级中拥有最少的步骤数。

- 每个线索卷轴宝箱都会掷出它能给予的最大奖励次数。（它可以多次掷出同一物品）：

- 初级宝箱掷3次。
- 简单宝箱掷4次。
- 中级宝箱掷5次。
- 困难宝箱掷6次。
- 精英宝箱掷6次。
- 大师宝箱掷7次。

- 打开线索宝箱时，有一定几率获得另一个同等级的宝箱。宝箱等级越低，此几率越高。

- 也有一定几率这个额外的宝箱会升级到比你打开的宝箱高一级。

english:
- When getting a Slayer Task, you can choose which Task to receive. The same Task can be chosen repeatedly.

- Superior Slayer Creatures have a 1/25 chance of spawning.

- Superior Slayer Creatures always drop a Clue Scroll if there is one on their drop table.

- Superior Slayer Creatures now have double the number of rolls on the lesser creatures' droptable. This does not double the number of rolls on the Superior Slayer Creature's unique drop table.
translation:
- 接受杀戮任务时，你可以选择要接受的任务。可以重复选择相同的任务。

- 高级杀戮生物有1/25的几率生成。

- 高级杀戮生物在其掉落表中如果有线索卷轴，则必定掉落一个。

- 高级杀戮生物现在在低级生物的掉落表上有双倍的掷骰次数。这不会使高级杀戮生物独特掉落表上的掷骰次数翻倍。

english:
- Farming cycles occur every 1 minute instead of every 5 minutes. (I.e. Your crops grow 5 times faster than normal.)

- Resources gathered from Farming are multiplied by 2x. Resources generated this way will not provide any additional experience.

- Mixing Potions always results in a 4-dose Potion, and there is a 95% chance to save your secondary ingredient.

- Stats boosted above their base level will no longer drain back down over time.
translation:
- 农业周期变为每1分钟一次，而不是每5分钟一次。（即你的作物生长速度是正常的5倍。）

- 从农业中获得的资源数量翻倍。以这种方式生成的资源不会提供额外经验值。

- 混合药水总是产生4剂药水，并且有95%的几率节省你的副材料。

- 提升到基础等级以上的属性将不再随时间下降。

english:
- Upon selecting this Relic, you will receive a set of Trailblazer Tools which can be used with no requirements. The Pickaxe and Axe will do their respective skilling actions 0.6 seconds quicker than their normal tool equivalent, and the Harpoon increases Fishing speed by 1.2s. All three tools have the same bonuses as Crystal tier tools.

- Any ore mined with the Trailblazer Pickaxe will be smelted into a bar, and Smithing XP given, regardless of Smithing level.

- Any fish caught with the Trailblazer Harpoon will be cooked, and Cooking XP given, regardless of Cooking level. This will work even for fish that don't require a Harpoon to be caught if the Trailblazer Harpoon is equipped or in your Inventory.

- Any logs chopped with the Trailblazer Axe will be burned, and Firemaking XP given, regardless of Firemaking level.

- On death, these tools are lost and can be reclaimed from the Sage in Lumbridge.

- As this Relic gives you an item it must be unlocked at a Bank.
translation:
- 选择此遗物后，你将获得一套开拓者工具，无需任何要求即可使用。镐子和斧头进行相应技能动作的速度比普通工具快0.6秒，鱼叉使钓鱼速度提高1.2秒。所有三种工具都具有与水晶级工具相同的加成。

- 用开拓者镐子开采的任何矿石都将熔炼成金属锭，并获得锻造经验值，无论锻造等级如何。

- 用开拓者鱼叉捕获的任何鱼都将被烹饪，并获得烹饪经验值，无论烹饪等级如何。如果装备了开拓者鱼叉或它在你的背包中，即使是不需要鱼叉捕获的鱼也能生效。

- 用开拓者斧头砍伐的任何原木都将被燃烧，并获得生火经验值，无论生火等级如何。

- 死亡时，这些工具会丢失，可以从仑桥镇的智者处重新领取。

- 由于此遗物会给予你物品，因此必须在银行解锁。

english:
You gain the following benefit to All Skills:

- Each time you gain XP, you gain additional XP equal to 10% of your total level.

- Additional XP given by this Relic is not multiplied by your Leagues XP multiplier.

- Your lowest skill will receive 20% total level XP instead of 10%.

Tip: Equilibrium will trigger per instance of individual xp provided, even if that is multiple times in a single tick. E.g. Production Master will trigger Equilibrium one time per item processed.
translation:
你获得以下所有技能的增益：

- 每次获得经验值时，你额外获得相当于你总等级10%的经验值。

- 此遗物提供的额外经验值不会被你的联盟经验倍率放大。

- 你最低的技能将获得总等级20%的经验值，而不是10%。

提示：均衡效果会在每次提供单独经验值时触发，即使是在同一个游戏刻内多次触发。例如，生产大师会为每个处理的物品触发一次均衡效果。

english:
- All of your attacks have 10% increased accuracy and 10% increased damage.

- Whenever one of your attacks successfully hits, there is a 50% chance that you will restore your Hitpoints and Prayer by 10% of the damage dealt. (Rounded up)

- This Relic does not work for multi-target attacks or Special Attacks.

- This Relic's restoration effect will work with the Scythe of Vitur's initial hit, however, it will only work for its secondary hits if those hits have the same target as the initial hit.
translation:
- 你所有的攻击都有10%的额外准确度和10%的额外伤害。

- 每当你的攻击成功命中时，有50%的几率恢复你造成伤害10%的生命值和祈祷值。（向上取整）

- 此遗物不适用于多目标攻击或战技。

- 此遗物的恢复效果适用于维图尔镰刀的首次命中，但仅当后续命中与首次命中的目标相同时才对其生效。

english:
- All of your attacks have 10% increased accuracy and 10% increased damage.

- Whenever one of your attacks successfully hits, up to 5 additional targets next to your opponent will also be hit. The damage dealt to these additional targets will be 100% of the initial damage.

- This Relic does not work for multi-target attacks or Special Attacks.

- This Relic will only work in a multi-way combat area.

- This Relic does not work with the Scythe of Vitur.
translation:
- 你所有的攻击都有10%的额外准确度和10%的额外伤害。

- 每当你的攻击成功命中时，你对手旁边最多5个额外目标也会被击中。对这些额外目标造成的伤害为初始伤害的100%。

- 此遗物不适用于多目标攻击或战技。

- 此遗物仅在多向战斗区域中有效。

- 此遗物不适用于维图尔镰刀。

english:
- All of your attacks have 10% increased accuracy and 10% increased damage.

- Every 30 seconds, your Special Attack energy is restored by 30% rather than the usual 10%.

- Special Attacks that would normally have an energy cost of more than 20% now only cost 20% instead.
translation:
- 你所有的攻击都有10%的额外准确度和10%的额外伤害。

- 每30秒，你的战技能量恢复30%，而不是通常的10%。

- 通常能量消耗超过20%的战技现在只需消耗20%。

english: Kill the Royal Titans without taking any avoidable damage. This includes damage from any melee attacks, explosions from the ice elemental or fire elemental, any icicle or fire spawn, any jump attacks or the ice or fire pulse attack.
translation: 在不承受任何可避免伤害的情况下击杀皇家泰坦。可避免伤害包括：任何近战攻击、冰元素或火元素的爆炸、任何冰柱或火焰幼体、任何跳跃攻击或冰/火脉冲攻击。

english: Kill one Titan at a time, without attacking the other.
translation: 一次只攻击一个泰坦，不攻击另一个。

english: Kill the Royal Titans in less than 1:30 minutes.
translation: 在1分30秒内击杀皇家泰坦。

english: Kill the Royal Titans 15 times without leaving the area. If a player joins the fight, the current streak will be reset to 0. If a player leaves the fight, the task will be failed and a new instance will need to be created.
translation: 在不离开区域的情况下连续击杀皇家泰坦15次。如果有玩家加入战斗，当前连续击杀计数将重置为0。如果有玩家离开战斗，任务将失败，需要创建新的副本。

english: Kill the Royal Titans without attacking any elementals.
translation: 在不攻击任何元素的情况下击杀皇家泰坦。

english: Kill the Royal Titans while extinguishing all fires and melting all icicles before they dissipate naturally.
translation: 在击杀皇家泰坦时，扑灭所有火焰并融化所有冰柱，不让它们自然消散。

translation: 完成库兰德王国与凯博斯成就日记

translation: 单人完成泽里克圣所且不死亡

translation: 单人完成泽里克圣所：挑战模式且不死亡

translation: 启用后，当你解锁新的音乐曲目时，聊天框中会显示一条消息。

translation: 启用后，当玩家使用聊天效果时，这些效果会显示出来。

translation: 启用后，在聊天框上方显示你的私信。

translation: 启用后，私聊消息会显示在聊天框下方。

translation: 在聊天中显示一条消息，告知你有贵重物品掉落。这基于你设定的阈值。

english: If an item drops that is worth more than this value, a message will be shown in chat to let you know.
translation: 如果掉落的物品价值超过此数值，聊天中会显示一条消息通知你。

translation: 你必须开启战利品掉落通知才能更改此设置。

english: If you go to drop an item that is worth more than this value, a warning will appear.

translation: 启用后，如果你使用透明聊天框，可以透过它点击。

translation: 启用后，如果你左键点击有多个选项的地方，点击将视为右键点击。

translation: 启用后，如果你点击的位置有多个选项，点击将视为长按。

translation: 启用后，按住鼠标中键可以移动镜头。

english: Moves the pet options lower down in the options menu, this stops your left click on the pet being Talk-to.

english: Moves the pet options lower down in the options menu, this stops your tap on the pet being Talk-to.
translation: 将宠物选项在菜单中下移，防止点击宠物时默认执行对话操作。

translation: 启用后，针对其他玩家的辅助法术可以对你施放。

translation: 启用后，在使用此传送前显示警告。

translation: 改变所有界面元素的大小。使用“输入”右键选项可以在完整范围内选择任意数字。

english: Change the size of all interface elements. Use the 'Input' option by tapping and holding to pick any number within the full range.
translation: 更改所有界面元素的大小。使用'输入'选项，通过长按并拖动来选择范围内的任意数值。

translation: 显示最后幸存者中雾的选定颜色。

english: When enabled, shows your timers to the nearest tenth of a second.
translation: 启用后，以十分之一秒的精度显示你的计时器。

translation: 启用后，在适用时将计时器按小时分隔。

translation: 在不离开弗萨尼之梦的情况下连续击杀弗萨尼的梦魇5次。

english: When enabled, on death in eligible areas, food & potions will be dropped as a pile of supplies where you died, rather than going to a gravestone.
translation: 启用后，在符合条件的区域死亡时，食物和药水会作为一堆补给品掉落在你死亡的地方，而不是进入墓碑。

在卡姆多萨尔对抗魔像时，

translation: 以下选项控制在不透明聊天框中显示聊天讯息的颜色。

translation: 限制氏族大厅仅限主世界使用。

translation: 限制大厅内允许进入的人数。
