english: Minimum rank required to edit any of these permissions. To edit a permission, a clan member must satisfy this rank, or whatever rank the permission currently requires, whichever is higher.
translation: 编辑任何这些权限所需的最低职位等级。要编辑权限，氏族成员必须满足此等级，或该权限当前要求的等级，以较高者为准。

english: Rank required to edit the clan's public profile, such as its home world and its listed interests.
translation: 编辑氏族公开资料（如常用世界和列出的兴趣）所需的职位等级。

english: Rank required to assign ranks to subordinate clan members. A clan member cannot edit more senior members' ranks, nor assign a rank higher than their own rank.
translation: 为下级氏族成员分配职位所需的等级。氏族成员不能编辑更高级成员的职位，也不能分配高于自身等级的职位。

english: Rank required to set the titles used for ranks within this clan.
translation: 设置氏族内职位头衔所需的职位等级。

english: Rank required to expel subordinate clan members from the clan.
translation: 将下级氏族成员逐出氏族所需的职位等级。

english: Rank required to admit other players into the clan, and to list the clan on the public Recruitment Board.
translation: 接纳其他玩家加入氏族，以及在公开招募板上列出氏族所需的职位等级。

english: Rank required to edit the icons and colour of the clan cape and vexillum.
translation: 编辑氏族披风和旗帜的图标和颜色所需的职位等级。

english: Rank required to talk in the clan's channel.
translation: 在氏族频道发言所需的职位等级。

english: Rank required to kick guests temporarily from the clan's channel.
translation: 暂时将访客踢出氏族频道所需的职位等级。

english: Rank required to ban guests permanently from the clan's channel, or to unban previously banned players.
translation: 永久封禁访客离开氏族频道，或解禁先前被封禁玩家所需的职位等级。

english: Guests may listen in the clan's chat channel. The separate 'Talk in chat' permission controls whether they may talk.
translation: 访客可以收听氏族的聊天频道。单独的“聊天发言”权限控制他们是否可以发言。

english: Minimum combat level required for a new guest to join the clan's channel. Changing the requirement will not expel existing guests.
translation: 新访客加入氏族频道所需的最低战斗等级。更改要求不会驱逐现有访客。

english: Minimum skill total required for a new guest to join the clan's channel. Changing the requirement will not expel existing guests.
translation: 新访客加入氏族频道所需的最低技能总等级。更改要求不会驱逐现有访客。

english: Minimum quest points required for a new guest to join the clan's channel. Changing the requirement will not expel existing guests.
translation: 新访客加入氏族频道所需的最低任务点数。更改要求不会驱逐现有访客。

english: Iron status required for a new guest to join the clan's channel. Changing the requirement will not expel existing guests.
translation: 新访客加入氏族频道所需的铁人状态。更改要求不会驱逐现有访客。

english: Rank required to deposit coins into the clan's coffer.
translation: 向氏族保险箱存入金币所需的职位等级。

english: Rank required to withdraw coins from the clan's coffer.
translation: 从氏族保险箱提取金币所需的职位等级。

english: Rank required to create, edit or cancel events.
translation: 创建、编辑或取消活动所需的职位等级。

english: Rank required to send or receive challenges on behalf of the clan at Clan Wars.
translation: 在氏族战争中代表氏族发送或接收挑战所需的职位等级。

english: Rank required to enter the clan hall.
translation: 进入氏族大厅所需的职位等级。

english: Rank required to edit aspects of the clan hall.
translation: 编辑氏族大厅各方面所需的职位等级。

english: The Wardens will become unstoppable. Floor slams are more frequent, phantoms attack faster, and tiles are removed more frequently during their final phase.
translation: 典狱长将变得势不可挡。地板猛击更频繁，幻影攻击更快，在最后阶段瓷砖被移除得更频繁。

english: Your hitpoints restore 15X faster than normal.
translation: 你的生命值恢复速度是正常的 15 倍。

english: Determines which type of music area to use when using area music mode. Modern areas primarily follow natural boundaries, whereas classic areas are mostly square. Modern areas are also typically larger and often have multiple music tracks assigned to them, whereas classic areas mostly only have one music track per area.
translation: 决定在使用区域音乐模式时使用哪种类型的音乐区域。现代区域主要遵循自然边界，而经典区域大多是方形的。现代区域通常也更大，并且通常分配有多首音乐曲目，而经典区域每个区域大多只有一首音乐曲目。

english: Show health overlay,hide health overlay,boss health overlay,Advanced Display Settings,health,hitpoints,hp,overlay,show,hide,enemy,boss
translation: 显示生命值覆盖层，隐藏生命值覆盖层，首领生命值覆盖层，高级显示设置，生命值，生命值，血量，覆盖层，显示，隐藏，敌人，首领

english: When enabled, fighting certain bosses will display a larger health overlay.
translation: 启用后，与某些Boss战斗时会显示更大的生命值覆盖层。

english: Show health overlay,hide health overlay,health overlay,Advanced Display Settings,health,hitpoints,hp,overlay,show,hide,enemy
translation: 显示生命值覆盖层，隐藏生命值覆盖层，生命值覆盖层，高级显示设置，生命值，生命值，血量，覆盖层，显示，隐藏，敌人

english: When enabled, fighting any enemies will display a small health overlay.
translation: 启用后，与任何敌人战斗时会显示一个小的生命值覆盖层。

english: When enabled, hold shift and right-click the ground to place highlights.
translation: 启用后，按住Shift并右键点击地面以放置高亮。

english: What colour your marked tiles will show up as.
translation: 你标记的瓷砖将显示为什么颜色。

english: When enabled, whatever action you have highlighted in game will be shown as a tooltip.
translation: 启用后，你在游戏中高亮的任何操作都会显示为工具提示。

english: When enabled, whatever action you have highlighted in game will be shown in the top-left of your screen.
translation: 启用后，你在游戏中高亮的任何操作都会显示在屏幕左上角。

english: Used to limit the amount of frames that are drawn per second.
translation: 用于限制每秒绘制的帧数。

english: Used to limit the amount of frames that are drawn per second. Reducing this can increase your battery life.
translation: 用于限制每秒绘制的帧数。降低此数值可以延长电池续航。

english: When enabled, adds a regeneration timer around your HP and special attack orbs on your minimap.
translation: 启用后，在小地图上的生命值和战技球周围添加恢复计时器。
数据球 - 恢复指示器

english: When enabled, the Chambers of Xeric helper will be shown when in a Chambers of Xeric raid.
translation: 启用后，在泽里克圣所突袭中会显示泽里克圣所助手。

english: When enabled, timestamps will be shown alongside messages that appear in your chat box. These can be displayed in either server time (as the game sees it) or local time (as your device sees it).
translation: 启用后，时间戳会与聊天框中出现的消息一起显示。这些时间戳可以以服务器时间（游戏所见）或本地时间（你的设备所见）显示。

english: When enabled, fishing spots will be highlighted and the fish the spot gives will be shown above the fishing spot. You can hover over the fish shown to see every fish that can be caught at the spot.
translation: 启用后，钓鱼点会被高亮，并且该钓鱼点能钓到的鱼会显示在钓鱼点上方。你可以将鼠标悬停在显示的鱼上，查看该钓鱼点可以钓到的所有鱼。

english: When enabled, fishing spot indicators will only be shown if you have a tool that can be used at the fishing spot. When disabled, show fishing spot indicators regardless of tools.
translation: 启用后，仅当你拥有可在该钓鱼点使用的工具时，才会显示钓鱼点指示器。禁用时，无论是否有工具，都显示钓鱼点指示器。

english: You can only change this setting if fishing spot indicators are enabled.
translation: 只有启用了钓鱼点指示器，你才能更改此设置。
钓鱼点指示器 - 仅工具

english: When enabled, hovering over a fishing spot indicator will show all the fish the spot has to offer.
translation: 启用后，将鼠标悬停在钓鱼点指示器上会显示该钓鱼点能提供的所有鱼。

english: Fishing spot indicators - Mouse over tooltip
translation: 钓鱼点指示器 - 鼠标悬停提示

english: Show attack style,hide attack style,combat style
translation: 显示攻击风格，隐藏攻击风格，战斗风格

english: When enabled, your active attack style will be displayed on the top-level interface.
translation: 启用后，你当前的攻击风格会显示在顶层界面上。

english: When enabled, shows the buff bar to the player with any enabled buffs.
translation: 启用后，向玩家显示增益栏，其中包含所有已启用的增益效果。

english: When enabled, shows a tooltip when you hover over a buff with the mouse.
translation: 启用后，当鼠标悬停在增益效果上时会显示工具提示。

english: When enabled, show a tooltips for a buff when you tap it.
translation: 启用后，点击增益效果时会显示提示信息。

english: Kill the Royal Titans without losing any prayer points.
translation: 在不损失任何祈祷点的情况下击杀皇家泰坦。

english: When enabled, shows the home teleport cooldown.
translation: 启用后，显示回家传送的冷却时间。

english: When enabled, shows the minigame teleport cooldown.
translation: 启用后，显示小游戏传送的冷却时间。

english: When enabled, shows how long you are teleport blocked for.
translation: 启用后，显示你被传送封锁的剩余时间。

english: When enabled, shows how long you are charged for.
translation: 启用后，显示你的充能剩余时间。

english: When enabled, shows how long until you can use the altar inside of godwars again to regain prayer.
translation: 启用后，显示距离你再次使用战神祭坛恢复祈祷的剩余时间。

english: When enabled, shows how long until you can use the Dragonfire and Wyvern shields special again.
translation: 启用后，显示距离你再次使用龙火和翼龙盾战技的剩余时间。

english: When enabled, shows how long until you can use the Imbued or Saturated heart buff again.
translation: 启用后，显示距离你再次使用注魔或完全魔能之心增益的剩余时间。

english: When enabled, shows how long until you can cast Vengeance again.
translation: 启用后，显示距离你再次施放复仇术的剩余时间。

english: When enabled, shows if you currently have Vengeance cast on you.
translation: 启用后，显示你当前是否被施加了复仇术。

english: When enabled, shows how long the Stamina effect will last.
translation: 启用后，显示体力效果将持续多久。

english: When enabled, shows how long the Prayer enhance effect will last.
translation: 启用后，显示祈祷增强效果将持续多久。

english: When enabled, shows how long the Overload effect will last.
translation: 启用后，显示过量药剂效果将持续多久。

english: When enabled, shows how long the Magic imbue effect will last.
translation: 启用后，显示魔法注魔效果将持续多久。

english: When enabled, shows how long the Abyssal sire stun duration will last.
translation: 启用后，显示深渊之主的眩晕术持续时间。
深渊之主眩晕持续时间

english: When enabled, shows how long you are frozen/entangled for.
translation: 启用后，显示你被冰冻/缠绕的剩余时间。

english: When enabled, shows how long the Staff of the dead special will last.
translation: 启用后，显示死亡法杖战技将持续多久。

english: Staff of the dead special duration
translation: 死亡法杖特殊持续时间

english: When enabled, shows how long Divine potions will last.
translation: 启用后，显示神圣药水将持续多久。

english: When enabled, shows how long Antifire potions will last.
translation: 启用后，显示防火药水将持续多久。

english: When enabled, shows how long Anti-venom and poison potions will last.
translation: 启用后，显示抗毒和毒药药水将持续多久。
抗毒与毒药水持续时间

english: When enabled, the client will always be on top of other windows/applications.
translation: 启用后，客户端将始终位于其他窗口/应用程序之上。

english: When enabled, shows modified stats as an overlay.
translation: 启用后，以覆盖层形式显示修改后的属性。

english: When enabled, shows a tooltip when hovering over a modified stat overlay with the mouse.
translation: 启用后，当鼠标悬停在修改后的属性覆盖层上时会显示工具提示。

english: When enabled, shows a tooltip when tapping on a modified stat overlay.
translation: 启用后，点击已修改的属性叠加层时会显示提示信息。

english: Show tooltips for modified stat overlays
translation: 显示修改属性覆盖层提示

english: Number of modified stats to show
When enabled, displays the difference between the stat and its base value. When disabled, displays the current stat value.
translation: 启用后，显示属性与其基础值之间的差值。禁用时，显示当前属性值。

english: Kill the Royal Titans while having them kill a total of 10 elementals.
translation: 在击杀皇家泰坦时，让它们总共杀死10个元素。

english: Rank required to receive notifications when other players join or leave the clan.
translation: 接收其他玩家加入或离开氏族通知所需的职位等级。

english: Determines how your quest list should be sorted.
translation: 决定你的任务列表应如何排序。

english: Determines how quests that you lack the requirements for are shown.
translation: 决定如何显示你缺少前置条件的任务。

english: Minimum value for notable monster loot to trigger a clan notification message.
translation: 触发氏族通知消息所需的显著怪物战利品最低价值。

english: Determines how quests that you lack the recommended stats for are shown.
translation: 决定如何显示你缺少推荐属性的任务。

english: When enabled, shows if Corruption is active for and how long until it can be cast again.
translation: 启用后，显示腐化术是否激活以及距离再次施放的剩余时间。

english: When enabled, shows how long Mark of Darkness is active.
translation: 启用后，显示黑暗印记的激活持续时间。

english: When enabled, shows how long Shadow Veil is active for and how long until it can be cast again.
translation: 启用后，显示暗影帷幕的激活持续时间以及距离再次施放的剩余时间。
暗影帷幕激活与持续时间

english: When enabled, shows how long Death Charge is active for and how long until it can be cast again.
translation: 启用后，显示死亡充能的激活持续时间以及距离再次施放的剩余时间。
死亡充能激活与持续时间

english: When enabled, shows how long Ward of Arceuus is active for and how long until it can be cast again.
translation: 启用后，显示阿西乌斯结界的激活持续时间以及距离再次施放的剩余时间。

english: Ward of Arceuus active and duration
translation: 阿西乌斯结界激活与持续时间

english: When enabled, shows how long your Thrall is active for and how long until it can be cast again.
translation: 启用后，显示你的仆从剩余活跃时间以及再次召唤的冷却时间。

english: Kill General Graardor whilst he is immobilized.
translation: 在格拉多尔将军被定身时击杀他。

english: Kill General Graardor without him attacking any players.
translation: 在不被格拉多尔将军攻击任何玩家的情况下击杀他。

english: Finish off General Graardor whilst all of his bodyguards are dead.
translation: 在格拉多尔将军的所有护卫都死亡后，给他最后一击。

english: Kill General Graardor 2 times consecutively in a privately rented instance without taking any damage from his bodyguards.
translation: 在私人租赁的副本中，连续两次击杀格拉多尔将军，且不承受来自他护卫的任何伤害。

english: Kill General Graardor in a privately rented instance without taking any damage from the boss or bodyguards.
translation: 在私人租赁的副本中，不承受来自首领或护卫的任何伤害，击杀格拉多尔将军。

english: Kill General Graardor 15 times in a privately rented instance without leaving the room.
translation: 在私人租赁的副本中，不离开房间，击杀格拉多尔将军15次。
打开巴罗斯墓穴的宝箱10次。

english: Kill Dharok, Verac, Torag and Guthan without letting them attack you with melee.
translation: 击杀达洛克、维拉克、托拉格和古坦，且不让他们用近战攻击到你。

english: Kill all six Barrows Brothers and loot the Barrows chest without taking any damage from any of the brothers.
translation: 击杀全部六位巴罗斯兄弟并打开巴罗斯宝箱，且不承受来自任何兄弟的伤害。

english: Kill any Barrows Brother using only magical damage.
translation: 仅使用魔法伤害击杀任意一位巴罗斯兄弟。

english: Kill Karil using only damage dealt by special attacks.
translation: 仅使用战技造成的伤害击杀卡里尔。

english: Kill all six Barrows Brothers and loot the Barrows chest without ever having more than 0 prayer points.
translation: 击杀全部六位巴罗斯兄弟并打开巴罗斯宝箱，且全程祈祷点从未超过0。
击杀一只石化蜥蜴骑士。
打开布赖奥菲塔的宝箱一次。
打开布赖奥菲塔的宝箱5次。

english: Kill Bryophyta with the Protect from Magic prayer active.
translation: 在激活魔法防护祈祷的情况下击杀布赖奥菲塔。

english: Kill all 3 of Bryophyta's growthlings within 3 seconds of the first one dying.
translation: 在第一个布赖奥菲塔的幼体死亡后的3秒内，击杀所有3个幼体。

english: Kill Bryophyta without suffering any poison damage.
translation: 在不承受任何中毒伤害的情况下击杀布赖奥菲塔。

english: Kill Bryophyta with either poison or venom being the final source of damage.
translation: 以中毒或剧毒作为最终伤害来源击杀布赖奥菲塔。

english: Kill Bryophyta on a free to play world.
translation: 在免费游玩世界中击杀布赖奥菲塔。

english: Kill Skotizo with no altars active.
translation: 在没有激活任何祭坛的情况下击杀斯科蒂佐。

english: Kill Skotizo without taking any damage.
Kill Skotizo with a demonbane weapon equipped.
translation: 装备着斩魔武器击杀斯科蒂佐。

english: Kill Skotizo without equipping a demonbane weapon.
translation: 在不装备斩魔武器的情况下击杀斯科蒂佐。

english: Kill Skotizo with the final source of damage being a Chinchompa explosion.
translation: 以炸弹鼠的爆炸作为最终伤害来源击杀斯科蒂佐。

english: Kill Cerberus without any of the Summoned Souls being spawned.
translation: 在不召唤出任何召唤之魂的情况下击杀刻耳柏洛斯。

english: Kill Cerberus after successfully negating 6 or more attacks from Summoned Souls.
translation: 在成功抵消召唤之魂的6次或更多攻击后，击杀刻耳柏洛斯。

english: Kill Cerberus without taking damage from any lava pools.
translation: 在不承受任何熔岩池伤害的情况下击杀刻耳柏洛斯。

english: Kill Cerberus without taking any melee damage.
translation: 在不承受任何近战伤害的情况下击杀刻耳柏洛斯。

english: Kill the Chaos Elemental without it unequipping any of your items.
translation: 在混沌元素没有卸下你任何装备的情况下击杀它。

english: Kill the Chaos Elemental without taking any damage from its attacks.
translation: 在不承受混沌元素任何攻击伤害的情况下击杀它。

english: Kill the Chaos Fanatic without anyone being hit by his explosion attack.
translation: 在没有人被混沌狂热者的爆炸攻击击中的情况下击杀他。

english: Kill the Chaos Fanatic 10 times without drinking any potion which restores prayer or leaving the Wilderness.
translation: 在不饮用任何恢复祈祷的药水且不离开荒野的情况下，击杀混沌狂热者10次。

english: Kill the Corporeal Beast without anyone killing the dark core or taking damage from the dark core.
translation: 在没有人击杀黑暗核心或承受黑暗核心伤害的情况下击杀实体巨兽。

english: Finish off the Corporeal Beast with a Halberd special attack.
translation: 使用戟的战技给实体巨兽最后一击。
击杀疯狂的考古学家10次。

english: Kill the Crazy Archaeologist with only magical attacks.
translation: 仅使用魔法攻击击杀疯狂的考古学家。

english: Kill the Crazy Archaeologist without anyone being hit by his "Rain of Knowledge" attack.
translation: 在没有人被疯狂的考古学家的“知识之雨”攻击击中的情况下击杀他。

english: Finish off a Demonic Gorilla with a demonbane weapon.
translation: 使用斩魔武器给恶魔大猩猩最后一击。
击杀精神错乱的考古学家10次。

english: Kill the Deranged Archaeologist with only magical attacks.
translation: 仅使用魔法攻击击杀精神错乱的考古学家。

english: Kill the Deranged Archaeologist without anyone being hit by his "Learn to Read" attack.
translation: 在没有人被精神错乱的考古学家的“学会阅读”攻击击中的情况下击杀他。

english: Kill Galvek in less than 3 minutes.
translation: 在3分钟内击杀加尔维克。

english: Kill the Grotesque Guardians without taking damage from Dusk's blinding attack.
translation: 在不承受怪诞守卫者.黄昏的致盲攻击伤害的情况下击杀怪诞守卫者。

english: Kill the Grotesque Guardians without taking damage from Dusk's prison attack.
translation: 在不承受怪诞守卫者.黄昏的囚禁攻击伤害的情况下击杀怪诞守卫者。

english: Kill the Grotesque Guardians without taking damage from Dawn's rockfall attack.
translation: 在不承受怪诞守卫者.黎明的落石攻击伤害的情况下击杀怪诞守卫者。

english: Kill the Grotesque Guardians without letting Dawn receive any healing from her orbs.
translation: 在不让怪诞守卫者.黎明从其能量球中获得任何治疗的情况下击杀怪诞守卫者。

translation: 击杀苏加丁蒂少女，且团队中无人受到以下伤害：血裔的投射物和血裔的轨迹。同时，不得在未开启祈祷时受到伤害，也不得让任何尼洛卡斯.马托梅诺斯治疗少女。

translation: 击杀尼洛卡斯.瓦西利亚斯，且团队中无人使用错误的攻击方式攻击任何尼洛卡斯，不让任何柱子倒塌，并且在未开启祈祷时不被尼洛卡斯.瓦西利亚斯的任何攻击击中。

english: Complete the Theatre of Blood (Trio) in less than 20 minutes.
translation: 在20分钟内完成血腥剧场（三人）。

translation: 在17分30秒内完成血腥剧场（三人）。

english: Kill Vorkath with only your fists.
Kill Vorkath in less than 1 minute and 15 seconds.
Kill Vorkath in less than 54 seconds.
Kill Vorkath 10 times without leaving his area.
translation: 击杀沃卡斯10次，且不离开他的区域。

english: Heal a pyromancer after they have fallen.
translation: 在火术士倒下后治疗他们。

english: Repair a brazier which has been destroyed by the Wintertodt.
translation: 修复一个被冬将军摧毁的火盆。

english: Subdue the Wintertodt without allowing all 4 braziers to be broken at the same time.
translation: 制服冬将军，且不让全部4个火盆同时被破坏。

english: Subdue the Wintertodt without any of the Pyromancers falling.
translation: 制服冬将军，且没有任何火术士倒下。

english: Subdue the Wintertodt with four pieces of warm equipment equipped.
translation: 在装备四件保暖装备的情况下制服冬将军。

english: Subdue the Wintertodt after earning 3000 or more points.
translation: 在获得3000或更多点数后制服冬将军。

english: Complete the Chambers of Xeric: Challenge Mode 10 times.
translation: 完成泽里克圣所：挑战模式10次。

english: Complete a Chambers of Xeric: Challenge mode raid without anyone dying.
translation: 完成一次泽里克圣所：挑战模式突袭，且无人死亡。

english: Complete a Chambers of Xeric Challenge mode (Solo) raid without dying.
translation: 完成一次泽里克圣所挑战模式（单人）突袭，且不死亡。

english: Complete a Chambers of Xeric Challenge mode raid in the target time.
translation: 在目标时间内完成一次泽里克圣所挑战模式突袭。

english: Complete a Chambers of Xeric: Challenge Mode (Solo) in less than 45 minutes.
translation: 在45分钟内完成一次泽里克圣所：挑战模式（单人）。

english: Complete a Chambers of Xeric: Challenge Mode (Solo) in less than 38 minutes and 30 seconds.
translation: 在38分30秒内完成一次泽里克圣所：挑战模式（单人）。
泽里克圣所：CM（5人）竞速追逐者

english: Complete a Chambers of Xeric: Challenge Mode (5-scale) in less than 30 minutes.
translation: 在30分钟内完成一次泽里克圣所：挑战模式（五人）。
泽里克圣所：CM（5人）竞速跑者

english: Complete a Chambers of Xeric: Challenge Mode (Trio) in less than 35 minutes.
translation: 在35分钟内完成一次泽里克圣所：挑战模式（三人）。

english: Complete the Chambers of Xeric 25 times.
Kill the Vanguards without them resetting their health.
translation: 击杀先锋，且它们未重置生命值。

english: Kill the Vanguards within 10 seconds of the first one dying.
translation: 在第一个先锋死亡后的10秒内击杀所有先锋。

english: Clear the Tightrope room without Killing any Deathly Mages or Deathly Rangers.
translation: 在不击杀任何死亡法师或死亡游侠的情况下清理钢索房间。

english: Complete a Chambers of Xeric solo raid with more than 40,000 points.
translation: 以超过40,000点数完成一次泽里克圣所单人突袭。

english: Kill the Great Olm in a solo raid without letting him use any of the following special attacks in his second to last phase: Crystal Burst, Lightning Walls, Teleportation Portals or left-hand autohealing.
translation: 在单人突袭中击杀大奥姆，且不让他倒数第二阶段使用以下任何特殊攻击：水晶爆裂、闪电墙、传送门或左手自动治疗。

english: Kill the Muttadile without letting her or her baby recover hitpoints from the meat tree.
translation: 击杀穆塔迪尔，且不让她或她的幼崽从血肉之树恢复生命值。

english: Kill the Abyssal Portal without forcing Vespula to land.
translation: 在不迫使维斯普拉降落的情况下击杀深渊传送门。

english: Kill Vasa Nistirio before he performs his teleport attack for the second time.
translation: 在瓦萨.尼斯蒂里奥第二次施展传送攻击前将其击杀。

english: Kill Tekton before he returns to his anvil for a second time after the fight begins.
translation: 在战斗开始后，泰克顿第二次返回他的铁砧前将其击杀。

english: Receive kill-credit for a Stone Guardian without taking damage from falling rocks.
translation: 在不受到落石伤害的情况下获得石头守护者的击杀记录。

english: Complete a Chambers of Xeric raid without anyone dying.
translation: 完成一次泽里克圣所突袭，且无人死亡。

english: Complete a Chambers of Xeric solo raid without dying.
translation: 完成一次泽里克圣所单人突袭，且不死亡。

english: Receive kill-credit for a Lizardman Shaman without taking damage from any shamans in the room.
translation: 在不受到房间内任何蜥蜴人萨满伤害的情况下获得蜥蜴人萨满的击杀记录。

english: Clear the Crystal Crabs room without wasting an orb after the first crystal has been activated.
translation: 在第一个水晶被激活后，不浪费任何宝珠的情况下清理水晶螃蟹房间。

english: Receive kill-credit for the Ice Demon without taking any damage.
translation: 在不受到任何伤害的情况下获得冰魔的击杀记录。

english: Kill the Great Olm in a solo raid without taking damage from any of the following: Teleport portals, Fire Walls, Healing pools, Crystal Bombs, Crystal Burst or Prayer Orbs. You also cannot let his claws regenerate or take damage from the same acid pool back to back.
translation: 在单人突袭中击杀大奥姆，且不受到以下任何伤害：传送门、火墙、治疗池、水晶炸弹、水晶爆裂或祈祷宝珠。你也不能让他的爪子再生，或连续受到同一个酸池的伤害。

english: Kill the Great Olm in a trio raid without any team member taking damage from any of the following: Teleport portals, Fire Walls, Healing pools, Crystal Bombs, Crystal Burst or Prayer Orbs. You also cannot let his claws regenerate or take damage from the same acid pool back to back.
translation: 在三人突袭中击杀大奥姆，且没有任何团队成员受到以下任何伤害：传送门、火墙、治疗池、水晶炸弹、水晶爆裂或祈祷宝珠。你们也不能让他的爪子再生，或连续受到同一个酸池的伤害。

english: Kill Tekton without taking any damage.
translation: 在不受到任何伤害的情况下击杀泰克顿。

english: Receive kill-credit for the Ice Demon without activating the Protect from Range prayer.
translation: 在不激活远程防护祈祷的情况下获得冰魔的击杀记录。

english: Finish off the Ice Demon with a fire spell.
translation: 使用火系法术终结冰魔。

english: Complete a Chambers of Xeric (Solo) in less than 21 minutes.
translation: 在21分钟内完成一次泽里克圣所（单人）。
泽里克圣所（5人）竞速追逐者

english: Complete a Chambers of Xeric (5-scale) in less than 15 minutes.
translation: 在15分钟内完成一次泽里克圣所（五人）。
泽里克圣所（5人）竞速跑者

english: Complete a Chambers of Xeric (5-scale) in less than 12 minutes and 30 seconds.
translation: 在12分30秒内完成一次泽里克圣所（五人）。

english: Complete a Chambers of Xeric (Trio) in less than 16 minutes and 30 seconds.
translation: 在16分30秒内完成一次泽里克圣所（三人）。

english: Kill Zalcano 5 times in a row without leaving or getting hit by the following: Falling rocks, rock explosions, Zalcano powering up, or standing in a red symbol.
translation: 连续击杀扎尔卡诺5次，且不离开或不被以下击中：落石、岩石爆炸、扎尔卡诺充能，或站在红色符号中。

english: Receive imbued tephra from a golem.
translation: 从魔像处获得注魔火山灰。

english: Kill Zalcano as the player who has dealt the most damage to her.
translation: 作为对她造成最多伤害的玩家击杀扎尔卡诺。
击杀克里尔.楚萨罗斯50次。

english: Receive kill-credit for K'ril Tsutsaroth without him using his special attack.
translation: 在克里尔.楚萨罗斯未使用其战技的情况下获得他的击杀记录。

english: Finish off K'ril Tsutsaroth whilst all of his bodyguards are dead.
translation: 在克里尔.楚萨罗斯的所有护卫都死亡时终结他。

english: Defeat K'ril Tsutsaroth in a privately rented instance using only demonbane spells.
translation: 在私人租赁的副本中，仅使用除魔咒语击败克里尔.楚萨罗斯。

english: Kill K'ril Tsutsaroth in a privately rented instance without taking any of his melee hits.
translation: 在私人租赁的副本中击杀克里尔.楚萨罗斯，且不受到他的任何近战攻击。

english: Kill K'ril Tsutsaroth in a privately rented instance without ever being hit by his bodyguards.
translation: 在私人租赁的副本中击杀克里尔.楚萨罗斯，且从未被他的护卫击中。

english: Finish off K'ril Tsutsaroth with a demonbane weapon.
translation: 使用除魔武器终结克里尔.楚萨罗斯。

english: Kill K'ril Tsutsaroth 20 times in a privately rented instance without leaving the room.
translation: 在私人租赁的副本中，不离开房间的情况下击杀克里尔.楚萨罗斯20次。

english: Kill a Jal-Zek within the Inferno.
translation: 在地狱中击杀一个贾尔.泽克。

english: Kill TzKal-Zuk without letting Jal-ImKot dig during any wave in the Inferno.
translation: 击杀特兹卡尔.祖克，且在地狱的任何波次中不让刺蛇钻地。

english: Complete wave 68 of the Inferno within 30 seconds of the first JalTok-Jad dying.
translation: 在第一个贾尔托克.贾德死亡后的30秒内完成地狱的第68波。

english: Kill TzKal-Zuk without being attacked by TzKal-Zuk and without taking damage from a JalTok-Jad.
translation: 击杀特兹卡尔.祖克，且不被特兹卡尔.祖克攻击，也不受到贾尔托克.贾德的伤害。

english: Kill TzKal-Zuk without letting a pillar fall before wave 67.
translation: 在第67波之前，不让任何柱子倒下，击杀特兹卡尔.祖克。

english: Kill TzKal-Zuk without letting your hitpoints fall below 50 during any wave in the Inferno.
translation: 在地狱的任何一波中，不让生命值低于50，击杀特兹卡尔.祖克。

english: Kill TzKal-Zuk without equipping a Twisted Bow within the Inferno.
translation: 在地狱中，不装备扭曲弓，击杀特兹卡尔.祖克。

english: Kill TzKal-Zuk without using any magic spells during any wave in the Inferno.
translation: 在地狱的任何一波中，不使用任何魔法法术，击杀特兹卡尔.祖克。

english: Kill TzKal-Zuk without equipping any range or mage weapons before wave 69.
translation: 在第69波之前，不装备任何远程或魔法武器，击杀特兹卡尔.祖克。

english: Kill TzKal-Zuk without killing the JalTok-Jad which spawns during wave 69.
translation: 不击杀第69波生成的贾尔托克.贾德，击杀特兹卡尔.祖克。

english: Complete the Inferno in less than 65 minutes.
Subdue Tempoross while wearing any variation of the angler outfit.
translation: 穿著任意款式的钓鱼服装，制服海灵。

english: Extinguish at least 5 fires during a single Tempoross fight.
translation: 在一场海灵战斗中，扑灭至少5处火焰。

english: Repair either a mast or a totem pole.
translation: 修复一根桅杆或一个图腾柱。

english: Subdue Tempoross, getting rewarded with 10 reward permits from a single Tempoross fight.
translation: 制服海灵，并在一场战斗中获得10张奖励许可证。

english: Subdue Tempoross alone without getting hit by any fires, torrents or waves.
translation: 独自制服海灵，且不被任何火焰、洪流或波浪击中。

english: Attack Tempoross from both sides by loading both cannons on both ships.
translation: 装填两艘船上的两门大炮，从两侧攻击海灵。
完成特扎尔.凯特.拉克的第二项挑战。
完成特扎尔.凯特.拉克的第四项挑战。
完成特扎尔.凯特.拉克的第六项挑战。

english: Complete TzHaar-Ket-Rak's first challenge in less than 45 seconds.
translation: 在45秒内完成特扎尔.凯特.拉克的第一项挑战。

english: Complete TzHaar-Ket-Rak's third challenge in less than 3 minutes.
translation: 在3分钟内完成特扎尔.凯特.拉克的第三项挑战。

english: Complete TzHaar-Ket-Rak's fifth challenge in less than 5 minutes.
translation: 在5分钟内完成特扎尔.凯特.拉克的第五项挑战。

english: Complete TzHaar-Ket-Rak's second challenge with only melee.
translation: 仅使用近战完成特扎尔.凯特.拉克的第二项挑战。

english: Complete TzHaar-Ket-Rak's fourth challenge with only melee.
translation: 仅使用近战完成特扎尔.凯特.拉克的第四项挑战。

english: Complete TzHaar-Ket-Rak's third challenge without having anything in your inventory.
translation: 在背包空无一物的情况下，完成特扎尔.凯特.拉克的第三项挑战。

english: Complete TzHaar-Ket-Rak's fifth and sixth challenges back to back without failing.
translation: 连续完成特扎尔.凯特.拉克的第五和第六项挑战，且不失败。

english: Complete TzHaar-Ket-Rak's third challenge while using a different attack style for each JalTok-Jad.
translation: 对每个贾尔托克.贾德使用不同的攻击风格，完成特扎尔.凯特.拉克的第三项挑战。

english: Defeat the Maiden of Sugadinti in the Theatre of Blood: Hard Mode without letting blood spawns create more than 15 blood trails.
translation: 在血腥剧场：困难模式中，不让血之生成物制造超过15条血迹，击败苏加丁蒂少女。

english: Defeat the Pestilent Bloat in the Theatre of Blood: Hard Mode with at least 3 people in the room, without anyone in your team standing on top of each other.
translation: 在血腥剧场：困难模式中，房间内至少有3人，且队伍中无人重叠站位，击败瘟疫肿胀怪。

english: In the Theatre of Blood: Hard Mode, complete the Nylocas room without ever letting the Nylocas Prinkipas change styles.
translation: 在血腥剧场：困难模式中，完成尼洛卡斯蛛房间，且不让尼洛卡斯.普林基帕斯改变风格。

english: Defeat Sotetseg in the Theatre of Blood: Hard Mode without anyone sharing the ball with anyone, without anyone dying, and without anyone taking damage from any of its other attacks or stepping on the wrong tile in the maze.
translation: 在血腥剧场：困难模式中，无人传球、无人死亡、无人受到索特塞格其他攻击伤害，也无人踩错迷宫中的瓷砖，击败索特塞格。

english: Defeat Xarpus in the Theatre of Blood: Hard Mode after letting the exhumeds heal him to full health and without anyone in the team taking any damage.
translation: 在血腥剧场：困难模式中，让掘尸者将扎普斯治疗至满血，且队伍中无人受到任何伤害，击败扎普斯。

english: Defeat Verzik Vitur in the Theatre of Blood: Hard Mode without anyone in your team causing a Nylocas to explode by getting too close.
translation: 在血腥剧场：困难模式中，队伍中无人因靠得太近而导致尼洛卡斯蛛爆炸，击败维齐克.维图尔。

english: When Verzik Vitur in the Theatre of Blood: Hard Mode uses her yellow power blast attack while the tornadoes are active, have everyone get through the attack without taking damage. This cannot be completed with one player alive
translation: 在血腥剧场：困难模式中，当维齐克.维图尔在龙卷风活跃时使用黄色能量爆破攻击，让所有人不受伤害地撑过该攻击。此成就无法在仅有一名玩家存活时完成。

english: Defeat Verzik Vitur in the Theatre of Blood: Hard Mode without anyone attacking her with a melee weapon during her third phase.
translation: 在血腥剧场：困难模式中，在维齐克.维图尔的第三阶段，无人使用近战武器攻击她，击败维齐克.维图尔。

english: Complete the Theatre of Blood: Hard Mode within the challenge time, with no deaths and without anyone buying anything from a supply chest.
translation: 在挑战时间内完成血腥剧场：困难模式，无人死亡，且无人从补给箱购买任何物品。

english: Complete the Theatre of Blood: Hard Mode within the challenge time.
translation: 在挑战时间内完成血腥剧场：困难模式。

english: Complete the Theatre of Blood: Hard Mode (Trio) with an overall time of less than 23 minutes.
translation: 以总用时少于23分钟完成血腥剧场：困难模式（三人）。
血腥剧场：困难模式（4人）竞速跑者

english: Complete the Theatre of Blood: Hard Mode (4-scale) with an overall time of less than 21 minutes.
translation: 以总用时少于21分钟完成血腥剧场：困难模式（四人）。

english: Complete the Theatre of Blood: Hard Mode 50 times.
translation: 完成血腥剧场：困难模式50次。

english: Defeat the Maiden of Sugadinti in the Theatre of Blood: Entry Mode without letting any bloodspawn live for longer than 10 seconds.
translation: 在血腥剧场：入门模式中，不让任何血之生成物存活超过10秒，击败苏加丁蒂少女。

english: Defeat the Pestilent Bloat in the Theatre of Blood: Entry Mode with everyone having a salve amulet equipped.
translation: 在血腥剧场：入门模式中，所有人装备萨鲁夫护符，击败瘟疫肿胀怪。

english: In the Theatre of Blood: Entry Mode, enter the Pestilent Bloat room from the opposite side.
translation: 在血腥剧场：入门模式中，从另一侧进入瘟疫肿胀怪的房间。

english: Defeat the Pestilent Bloat in the Theatre of Blood: Entry Mode by using a halberd special attack as your final attack.
translation: 在血腥剧场：入门模式中，使用戟的战技作为最后一击，击败瘟疫肿胀怪。

english: In the Theatre of Blood: Entry Mode, freeze any 4 Nylocas with a single Ice Barrage spell.
translation: 在血腥剧场：入门模式中，用一个冰之弹幕法术冻结任意4只尼洛卡斯蛛。

english: Defeat Sotetseg in the Theatre of Blood: Entry Mode after having split the big ball with your entire team. This must be done with a group size of at least 2.
translation: 在血腥剧场：入门模式中，与全队分担大球后，击败索特塞格。此成就必须在至少2人的队伍中完成。

english: Kill Xarpus in the Theatre of Blood: Entry Mode without him reflecting any damage to anyone.
translation: 在血腥剧场：入门模式中，不让扎普斯反弹任何伤害给任何人，击杀扎普斯。

english: Survive Verzik Vitur's pillar phase in the Theatre of Blood: Entry Mode without losing a single pillar.
translation: 在血腥剧场：入门模式中，不损失任何一根柱子，撑过维齐克.维图尔的柱子阶段。

english: Survive Verzik Vitur's second phase in the Theatre of Blood: Entry Mode without anyone getting bounced by Verzik.
translation: 在血腥剧场：入门模式中，无人被维齐克弹飞，撑过维齐克.维图尔的第二阶段。

english: In the Theatre of Blood: Entry Mode, successfully pass on the green ball to a team mate.
translation: 在血腥剧场：入门模式中，成功将绿色球传给队友。

english: Complete the Theatre of Blood: Entry Mode in less than 17 minutes.
translation: 在17分钟内完成血腥剧场：入门模式。

english: Complete the Theatre of Blood: Entry Mode 1 time.
translation: 完成血腥剧场：入门模式1次。

english: Kill a Hill Giant, Moss Giant and Fire Giant in the Giant Cave within the Shayzien region.
translation: 在谢兹恩城区域的巨人洞穴中，击杀一只丘陵巨人、一只苔藓巨人和一只火焰巨人。

english: Deal 100 damage to creatures using undead thralls.
translation: 使用不死奴仆对生物造成100点伤害。

english:
The Chambers of Xeric is a large cave system found underneath Mount Quidamortem in the Kebos Lowlands.

The Chambers of Xeric will scale to the number of players (1-100) and their stats.

The Chambers of Xeric has a challenge mode difficulty setting for more experienced raiders.

Attack Styles - Magic, Ranged, Melee, Special
Immunities - Poison, Venom
Slayer Categories - None
translation:
泽里克圣所是位于凯博斯低地奎达莫特姆山下的一个大型洞穴系统。

泽里克圣所会根据玩家人数（1-100）及其属性进行缩放。

泽里克圣所拥有挑战模式难度设置，适合更有经验的突袭者。

攻击风格 - 魔法、远程、近战、战技
免疫 - 毒、剧毒
杀戮类别 - 无

english:
The Theatre of Blood is a large arena located within the castle of Ver Sinhaza in Morytania.

The Theatre of Blood is a raid for 1-5 players.

Attack Styles - Magic, Ranged, Melee, Special
Immunities - Poison, Venom
Slayer Categories - None
translation:
血腥剧场是位于莫利塔尼亚的维尔辛哈扎城堡内的一座大型竞技场。

血腥剧场是一个 1-5 人的突袭副本。

攻击风格 - 魔法、远程、近战、战技
免疫 - 毒、剧毒
杀戮类别 - 无

english:
The Theatre of Blood is a large arena located within the castle of Ver Sinhaza in Morytania.

The Theatre of Blood is a raid for 1-5 players.

Hard mode is a more challenging experience than the regular raid. Mechanics are harder and more punishing.

Attack Styles - Magic, Ranged, Melee, Special
Immunities - Poison, Venom
Slayer Categories - None
translation:

Entry mode is an easier version of the Theatre of Blood aimed at introducing you to the content and the boss mechanics in a less punishing way.

Immunities - Poison, Venom

english: Hides unstarted quests in the quest list.
translation: 在任务列表中隐藏未开始的任务。

english: Kill a Lizardman Shaman in Molch which has not dealt damage to anyone (excluding its Spawns).
translation: 在莫尔奇聚落击杀一只未对任何人造成伤害的蜥蜴人萨满（不包括其召唤物）。

english: Determines the text colour for the currently playing music track in your music player.
translation: 设定音乐播放器中当前播放曲目的文字颜色。

english: Sends a chat notification whenever a new item is added to your Collection log.
translation: 每当收藏日志新增物品时，发送聊天通知。

english: When enabled, the Agility helper will be shown when on Agility courses.
translation: 启用后，在敏捷课程中会显示敏捷辅助。

english: When enabled, Agility obstacles will be highlighted in the game world, for the course that you are training on.
translation: 启用后，你正在训练的敏捷课程中的障碍物会在游戏世界中高亮显示。

english: When enabled, Agility shortcuts will be highlighted in the game world.
translation: 启用后，游戏世界中的敏捷捷径会高亮显示。
悬停鼠标悬停瓷砖高亮指示器

english: When enabled, highlights the tile under the mouse.
translation: 启用后，高亮显示鼠标下方的瓷砖。

english: player current true tile highlighting indicator
translation: 玩家当前真实瓷砖高亮指示器

english: When enabled, highlights the tile you are currently on.
translation: 启用后，高亮显示你当前所在的瓷砖。
目的地瓷砖高亮指示器

english: When enabled, highlights the tile you are moving to.
translation: 启用后，高亮显示你正在移动的目标瓷砖。

english: hover mouseover tile highlighting indicator colour
translation: 悬停鼠标悬停瓷砖高亮指示器颜色

english: Colour to highlight the tile under the mouse.
translation: 高亮鼠标下方瓷砖的颜色。

english: Highlight hovered tile must be enabled for this setting to have any effect.
translation: 必须启用悬停瓷砖高亮功能，此设置才会生效。
高亮悬停瓷砖 - 颜色

english: Colour to highlight the tile you are currently on.
translation: 高亮当前所在瓷砖的颜色。

english: Highlight current tile must be enabled for this setting to have any effect.
translation: 必须启用当前瓷砖高亮功能，此设置才会生效。
高亮当前瓷砖 - 颜色

english: Colour to highlight the tile you are moving to.
translation: 高亮移动目标瓷砖的颜色。

english: Highlight destination tile must be enabled for this setting to have any effect.
translation: 必须启用目标瓷砖高亮功能，此设置才会生效。
高亮目标瓷砖 - 颜色

english: When enabled, shows the hovered tile highlight over objects in the world.
translation: 启用后，鼠标悬停的瓷砖高亮会显示在世界中的物体之上。

english: Highlight hovered tile - Always on top
translation: 高亮悬停瓷砖 - 始终置顶

english: When enabled, shows the current tile highlight over objects in the world.
translation: 启用后，当前所在瓷砖的高亮会显示在世界中的物体之上。

english: Highlight current tile - Always on top
translation: 高亮当前瓷砖 - 始终置顶

english: When enabled, shows the destination tile highlight over objects in the world.
translation: 启用后，目标瓷砖的高亮会显示在世界中的物体之上。

english: Highlight destination tile - Always on top
translation: 高亮目标瓷砖 - 始终置顶

english: When enabled, allows you to increase and decrease the zoom of the minimap by scrolling, while the mouse cursor over the minimap.
translation: 启用后，当鼠标光标悬停在小地图上时，可以通过滚动滚轮来放大或缩小地图。

english: When enabled, allows you to increase and decrease the zoom of the minimap by pinching the minimap with two fingers.
translation: 启用后，你可以用两根手指捏合小地图来放大或缩小。

english: Change how far you can see the landscape. This does not affect view distance of other players or interact distance.
translation: 调整你能看到的景观距离。这不会影响其他玩家的可视距离或交互距离。

english: Change how the interface is scaled, this affects the quality and performance of the scaling.
translation: 更改界面的缩放方式，这会影响缩放的质量和性能。

english: When enabled, shows your remaining ammo.
translation: 启用后，显示你剩余的弹药。

english: Activate the Sigil to break free from bind effects cast on you by other players. Consumes the Sigil upon activation.
translation: 激活此符印以挣脱其他玩家施加在你身上的束缚效果。激活后消耗此符印。

english: You have a 90% chance to send your newly gathered resources to the Bank when gathering with Mining, Fishing, Woodcutting or Farming.
translation: 使用采矿、钓鱼、伐木或农业采集时，你有 90% 的几率将新获得的资源直接存入银行。

english: When smelting Ores, smithing Bars, or making Cannonballs, all items are processed at once.
translation: 熔炼矿石、锻造金属锭或制作炮弹时，所有物品将一次性处理完毕。

english: When cleaning Herbs or making Potions, all items will be processed at once.
translation: 清理草药或制作药水时，所有物品将一次性处理完毕。

english: When Fletching Logs or cutting Bolt Tips, all items are processed at once.
translation: 制箭原木或切割弩箭尖时，所有物品将一次性处理完毕。

english: When Cooking food or making Jugs of Wine, all items are processed at once.
translation: 烹饪食物或制作酒壶时，所有物品将一次性处理完毕。

english: When Crafting Leather, Uncut Gems, Glass, Jewellery, Pottery or Battlestaves, or when spinning Flax or Wool, all items are processed at once.
translation: 制作皮革、未切割宝石、玻璃、首饰、陶器或战斗法杖，或纺亚麻或羊毛时，所有物品将一次性处理完毕。

english: When Runecrafting, you gain 5X as many runes as usual.
translation: 进行符石制作时，你获得的符石数量是平时的 5 倍。

english: You're permanently under the effects of a Stamina Potion.
translation: 你永久处于体力药水的效果下。

english: Teleporting via the following methods will never use charges: Master Scroll Book, Ring of Duelling, Ring of Returning, Slayer Ring, Ring of Wealth, Amulet of Glory, Games Necklace, Skills Necklace, Digsite Pendant, Combat Bracelet, Burning Amulet and Necklace of Passage.
translation: 通过以下方式传送将永不消耗充能：大师卷轴书、决斗戒指、回归戒指、杀戮者戒指、财富戒指、荣耀护符、游戏项链、技能项链、考古挖掘场护符、战斗手镯、燃烧护符和通行项链。

english: Teleports do not consume runes and do not grant any XP.
translation: 传送不消耗符石，也不提供任何经验值。

english: All non-combat skills are permanently boosted by 5.
translation: 所有非战斗技能永久提升 5 级。

english: Activate the Sigil to get a 75% magic accuracy buff on your next binding spell within the next 12 seconds. The Sigil has a 15 second cooldown.
translation: 激活此符印，使你在接下来 12 秒内的下一个束缚法术获得 75% 的魔法命中率加成。此符印有 15 秒冷却时间。

english: Activate the Sigil to get a 75% increased chance to resist the first bind effect that is cast on you within the next 12 seconds. If the bind was not successful, the Sigil has a 5-minute cooldown. If it successfully binds you, the Sigil has a 1-minute cooldown.
translation: 激活此符印，使你在接下来 12 秒内抵抗第一个施加于你的束缚效果的几率提高 75%。如果束缚未成功，此符印有 5 分钟冷却时间。如果束缚成功施加于你，此符印有 1 分钟冷却时间。

english: Upon dealing melee damage, you have a 20% chance to set your attack speed to 1.8 seconds for your next attack against a player, or for your next two attacks against monsters, within the next 12 seconds.
translation: 造成近战伤害时，你有 20% 的几率在接下来 12 秒内，使你对玩家的下一次攻击或对怪物的下两次攻击的攻击速度变为 1.8 秒。

english: You have a 20% increased chance to receive loot from the Global Deadman Mode loot table.
translation: 你从全球死亡模式战利品表中获得战利品的几率提高 20%。

english: You gain 50% more XP in the following skills: Mining, Smithing, Construction and Crafting.
translation: 你在以下技能中获得 50% 额外经验值：采矿、锻造、建筑和制作。

english: You gain 50% more XP in the following skills: Agility, Fletching, Hunter and Farming.
translation: 你在以下技能中获得 50% 额外经验值：敏捷、制箭、狩猎和农业。

english: You gain 50% more XP in the following skills: Firemaking, Fishing, Herblore and Slayer.
translation: 你在以下技能中获得 50% 额外经验值：生火、钓鱼、草药学和杀戮。

english: You gain 50% more XP in the following skills: Cooking, Woodcutting, Thieving and Runecraft.
translation: 你在以下技能中获得 50% 额外经验值：烹饪、伐木、偷窃和符石制作。

english: You always gain double resources from Mining, Fishing, Woodcutting and Farming. This sigil does not stack with the Sigil of Enhanced Harvest.
translation: 你从采矿、钓鱼、伐木和农业中总是获得双倍资源。此符印不与丰收符印叠加。

english: You always have the set effects of all skilling outfits.
translation: 你始终拥有所有技能套装的套装效果。

english: All clue scrolls will drop as stackable scroll boxes that can be opened when this sigil is attuned.
translation: 所有线索卷轴将以可堆叠的卷轴盒形式掉落，可在调谐此符印后打开。

english: Activate the Sigil to instantly swap your Spellbook to any unlocked Spellbook while outside of combat.
translation: 激活此符印，在非战斗状态下立即将你的法术书切换至任何已解锁的法术书。

english: Activate the Sigil to cure venom and poison, and gain immunity from both effects for 10 minutes. Once activated, the Sigil has a 3-minute cooldown.
translation: 激活此符印以治愈剧毒和中毒，并在 10 分钟内免疫这两种效果。激活后，此符印有 3 分钟冷却时间。

english: Activate the Sigil to set your run energy to 100% and stop it from draining while running for the next minute. Once activated, the Sigil has a 2-minute cooldown.
translation: 激活此符印，将你的跑步能量设为 100%，并在接下来一分钟内跑步时不会消耗能量。激活后，此符印有 2 分钟冷却时间。

english: Stats boosted above your base level will not drain over time.
translation: 提升至基础等级以上的属性不会随时间衰减。

english: You gain 100% increased XP in all skills.
translation: 你在所有技能中获得 100% 额外经验值。

english: Activate the Sigil to teleport back to the location from which your most recent teleport occurred. Once activated, the Sigil has a 5-minute cooldown.
translation: 激活此符印，传送回你最近一次传送发生的位置。激活后，此符印有 5 分钟冷却时间。

english: Upon dying to another player, this Sigil is consumed and you will lose the items you are carrying as normal. However, you will not drop a Bank Key.
translation: 被其他玩家杀死时，此符印会被消耗，你会像往常一样失去携带的物品。但是，你不会掉落银行钥匙。

english: When enabled, show the store button around the minimap on mobile only.
translation: 启用后，仅在移动设备上在小地图周围显示商店按钮。

english: Show the Store button on mobile
translation: 在移动端显示商店按钮

english: When enabled, show the store button around the minimap on desktop only.
translation: 启用后，仅在桌面设备上在小地图周围显示商店按钮。

english: When enabled, Ironmen will occasionally see chatbox messages warning them if they're attacking a creature that's restricted from dropping loot to them.
translation: 启用后，铁人玩家在攻击无法掉落战利品的生物时，偶尔会在聊天框中看到警告信息。

english: When enabled, the deep Wilderness teleport lever will take you to Edgeville by default instead of Ardougne.
translation: 启用后，荒野深处的传送拉杆默认会将你传送到边陲镇，而不是阿多尼城。

english: You must have completed at least one Wilderness achievement diary to access this setting.
translation: 你必须至少完成一个荒野成就日记才能访问此设置。

english: When enabled, the Slayer helper will be shown while training slayer.
translation: 启用后，在训练杀戮技能时会显示杀戮辅助。

english: When enabled, a notification will be sent 30 seconds before you logout.
translation: 启用后，会在你登出前30秒发送通知。

english: When enabled, shows how long until you will take poison damage and how much you will take.
translation: 启用后，显示你距离下一次受到中毒伤害的剩余时间以及伤害量。

english: When enabled, a respawn timer will be shown when you mine a rock for ore. You can set this to only be shown if you have a pickaxe.
translation: 启用后，当你开采岩石获得矿石时会显示重生计时器。你可以将其设置为仅在你持有镐子时显示。

english: When enabled, a respawn timer will be shown when you chopdown a tree. You can set this to only be shown if you have an axe.
translation: 启用后，当你砍倒一棵树时会显示重生计时器。你可以将其设置为仅在你持有斧头时显示。

english: When enabled, a notification will be displayed if you obtain a bird nest drop while cutting down trees.
translation: 启用后，如果你在砍树时获得鸟巢掉落，会显示通知。

english: Adds a highlight to entities when you hover the mouse cursor over them.
translation: 当鼠标光标悬停在实体上时，为其添加高亮效果。

english: When enabled, you will be able to access the XP tracker through the popout panel.
translation: 启用后，你可以通过弹出面板访问经验追踪器。

english: When enabled, you will get a confirmation before paying for your items from a gravestone.
translation: 启用后，在从墓碑支付物品费用前会要求你确认。

english: Hides quests in progress in the quest list.
translation: 在任务列表中隐藏进行中的任务。

english: You must have the transparent chatbox disabled or be in fixed mode and be a Group Ironman to change this setting.
translation: 你必须禁用透明聊天框或处于固定模式，并且是组铁人模式玩家才能更改此设置。

english: You must have the transparent chatbox enabled, be in resizable mode and be a Group Ironman to change this setting.
translation: 你必须启用透明聊天框、处于可调整大小模式，并且是组铁人模式玩家才能更改此设置。

english: Hides completed quests in the quest list.
translation: 在任务列表中隐藏已完成的任务。

english: Hides miniquests in the quest list.
translation: 在任务列表中隐藏迷你任务。

english: Hides quests in the quest list.
translation: 在任务列表中隐藏任务。

english: Determines the size of the text in your quest list.
translation: 设定任务列表中文字的大小。

english: Removes shadows from the text in your quest list.
translation: 移除任务列表中文字的阴影。

english: When enabled, sending a message with any chat prefix will automatically sets your chat mode to the respective channel: /p, /f, /c, /gc or /g (GIM only).
translation: 启用后，使用任何聊天前缀发送消息都会自动将聊天模式切换到对应的频道：/p、/f、/c、/gc 或 /g（仅限群组铁人模式）。

english: When enabled, mouseover tooltips will also show how many more options are available in the menu.
translation: 启用后，鼠标悬停提示也会显示菜单中还有多少其他选项可用。

english: Show number of options in mouseover tooltips
translation: 在鼠标悬停提示中显示选项数量

english: When enabled on members' worlds, Agility shortcuts you can't use will have an overlay displaying the requirements to use them.
translation: 在会员世界启用后，你无法使用的敏捷捷径会显示使用它们所需的条件。
高亮敏捷捷径 - 捷径需求

english: When enabled, shows how long until you will take desert heat damage.
translation: 启用后，显示你距离下一次受到沙漠高温伤害的剩余时间。

english: When enabled, you will be prevented from attacking players in any way that would cause you to become skulled.
translation: 启用后，你将无法以任何会导致你变成骷髅标记的方式攻击其他玩家。

english: This setting cannot be enabled on Deadman worlds.
translation: 此设置无法在死寂世界启用。

english: When enabled, you will have to wait 3 seconds after a change is made before you can click the accept button when trading another player.
translation: 启用后，在与另一名玩家交易时，每次更改后必须等待3秒才能点击接受按钮。

english: You must be allowed to trade to change this setting.
translation: 你必须允许交易才能更改此设置。

english: Set whether holding Ctrl when clicking to walk or interact will temporarily invert your selected run mode.
translation: 设置按住Ctrl键点击行走或交互时，是否暂时反转你选择的奔跑模式。

english: Kill both royal titans while they are charging up their area attack. Both titans must die during the same charging up phase.
translation: 在两只皇家泰坦蓄力范围攻击时击杀它们。两只泰坦必须在同一蓄力阶段内死亡。

english: Casting Alchemy spells by 'using' items together always triggers a warning,low level alchemy,low alchemy,high level alchemy,high alchemy,notifications,inventory,lumbridge ring,Explorer's ring,use,diary
translation: 通过'使用'物品组合施法炼金术法术始终触发警告，低级炼金术，低级炼金，高级炼金术，高级炼金，通知，背包，仑桥镇戒指，探险者戒指，使用，日记

english: When enabled, always shows a warning when you try to cast an Alchemy spell by 'using' items on an Explorer's Ring in your inventory.
translation: 启用后，当你尝试通过“使用”物品栏中的探险者戒指来施放炼金术法术时，始终显示警告。

english: Casting Alchemy spells by 'using' items together always triggers a warning
translation: 通过'使用'物品组合施放炼金术法术时始终触发警告

english: When enabled, you will be offered a 'Did you know?' tip when you log into the game.
translation: 启用后，当你登录游戏时会显示一个“你知道吗？”小贴士。

english: <col=cfcfcf>Attack is your accuracy in melee combat. As you raise your Attack level, you can hit more consistently and wield stronger weapons.
translation: <col=cfcfcf>攻击决定了你在近战中的命中率。提升攻击等级后，你的攻击会更稳定，也能使用更强的武器。

english: <col=cfcfcf>Strength is your power in melee combat. As you raise your Strength level, you can deal more damage and wield stronger weapons and armour.
translation: <col=cfcfcf>力量决定了你在近战中的威力。提升力量等级后，你能造成更多伤害，也能使用更强的武器和盔甲。

english: <col=cfcfcf>Ranged is your skill with bows, and thrown weapons. As you raise your Ranged level you will be able to equip better Ranged weapons and armour.
translation: <col=cfcfcf>远程是你的弓术和投掷武器技能。提升远程等级后，你将能装备更好的远程武器和盔甲。

english: <col=cfcfcf>Magic is a versatile skill used in combat, production, and utility spells. As you raise your Magic level, more spells will become available.
translation: <col=cfcfcf>魔法是一种多用途技能，可用于战斗、生产和辅助法术。提升魔法等级后，你将能使用更多法术。

english: <col=cfcfcf>Hitpoints represent your health. If you reach zero, you will die. As you raise your Hitpoints level, you will be able to take more damage.
translation: <col=cfcfcf>生命值代表你的健康。如果降到零，你就会死亡。提升生命值等级后，你将能承受更多伤害。

english: <col=cfcfcf>Prayer provides combat boosts and protective wards. As you raise your Prayer level, more options will become available.
translation: <col=cfcfcf>祈祷能提供战斗增益和保护屏障。提升祈祷等级后，你将能使用更多选项。

english: <col=cfcfcf>Agility gives access to various shortcuts and is required for many quests. As you raise your Agility level more shortcuts become available.
translation: <col=cfcfcf>敏捷能让你使用各种捷径，也是许多任务所需。提升敏捷等级后，更多捷径将为你开放。

english: <col=cfcfcf>Herblore is used to make potions, which can be drunk to give temporary effects. As you raise your Herblore, more potions will become available.
translation: <col=cfcfcf>草药学用于制作药水，饮用后可获得临时效果。提升草药学等级后，更多药水将为你开放。

english: <col=cfcfcf>Crafting is a skill that allows you to create items. As you raise your Crafting level, more items will be available for you to make.
translation: <col=cfcfcf>制作是一项能让你创造物品的技能。提升制作等级后，更多物品将可供你制作。

english: <col=cfcfcf>Runecraft allows you to craft your own runes for Magic spells. As you raise your Runecraft level, you will be able to craft more runes.
translation: <col=cfcfcf>符石制作能让你为魔法法术制作自己的符石。提升符石制作等级后，你将能制作更多符石。

english: <col=cfcfcf>Mining allows you to obtain ores and gems from rocks. The higher your Mining level is, the more likely you are to successfully extract ore.
translation: <col=cfcfcf>采矿能让你从岩石中获取矿石和宝石。采矿等级越高，成功提取矿石的几率就越大。

english: <col=cfcfcf>Smithing allows you to create metal items from ore and metal bars. As you raise your Smithing level, more items will become available.
translation: <col=cfcfcf>锻造能让你用矿石和金属条制作金属物品。提升锻造等级后，更多物品将为你开放。

english: <col=cfcfcf>Cooking allows you to prepare raw food, which heals hitpoints when eaten.  As you raise your Cooking level, more recipes will become available.
translation: <col=cfcfcf>烹饪能让你处理生食，食用后可恢复生命值。提升烹饪等级后，更多食谱将为你开放。

english: <col=cfcfcf>Firemaking is used to light fires, among other things. As you raise your Firemaking level, you'll be able to set alight a wider variety of things.
translation: <col=cfcfcf>生火用于点燃火焰等用途。提升生火等级后，你将能点燃更多种类的物品。

english: <col=cfcfcf>Woodcutting allows you to gather logs, used in other skills. As you raise your Woodcutting level, new types of trees and axes become available.
translation: <col=cfcfcf>伐木能让你收集原木，用于其他技能。提升伐木等级后，新的树木种类和斧头将为你开放。

english: <col=cfcfcf>Fletching allows you to create various ranged weapons and ammunition. As you raise your Fletching level, more items will become available.
translation: <col=cfcfcf>制箭能让你制作各种远程武器和弹药。提升制箭等级后，更多物品将为你开放。

english: <col=cfcfcf>Slayer allows you to kill monsters that are otherwise invulnerable. As you raise your Slayer level, more items and monsters will become available.
translation: <col=cfcfcf>杀戮能让你杀死原本无法伤害的怪物。提升杀戮等级后，更多物品和怪物将为你开放。

english: <col=cfcfcf>Farming allows you to plant seeds and harvest crops. As you raise your Farming level, more crops will become available.
translation: <col=cfcfcf>农业能让你种植种子并收获作物。提升农业等级后，更多作物将为你开放。

english: <col=cfcfcf>Construction allows players to build their own houses and furniture. As you raise your Construction level you can build more things.
translation: <col=cfcfcf>建筑能让玩家建造自己的房屋和家具。提升建筑等级后，你将能建造更多东西。

english: <col=cfcfcf>Hunter allows you to catch different animals and creatures. As you raise your Hunter level you can lay more traps and catch more types of animal.
translation: <col=cfcfcf>狩猎能让你捕捉不同的动物和生物。提升狩猎等级后，你将能设置更多陷阱并捕捉更多种类的动物。

english:
The Giant Mole is found within its lair beneath Falador Park.
Light source and spade required.
translation:
巨型鼹鼠位于法拉多公园下方的巢穴中。
需要光源和铲子。

english:
Obor the Hill Titan is the strongest of all the hill giants. His lair can be found within the Edgeville Dungeon.
Giant key required - 5 Provided.
translation:
奥博尔，丘陵巨人中的泰坦，是所有丘陵巨人中最强的。他的巢穴位于边陲镇地牢内。
需要巨型钥匙 - 提供5把。

english:
Bryophyta the moss giantess can be found in her lair in the Varrock Sewers.
Mossy key required - 5 Provided.
translation:
布赖奥菲塔，苔藓女巨人，可在维洛克城下水道的巢穴中找到。
需要苔藓钥匙 - 提供5把。

english:
Dusk and Dawn can be found on the Slayer Tower's rooftop, through the entrance on the upper floor.
75 Slayer and Brittle key required.
translation:
怪诞守卫者.黄昏和怪诞守卫者.黎明可在杀戮者塔的屋顶找到，入口在顶层。
需要75级杀戮和易碎钥匙。

english:
Tempoross is a skilling boss located off the coast of the Ruins of Unkah
in the Kharidian Desert.
35 Fishing required.
translation:
海灵是一个技能型首领，位于昂卡遗址海岸外
的卡里迪安沙漠中。
需要35级钓鱼。

english:
Wintertodt is a skilling boss located
in the Northern Tundras of Great Kourend, east of the Fishing Hamlet.
50 Firemaking required.
translation:
冬将军是一个技能型首领，位于
大库兰德王国北部冻原，钓鱼小村以东。
需要50级生火。

english:
The King Black Dragon is a three-headed dragon found in his lair in the Wilderness, west of the Lava Maze.
Anti-dragon shield required.
translation:
黑龙王是一只三头龙，位于荒野中熔岩迷宫以西的巢穴里。
需要防龙盾。

english:
The accursed Barrows Brothers are buried within six mounds located to the east of Mort'ton, in Morytania.
Access to Morytania required.
translation:
被诅咒的巴罗斯墓穴兄弟葬于莫利塔尼亚莫顿镇以东的六个土丘中。
需要进入莫利塔尼亚。

english:
The three Dagannoth Kings are found within the Waterbirth Island Dungeon.
There are no mandatory requirements.
translation:
三位深潜者之王位于水诞岛地牢内。
没有强制要求。

english:
The Hespori is a rare carnivorous plant that can be grown and fought in the Farming Guild.
65 Farming required.
translation:
赫斯波里是一种稀有的食肉植物，可在农业公会中种植并与之战斗。
需要65级农业。

english:
Sarachnis is a spider boss found to the south of the Spider Den in Forthos Dungeon.
There are no mandatory requirements.
translation:
萨拉奇尼斯是一种蜘蛛首领，位于福索斯地牢蜘蛛巢穴的南边。
没有强制要求。

english:
Skotizo is a demonic boss located deep beneath the Catacombs
of Kourend.
Dark Totem required - 5 Provided.
translation:
斯科蒂佐是一个恶魔首领，位于库兰德王国地下墓穴
的深处。
需要黑暗图腾 - 提供5个。

english:
The Kalphite Queen is the strongest of all kalphites, found in the Kalphite Lair within the Kharidian Desert.
Two ropes required.
translation:
卡尔夫特虫后是所有卡尔夫特虫中最强的，位于卡里迪安沙漠的卡尔夫特虫巢内。
需要两根绳子。

english:
Zalcano is a demon skilling boss imprisoned beneath the elven capital city of Prifddinas.
Song of the Elves quest required.
translation:
扎尔卡诺是一个恶魔技能型首领，被囚禁在精灵首都普里夫迪纳斯城的地下。
需要完成精灵之歌任务。

english:
The Kraken is a stronger and larger cave kraken, found within Lieve's cave north of Eagles' Peak.
87 Slayer required.
translation:
克拉肯海怪是一种更强更大的洞穴克拉肯海怪，位于鹰峰以北利夫的洞穴中。
需要87级杀戮。

english:
The Gauntlet is an activity within the elven capital city of Prifddinas.
Song of the Elves quest required.
translation:
试炼之路是精灵首都普里夫迪纳斯城内的一项活动。
需要完成精灵之歌任务。

english:
The Thermonuclear Smoke Devil is located within Breive's cave

93 Slayer required.
translation:
热核烟魔位于城堡战争以南
布雷夫的洞穴中。
需要93级杀戮。

english:
An Abyssal Sire is stronger and larger than any other Abyssal demon. It can be found in the Abyssal Nexus.
85 Slayer required.
translation:
深渊之主比任何其他深渊恶魔都更强更大。它可以在深渊核心中找到。

english:
Zulrah is a serpent boss found at their shrine at Zul-Andra within the Poison Wastes.
Regicide quest required.

祖尔拉是一种蛇形首领，位于毒废土中祖尔-安德拉的神龛处。

english:
Vorkath is an undead blue dragon found on the island of Ungael north of the Fremennik Province.

沃卡斯是一只亡灵蓝龙，位于弗瑞曼尼克省以北的昂格尔岛上。
需要完成屠龙者 II 任务。

english:
Cerberus is a three-headed hellhound located deep beneath Taverley Dungeon.

刻耳柏洛斯是一只三头地狱犬，位于塔韦利地牢深处。

Kree'arra represents Armadyl within the God Wars Dungeon

Commander Zilyana represents Saradomin within the God Wars Dungeon north of Trollheim.

齐利亚娜指挥官代表萨拉多明，位于巨魔家园以北的神战地牢中。

english:
K'ril Tsutsaroth represents Zamorak within the God Wars Dungeon

克里尔.楚萨罗斯代表扎莫拉克，位于巨魔家园以北的

炼金九头蛇是一个首领，位于卡鲁尔姆山深处的卡鲁尔姆杀戮者地牢中。

english:
The Corporeal Beast can be found in its cave, east of the Graveyard of Shadows in the Wilderness.

实体巨兽可在其洞穴中找到，位于荒野阴影墓园以东。

The Chambers of Xeric is a large cave system found underneath Mount Quidamortem in the Kebos Lowlands.

The Theatre of Blood is a large arena located within the castle of Ver Sinhaza in Morytania.

血腥剧场是一个大型竞技场，位于莫利塔尼亚维尔辛哈萨城堡内。
需要进入莫利塔尼亚。

english:
Nex represents Zaros within the God Wars Dungeon north of Trollheim.
The Frozen Door miniquest required.
translation:
奈克斯代表扎罗斯，位于巨魔家园以北的神战地牢中。
需要完成冰冻之门迷你任务。

english: This fragment reduces Prayer drain by 15%.
translation: 此碎片减少15%的祈祷消耗。

english: Melee attack accuracy increases 12% with 0 Prayer Points left.
translation: 当祈祷点归零时，近战攻击命中率提高12%。

english: Ranged attack accuracy increases 30% with 0 Prayer Points left.
translation: 当祈祷点归零时，远程攻击命中率提高30%。

english: Magic attack accuracy increases 40% with 0 Prayer Points left.
translation: 当祈祷点归零时，魔法攻击命中率提高40%。

english: Melee weapon charges have a 20% chance to be saved.
translation: 近战武器充能有20%的几率不消耗。

english: Range ammunition & weapon charges have a 40% chance to be saved, excluding chinchompas.
translation: 远程弹药和武器充能有40%的几率不消耗，不包括灰鼠。

english: Magic runes & weapon charges have 40% chance to be saved.
translation: 魔法符文和武器充能有40%的几率不消耗。

english: Completing Slayer Tasks will award 10% more Slayer Points.
translation: 完成杀戮任务将额外获得10%的杀戮点数。

english: Killing a Slayer monster on task will heal you for 1 hitpoint.
translation: 在任务中击杀杀戮怪物会恢复1点生命值。

english: Killing a Slayer monster on task will heal you for 2 hitpoints.
translation: 在任务中击杀杀戮怪物会恢复2点生命值。

english: Superior Slayer monsters will have a 1/150 chance of appearing.
translation: 高级杀戮怪物出现的几率为1/150。

english: Special Attack is restored for 10% every 25 seconds
Special Attacks that cost more than 50% energy will cost 50% instead
translation: 消耗超过50%能量的战技将改为只消耗50%能量。

english: 20% chance that any fish caught are cooked, granting Cooking experience regardless of level requirements.
translation: 钓到的鱼有20%的几率被直接烹饪，无视等级要求获得烹饪经验。

english: 20% chance logs chopped are burned, granting Firemaking experience regardless of level requirements.
translation: 砍伐的原木有20%的几率被直接烧掉，无视等级要求获得生火经验。

english: Chance to successfully pickpocket is increased by 15%.
Chance to successfully pickpocket is increased by 25% and you no longer take damage from being stunned.
translation: 扒窃成功率提高25%，且不再因眩晕而受到伤害。

english: 20% chance to gain double loot when pickpocketing.
translation: 扒窃时有20%的几率获得双倍战利品。

english: Prayer Points are restored at a rate of 1 point every 15 seconds.
Prayer Points are restored at a rate of 1 point every 3.6 seconds.
Your thralls have a 100% increased max hit.
translation: 你的仆从最大伤害提高100%。

english: Bird Nests from Woodcutting are sent to the Bank with a 2x increased chance to drop.
translation: 伐木获得的鸟巢会直接存入银行，且掉落几率翻倍。

english: 2% chance of receiving a clue by lighting a fire.
translation: 生火时有2%的几率获得线索。

english: 10% chance for all types of planks to not be consumed in Construction.
translation: 建筑时所有类型的木板有10%的几率不消耗。

english: You have a 1/300 chance of obtaining a rare item while fishing.
translation: 钓鱼时有1/300的几率获得稀有物品。

english: Iron, Sandstone and Granite have a 25% chance of not depleting when mined.
translation: 开采铁矿、砂岩和花岗岩时有25%的几率不枯竭。

english: You have a 20% chance to automatically smelt any ore you mine, granting 100% XP regardless of Smithing level.
translation: 开采矿石时有20%的几率自动熔炼，无视锻造等级获得100%经验。

english: You automatically smelt any ore you mine, granting 100% XP regardless of Smithing level.
translation: 你开采的任何矿石都会自动熔炼，无视锻造等级获得100%经验。

english: Bones and ashes are auto buried and scattered with 50% XP.
translation: 骨头和灰烬会自动掩埋和撒散，获得50%经验。

english: When a Mark of Grace is spawned, 4000 coins will be spawned together.
translation: 当生成优雅印记时，会同时生成4000金币。

english: Amount of Hallowed marks received increased by 50%.
translation: 获得的圣洁印记数量增加50%。

english: XP from fletching and stringing bows is increased by 30%.
translation: 制箭和上弦弓的经验提高30%。

english: Receive More Bolt Tips Per Gem
translation: 每颗宝石获得更多箭尖

english: When fletching gems into bolt tips, you'll receive 30% more tips per gem.
translation: 将宝石制成弩箭尖时，每颗宝石多获得30%的箭尖。

english: 10% chance players will get an extra cooked food. The extras will be sent to the Bank and provide no additional XP. Does not work on untradeable items or in instances.
translation: 有10%的几率额外获得一份熟食。额外食物会存入银行且不提供额外经验。不适用于不可交易物品或副本中。

english: Enchant 5 pieces of jewellery per enchantment, with 100% XP.
translation: 每次附魔可附魔5件首饰，并获得100%经验。

english: You'll receive 15% more gold when casting High Alchemy.
translation: 施放高等炼金术时获得的金币增加15%。

english: Barbarian Assault Points, Pest Control Points and Soul Wars Zeal Tokens received are boosted by 100%.
translation: 获得的野蛮人突袭点数、虫害治理点数和灵魂战争狂热代币翻倍。

english: Tithe Farm points are boosted by 100%, chance to successfully crack the wall safe in the Rogues' Den maze is boosted by 10% and each chompy bird kill is worth 2 kills.
translation: 什一税农场点数翻倍，成功破解盗贼巢穴迷宫墙壁保险箱的几率提高10%，每只食人鸟击杀算作2次击杀。

english: The chance of obtaining Fossils on Fossil island and Motherlode Mine Gold nuggets are increased by 100%. Mage Training Arena points received are increased by 100%.
translation: 在化石岛获得化石和母矿脉金块的几率翻倍。获得的魔法师训练场点数翻倍。

english: Smithing gem jewellery has a 20% chance to give twice the end product with 100% xp.
translation: 锻造宝石首饰时有20%的几率产出双倍成品并获得100%经验。

english: Smithing at an anvil has a 5% chance to give two of the end product with 100% xp.
translation: 在铁砧上锻造时有5%的几率产出双倍成品并获得100%经验。
捕捉灰鼠获得50%额外经验。

english: Catching Chinchompas yields 100% more XP and 2 Chinchompas instead of 1.
translation: 捕捉灰鼠获得100%额外经验，且每次获得2只灰鼠而非1只。

english: Each time a rune is crafted, there is 20% chance to get double runes(stacks with normal rune doubling).
translation: 每次制作符文时有20%的几率获得双倍符文（可与常规符文翻倍叠加）。

english: Get better runes at the Ourania Altar
translation: 在奥拉尼亚祭坛获得更好符文

english: When crafting runes at the Ourania Altar, you no longer gain mind runes.
translation: 在奥拉尼亚祭坛制作符文时，不再获得意念符文。

english: When crafting runes at the Ourania Altar, you no longer gain mind and body runes.
translation: 在奥拉尼亚祭坛制作符文时，不再获得意念符文和身体符文。

english: When crafting runes at the Ourania Altar, you no longer gain mind, body and elemental runes.
translation: 在奥拉尼亚祭坛制作符文时，不再获得意念符文、身体符文和元素符文。

english: Spin Flax spell processes 10 flax at once instead of 5.
translation: 纺织亚麻法术一次处理10个亚麻，而非5个。

english: When crafting dragonhide armour, there is a 10% chance the materials will be saved and sent to your bank.
translation: 制作龙皮盔甲时有10%的几率材料不消耗并存入银行。

english: Resources harvested from Farming are always noted and have a 25% chance of being doubled.
translation: 农业收获的资源始终以凭证形式获得，并有25%的几率翻倍。

english: Resources harvested from Farming are always noted and doubled.
translation: 农业收获的资源始终以凭证形式获得并翻倍。

english: You have a 10% chance to not consume seeds when planting them.
translation: 种植时有10%的几率不消耗种子。

english: Enemies that drop clues drop them at a rate of 1/30.
translation: 掉落线索的敌人以1/30的几率掉落。

english: Clue vessels from skilling are found 3 times as often.
translation: 从技能活动中获得线索容器的几率提高3倍。

english: When wearing four bandos items your max melee hit is increased relative to your attack speed. 1 damage per attack speed.
translation: 穿戴四件班多斯装备时，近战最大伤害根据攻击速度提高，每点攻击速度增加1点伤害。

english: When wearing four Armadyl items, bolt effects have a 25% increased chance to activate.
translation: 穿戴四件阿玛杜尔装备时，弩箭效果触发几率提高25%。

english: When wearing four Zamorak items you have 50% increased magic accuracy.
translation: 穿戴四件扎莫拉克装备时，魔法命中率提高50%。

english: When wearing four Saradomin items, if you've taken damage from an NPC or a Player in the last 3.6 seconds your max hit is increased by 2. Poison does not trigger this effect.
translation: 穿戴四件萨拉多明装备时，如果在过去3.6秒内受到NPC或玩家伤害，最大伤害提高2点。中毒不会触发此效果。

english: Creating potions has a 25% chance to give their four-dose variant and a 20% chance to save the secondary ingredient.
translation: 制作药水时有25%的几率获得四剂版本，并有20%的几率节省次要材料。

english: Creating potions will always give their four-dose variant and save the secondary ingredient.
translation: 制作药水时总是获得四剂版本并节省次要材料。

english: XP from cleaning herbs is increased by 10%.
translation: 清理草药获得的经验提高10%。

english: Your attacks have a chance to inflict 3 poison damage.
translation: 你的攻击有几率造成3点中毒伤害。

english: Your attacks have a chance to inflict 5 poison damage. Additionally, you are immune to being poisoned.
translation: 你的攻击有几率造成5点中毒伤害。此外，你免疫中毒。

english: Your attacks have a chance to inflict 7 poison damage. Additionally, you are immune to being poisoned and venomed.
translation: 你的攻击有几率造成7点中毒伤害。此外，你免疫中毒和剧毒。

english: A scroll which can be used to unlock the Leagues III - Shattered relics Home Teleport Animation. The scroll is destroyed once it has been used.
translation: 一张可用于解锁联赛 III - 破碎遗物回家传送动画的卷轴。使用后卷轴会被销毁。

english: A kit that can be used to apply a Leagues III - Shattered Relics theme to an Abyssal Whip or Tentacle, Rune Crossbow or a completed God Book.
translation: 一个可用于将联赛 III - 破碎遗物主题应用于深渊长鞭或触手、符文弩或已完成的圣典的工具包。

english: A set of 6 ornament kits that can be used to apply a Leagues III - Shattered Relics theme to a Void and Elite Void armour.
translation: 一套 6 个装饰品工具包，可用于将联赛 III - 破碎遗物主题应用于虚空和精英虚空盔甲。

english: A cosmetic banner that represents Leagues III - Shattered Relics. The banner is held in the main-hand slot.
translation: 一面代表联赛 III - 破碎遗物的装饰旗帜。这面旗帜装备在主手栏位。

english: A set of 5 ornament kits that can be used to apply a Leagues III - Shattered Relics theme to a blue Mystic robe piece.
translation: 一套 5 个装饰品工具包，可用于将联赛 III - 破碎遗物主题应用于一件蓝色神秘长袍部件。

english: A set of 4 ornament kits that can be used to apply a Leagues III - Shattered Relics theme to the Dwarf multicannon.
translation: 一套 4 个装饰品工具包，可用于将联赛 III - 破碎遗物主题应用于矮人大炮。

english: After a successful melee attack, you have a chance to do another melee attack roll.
translation: 成功近战攻击后，你有几率再次进行近战攻击判定。

english: After a successful Ranged attack, you have a chance to do another range attack roll.
translation: 成功远程攻击后，你有几率再次进行远程攻击判定。

english: After a successful Magic attack, you have a chance to do another magic attack roll.
translation: 成功魔法攻击后，你有几率再次进行魔法攻击判定。
你的生命值恢复速度提高。

english: Any successful attack has a 50% chance of restoring your hitpoints based on the amount of damage dealt.
translation: 任何成功攻击都有50%的几率根据造成的伤害恢复生命值。

english: You take reduced damage from monsters and any damage you take post-reduction is reflected to the attacker.
translation: 你受到的怪物伤害减少，且减免后的伤害会反弹给攻击者。

english: For every hitpoint missing, you deal additional damage in all combat styles.
translation: 每缺少一点生命值，你所有战斗风格造成的伤害都会增加。

english: All non-combat skills receive a permanent boost.
translation: 所有非战斗技能获得永久提升。

english: When doing Cooking and Herblore activities, all items in your inventory will be processed at once and reward full experience.
translation: 进行烹饪和草药学活动时，背包中的所有物品将一次性处理并获得全额经验。

english: Cooking food, making Jugs of Wine, cleaning herbs and making potions.
translation: 烹饪食物、制作酒壶、清理草药和制作药水。

english: When doing Smithing, Crafting and Fletching activities, all items in your inventory will be processed at once and reward full experience.
translation: 进行锻造、制作和制箭活动时，背包中的所有物品将一次性处理并获得全额经验。

english: Smelting ores, smithing bars and cannonballs, crafting with leather, glass, uncut gems, pottery, battlestaves, spinning flax and wool, fletching logs and cutting bolt tips.
translation: 熔炼矿石、锻造金属锭和炮弹、用皮革、玻璃、未切割宝石、陶器、战斗法杖制作、纺织亚麻和羊毛、制箭原木和切割弩箭尖。

english: You gain additional resources from Fishing, Woodcutting, Mining and Farming. Experience is granted per resource gathered.
translation: 你从钓鱼、伐木、采矿和农业中获得额外资源。每收集一个资源获得经验。

english: You have a chance that resources gathered from Fishing, Woodcutting, Mining and Farming will be sent directly to your bank.
translation: 从钓鱼、伐木、采矿和农业中收集的资源有几率直接存入银行。

english: You gain an item that allows you to swap spellbooks at will.
translation: 你获得一件可以随意切换法术书的物品。

english: You gain an item that allows you to teleport back to the location where your most recent teleport occurred outside of an instance.
translation: 你获得一件可以传送回最近一次非副本传送地点的物品。

english: You gain an item which allows you to teleport to major areas.
translation: 你获得一件可以传送到主要区域的物品。

english: When enabled, shows how long the Forinthry surge buff will last.
translation: 启用后，显示福林斯瑞涌动增益效果的持续时间。

english: Forinthry surge, additional 15% accuracy and damage to the revenants.
translation: 福林斯瑞涌动，对亡灵额外增加15%命中率和伤害。
无人死亡的情况下击杀奈克斯。

english: Kill Nex without letting her heal from her Blood Siphon special attack.
translation: 不让奈克斯透过其血之虹吸战技回血，击杀奈克斯。

english: Kill Nex without anyone taking damage from any Ice special attack.
translation: 无人受到任何冰系战技伤害的情况下，击杀奈克斯。

english: Kill Nex without anyone being hit by the Smoke Dash special attack
translation: 无人被烟雾冲刺战技击中的情况下，击杀奈克斯。

english: Kill Nex with three or less players inside the arena at the start of the fight.
translation: 战斗开始时竞技场内有3名或更少玩家，击杀奈克斯。

english: Kill Nex with two or less players inside the arena at the start of the fight.
translation: 战斗开始时竞技场内有2名或更少玩家，击杀奈克斯。

english: Kill Nex whilst a player is coughing.
translation: 在玩家咳嗽的状态下击杀奈克斯。

english: Kill Nex whilst completing the requirements for There is no escape, Shadows move, A siphon will solve this, and Contain this!
translation: 在同时完成“无处可逃”、“暗影移动”、“虹吸解决问题”和“控制住！”成就的条件下，击杀奈克斯。

english: Kill Nex without anyone being hit by the Shadow Smash attack.
translation: 无人被暗影粉碎攻击击中的情况下，击杀奈克斯。

english: When enabled, shows your remaining cannon ammo.
translation: 启用后，显示你大炮的剩余弹药。

english: Adds a highlight to entities when you tap them.
translation: 当你点击实体时，为其添加高亮效果。

english: Determines the text colour for unstarted quests in your quest list.
translation: 设定任务列表中未开始任务的文字颜色。

english: Have any member of this Ironman Group open the group storage with a standard Rune Platebody equipped.
translation: 让此铁人小组的任何成员在装备标准符文胸甲时打开团队储物箱。

english: Have any member of this Ironman Group open the group storage with Fighter, Fancy or Fancier Boots equipped.
translation: 让此铁人小组的任何成员在装备战士靴、华丽的靴或华丽靴时打开团队储物箱。

english: Have any member of this Ironman Group open the group storage after achieving level 99 in either Mining, Fishing, Woodcutting, Hunter or Farming.
translation: 让此铁人小组的任何成员在采矿、钓鱼、伐木、狩猎或农业达到99级后打开团队储物箱。

english: Have any member of this Ironman Group open the group storage after achieving level 99 in either Cooking, Smithing, Fletching, Firemaking, Herblore, Crafting, Runecraft or Construction.
translation: 让此铁人小组的任何成员在烹饪、锻造、制箭、生火、草药学、制作、符石制作或建筑达到99级后打开团队储物箱。

english: Have any member of this Ironman Group open the group storage after achieving level 99 in either Agility, Thieving or Slayer.
translation: 让此铁人小组的任何成员在敏捷、偷窃或杀戮达到99级后打开团队储物箱。

english: Have any member of this Ironman Group open the group storage after achieving level 99 in either Attack, Strength, Defence, Magic, Ranged, Prayer or Hitpoints.
translation: 让此铁人小组的任何成员在攻击、力量、防御、魔法、远程、祈祷或生命值达到99级后打开团队储物箱。

translation: 让此铁人小组的任何成员在杀戮达到99级后打开团队储物箱。

translation: 让此铁人小组的任何成员在建筑达到99级后打开团队储物箱。

english: Have any member of this Ironman Group open the group storage after achieving level 99 in Mining.
translation: 让此铁人小组的任何成员在采矿达到99级后打开团队储物箱。

translation: 让此铁人小组的任何成员在锻造达到99级后打开团队储物箱。

english: Have any member of this Ironman Group open the group storage after achieving level 99 in Fishing.
translation: 让此铁人小组的任何成员在钓鱼达到99级后打开团队储物箱。

translation: 让此铁人小组的任何成员在烹饪达到99级后打开团队储物箱。

translation: 让此铁人小组的任何成员在生火达到99级后打开团队储物箱。

translation: 让此铁人小组的任何成员在伐木达到99级后打开团队储物箱。

translation: 让此铁人小组的任何成员在农业达到99级后打开团队储物箱。

english: Have any member of this Ironman Group open the group storage after achieving 50 Quest Points.
translation: 让此铁人小组的任何成员在获得50任务点数后打开团队储物箱。

english: Have any member of this Ironman Group open the group storage after achieving a combat level of 50.
translation: 让此铁人小组的任何成员在达到50级战斗等级后打开团队储物箱。

english: Have any member of this Ironman Group open the group storage after completing every easy achievement diary task.
translation: 让此铁人小组的任何成员在完成所有简单成就日记任务后打开团队储物箱。

translation: 让此铁人小组的任何成员在完成所有中等成就日记任务后打开团队储物箱。

translation: 让此铁人小组的任何成员在完成所有困难成就日记任务后打开团队储物箱。

english: Have any member of this Ironman Group open the group storage after completing every easy combat achievement task.
translation: 让此铁人小组的任何成员在完成所有简单战斗成就任务后打开团队储物箱。

english: Have any member of this Ironman Group open the group storage after completing every medium combat achievement task.
translation: 让此铁人小组的任何成员在完成所有中等战斗成就任务后打开团队储物箱。
