english: Have any member of this Ironman Group open the group storage after completing every elite combat achievement task.
translation: 让此铁人小组的任何成员在完成所有精英战斗成就任务后打开团队储物箱。

english: Have any member of this Ironman Group open the group storage after reaching a total level of 500.
translation: 让此铁人小组的任何成员在达到总等级500后打开团队储物箱。

english: When enabled will send out a notification when a group member complete a quest.
translation: 启用后，当团队成员完成任务时，将发送通知。

english: When enabled will send out a notification when a group member receives a new collection log item.
translation: 启用后，当团队成员获得新的收藏日志物品时，将发送通知。

english: When enabled will send out a notification when a group member achieves a new personal best.
translation: 启用后，当团队成员达成新的个人最佳成绩时，将发送通知。

english: When enabled will send out a notification when a group member completes an achievement diary tier.
translation: 启用后，当团队成员完成成就日记等级时，将发送通知。

english: When enabled will send out a notification when a group member reaches milestone levels on a standard or Deadman world.
translation: 启用后，当团队成员在标准或死亡世界达到里程碑等级时，将发送通知。

english: The threshold for notifications to be sent out after every 10th level-up gained by a group member, starting from this value.
translation: 团队成员每升10级发送一次通知的阈值，从此值开始。

english: The threshold for notifications to be sent out after every level-up gained by a group member, starting from this value.
translation: 团队成员每升一级发送一次通知的阈值，从此值开始。

english: When enabled will send out a notification when a group member reaches 10m xp milestones above level 99 in a skill.
translation: 启用后，当团队成员在技能中达到99级以上每1000万经验里程碑时，将发送通知。

english: Trigger a group notification message every multiple of this XP above level 99 in a skill.
translation: 在技能99级以上，每达到此经验倍数时触发团队通知消息。

english: When enabled will send out a notification when a group member receives notable loot from monster drops.
translation: 启用后，当团队成员从怪物掉落中获得显著战利品时，将发送通知。

english: The minimum value for notable monster loot to trigger a group notification message.
translation: 触发团队通知消息所需的最低显著怪物战利品价值。

english: When enabled will send out a notification when a group member completes a combat achievement tier.
translation: 启用后，当团队成员完成战斗成就等级时，将发送通知。

english: When enabled will send out a notification when a group member defeats another player.
translation: 启用后，当团队成员击败另一名玩家时，将发送通知。

english: The minimum value for loot from player kills to trigger a group notification message.
translation: 触发团队通知消息所需的最低玩家击杀战利品价值。

english: When enabled will send out a notification when a group member is defeated by another player.
translation: 启用后，当团队成员被另一名玩家击败时，将发送通知。

english: Rank required to receive notifications when clan members complete quests.
translation: 接收氏族成员完成任务通知所需的职位等级。

english: Rank required to receive notifications when clan members receive a new collection log item.
translation: 接收氏族成员获得新收藏日志物品通知所需的职位等级。

english: Rank required to receive notifications when clan members achieve a new personal best.
translation: 接收氏族成员达成新个人最佳记录通知所需的职位等级。

english: Rank required to receive notifications when clan members complete achievement diary tiers.
translation: 接收氏族成员完成成就日记等级通知所需的职位等级。

english: Rank required to receive notifications when hardcore clan members lose their status.
translation: 接收硬核氏族成员失去状态通知所需的职位等级。

english: Rank required to receive notifications when clan members reach milestone levels on a standard or Deadman world.
translation: 接收氏族成员在标准或死寂世界达到里程碑等级通知所需的职位等级。

english: Rank required to receive notifications when clan members reach XP milestones above level 99 in a skill.
translation: 接收氏族成员在技能达到99级后达成经验里程碑通知所需的职位等级。

english: Trigger a clan notification message every multiple of this XP above level 99 in a skill.
translation: 在技能达到99级后，每获得此数值倍数的经验值触发一次氏族通知消息。

english: Trigger a clan notification message for every 10th level-up gained by a clan member, starting from this value.
translation: 从该数值开始，氏族成员每升10级触发一次氏族通知消息。

english: Trigger a clan notification message for every level-up gained by a clan member, starting from this value.
translation: 从该数值开始，氏族成员每升1级触发一次氏族通知消息。

english: Rank required to receive notifications when clan members receive notable loot from monster drops.
translation: 接收氏族成员从怪物掉落获得显著战利品通知所需的职位等级。

english: Rank required to receive notifications when clan members complete combat achievement tiers.
translation: 接收氏族成员完成战斗成就等级通知所需的职位等级。

english: Rank required to receive notifications when clan members defeats another player.
translation: 接收氏族成员击败其他玩家通知所需的职位等级。

english: Minimum value for loot from player kills to trigger a clan notification message.
translation: 触发氏族通知消息所需的玩家击杀战利品最低价值。

english: Rank required to receive notifications when clan members are defeated by another player.
translation: 接收氏族成员被其他玩家击败通知所需的职位等级。

english: Determines the text colour for quests in progress in your quest list.
translation: 设定任务列表中进行中任务的文字颜色。

english: Determines the text colour for completed quests in your quest list.
translation: 设定任务列表中已完成任务的文字颜色。

english: Determines the text colour for unavailable quests in your quest list.
translation: 设定任务列表中不可用任务的文字颜色。

english: When enabled, shows Grand Exchange price when examining items.
translation: 启用后，检查物品时会显示大交易所价格。
查看价格信息 - 大交易所

english: When enabled, shows alchemy price when examining items.
translation: 启用后，检查物品时会显示炼金术价格。
查看价格信息 - 炼金术

english: When enabled, disables dragging items in your inventory based on your Anti Drag settings.
translation: 启用后，根据你的防拖拽设置，禁止在物品栏中拖拽物品。

english: Delay, in milliseconds, between dragging an item in the inventory and when it will actually start being dragged. Useful for preventing accidental drags. Value will be rounded to the nearest 20ms (max 5000).
translation: 拖拽物品栏中的物品与实际开始拖拽之间的延迟时间，以毫秒为单位。用于防止意外拖拽。数值将四舍五入到最接近的20毫秒（最大5000）。

english: When set, only disables dragging items in your inventory while the key is held down. If no key is set, Anti Drag will always be on.
translation: 设置后，仅在按住该键时禁止拖拽物品栏中的物品。如果未设置按键，防拖拽将始终开启。

english: When set, enables dragging items in your inventory while the key is held down if Anti Drag is active.
translation: 设置后，如果防拖拽处于激活状态，按住该键时可以拖拽物品栏中的物品。

english: When enabled, your device will vibrate when you perform any non-interface interaction (except Walk-here).
translation: 启用后，当你执行任何非界面交互（“走到这里”除外）时，你的设备会震动。

english: When enabled, your device will vibrate when you begin dragging something in an interface.
translation: 启用后，当你开始在界面中拖拽某物时，你的设备会震动。

english: When enabled, your device will vibrate when the minimenu opens.
translation: 启用后，当迷你菜单打开时，你的设备会震动。

english: When enabled, your device will vibrate when you hover over different minimenu entries.
translation: 启用后，当你悬停在不同的迷你菜单条目上时，你的设备会震动。

english: Vibrate when hovering over minimenu entries
translation: 悬停在迷你菜单条目上时震动

english: The time taken, in milliseconds, to open the minimenu when long-pressing.
translation: 长按后打开迷你菜单所需的时间，以毫秒为单位。

english: Hides category headers in the quest list.
translation: 在任务列表中隐藏分类标题。

english:
Group Boss Bash will have you and your group participate in various group activities around Gielinor. This raffle will start on 26th May 2022 and will end at 23:59 UTC on 9th June 2022.

Tickets can be earned by receiving loot from the following non-combat activities:
- Tempoross, 1 ticket
- Wintertodt, 1 ticket
- Zalcano, 3 tickets
- Barbarian Assault, 10 tickets
(Upon finishing wave 10)

Tickets can be earned by receiving loot from the following combat activities:
- Sarachnis, 1 ticket
- King Black Dragon, 1 ticket
- Dagannoth Kings, 1 ticket
- Kalphite Queen, 2 tickets
- Commander Zilyana, 5 tickets
- General Graardor, 5 tickets
- K'ril Tsutsaroth, 5 tickets
- Kree'arra, 5 tickets
- The Nightmare, 2 tickets
(Phosani's Nightmare excl.)
- Nex, 2 tickets
- Corporeal Beast, 5 tickets
- Chambers of Xeric, 10 tickets
- Challenge Mode, 20 tickets
- Theatre of Blood, 15 tickets
- Story Mode, 3 tickets
- Hard Mode, 20 tickets
translation:
团队首领狂欢将让你和你的小组参与吉列诺的各种团队活动。此抽奖将于2022年5月26日开始，并于2022年6月9日的23:59 UTC结束。

通过从以下非战斗活动中获得战利品来赚取抽奖券：
- 海灵，1张券
- 冬将军，1张券
- 扎尔卡诺，3张券
- 野蛮人突袭，10张券
（完成第10波后）

通过从以下战斗活动中获得战利品来赚取抽奖券：
- 萨拉奇尼斯，1张券
- 黑龙王，1张券
- 深潜者之王，1张券
- 卡尔夫特虫后，2张券
- 齐利亚娜指挥官，5张券
- 格拉多尔将军，5张券
- 克里尔.楚萨罗斯，5张券
- 克里阿拉，5张券
- 梦魇，2张券
（弗萨尼的梦魇除外）
- 奈克斯，2张券
- 实体巨兽，5张券
- 泽里克圣所，10张券
- 挑战模式，20张券
- 血腥剧场，15张券
- 故事模式，3张券
- 困难模式，20张券

english: When enabled, the client will be displayed in full screen mode.
translation: 启用后，客户端将以全屏模式显示。

english:
This double-sized mould looks like two ammo moulds, roughly put together with a metal strip.

It will allow for faster production of cannonballs, giving eight balls for two bars with each use.

Requires completion of the Dwarf Cannon quest to purchase.
translation:
这个双倍大小的模具看起来像是两个弹药模具用金属条粗略拼凑而成。

它可以更快地生产炮弹，每次使用两个金属条可产出八颗炮弹。

需要完成矮人大炮任务才能购买。

english:
Grog made by Kovac. This foul-looking brew will imbue anyone who drinks it with improved knowledge of Smithing.

Smithing: +4
Attack: -2
Range: -2
Magic: -2
translation:
科瓦克酿造的格罗格酒。这种看起来恶心的饮料能让喝下它的人提升锻造知识。

锻造：+4
攻击：-2
远程：-2
魔法：-2

english: This fine powder helps smiths smelt bars. Bars made at standard furnaces using this powder will require half the amount of coal and reward twice the amount of XP. The powder will be consumed when used.
translation: 这种精细粉末能帮助铁匠熔炼金属条。在标准熔炉中使用此粉末熔炼金属条，所需煤量减半，获得的经验值翻倍。使用后粉末将被消耗。

english:
A rather heavy looking package, packed to the brim with ores and minerals.

A pack contains 30 noted ores which could be any combination of the following:
Coal
Iron ore
Mithril ore
Adamantite ore
Runite ore
translation:
一个看起来很重的包裹，塞满了矿石和矿物。

每包包含30个已备注的矿石，可能是以下矿石的任意组合：
煤
铁矿石
秘银矿石
精金矿石
符文矿石

english:
A part of the Smiths Uniform. This piece of equipment provides a 20% chance to increase the speed of a Smithing action at an anvil.
This effect stacks when combined with other outfit pieces.

When the full set is worn, the chance increases to 100%.
translation:
铁匠制服的一部分。这件装备有20%的几率提升在铁砧上进行锻造动作的速度。
此效果与其他制服部件叠加。

穿戴全套时，几率提升至100%。

english:
A part of the Smiths Uniform. This piece of equipment provides a 20% chance to increase the speed of a Smithing action at an anvil.
This effect stacks when combined with other outfit pieces.

When the full set is worn, the chance increases to 100%.

Can also be combined with ice gloves to gain the effects of both.
translation:
铁匠制服的一部分。这件装备有20%的几率提升在铁砧上进行锻造动作的速度。
此效果与其他制服部件叠加。

穿戴全套时，几率提升至100%。

也可以与冰手套组合，同时获得两者的效果。

english:
A Giant Blade forged within the Giants' Foundry.
Normally reserved for the giants of Gielinor, Kovac is willing to part with this one, even though you made it.

Requires 60 Attack to wield.
translation:
在巨人铸造厂锻造的巨人之刃。
通常是为吉列诺的巨人保留的，但科瓦克愿意割爱这把，即使是你打造的。

需要60攻击才能装备。

english: Unlock this new mould for use in the Giants' Foundry. Higher tier moulds allow you to better match contracts, earning you more reputation.
translation: 解锁这个新模具，用于巨人铸造厂。更高等级的模具能让你更好地匹配合约，从而获得更多声望。

english: When enabled on desktop, show the popout panel.
translation: 在桌面设备上启用后，显示弹出面板。

english: When enabled on mobile, show the popout panel.
translation: 在移动设备上启用后，显示弹出面板。
在荒野传送拉杆时显示警告，边陲镇，阿多尼城，拉杆，游戏玩法，传送

english: Show warning on Wilderness teleport levers on High Risk worlds,Edgeville,Ardougne,lever,risk,gameplay,teleports
translation: 在高风险世界的荒野传送拉杆时显示警告，边陲镇，阿多尼城，拉杆，风险，游戏玩法，传送
离开费罗飞地时显示警告，荒野，枢纽，传送封锁，安全，区域，游戏玩法

english: When enabled, shows a warning before exiting Ferox Enclave.
translation: 启用后，在离开费罗飞地前显示警告。

english: Show warning on taking a canoe to the Wilderness,Wilderness,canoe,waka,warning,gameplay,teleport
translation: 乘坐独木舟前往荒野时显示警告，荒野，独木舟，瓦卡，警告，游戏玩法，传送

english: When enabled, shows a warning when taking a canoe to the Wilderness.
translation: 启用后，在乘坐独木舟前往荒野时显示警告。

english: A tier 1 adventurer's outfit consisting of body, legs, hood and boots.
translation: 一套一级冒险者套装，包含上衣、裤子、兜帽和靴子。

english: A tier 3 adventurer's outfit consisting of body, legs, hood, boots, vambraces and cape. Each piece of the outfit can be used to modify the corresponding piece of graceful equipment.
translation: 一套三级冒险者套装，包含上衣、裤子、兜帽、靴子、护腕和披风。套装的每个部件都可以用来改造对应的优雅装备部件。

english: An equippable cosmetic stopwatch that changes your animations while held.
translation: 一个可装备的装饰性秒表，手持时会改变你的动画。

english: A scroll which can be used to unlock the Speedy Home Teleport Animation. The scroll is destroyed once it has been used.
translation: 一张可用于解锁快速回家传送动画的卷轴。使用后卷轴会被销毁。

english: How do I set up two-factor authentication for my Steam account?
translation: 如何为我的Steam账号设置双重验证？

english: Rank required to deposit items in the party chest.
translation: 在派对宝箱中存入物品所需的职位等级。

english: Pull the lever for the party chest
Rank required to pull the lever for a drop party.
translation: 为掉落派对拉动拉杆所需的职位等级。

english: Rank required to get drops from the party chest when popping ballons.
translation: 戳破气球时从派对宝箱获得掉落所需的职位等级。

english: When enabled, you will no longer be asked to confirm Charter Ship payment.
translation: 启用后，你将不再被要求确认包船付款。

english: When enabled, you will no longer be asked to confirm protection payment for your crops.
translation: 启用后，你将不再被要求确认作物的保护费。

english: Complete the Tombs of Amascut (normal) within 18 mins at any group size.
translation: 在任何队伍规模下，于18分钟内完成阿玛斯库特之墓（普通）。

english: Complete the Tombs of Amascut (expert) within 20 mins at any group size.
translation: 在任何队伍规模下，于20分钟内完成阿玛斯库特之墓（专家）。

english: Complete the Tombs of Amascut (expert) within 18 mins in a group of 8.
translation: 在8人队伍中，于18分钟内完成阿玛斯库特之墓（专家）。

english: Complete a full Tombs of Amascut raid only using supplies given inside the tomb and without anyone dying.
translation: 仅使用墓穴内提供的补给，且无人死亡，完成一次完整的阿玛斯库特之墓突袭。

english: Complete the Tombs of Amascut without using any supplies from the Helpful Spirit and without anyone dying. Honey locusts are included in this restriction.
translation: 不使用来自乐于助人的灵魂的任何补给，且无人死亡，完成阿玛斯库特之墓。此限制包括蜜荚。

english: Complete the Tombs of Amascut with the "On a diet" and "Dehydration" invocations activated and without anyone dying.
translation: 在启动“节食中”和“脱水”祈祷文的情况下，且无人死亡，完成阿玛斯库特之墓。

english: Complete the Tombs of Amascut without anyone in your party wearing or holding any equipment at tier 75 or above.
translation: 队伍中无人穿戴或持有75级或以上的装备，完成阿玛斯库特之墓。

english: Defeat Zebak using only melee attacks and without dying yourself.
translation: 仅使用近战攻击，且自身不死亡，击败泽巴克。

english: Complete phase three of The Wardens in a group of two or more, using only melee attacks and without dying yourself. The 'Insanity' invocation must be activated.
translation: 在2人或以上的队伍中，仅使用近战攻击，且自身不死亡，完成典狱长的第三阶段。必须启动“疯狂”祈祷文。

english: Complete the Tombs of Amascut in a group of two or more without anyone dying.
translation: 在2人或以上的队伍中，无人死亡，完成阿玛斯库特之墓。

english: Complete the Tombs of Amascut solo without dying.
translation: 独自一人且不死亡，完成阿玛斯库特之墓。

english: Complete the Het room without taking any hits from the light beam or orbs. You must destroy the core after one exposure.
translation: 不受到任何光束或光球的攻击，完成赫特房间。你必须在一次暴露后摧毁核心。

english: Complete Akkha in a group of two or more, without anyone taking any hits from the following: Akkha's attacks off-prayer, Akkha's special attacks (orbs, memory, detonate), exploding shadow timers, orbs in the enrage phase or attacking Akkha with the wrong style. Hits for zero damage still count. You must have all Akkha invocations activated.
translation: 在2人或以上的队伍中，无人受到以下任何攻击：阿卡的非祈祷攻击、阿卡的战技（光球、记忆、引爆）、爆炸暗影计时器、狂暴阶段的光球，或以错误风格攻击阿卡。零伤害的攻击仍计入。你必须启动所有阿卡的祈祷文。

english: Complete 'Perfect Het' and 'Perfect Akkha' in a single run of the Tombs of Amascut.
translation: 在单次阿玛斯库特之墓的旅程中，完成“完美赫特”和“完美阿卡”。

english: Complete the Apmeken room in a group of two or more, without anyone allowing any dangers to trigger, standing in venom or being hit by a volatile baboon. You must complete this room in less than three minutes.
translation: 在2人或以上的队伍中，无人触发任何危险、站在毒液中，或被暴躁的狒狒击中。你必须在三分钟内完成此房间。

english: Defeat Ba-Ba in a group of two or more, without anyone taking any hits from the following: Ba-Ba's Attacks off-prayer, Ba-Ba's slam, rolling boulders, rubble attack or falling rocks. Hits for zero damage still count. No sarcophagi may be opened. You must have all Ba-Ba invocations activated.
translation: 在2人或以上的队伍中，无人受到以下任何攻击：巴巴的非祈祷攻击、巴巴的重击、滚动的巨石、瓦砾攻击或落石。零伤害的攻击仍计入。不得打开任何石棺。你必须启动所有巴巴的祈祷文。

english: Complete 'Perfect Apmeken' and 'Perfect Ba-Ba' in a single run of the Tombs of Amascut.
translation: 在单次阿玛斯库特之墓的旅程中，完成“完美阿普梅肯”和“完美巴巴”。

english: Complete the Crondis room without letting a crocodile get to the tree, without anyone losing water from their container and in under one minute.
translation: 不让任何鳄鱼到达树木，无人从容器中失去水，且在一分钟内，完成克伦迪斯房间。

english: Defeat Zebak without anyone taking any hits from: poison, Zebak's basic attacks off-prayer, blood spawns and waves. You also must not push more than two jugs on the roar attack during the fight (you may destroy stationary ones). Hits for zero damage still count. You must have all Zebak invocations activated.
translation: 无人受到以下任何攻击：毒液、泽巴克的非祈祷基本攻击、血之生成物和波浪。在战斗中的咆哮攻击期间，你也不能推动超过两个水罐（你可以摧毁静止的水罐）。零伤害的攻击仍计入。你必须启动所有泽巴克的祈祷文。

english: Complete 'Perfect Crondis' and 'Perfect Zebak' in a single run of the Tombs of Amascut.
translation: 在单次阿玛斯库特之墓的旅程中，完成“完美克伦迪斯”和“完美泽巴克”。

english: Complete the Scabaras room in less than a minute without anyone taking any damage from puzzles.
translation: 在一分钟内完成斯卡巴拉斯房间，且无人受到谜题的任何伤害。

english: Defeat Kephri in a group of two or more, without anyone taking any hits from the following: egg explosions, Kephri's attacks, Exploding Scarabs, Bodyguards, dung attacks. Hits for zero damage still count. No eggs may hatch throughout the fight.
translation: 在2人或以上的队伍中，无人受到以下任何攻击：蛋爆炸、凯弗里的攻击、爆炸圣甲虫、保镖、粪便攻击。零伤害的攻击仍计入。整场战斗中不得有蛋孵化。

english: Complete 'Perfect Scabaras' and 'Perfect Kephri' in a single run of Tombs of Amascut.
translation: 在单次阿玛斯库特之墓的旅程中，完成“完美斯卡巴拉斯”和“完美凯弗里”。

english: Defeat The Wardens in a group of two or more, without anyone taking avoidable hits from the following: Warden attacks, obelisk attacks, lightning attacks in phase three, skull attack in phase three, Demi god attacks in phase three. Hits for zero damage still count. You must have all Wardens invocations activated.
translation: 在2人或以上的队伍中，无人受到以下可避免的攻击：典狱长攻击、方尖碑攻击、第三阶段的闪电攻击、第三阶段的头骨攻击、第三阶段的半神攻击。零伤害的攻击仍计入。你必须启动所有典狱长的祈祷文。

english: Complete 'Perfect Wardens' at expert or above.
translation: 在专家或以上难度完成“完美典狱长”。

english: Complete the Tombs of Amascut at raid level 500 or above without anyone dying.
translation: 在突袭等级500或以上，且无人死亡的情况下，完成阿玛斯库特之墓。

english: Complete the Tombs of Amascut raid at level 350 or above without anyone dying.
translation: 在等级350或以上，且无人死亡的情况下，完成阿玛斯库特之墓突袭。

english: Complete a Tombs of Amascut raid with every single boss invocation activated and without anyone dying.
translation: 启动每一个首领祈祷文，且无人死亡，完成一次阿玛斯库特之墓突袭。

english: Defeat Akkha without dropping any materialising orbs and without dying yourself.
translation: 不让任何实体化光球掉落，且自身不死亡，击败阿卡。

english: Defeat Akkha with all Akkha invocations activated and the path levelled up to at least four, without dying yourself.
translation: 启动所有阿卡的祈祷文，且路径等级至少提升至四级，自身不死亡，击败阿卡。

english: Defeat Ba-Ba after only attacking the non-weakened boulders in the rolling boulder phase, without dying yourself. The Boulderdash invocation must be activated.
translation: 在滚动巨石阶段，仅攻击未被削弱的巨石，且自身不死亡，击败巴巴。必须启动“巨石冲刺”祈祷文。

english: Defeat Ba-Ba after destroying four or fewer rolling boulders in total without dying yourself.
translation: 总共摧毁四个或更少的滚动巨石，且自身不死亡，击败巴巴。

english: Defeat Ba-Ba with all Ba-Ba invocations activated and the path levelled up to at least four, without dying yourself.
translation: 启动所有巴巴的祈祷文，且路径等级至少提升至四级，自身不死亡，击败巴巴。

english: Defeat Zebak without losing a single prayer point. You must also meet the conditions of the 'Rockin' Around The Croc' achievement.
translation: 不损失任何祈祷点数，击败泽巴克。你还必须满足“鳄鱼摇摆”成就的条件。

english: Defeat Zebak with all Zebak invocations activated and the path levelled up to at least four, without dying yourself.
translation: 启动所有泽巴克的祈祷文，且路径等级至少提升至四级，自身不死亡，击败泽巴克。

english: Defeat Kephri with all Kephri invocations activated and the path levelled up to at least four, without dying yourself.
translation: 在激活所有凯弗里祈祷文且路径等级至少达到四级的情况下击败凯弗里，且自身不能死亡。

english: Defeat Kephri without letting her heal above 25% after the first down. The 'Medic' invocation must be activated. You must do this without dying yourself.
translation: 在首次击倒凯弗里后，不让她治疗到 25% 以上。必须激活“医疗兵”祈祷文。且自身不能死亡。

english: Defeat the Wardens after staggering the boss a maximum of twice during phase two, without dying yourself.
translation: 在第二阶段最多打断 Boss 两次的情况下击败典狱长，且自身不能死亡。

english: Defeat Elidinis' Warden in phase three of the Wardens fight with 'Aerial Assault', 'Stay vigilant' and 'Insanity' invocations activated and without dying yourself.
translation: 在激活“空中突击”、“保持警惕”和“疯狂”祈祷文的情况下，于典狱长战斗的第三阶段击败伊莉迪尼斯的典狱长，且自身不能死亡。

english: Defeat the Wardens with all Wardens invocations activated, at expert level and without dying yourself.
translation: 在激活所有典狱长祈祷文、专家难度下击败典狱长，且自身不能死亡。

english: Complete the Tombs of Amascut in Entry mode (or above) once.
translation: 完成一次入门模式（或以上）的阿玛斯库特之墓。

english: Complete the Tombs of Amascut in Entry mode (or above) 25 times.
translation: 完成 25 次入门模式（或以上）的阿玛斯库特之墓。

english: Complete a Tombs of Amascut raid at level 50 or above.
translation: 完成一次等级 50 或以上的阿玛斯库特之墓突袭。

english: Complete the Tombs of Amascut 25 times.
translation: 完成 25 次阿玛斯库特之墓。

english: Complete the Tombs of Amascut once.
translation: 完成一次阿玛斯库特之墓。

english: Complete the Tombs of Amascut (Expert mode) once.
translation: 完成一次阿玛斯库特之墓（专家模式）。

english: Complete the Tombs of Amascut (Expert mode) 25 times.
translation: 完成 25 次阿玛斯库特之墓（专家模式）。

english: When enabled, shows a warning when placing a buy offer that is more than 10 times of the guide price.
translation: 启用后，当出价购买的价格超过指导价的10倍时，显示警告。

english: When enabled, shows a warning when placing a sell offer that is lower than 10% of the guide price.
translation: 启用后，当出售价格低于指导价的10%时，显示警告。

english: When enabled, you will no longer receive messages in chat in relation to the Phantom Muspah fight.
translation: 启用后，你将不再收到与幻影穆斯帕战斗相关的聊天消息。

english: You must complete the Secrets of the North quest to access this setting.
translation: 你必须完成北方的秘密任务才能访问此设置。

english: When enabled, ammo you pick up from the ground will attempt to equip itself to your quiver or bolt pouch, if those contain matching ammo.
translation: 启用后，你从地上捡起的弹药会尝试自动装备到你的箭袋或弩箭袋中，前提是它们包含匹配的弹药。

english: When enabled, runes you pick up from the ground or make during Runecrafting will attempt to go into your rune pouch, if it contains matching runes.
translation: 启用后，你从地上捡起或在制作符文过程中制作的符文会尝试自动放入你的符石袋中，前提是它包含匹配的符文。

english: When enabled, the enemy name will be displayed on the health overlay.
translation: 启用后，敌人名称会显示在生命值覆盖层上。

english: When enabled, the boss health overlay will be more compact.
translation: 启用后，首领生命值覆盖层会更加紧凑。

english: Determines how values are displayed on the health overlay.
translation: 决定生命值覆盖层上数值的显示方式。

english: When enabled, any dialogue will also be shown in the chatbox.
translation: 启用后，任何对话也会显示在聊天框中。

english: When enabled, any text shown in message boxes will also be shown in the chatbox.
translation: 启用后，消息框中显示的任何文字也会显示在聊天框中。

english: Show message box text in the chatbox
translation: 在聊天框中显示消息框文本

english: When enabled, shows the wilderness cave decay debuff.
translation: 启用后，显示荒野洞穴的腐朽减益效果。

english: When enabled, shows a warning before exiting Ferox Enclave on a High Risk world.
translation: 启用后，在高风险世界中离开费罗飞地前显示警告。

english: When enabled, shows a warning when taking a canoe to the Wilderness on a High Risk world.
translation: 启用后，在高风险世界中乘坐独木舟前往荒野时显示警告。

english: Changes the zoom level of the minimap.
translation: 更改小地图的缩放级别。

english: When enabled, the combat interface will show your combat level to two decimal places rather than as a whole number.
translation: 启用后，战斗界面会显示你的战斗等级至小数点后两位，而不是整数。

english: Kill the Phantom Muspah by only dealing damage to it with a salamander.
translation: 仅使用蝾螈对幻影穆斯帕造成伤害并将其击杀。

english: Kill the Phantom Muspah without running.
translation: 在不奔跑的情况下击杀幻影穆斯帕。

english: Kill the Phantom Muspah 10 times in one trip.
translation: 在一次行程中击杀幻影穆斯帕 10 次。

english: Kill the Phantom Muspah in less than 3 minutes without a slayer task.
translation: 在没有杀戮任务的情况下，在 3 分钟内击杀幻影穆斯帕。

english: Kill the Phantom Muspah in less than 1 minute and 30 seconds without a slayer task.
translation: 在没有杀戮任务的情况下，在 1 分 30 秒内击杀幻影穆斯帕。
击杀幻影穆斯帕 25 次。

english: Kill the Phantom Muspah whilst it is surrounded by spikes.
translation: 在幻影穆斯帕被尖刺包围时将其击杀。

english: Drain the Phantom Muspah's Prayer with three different sources in one kill.
translation: 在一次击杀中，使用三种不同的来源耗尽幻影穆斯帕的祈祷。

english: Kill the Phantom Muspah without taking any avoidable damage.
translation: 在不承受任何可避免伤害的情况下击杀幻影穆斯帕。

english: Kill the Phantom Muspah whilst completing Walk Straight Pray True, Space is Tight & Can't Escape.
translation: 在完成“笔直行走，虔诚祈祷”、“空间狭窄”和“无处可逃”的情况下击杀幻影穆斯帕。

english: Select whether Trade options are shown on other players, if available.
translation: 选择是否在其他玩家身上显示交易选项（如果可用）。

english: If enabled, the game will run a daily process that removes some permanently banned accounts from your Ignore list, freeing up space.
translation: 启用后，游戏会每天运行一次进程，从你的忽略列表中移除一些永久封禁的账号，以释放空间。

english: If enabled, the game will run a daily process that removes some permanently muted accounts from your Ignore list, freeing up space.
translation: 启用后，游戏会每天运行一次进程，从你的忽略列表中移除一些永久禁言的账号，以释放空间。

english: A pop-up may open in the chatbox to congratulate you as you level-up a skill. It may optionally be followed by a pop-up list of some features unlocked at that level.
translation: 当你技能升级时，聊天框中可能会弹出一个祝贺窗口。之后可能还会弹出一个列表，显示在该等级解锁的一些功能。

english: Controls whether the minimap is expanded or minimised on mobile devices.
translation: 控制移动设备上的小地图是展开还是最小化。

english: Controls whether the minimap is expanded or minimised.
translation: 控制小地图是展开还是最小化。
逃脱水晶自动激活已开启。

english: When enabled, you will be able to access the Loot Tools through the popout panel.
translation: 启用后，你可以通过弹出面板访问战利品工具。
清除所有追踪的战利品

english: When enabled, loot will be added to the loot tracker when you gain it from combat, skilling and other sources. Loot is remembered between sessions but only on this device.
translation: 启用后，当你通过战斗、技能训练和其他来源获得战利品时，战利品会被添加到战利品追踪器中。战利品会在会话之间保留，但仅限于此设备。
战利品追踪器 - 追踪战利品

english: When enabled, items that are automatically destroyed will be tracked, such as logs burnt by the Infernal axe.
translation: 启用后，会自动销毁的物品将被追踪，例如被地狱斧烧掉的原木。
战利品追踪器 - 追踪消耗的战利品

english: Comma separated list of items ignored by the loot tracker.
translation: 战利品追踪器忽略的物品列表，以逗号分隔。
战利品追踪器 - 物品忽略列表

english: Set the type of Anti-aliasing to use.
translation: 设置要使用的抗锯齿类型。

english: When enabled, items on the ground may display an overlay to tell you what items are available, and how much they are worth.
translation: 启用后，地面上的物品可能会显示一个覆盖层，告诉你有哪些物品可用以及它们的价值。

english: The minimum price of an item for it to show up as a tier 5 coloured item in your ground items displays.
translation: 物品在地面物品显示中显示为第5级彩色物品的最低价格。
地面物品覆盖层 - 第5级价格

english: The minimum price of an item for it to show up as a tier 1 coloured item in your ground items displays. Items below this value (assuming it is your lowest) will not be displayed at all.
translation: 物品在地面物品显示中显示为第一层颜色物品的最低价格。低于此值（假设这是你的最低设置）的物品将完全不显示。

english: The colour that tier 5 items, as determined by your tier 5 item price, will be displayed as.
translation: 由你的第五层物品价格决定的第五层物品将显示的颜色。
地面物品覆盖层 - 第5级颜色

english: The colour that custom highlighted items, as determined by your list of highlights, will be displayed as.
translation: 由你的高亮列表决定的自定义高亮物品将显示的颜色。

english: Ground Items Overlay - Custom highlight colour
translation: 地面物品覆盖层 - 自定义高亮颜色

english: When enabled, your ground items overlay will display prices as a high alchemy value, rather than grand exchange price.
translation: 启用后，你的地面物品覆盖层将以高炼价值显示价格，而非大交易所价格。
地面物品覆盖层 - 炼金价值

english: When enabled, your ground items overlay will display the time remaining until a given item will despawn. If set to display with key held, this will be dependent on your ground items modifier key.
translation: 启用后，你的地面物品覆盖层将显示指定物品消失前的剩余时间。如果设置为按住按键显示，则取决于你的地面物品修饰键。

english: Ground Items Overlay - Time until items despawn
translation: 地面物品覆盖层 - 物品消失时间

english: When enabled, your ground items overlay will display the time remaining until a given item will despawn.
translation: 启用后，你的地面物品覆盖层将显示指定物品消失前的剩余时间。

english: When enabled, your ground items overlay will display the time remaining until a given item will be visible to other players. If set to display with key held, this will be dependent on your ground items modifier key.
translation: 启用后，你的地面物品覆盖层将显示指定物品对其他玩家可见前的剩余时间。如果设置为按住按键显示，则取决于你的地面物品修饰键。

english: Ground Items Overlay - Time until items are visible to others
translation: 地面物品覆盖层 - 物品对他人可见时间

english: When enabled, your ground items overlay will display the time remaining until a given item will be visible to other players.
translation: 启用后，你的地面物品覆盖层将显示指定物品对其他玩家可见前的剩余时间。

english: When enabled, your ground items overlay will display all items, even those filtered out, and offer the ability to add them as filters or highlights. If set to display with key held, this will be dependent on your ground items modifier key.
translation: 启用后，你的地面物品覆盖层将显示所有物品，包括那些被过滤掉的，并提供将它们添加为过滤器或高亮的功能。如果设置为按住按键显示，则取决于你的地面物品修饰键。
地面物品覆盖层 - 编辑模式

english: When enabled, your ground items overlay will display all items, even those filtered out, and offer the ability to add them as filters or highlights.
translation: 启用后，你的地面物品覆盖层将显示所有物品，包括那些被过滤掉的，并提供将它们添加为过滤器或高亮的功能。

english: When any information on the ground items overlay is set to show with key held, pressing this key will show such information.
translation: 当地面物品覆盖层上的任何信息设置为按住按键显示时，按下此键将显示此类信息。
地面物品覆盖层 - 修饰键

english: When enabled, items on the ground will have their price displayed next to the name of the item.
translation: 启用后，地面上的物品将在其名称旁边显示价格。
地面物品 - 显示价格

english:
Brutus is a boss found in the cow pen in eastern Lumbridge.

Attack Styles - Melee
Slayer Categories - Cow
translation:
布鲁图斯是位于仑桥镇东部牛栏中的一个 Boss。

攻击风格 - 近战
杀戮类别 - 牛

english:
Mandatory requirements:
- The Ides of Milk
translation:
强制要求：
- 奶月望日

english: When enabled, you will be asked to confirm your selection when using the in-game World Switcher menu to change worlds. Especially dangerous worlds, such as PvP worlds, may give warnings regardless.
translation: 启用后，当你使用游戏内的世界切换菜单更换世界时，系统会要求你确认选择。特别危险的世界，例如PvP世界，可能会无视此设置而发出警告。

english: When enabled, if there's no new music track to play when one ends, the currently playing one will restart.
translation: 启用后，如果一首音乐曲目结束时没有新的曲目可播放，当前播放的曲目将重新开始。

english: Comma separated list of sources ignored by the loot tracker.
translation: 战利品追踪器忽略的来源列表，以逗号分隔。
战利品追踪器 - 来源忽略列表

english: Maximum number of lines shown in the ground items overlay.
translation: 地面物品覆盖层中显示的最大行数。
地面物品 - 最大显示行数

english: Defeat the Doom of Mokhaiotl during its Melee charge phase.
translation: 在莫凯奥特之灾的近战冲锋阶段将其击败。

english: Defeat the Doom of Mokhaiotl at level 8 or above before he finishes the first burrow phase.
translation: 在莫凯奥特之灾完成第一次洞穴阶段之前，以等级 8 或以上将其击败。

english: Defeat the Doom of Mokhaiotl levels 1-8 without ever letting a grub be absorbed.
translation: 在莫凯奥特之灾 1-8 级中，不让任何幼虫被吸收的情况下将其击败。

english: Defeat the Doom of Mokhaiotl levels 1-8 without taking any damage from the boss, letting any grubs be absorbed, or stepping in acid blood.
translation: 在莫凯奥特之灾 1-8 级中，不承受 Boss 的任何伤害、不让任何幼虫被吸收、不踩到酸性血的情况下将其击败。

english: Defeat the Doom of Mokhaiotl levels 1-8 without restoring your prayer points through any method.
translation: 在莫凯奥特之灾 1-8 级中，不通过任何方式恢复祈祷点的情况下将其击败。

english: Defeat the Doom of Mokhaiotl levels 1-8 whilst only damaging the boss with one-handed melee attacks.
translation: 在莫凯奥特之灾 1-8 级中，仅使用单手近战攻击对 Boss 造成伤害的情况下将其击败。

english: Defeat the Doom of Mokhaiotl levels 1-8 without equipping a demonbane weapon.
translation: 在莫凯奥特之灾 1-8 级中，不装备除魔武器的情况下将其击败。

english: Defeat the Doom of Mokhaiotl levels 1-8 whilst always wearing a shield.
translation: 在莫凯奥特之灾 1-8 级中，始终装备盾牌的情况下将其击败。

english: Defeat the Doom of Mokhaiotl level 1 in less than 30 seconds.
translation: 在 30 秒内击败莫凯奥特之灾 1 级。

english: Defeat the Doom of Mokhaiotl levels 1-8 in less than 10:00.
translation: 在 10 分钟内击败莫凯奥特之灾 1-8 级。

english: Clear at least 8 acid splats in a single Volatile Earth special attack.
translation: 在单次不稳定地块战技中清除至少 8 个酸液飞溅。

english: Send a notification to players when an event is an hour from starting.
translation: 当活动距开始还有一小时时向玩家发送通知。

english: Collection log broadcast every x logs
translation: 每收集x个日志广播一次收藏日志

english: Only send a collection log broadcast every X amount of logs.
translation: 每获得X个收藏日志才发送一次广播。

english: Only send notifications from the main game worlds only.
translation: 仅从主要游戏世界发送通知。

english: When enabled, while you are playing on a mobile device, other players may see a mobile icon (<img=54>) in their minimenu when they look at your character. The icon is not shown if you are in a PvP area, regardless of this option.
translation: 启用后，当你在移动设备上游玩时，其他玩家在迷你菜单中查看你的角色时可能会看到一个移动图标（<img=54>）。如果你在PvP区域，无论此选项如何设置，都不会显示该图标。

english: You have a 50% chance not to consume secondary ingredients when creating potions.
translation: 制作药水时，你有 50% 的几率不消耗辅助材料。

english: You have a 20% chance to instantly forge bars from the ore you mine, granting Smithing experience regardless of level requirements.
translation: 你有 20% 的几率立即将你开采的矿石锻造成金属锭，无视等级要求并获得锻造经验值。

english: You have a 75% chance for a Clue Scroll to return the reward casket after you complete a clue step for any tier.
translation: 完成任意等级的线索步骤后，你有 75% 的几率让线索卷轴返还奖励宝箱。

english: All weapons with a base attack speed above 4 will be reduced by 1.
translation: 所有基础攻击速度高于 4 的武器，其攻击速度将降低 1。

english: Rank required to receive notifications when clan members open a loot key.
translation: 接收氏族成员打开战利品钥匙通知所需的职位等级。

english: Minimum value for loot from loot keys to trigger a clan notification message.
translation: 触发氏族通知消息所需的战利品钥匙战利品最低价值。

english: When enabled, when using items on your looting bag, you will immediately store as many of that item as possible in the bag.
translation: 启用后，当对战利品袋使用物品时，你将立即将尽可能多的该物品存入袋中。
战利品袋 - 全部存入

english: When enabled, food and potions will be prevented from being automatically put into your looting bag.
translation: 启用后，食物和药水将被阻止自动放入你的战利品袋。
战利品袋 - 忽略补给品

english: When enabled, if you die with a rune pouch, its contents will be emptied into your grave, even if the pouch itself is not lost. The pouch is always emptied if it is destroyed, or if the death is in PvP, regardless of this option.
translation: 启用后，如果你带着符石袋死亡，其内容物将被清空到你的坟墓中，即使袋子本身没有丢失。如果袋子被摧毁，或者死亡发生在PvP中，无论此选项如何设置，袋子都会被清空。

english: Always empty rune pouches on death
translation: 死亡时始终清空符石袋

english: When enabled, if you die with a tackle box, its contents will be emptied into your grave, even if the box itself is not lost. The box is always emptied if it is destroyed, or if the death is in PvP, regardless of this option.
translation: 启用后，如果你带着渔具盒死亡，其内容物将被清空到你的坟墓中，即使盒子本身没有丢失。如果盒子被摧毁，或者死亡发生在PvP中，无论此选项如何设置，盒子都会被清空。

english: Always empty tackle boxes on death
translation: 死亡时始终清空工具箱

english: When enabled, if you die with a bolt pouch, its contents will be emptied into your grave, even if the pouch itself is not lost. The pouch is always emptied if it is destroyed, or if the death is in PvP, regardless of this option.
translation: 启用后，如果你带着弩箭袋死亡，其内容物将被清空到你的坟墓中，即使袋子本身没有丢失。如果袋子被摧毁，或者死亡发生在PvP中，无论此选项如何设置，袋子都会被清空。

english: Always empty bolt pouches on death
translation: 死亡时始终清空弩箭袋

english: When enabled, if you die with a seed box, its contents will be emptied into your grave, even if the box itself is not lost. The box is always emptied if it is destroyed, or if the death is in PvP, regardless of this option.
translation: 启用后，如果你带着种子盒死亡，其内容物将被清空到你的坟墓中，即使盒子本身没有丢失。如果盒子被摧毁，或者死亡发生在PvP中，无论此选项如何设置，盒子都会被清空。

english: Always empty seed boxes on death
translation: 死亡时始终清空种子盒

english: When enabled, if you die with an essence pouch, its contents will be emptied into your grave, even if the pouch itself is not lost. The pouch is always emptied if it is destroyed, or if the death is in PvP, regardless of this option.
translation: 启用后，如果你带着精华袋死亡，其内容物将被清空到你的坟墓中，即使袋子本身没有丢失。如果袋子被摧毁，或者死亡发生在PvP中，无论此选项如何设置，袋子都会被清空。

english: Always empty essence pouches on death
translation: 死亡时始终清空精华袋

english: When enabled, if you die with a herb sack, its contents will be emptied into your grave, even if the sack itself is not lost. The sack is always emptied if it is destroyed, or if the death is in PvP, regardless of this option.
translation: 启用后，如果你带着草药袋死亡，其内容物将被清空到你的坟墓中，即使袋子本身没有丢失。如果袋子被摧毁，或者死亡发生在PvP中，无论此选项如何设置，袋子都会被清空。

english: Always empty herb sacks on death
translation: 死亡时始终清空草药袋

english: When enabled, the compass options that orient the camera towards North, South, East or West will use a fixed vertical angle rather than preserving its current height.
translation: 启用后，将摄像机朝向北、南、东或西的指南针选项将使用固定的垂直角度，而不是保持其当前高度。

english: When enabled, shows your current woodcutting skill bonus while chopping with other players.
translation: 启用后，与其他玩家一起砍伐时显示你当前的伐木技能加成。

english: When enabled, shows the remaining amount of woodcutting chops boosted by leprechaun luck. You can set this to only be shown if you have an axe.
translation: 启用后，显示由小妖精运气提升的剩余伐木次数。你可以将其设置为仅在你持有斧头时显示。

english: Adventurer, I'll trade items with you for an amazing price, but you've got to come immediately to a particular place on a different game world. Hurry up! Come now before you lose out! What do you say?
translation: 冒险者，我跟你做个交易，价格超棒，但你得马上到另一个游戏世界的某个地方来。快点！现在就来，不然就亏了！你怎么说？

english: When enabled, snow overlays will be shown where applicable.
translation: 启用后，在适用的情况下将显示雪覆盖层。

english:
- All items in shops around Gielinor that use coins as currency are free of charge.

- All items purchased from some select shops can be noted, provided the item can be noted at all.
- There will be a new button on select shops which toggles this effect.

- Shops no longer buy items for gold.
translation:
- 吉列诺尔所有使用金币作为货币的商店中的物品全部免费。

- 从某些特定商店购买的所有物品都可以被注明，前提是该物品可以被注明。
- 特定商店上将有一个新按钮来切换此效果。

- 商店不再用金币收购物品。

english:
- You will be given a Globetrotter Pendant, which grants access to the following:

- Teleports from a fully upgraded Jewellery Box

- The following teleports from the Portal Nexus:

- Annakarl (Demonic Ruins)
- Ape Atoll
- Ape Atoll Dungeon
- Arceuus Library
- Barbarian Outpost
- Barrows
- Battlefront
- Camelot
- Carrallanger (Graveyard of Shadows)
- Catherby
- Draynor Manor
- East Ardougne
- Falador

- Ghorrock (Frozen Waste Plateau)
- Grand Exchange
- Harmony Island
- Ice Plateau
- Kharyrll (Canifis)
- Kourend Castle
- Lassar (Ice Mountain)
- Lumbridge
- Lunar Isle
- Mind Altar
- Ourania
- Paddewwa (Edgeville Dungeon)
- Port Khazard
- Salve Graveyard
- Seers' Village
- Senntisten (Digsite)
- Teleport to House
- The Forgotten Cemetery
- Troll Stronghold
- Trollheim
- Varrock
- Watchtower
- Waterbirth Island
- Weiss
- West Ardougne
- Yanille

- As this Relic gives you an item it must be unlocked at a Bank.
translation:
- 你将获得一个环球旅行家的吊坠，可访问以下传送点：

- 来自完全升级的首饰盒的传送

- 来自传送枢纽的以下传送点：

- 安纳卡尔（恶魔废墟）
- 猿猴岛
- 猿猴岛地牢
- 阿西乌斯图书馆
- 野蛮人前哨站
- 巴罗斯墓穴
- 战场前线
- 卡美洛
- 卡拉兰格（阴影墓地）
- 凯瑟比镇
- 德雷诺庄园
- 东阿多尼城
- 法拉多城
- 芬肯斯特雷恩城堡
- 钓鱼公会
- 戈洛克（冰原高原）
- 大交易所
- 和谐岛
- 冰原
- 卡里尔（坎尼非斯村）
- 库兰德城堡
- 拉萨尔（冰山）
- 仑桥镇
- 月亮岛
- 心灵祭坛
- 奥拉尼亚
- 帕德瓦（边陲镇地牢）
- 卡扎德港
- 萨尔维墓地
- 先知村
- 森蒂斯滕（考古挖掘场）
- 房屋传送术
- 被遗忘的墓地
- 巨魔要塞
- 巨魔之家
- 维洛克城
- 瞭望塔
- 水诞岛
- 韦斯
- 西阿多尼城
- 亚尼勒城

- 由于此遗物会给予你物品，因此必须在银行解锁。

english:
- You are able to get a Slayer Task and cancel a Slayer Task by speaking to a Slayer Master or checking your Slayer status via your Slayer Gem, Helmet, or Ring.

- Superior Slayer creatures have a 1/25 chance to appear.

- Superior Slayer creatures will give Slayer points when killed, based on their Slayer level and difficulty.

- Superior Slayer creatures now have double the number of rolls on the lesser creature's drop table. This does not double the amount of rolls on the Superior Slayer Creature's unique drop table.

- There is a 25% chance a superior monster will appear as a 'Bloodthirsty' version, with boosted offensive stats. This monster will triple the number of rolls on the lesser creature's non-unique drop table, plus a roll on its own unique drop table. They will also drop guaranteed Clue Scrolls if it is on the superior's drop table.

- Expeditious and Slaughter Bracelets will no longer consume charges and have a 35% chance to trigger, up from 25%.
translation:
- 你可以通过与杀戮大师交谈或通过你的杀戮宝石、头盔或戒指检查你的杀戮状态来接受杀戮任务和取消杀戮任务。

- 高级杀戮生物有1/25的几率出现。

- 杀死高级杀戮生物时会给予杀戮点数，具体取决于其杀戮等级和难度。

- 高级杀戮生物现在在低级生物的掉落表上有双倍的掷骰次数。这不会使高级杀戮生物独特掉落表上的掷骰次数翻倍。

- 有25%的几率高级怪物会以'嗜血'版本出现，拥有增强的攻击属性。此怪物将在低级生物的非独特掉落表上掷骰三次，外加一次其自身独特掉落表的掷骰。如果高级生物的掉落表上有线索卷轴，它们也会保证掉落。

- 急速手镯和屠杀手镯不再消耗充能，并且触发几率从25%提升至35%。

english:
- This item will allow you to note and unnote items anywhere in Gielinor.

- You can manually use items on the Banker's Note to unnote or note them all, much like a Bank.

- The 'Activate' option allows you to note and unnote items in one action with a specified quantity. An object must first be used on the Banker's Note in order for this to work.

- You can customise how many items the Banker's note will note and unnote using the quantity options.
translation:
- 此物品允许你在吉列诺尔任何地方注明和取消注明物品。

- 你可以像使用银行一样，手动将物品用于银行职员票据以全部取消注明或注明。

- '激活'选项允许你通过一次操作并指定数量来注明和取消注明物品。必须先对银行职员票据使用一个物品，此功能才能生效。

- 你可以使用数量选项自定义银行职员票据每次注明和取消注明的物品数量。

english:
- All your attacks have an increased minimum hit (10% of your max hit).

- Whenever one of your attacks successfully hits, there is a 50% chance that you will restore your Hitpoints and Prayer by 10% of the damage dealt, rounded up.

- This Relic's restore effect does not work for multi-target attacks or Special Attacks.

- This Relic's restoration effect will work with the Scythe of Vitur's initial hit, however, it will only work for its secondary hits if those hits have the same target as the initial hit. The Restoration effect will only work on the Venator bow's initial hit.
translation:
- 你所有的攻击都有更高的最低伤害（你最大伤害的10%）。

- 每当你的攻击成功命中时，有50%的几率恢复你造成伤害10%的生命值和祈祷值，向上取整。

- 此遗物的恢复效果不适用于多目标攻击或战技。

- 此遗物的恢复效果适用于维图尔镰刀的首次命中，但仅当后续命中与首次命中的目标相同时才对其生效。恢复效果仅适用于维纳托弓的首次命中。

english:
- Every 30 seconds, your Special Attack energy is restored by 30% rather than the usual 10%.

- If you have no Special Attack energy remaining, you sacrifice 25 hitpoints for the special attack instead.

- Special Attacks are 100% accurate against monsters.

- Special Attacks have a minimum hit of 20% of your max hit.
translation:
- 每30秒，你的战技能量恢复30%，而不是通常的10%。

- 如果你没有剩余的战技能量，你可以牺牲25点生命值来发动战技。

- 战技对怪物100%准确。

- 战技的最低伤害为你最大伤害的20%。

english:
- You will harvest patches at a rate of up to 20x per action, noting any contents you receive.

- All patches will give 3x the yield.

- Farming patches grow instantly.

- Your plants will never die.

- You have a 20%~ chance to not use a seed or sapling when planting items in patches.
translation:
- 你收获作物地块的速度高达每次动作20倍，并注明你收到的任何物品。

- 所有地块的产量增加3倍。

- 农业地块瞬间生长。

- 你的植物永远不会死亡。

- 你在地块中种植物品时，有20

english:
- Magic spells and weapons with an attack speed of 4 or above have this stat halved, rounded down.

- Magic spells and weapons with an attack speed of 3 or below have this stat halved, rounded up.

- You save 90% of your Runes when casting spells. This includes charges when using powered staves such as the Trident of the Seas, Trident of the Swamp, Sanguinesti Staff, Tumeken's Shadow, and the Enchanted Slayer Staff.

- Bind spells will always hit on an unfrozen, non freeze-immune target.

- Acquire the Arcane Grimoire, which allows you to change between any Spellbooks you have unlocked. Must be at a Bank to obtain the item.

- Acquire a Rune Pouch.

- All Rune Pouches store 2 more types of Runes.

- Magic attacks will deal an additional 25% as splash damage to surrounding targets, up to 5 additional targets.

- This splash damage effect only works in multicombat areas.

- Magic accuracy is increased by 175%.

- Magic damage is increased by 20%.
translation:
- 攻击速度为4或以上的魔法法术和武器，该属性减半，向下取整。

- 攻击速度为3或以下的魔法法术和武器，该属性减半，向上取整。

- 施法时节省90%的符石。这包括使用充能法杖（如海洋三叉戟、沼泽三叉戟、桑格内斯蒂法杖、图梅肯之影和附魔杀戮者法杖）时的充能消耗。

- 束缚术法术将始终命中未冰冻且非冰冻免疫的目标。

- 获得奥术魔法书，它允许你在已解锁的任何法术书之间切换。必须在银行才能获得该物品。

- 获得一个符石袋。

- 所有符石袋可多储存2种符石。

- 魔法攻击将对周围目标造成额外25%的溅射伤害，最多5个额外目标。

- 此溅射伤害效果仅在多战斗区域生效。

- 魔法命中率提高175%。

- 魔法伤害提高20%。

english:
- Melee weapons with attack speed 4 or above have this stat halved, rounded down.

- Melee weapons with attack speed 3 or below have this stat halved, rounded up.

- 90% of charges are saved when using Melee weapons.

- Immune to all status effects, including but not limited to Poison, Venom, and Firebreath, with the exception of stuns and roots. This applies in both PvE and PvP.

- 10% Chance to deal a critical strike on a successful melee hit, dealing double damage.

- Melee accuracy is increased by 50%.

- Melee, Ranged and Magic defence is increased by 50%.
translation:
- 攻击速度为4或以上的近战武器，该属性减半，向下取整。

- 攻击速度为3或以下的近战武器，该属性减半，向上取整。

- 使用近战武器时节省90%的充能。

- 免疫所有状态效果，包括但不限于中毒、剧毒和龙息，但眩晕和定身效果除外。这适用于PvE和PvP。

- 成功进行近战攻击时，有10%的几率造成暴击，造成双倍伤害。

- 近战命中率提高50%。

- 近战、远程和魔法防御提高50%。

english:
- Ranged weapons with attack speed 4 or above have this stat halved, rounded down.

- Ranged weapons with attack speed 3 or below have this stat halved, rounded up.

- 90% of ammunition is saved when using Ranged weapons. This effect stacks with Ava's devices resulting in a 98% ammo saving bonus. Bow of Faerdhinen, Crystal Bow, Chinchompas and Toxic Blowpipe charges are included in this effect.

- Enchanted Bolts have a 2x boosted chance to proc.

- 10% chance that your weapon will fire an extra projectile. (Bows, Crossbows, Ballista and most thrown weapons).

- Ranged accuracy is increased by 100%.
translation:
- 攻击速度为4或以上的远程武器，该属性减半，向下取整。

- 攻击速度为3或以下的远程武器，该属性减半，向上取整。

- 使用远程武器时节省90%的弹药。此效果与艾娃的装置叠加，可获得98%的弹药节省加成。法尔迪宁之弓、水晶弓、炸弹鼠和有毒的吹箭筒的充能也包含在此效果中。

- 附魔弩箭触发效果的几率提高2倍。

- 有10%的几率你的武器会额外发射一枚弹丸。（弓、弩、弩炮和大多数投掷武器）。

- 远程命中率提高100%。

english:
- The axe is a thrown ranged weapon which can be used to execute targets below 20% hitpoints.

- The axe has an attack range of 6 tiles.

- The axe's damage respects any ranged damage reduction effects and immunities the target has.

- The axe will not work against Yama.

- Throwing the axe doesn't consume it, but the primary hit does trigger regeneration effects from Demonic Pacts.

- Execute damage can hit additional targets with Demonic Pacts.

- This perk will also work inside The Gauntlet.
translation:
- 这把斧头是一种投掷远程武器，可用于处决生命值低于20%的目标。

- 斧头的攻击范围为6格。

- 斧头的伤害受目标的远程伤害减免效果和免疫效果影响。

- 斧头对阎魔无效。

- 投掷斧头不会消耗它，但主要命中会触发来自恶魔契约的再生效果。

- 处决伤害可以通过恶魔契约命中额外目标。

- 此效果在试炼之路内也有效。

english:
- When you take fatal damage directly from an NPC or player, you will restore all your hitpoints and Prayer.

- Upon triggering this effect you will deal damage to all monsters or players within 3 tiles of you, assuming their south-west coordinate is within this radius. (Similar to how chinchompas and other AoE effects work). This effect will only work in the same scenarios that the Retribution Prayer would normally trigger.

- In PvM combat this damage will be equal to 200% of your Prayer level. In PvP combat this effect will be equal to 50% of your Prayer level.

- There is a 3 minute cooldown on this effect.

- Cooldown is reset on actual death.

- The damaging effect will not work on NPCs that are recoil immune, with some exceptions:
- Nex
- Hespori
- Vorkath
- All Wilderness bosses
translation:
- 当你直接受到NPC或玩家的致命伤害时，你将恢复所有生命值和祈祷。

- 触发此效果时，你将对你周围3格内的所有怪物或玩家造成伤害，假设它们的西南坐标在此半径内。（类似于炸弹鼠和其他范围效果的工作方式）。此效果仅在报应祈祷通常触发的相同场景下有效。

- 在PvM战斗中，此伤害等于你祈祷等级的200%。在PvP战斗中，此效果等于你祈祷等级的50%。

- 此效果有3分钟的冷却时间。

- 实际死亡时重置冷却时间。

- 伤害效果对反伤免疫的NPC无效，但有一些例外：
- 奈克斯
- 赫斯波里
- 沃卡斯
- 所有荒野Boss

english:
- This item will allow you to summon a powerful Guardian Thrall, lasting 30 minutes.

- The guardian will attack your target with whatever style it is weak to.

- When you are in multi-combat it will cast an AoE attack if the target is weak to range or magic.

- The Guardian's stats are:
- Min hit: 5
- Max hit: 13
- Attack Speed: 4
- Accuracy: 45000

- The Guardian does not work in PvP.

- This perk will also work inside The Gauntlet.
translation:
- 此物品将允许你召唤一个强大的守护者仆从，持续30分钟。

- 守护者将使用目标弱点的战斗风格攻击你的目标。

- 当你在多战斗区域时，如果目标弱点是远程或魔法，它将施放范围攻击。

- 守护者的属性为：
- 最小伤害：5
- 最大伤害：13
- 攻击速度：4
- 命中率：45000

- 守护者在PvP中无效。

- 此效果在试炼之路内也有效。

english:
- Damage is increased against monsters by 0.4% per hitpoint you are missing.

- Your damage is equal to your max hit on monsters with full hitpoints.
translation:
- 对怪物的伤害根据你缺失的每点生命值提高0.4%。

- 你对满生命值的怪物造成的伤害等于你的最大伤害。

english:
- You will automatically re-pickpocket your target.

- Loot from pickpocketing is doubled and noted.

- Coin pouch limit is multiplied by 3.

- You will be given the Sage's Greaves, that will grant Agility XP that scales with your Agility level while running.

- Box traps lure creatures faster.

- Loot from box traps is doubled.

- Impling jars cannot break.

- You can burn up to 9 logs simultaneously.

- You cannot fail actions for Thieving, Agility, Hunter and Firemaking.

- As this Relic gives you an item it must be unlocked at a Bank.
translation:
- 你将自动重复扒窃你的目标。

- 扒窃的战利品翻倍并被备注。

- 钱袋上限乘以3。

- 你将获得智者护腿，它会在你奔跑时提供与你的敏捷等级成比例的敏捷经验。

- 箱式陷阱能更快地吸引生物。

- 箱式陷阱的战利品翻倍。

- 小精灵罐不会破碎。

Yama is a boss found within the Chasm of Fire, north west of Shayzien.

Attack Styles - Melee, Ranged, Magic, Special
Immunities - Venom

阎魔是位于谢兹恩城西北方火焰深渊地牢中的一个 Boss。

english: Defeat Yama in an average time of under 3:38 over your last four kills.
translation: 在最近四次击杀中，以平均时间低于 3 分 38 秒击败阎魔。

english: Defeat Yama without anybody healing using anything other than plain pizza and without anybody drinking any potions.
translation: 在没有人使用原味披萨以外的任何东西治疗，且没有人饮用任何药水的情况下击败阎魔。

english: Determines how long you can remain idle before being logged out.
translation: 决定你在被登出前可以保持闲置多长时间。

english: Determines how long you can remain idle before being logged out. Note: Mobile operating systems may override this timer by suspending or closing the app when idle or in the background.
translation: 决定你保持空闲多久后会被登出。注意：移动操作系统可能会在空闲或后台时暂停或关闭应用，从而覆盖此计时器。

english: Defeat Yama without getting hit by shadows and without being more than one tile away from the center of his shadow crash attack.
translation: 在不被阴影击中，且距离其阴影冲击攻击中心不超过一格瓷砖的情况下击败阎魔。

english: Defeat Yama without getting hit by fire and having only killed void flares with special attacks.
translation: 在不被火焰击中，且仅使用战技击杀虚空耀斑的情况下击败阎魔。

english: Defeat Yama without the judge being attacked with the wrong style and without taking more than one instance of damage each time you are exiled from the arena.
translation: 在审判官未被错误攻击风格攻击，且每次被逐出竞技场时承受不超过一次伤害的情况下击败阎魔。

english: Defeat Yama whilst completing 'Shadow Dancer', 'Fire Fighter', 'Back so soon?' and without taking any other avoidable damage.
translation: 在完成“暗影舞者”、“消防员”、“这么快就回来了？”且不承受任何其他可避免伤害的情况下击败阎魔。

english: Defeat Yama under the elevated conditions of one of his non-standard contracts.
translation: 在阎魔某个非标准契约的强化条件下击败他。

english:
The Misthalin area covers the entire Kingdom of Misthalin as well as Fossil Island.

Instances of areas in Misthalin and underground areas with an entrance in Misthalin will also be included.

Access to Al Kharid, Port Sarim and the western exit of Barbarian Village is blocked by magical barriers.

All transportation and teleportation through Charter Ships, Customs Officers, Gnome Gliders, Fairy Rings, Balloons, or any other transport system will require you to have unlocked access to the area your destination is in.

The following travel options are restricted unless you have access to the appropriate area:

- The gate between Lumbridge and Al Kharid
- The entrance to the Kalphite Hive from Dorgesh-Kaan Dungeon
- The grapple shortcut between Lumbridge and Al Kharid
- The stepping stone between Lumbridge Swamp and the Kalphite Lair
- The under-wall shortcut between Draynor Village and Port Sarim
- The underground sections of the Paterdomus Temple
- The railing shortcut between the Paterdomus Temple and Canifis

english:
The Wilderness area covers the entirety of the Wilderness.

Last Man Standing and Bounty Hunter will not be accessible during this League.

For this League, deaths will behave differently in the Wilderness:

- PvP deaths will be treated like a PvM death with your lost items moving to a gravestone. The gravestone will then move to your respawn location.
- PvM deaths will be unaffected.
- Loot keys are disabled on League Worlds.

Instances of areas in the Wilderness and underground areas with an entrance in the Wilderness will also be included.

All transportation and teleportation via Charter Ships, Customs Officers, Gnome Gliders, Fairy Rings, Balloons and other forms of transport require you to have unlocked access to the area your destination is in.

The following travel options are restricted unless you have access to the appropriate area:

- Crossing the Wilderness Ditch will require access to whichever area is on the other side of it
- The lever at the Deserted Keep will work only if you have access to the area it takes you to

Demonic pacts will be disabled in PVP where possible.
translation:
荒野地区覆盖了整个荒野。

本次联赛期间，最后幸存者和赏金猎人将不可用。

本次联赛中，荒野中的死亡将有不同的表现：

- PvP死亡将被视为PvM死亡，你丢失的物品将移至墓碑。然后墓碑将移至你的重生点。
- PvM死亡将不受影响。
- 战利品钥匙在联赛世界中禁用。

荒野地区的副本实例以及入口在荒野的地下区域也将包含在内。

english: Determines which music mode to use. Area plays music relevant to the area you are currently in. Shuffle plays unlocked music tracks in a shuffled order (and if in a playlist, only selects tracks from that playlist). Single simply plays the current music track.
translation: 决定使用哪种音乐模式。区域模式播放与你当前所在区域相关的音乐。随机模式以随机顺序播放已解锁的音乐曲目（如果在播放列表中，则仅从该播放列表中选择曲目）。单曲模式仅播放当前音乐曲目。

english:
Farming patches and plants no longer have any level requirements to harvest, plant or make.

Additionally, you gain the following perks to Farming:
- You will receive 10x yield from all farming patches and it will automatically be noted.
- XP is granted for all additional resources gathered.
- Your plants will never die.
- You have a 20% chance to not use a seed or sapling when planting crops in patches.

The Fairy mushroom will allow you to teleport to any fairy ring, spirit tree, or tool leprechaun.
- Unlocking this will autocomplete the Tree Gnome Village quest.
- This item ignores wilderness teleport restrictions.
- This item cannot be used to teleport to an area you haven't unlocked.
translation:
种植地和植物不再有收获、种植或制作的等级要求。

此外，你获得以下 农业 增益：
- 你将获得所有种植地 10 倍的产量，并且会自动变为银行票据。
- 所有额外收集的资源都会给予经验值。
- 你的植物永远不会死亡。
- 你在种植地种植作物时有 20% 的几率不消耗种子或树苗。

仙女菇 将允许你传送到任何 仙女环、灵魂树 或 工具小妖精。
- 解锁此物品将自动完成地精村庄任务。
- 此物品无视荒野传送限制。
- 此物品不能用于传送到你尚未解锁的区域。

english:
- This whistle will allow you to summon a powerful Minion which lasts for 30 minutes.

- The minion will attack your target with whatever style it is weakest to.

- When you are in multi-combat it will cast an AoE attack if the target is weakest to range or magic.

- The minion's stats are:
- Min hit: 3
- Max hit: 10
- Attack Speed: 1.8
- Accuracy: 45,000

- The whistle can consume up to 5 unique equippable Zamorak items (by using them on the whistle) increasing your minion's max hit by 2 per unique item.

- The minion will try to automatically loot items from creatures you kill (including fired range ammo). A minimum value threshold and whether or not these should be noted is configurable on the whistle.

- The minion will deal damage to targets which are immune to thralls.

- The minion will not fight in PvP and will not fight against Yama.
translation:
- 此哨子将允许你召唤一个强大的 仆从，持续 30 分钟。

- 仆从将使用目标最弱的攻击风格攻击你的目标。

- 当你在多目标战斗区域时，如果目标最弱于远程或魔法，它将施放范围攻击。

- 仆从的属性为：
- 最小伤害：3
- 最大伤害：10
- 攻击速度：1.8
- 准确度：45,000

- 哨子可以消耗最多 5 件独特的可装备扎莫拉克物品（通过将物品使用在哨子上），每件独特物品可使你的 仆从的最大伤害提高 2。

- 仆从将尝试自动 拾取物品 从你击杀的生物身上（包括发射的远程弹药）。可以在哨子上配置最低价值阈值以及是否将其变为银行票据。

- 仆从将对免疫召唤物的目标造成伤害。

- 仆从不会在 PvP 中战斗，也不会与 阎魔 战斗。

english:
This item will allow you to teleport to the entrance of any boss or raid in the combat achievements list.

Additionally:
- Barrows will have the option to go to the chest or to the surface.
- You can teleport to each Moon of peril individually.

- This item ignores wilderness teleport restrictions.

- This item cannot be used to teleport to an area you haven't unlocked.
translation:
此物品将允许你传送到战斗成就列表中任何 Boss 或副本的入口。

此外：
- 巴罗斯墓穴 将可以选择前往宝箱处或地面。
- 你可以单独传送到每个 灾厄之月。

- 此物品无视荒野传送限制。

- 此物品不能用于传送到你尚未解锁的区域。

english:
- All items are processed at once while Fletching. Stackable fletching items are capped at 10x the regular amount per action.

- Chopped logs are automatically burned while Woodcutting granting full Firemaking XP, this effect can be toggled above.

You also gain the following benefits to Hunter:

- 100% success rate on all actions.

- Traps attract animals faster, give double the loot and XP.

- Traps always drop a random herb seed or tree seed when harvested.

- Hunter rumours give double XP and Hunters' loot sacks will give double the amount of loot rolls.

- All loot from jarred implings will give an extra loot roll and be noted. Additionally they will no longer break upon opening.

- All Quetzal Whistles will not lose charges.
translation:
- 进行 制箭 时，所有物品将一次性处理。可堆叠的制箭物品每次操作的上限为常规数量的 10 倍。

- 进行 伐木 时，砍下的原木会自动燃烧，给予全额 生火 经验值，此效果可在上方切换。

你还获得以下 猎人 增益：

- 所有动作 100% 成功。

- 陷阱更快吸引动物，给予双倍战利品和经验值。

- 陷阱在收获时总是掉落随机草药种子或树木种子。

- 猎人传闻给予双倍经验值，猎人战利品袋 将给予双倍战利品次数。

- 来自罐装小精灵的所有战利品将获得额外一次战利品次数并变为银行票据。此外，它们打开时不再破碎。

- 所有绿咬鹃哨子不会损失充能。

english:
- You become capable of chopping wood, mining rocks and fishing with your bare hands without requiring any tools or bait.

- Your hands are equivalent to the crystal version of the respective tools where those exist.

- Whenever you gain Fishing, Woodcutting or Mining XP while gathering you will also receive an additional 10% XP in both Strength and Agility.

- Up to 3 different types of gathered items (wood, fish, metallic ore and coal) can be placed in the Knapsack, which has a total maximum capacity of 140.

- On failing to mine a rock, catch a fish or chop a tree you will have a separate 50% chance to succeed instead.

- The Knapsack can be emptied at a bank.
translation:
- 你能够徒手砍伐木材、开采岩石和钓鱼，无需任何工具或鱼饵。

- 你的双手等同于相应工具的水晶版本（如果存在）。

- 每当你通过采集获得 钓鱼、伐木 或 采矿 经验值时，你还将在 力量 和 敏捷 中获得额外的 10% 经验值。

- 最多 3 种不同类型的采集物品（木材、鱼类、金属矿石和煤）可以放入 背包，其总容量上限为 140。

- 在采矿、钓鱼或伐木失败时，你有额外的 50% 几率成功。

- 背包 可以在银行清空。

english:
While the Searing boots are worn, you gain the following benefits:

- Agility experience is gained based on your Agility level while you run.

- Caught fish are automatically cooked.

- Mined ore is automatically smelted.

Additionally, regardless of your footwear:

- Picking up some Termites or a Mark of grace from a course will automatically complete the lap granting completion XP and 10,000 coins.

- Marks of grace will always have a 33% chance to spawn on all rooftop courses.

- Completing a course grants two completion count and 25% bonus experience.

- 100% success rate on all actions for Agility and Cooking.

- You will receive 2x Termites from the Colossal Wyrm Agility Course.

- You will receive 10x Crystal shards from Prifddinas Agility Course.
translation:
穿着 灼热之靴 时，你获得以下增益：

- 奔跑时根据你的 敏捷 等级获得 敏捷 经验值。

- 钓到的鱼会自动烹饪。

- 开采的矿石会自动冶炼。

此外，无论你穿着何种鞋类：

- 从课程中拾取一些 白蚁 或 优雅印记 将自动完成该圈，给予完成经验值和 10,000 金币。

- 优雅印记 在所有屋顶课程上总是有 33% 的几率生成。

- 完成一个课程给予两次完成计数和 25% 的奖励经验值。

- 敏捷 和 烹饪 的所有动作 100% 成功。

- 你将获得 2 倍的 白蚁 来自巨蠕虫敏捷课程。

- 你将获得 10 倍的 水晶碎片 来自普里夫迪纳斯城敏捷课程。

english:
You will gain the following benefits while Thieving:
- 100% success rate on all actions.
- You will automatically re-pickpocket an NPC.
- You will automatically re-steal from a stall.
- Items obtained from pickpocketing and stalls are noted.
- Stalls never deplete and guards will never catch you thieving them.
- The amount of coin pouches you can carry is increased by 10x.

Additionally, while Thieving loot is increased by 10x for the following:
- Pickpocketing.
- Stealing from stalls.
- Stealing house valuables in Varlamore.
translation:
进行 偷窃 时，你将获得以下增益：
- 所有动作 100% 成功。
- 你将自动重复扒窃 NPC。
- 你将自动重复从摊位偷窃。
- 从扒窃和摊位获得的物品将变为银行票据。
- 摊位永远不会耗尽，守卫永远不会抓住你偷窃。
- 你可以携带的钱袋数量增加 10 倍。

此外，进行 偷窃 时，以下物品的战利品增加 10 倍：
- 扒窃。
- 从摊位偷窃。
- 在瓦尔拉莫偷窃房屋贵重物品。

english:
- All non-combat skills are permanently boosted by 10.

- Every time you receive an XP drop, gain an additional 2 XP in the same skill. This is affected by the League Passive XP modifier.

- For every XP gained, gain 2x as many coins. These can go either to your bank or inventory if there is room, which can be toggled above.
translation:
- 所有非战斗技能永久提升 10 级。

- 每当你获得一次经验值掉落，在相同技能中额外获得 2 点经验值。这受联赛被动经验值修正影响。

- 每获得一点经验值，获得 2 倍的金币。这些金币可以存入你的银行或背包（如果有空间），可以在上方切换。

english:
The high alchemy and low alchemy spells transform into two new spells:

- Alchemic Divergence: Upgrades up to 10 of a resource into a higher tier.
- Alchemic Convergence: Downgrades up to 10 of a resource into a lower tier.

Both spells cost no runes and have no level requirement. The spell gives 10 Magic XP for each item transmuted (before league XP multipliers).

The Transmutation ledger can be equipped and acts as an infinite source of Nature runes.

Using items on the Transmutation ledger will display what they can turn into.

When cast upon a noted item, these spells will automatically re-cast over time as long as the items are available in the same slot in your inventory.

You can still cast alchemy spells via the toggle above or by configuring the spells in your spellbook. Normal Alchemy spells will not automatically re-cast and will only cost 1 Nature rune.

List of Transmutable resources:

- Hides
- Runes
- Ashes
- Uncut gems
- Compost
- Seeds (Cactus)
- Seeds (Hardwood tree)
- Seeds (Fruit tree)
- Seeds (Tree)
- Seeds (Bush)
- Seeds (Hops)
- Seeds (Herbs)
- Seeds (Flower)
- Seeds (Allotment)
- Logs (Normal)
- Logs (Pyre)
- Mining (Normal)
- Mining (Crafting)
- Bones
- Raw Fish
translation:
高级炼金术和低级炼金术法术转变为两个新法术：

- 炼金分化：将最多 10 个资源升级为更高等级。
- 炼金聚合：将最多 10 个资源降级为更低等级。

两个法术均不消耗符文且无等级要求。每个转化的物品给予 10 点 魔法 经验值（在联赛经验值倍率之前）。

转化账本 可以装备，并作为 自然符石 的无限来源。

将物品使用在 转化账本 上将显示它们可以转化为什么。

当对已变为银行票据的物品施放时，只要你的背包中同一格有可用物品，这些法术将随时间自动重复施放。

你仍然可以通过上方的切换或在法术书中配置法术来施放炼金术法术。普通炼金术法术不会自动重复施放，且仅消耗 1 个 自然符石。

可转化资源列表：

- 兽皮
- 符文
- 灰烬
- 未切割宝石
- 堆肥
- 种子 (仙人掌)
- 种子 (硬木树)
- 种子 (果树)
- 种子 (树木)
- 种子 (灌木)
- 种子 (霍普斯)
- 种子 (草药)
- 种子 (花卉)
- 种子 (农田)
- 原木 (普通)
- 原木 (火葬)
- 采矿 (普通)
- 采矿 (制作)
- 骨头
- 生鱼

english:
While harvesting any farming crop, or when NPCs would drop bones or ashes, you will instead harvest stackable Soul shards.

Soul shards can be used for the following:
- They can be used in place of Pure essence while training Runecraft.
- 100 can be sacrificed at the Libation bowl at the Teomat for 550 Prayer XP (before league multipliers) without requiring Libation wine.

You will receive 1 shard per 4 base Farming XP granted while harvesting or checking health while farming, this is not multiplied by the leagues XP multiplier.

You will receive more shards for higher tier bones and ashes roughly equal to the bone shard equivalent for that tier of item.
translation:
收获任何农作物，或当 NPC 掉落骨头或灰烬时，你将改为收获可堆叠的 灵魂碎片。

灵魂碎片 可用于以下用途：
- 它们可以在训练 符石制作 时替代 纯净精华。
- 可以在 特奥马特 的 奠酒碗 处献祭 100 个以获得 550 点 祈祷 经验值（在联赛倍率之前），无需 奠酒葡萄酒。

每获得 4 点基础 农业 经验值（在收获或检查作物健康时），你将获得 1 个碎片，这不受联赛经验值倍率影响。

对于更高等级的骨头和灰烬，你将获得更多碎片，大致相当于该等级物品的骨片等价物。

english:
When the bell is rung, a Demon butler will be summoned to work for you. The butler's work will continue even if you are offline.

The butler can gather the following resources for you:
- Mining ores (8 per minute)
- Catching fish (14 per minute)
- Chopping logs (10 per minute)
- Picking flax (50 per minute)
- Farming herbs (10 per minute)

Additionally, the butler can also process these gathered items for you but at half the rates listed above:
- Ores into bars
- Raw fish into cooked fish
- Logs into planks
- Flax into bowstrings
- Herbs into unfinished potions

When the Demon butler processes resources for you, he will share a 10 XP (before League XP multipliers) with you in the relevant production skill per resource.
translation:
当铃铛被敲响时，一个 恶魔管家 将被召唤来为你工作。即使你离线，管家的工也会继续。

管家可以为你收集以下资源：
- 采矿矿石 (每分钟 8 个)
- 钓鱼 (每分钟 14 条)
- 砍伐原木 (每分钟 10 个)
- 采摘亚麻 (每分钟 50 个)
- 种植草药 (每分钟 10 个)

此外，管家还可以为你加工这些收集到的物品，但速度是上述速率的一半：
- 矿石冶炼成金属锭
- 生鱼烹饪成熟鱼
- 原木加工成木板
- 亚麻加工成弓弦
- 草药加工成未完成的药水

当 恶魔管家 为你加工资源时，每个资源他将与你分享 10 点经验值（在联赛经验值倍率之前）在相关的生产技能中。

english: Food is no longer consumed when eaten.
translation: 食物在食用时不再被消耗。

english:
This item will allow you to teleport to Agility shortcuts.
- You will be sent to the less favourable side of the shortcut, or the starting side if it is one-way.
- Teleports can only be used if you meet all of the requirements to reach their location.
- Shortcuts retain all of their typical requirements.

This item ignores wilderness teleport restrictions.
translation:
此物品将允许你传送到 敏捷捷径。
- 你将被传送到捷径较不利的一侧，如果是单向捷径则传送到起始侧。
- 只有当你满足到达其位置的所有要求时，才能使用传送。
- 捷径保留其所有常规要求。

此物品无视荒野传送限制。

english:
When you are assigned a Slayer task you will be able to choose from three different options. You will also be able to choose how many you wish to slay (5-200).

Where possible, at least one of the choices will be a boss slayer task.

Additionally you gain the following bonuses while on a Slayer task.
- Upon slaying a superior slayer monster, there is a 50% chance that another will spawn.
- Superior slayer creatures will always drop 1-3 Clue scroll (elite).
- You will gain all of the the effects of a Slayer helmet (i) without needing to wear one.
- You can purchase any of the slayer reward store perks for free.
- The Rune pouch, Herb sack and Looting bag will be purchasable for free from the slayer reward store.
translation:
当你被分配一个 杀戮 任务时，你将能够从三个不同的选项中选择。你还将能够选择你想要杀戮的数量 (5-200)。

在可能的情况下，至少有一个选项会是 Boss 杀戮任务。

此外，在执行 杀戮 任务时，你获得以下增益：
- 击杀高级杀戮怪物时，有 50% 的几率再生成一个。
- 高级杀戮生物总是会掉落 1-3 个 线索卷轴 (精英)。
- 你将获得 杀戮者头盔 (强化) 的所有效果，而无需佩戴。
- 你可以免费购买杀戮奖励商店的任何增益。
- 符石袋、草药袋 和 战利品袋 可以从杀戮奖励商店免费购买。

english:
When opening a Reward casket, you have a 1/3 chance to receive Clue contracts which can be consumed to teleport to your current clue step.

- Beginner clues give 0-2 contracts at a time
- Easy clues give 1-4 contracts at a time
- Medium clues give 1-5 contracts at a time
- Hard clues give 1-7 contracts at a time
- Elite clues give 1-9 contracts at a time
- Master clues give 1-10 contracts at a time

Reward caskets also have a 1/4 chance to contain a clue scroll box of the same tier.

- Clues from creatures and impling jars now have a drop rate of 1/15.

- Clue vessels obtained from skilling (such as clue geodes and clue nests) are 10x more likely to drop.

- All clues have the lowest possible number of steps, and will give the maximum amount of reward rolls.

- Emote, Falo & Charlie Clue steps no longer have item requirements.
translation:
打开 奖励宝箱 时，你有 1/3 的几率获得 线索契约，可以消耗它们来传送到你当前的线索步骤。

- 新手线索每次给予 0-2 个契约
- 简单线索每次给予 1-4 个契约
- 中等线索每次给予 1-5 个契约
- 困难线索每次给予 1-7 个契约
- 精英线索每次给予 1-9 个契约
- 大师线索每次给予 1-10 个契约

奖励宝箱 也有 1/4 的几率包含一个同等级的线索卷轴盒。

- 来自生物和罐装小精灵的线索现在掉落率为 1/15。

- 通过技能获得的线索容器（例如线索晶球和线索鸟巢）的掉落几率提高 10 倍。

- 所有线索的步骤数均为可能的最低值，并将给予最大数量的奖励次数。

- 表情、法洛和查理线索步骤不再有物品要求。

english:
The following actions all occur at a rate of 1.2 seconds (2 cycles) rather than their usual speed:

- Mining any rock.

- Woodcutting any tree.

- Fishing from any fishing spot.

- Cooking any food.

- Firemaking any logs or adding to a bonfire.

- Offering bones at a Prayer altar.

- Fletching the following items:
- Regular & Atlatl arrows
- Bruma Roots
- Unstrung bows
- Shields
- Stocks
- Javelins
- Battlestaves
- Hunter spears
- Redwood hiking staffs

- Smithing the following items:
- Smelting ores
- Smithing bars
- Making cannonballs

- Crafting the following items:
- Glassblowing
- Leather crafting
- Pottery
- Gold/Silver items
- Spinning wheel

- The following Farming interactions:
- Harvesting herbs
- Harvesting allotments
- Planting seeds

- Casting the following Magic spells:
- Low & high alchemy
- Superheat
- Alchemic divergence & convergence (if unlocked)

- Additionally the following interactions in minigames will be sped up:
- Wintertodt Roots and Brazier lighting
- Tempoross fishing
- Stealing Valuables

This effect stacks with the Fletching knife and Diabolical worms.
translation:
以下所有动作都以 1.2 秒（2 个游戏刻）的速率进行，而不是其通常速度：

- 采矿 任何岩石。

- 伐木 任何树木。

- 钓鱼 在任何钓鱼点。

- 烹饪 任何食物。

- 生火 任何原木或添加到篝火。

- 在 祈祷 祭坛上献祭骨头。

- 制箭 以下物品：
- 普通箭和投矛器箭
- 布鲁玛树根
- 未上弦的弓
- 盾牌
- 弩托
- 标枪
- 战斗法杖
- 狩猎矛
- 红木远足杖

- 锻造 以下物品：
- 冶炼矿石
- 锻造金属锭
- 制作炮弹

- 制作 以下物品：
- 玻璃吹制
- 皮革制作
- 陶器
- 金/银物品
- 纺车

- 以下 农业 互动：
- 收获草药
- 收获农田
- 种植种子

- 施放以下 魔法 法术：
- 低级和高级炼金术
- 矿石冶炼术
- 炼金分化与聚合 (如果已解锁)

- 此外，小游戏中的以下互动将加速：
- 冬将军的树根和火盆点燃
- 海灵的钓鱼
- 偷窃贵重物品

此效果与 制箭刀 和 恶魔蠕虫 叠加。

english:
When the Flask is consumed:
- Your Hitpoints will be restored to full.
- Your Prayer points will be restored to full.
- Your special attack energy will be restored to full.

Over the next 2.4 seconds the sigil will:
- Trigger three explosions which deal 60% of your base Prayer level (30% in PvP) to all enemies within 3 tiles of you as typeless damage.
- Reduce all damage you take to 0.
- Not deal damage to Yama.

This item has a base cooldown of 3 minutes
- For every 10 damage you deal in a single hit reduce the cooldown 0.6s.

- This perk will also work inside The Gauntlet.
translation:
消耗此瓶时：
- 你的 生命值 将恢复至满。
- 你的 祈祷 点数将恢复至满。
- 你的战技能量将恢复至满。

在接下来的 2.4 秒内，此符印将：
- 触发三次爆炸，对你周围 3 格内的所有敌人造成你基础 祈祷 等级 60% 的无类型伤害（PvP 中为 30%）。
- 将你受到的所有伤害降低至 0。
- 不对 阎魔 造成伤害。

此物品的基础冷却时间为 3 分钟。
- 每次单次攻击造成 10 点伤害，冷却时间减少 0.6 秒。

- 此增益在试炼之路内也有效。
解锁一个顶石恶魔契约

english: Defeat Sol Heredit at the Fortis Colosseum
translation: 在福蒂斯竞技场击败索尔.赫雷迪特

english: Defeat the Doom of Mokhiatol at Delve level 8
translation: 在深渊8层击败莫希亚托尔的末日
在某个技能达到2亿经验值

english: A cosmetic banner that represents Leagues VI - Demonic Pacts. The banner is held in the main-hand slot.
translation: 一面代表联赛 VI - 恶魔契约的装饰旗帜。这面旗帜装备在主手栏位。
联赛 VI 遗物猎人 (T1)

english: A tier 3 cosmetic Relic hunter outfit (head, chest, legs, boots, and sceptre).
translation: 一套第 3 级装饰性遗物猎人套装（头、胸、腿、靴子和权杖）。

english: A Throne scroll from Leagues VI - Demonic Pacts. Apply it to a Throne to transform its appearance.
translation: 一张来自联赛 VI - 恶魔契约的王座卷轴。将其应用于王座以改变其外观。

english: A scroll with instructions for performing impish rituals. Read it to unlock a new home teleport animation.
translation: 一张记载着小恶魔仪式说明的卷轴。阅读它以解锁一个新的回家传送动画。

english: A Whistle used to unlock the Impish overrides for your Arceuus thralls.
translation: 一个用于解锁阿西乌斯城仆役的小恶魔外观覆盖的哨子。

english: An ornament kit from Leagues VI - Demonic Pacts. Apply it the Trident of the Seas/Swamp to change its appearance.
translation: 一个来自联赛 VI - 恶魔契约的装饰品工具包。将其应用于海洋三叉戟/沼泽三叉戟以改变其外观。

english: An ornament kit from Leagues VI - Demonic Pacts. Apply it the Soulreaper Axe to change its appearance.
translation: 一个来自联赛 VI - 恶魔契约的装饰品工具包。将其应用于猎魂斧以改变其外观。

english: A demonic feather that can be used to give an Oathplate ornamentation to a Slayer helm.
translation: 一根恶魔羽毛，可用于为杀戮者头盔添加誓约板装饰。

english: A sample of demonic skin that can be used to turn your character red!
translation: 一份恶魔皮肤样本，可用于将你的角色变成红色！

english: A scroll from Leagues VI - Demonic Pacts. Can be used to change the appearance of your Demon Butler.
translation: 一张来自联赛 VI - 恶魔契约的卷轴。可用于改变你的恶魔管家的外观。

english: An ornament kit from Leagues VI - Demonic Pacts. Apply it to Iban's Staff to change its appearance.

english: The battle ends when all members of a team have been defeated. Fighters may not join or re-join the battle after it has begun.
translation: 当一队所有成员都被击败时，战斗结束。战斗开始后，战士不得加入或重新加入。

english:
The first team to score 25 kills will win.
Fighters may enter the battle at any time.
translation:
率先获得25次击杀的队伍获胜。
战士可随时加入战斗。

english:
The first team to score 1,000 kills will win.
Fighters may enter the battle at any time.
translation:
率先获得1,000次击杀的队伍获胜。
战士可随时加入战斗。

english: King of the Hill: The first team to hold the hills for 80 points will win.
translation: 小山之王：率先占领小山累积80分的队伍获胜。

english: King of the Hill: The first team to hold the hills for 1,500 points will win.
translation: 小山之王：率先占领小山累积1,500分的队伍获胜。

english:
Most kills: The team with the most kills after 5 minutes will win.
Fighters may enter the battle at any time.
translation:
最多击杀：5分钟后击杀数最多的队伍获胜。
战士可随时加入战斗。

english: Oddskull: The first team to hold the skull for 100 points will win.
translation: Oddskull：率先持有头骨累积100分的队伍获胜

english: Should drinks, such as potions, be allowed?

Should special attacks be allowed?
The Staff of the Dead, and equivalent items, can be barred even if other special attacks are permitted.
translation:
是否允许特殊攻击？
即使允许其他特殊攻击，死亡法杖及同类物品仍可被禁用。

english:
What should happen to a player who leaves a chat-channel mid-fight?
The game may attempt to count it as a kill by the opposing team, if selected.
translation:
战斗中离开聊天频道的玩家应如何处理？
若选择此选项，游戏可能将其视为对方队伍的一次击杀。

english: Should players be able to rejoin the fight without a delay after dying?
translation: 玩家死亡后能否立即重新加入战斗？

english: How large a team is permitted?
A wieldable ring that can check your task progress. It has 8 charges for teleporting to useful Slayer sites.
translation: 一个可佩戴的戒指，能查看你的任务进度。它有8次充能，可传送至有用的杀戮地点。

english: Crossbow bolts that can pierce the hides of creatures such as Turoth and Kurasks. Levels 55 Slayer and 61 Ranged required, and a runite crossbow or better.
translation: 能穿透图罗斯和库拉斯克等生物皮甲的弩箭。需要55级杀戮和61级远程，以及符文弩或更好的弩。

english: Arrows that can pierce the hides of creatures such as Turoth and Kurasks. Levels 55 Slayer and 50 Ranged required, and a magic bow or better.
translation: 能穿透图罗斯和库拉斯克等生物皮甲的箭矢。需要55级杀戮和50级远程，以及魔法弓或更好的弓。

english: The herb sack has the ability to store up to 30 of each major grimy herb. Requires 58 Herblore to use.
translation: 草药袋可储存每种主要脏草药最多30份。需要58级草药学才能使用。

english: The rune pouch has the ability to store up to 16,000 runes of 3 types.
translation: 符石袋可储存最多16,000个符文，共3种类型。

english: Within the Wilderness and certain other PvP areas, tradeable items can be stored in the looting bag, enabling you to carry more loot.
translation: 在荒野及其他某些PvP区域，可交易物品可存放在战利品袋中，让你携带更多战利品。

english: You may exchange your points for this item.
translation: 你可以用点数兑换此物品。
所有法术书都允许使用。

english: Only the standard spellbook is allowed.
translation: 仅允许使用标准法术书。

english: Only the classic standard F2P spells are allowed. (This excludes Snare)
translation: 仅允许使用经典免费版的标准法术。（不包括陷阱术）

english: Only the Bind, Snare and Entangle spells are allowed.
translation: 仅允许使用束缚术、陷阱术和缠绕术。

english: Prayers that use an overhead icon are forbidden. Other prayers are allowed.
translation: 禁止使用头顶图标的祈祷。其他祈祷允许使用。

english: Food may be eaten during the battle.
No food may be eaten during the battle.
Drinks, such as potions, may be used during the battle.
translation: 战斗中允许使用药水等饮品。

english: No drinks may be consumed during the battle.
translation: 战斗中禁止饮用任何饮品。

english: The Staff of the Dead cannot use its special attack, but all other special attacks are allowed.
translation: 死亡法杖不能使用其战技，但其他所有战技都允许使用。

english: A team will lose the battle if it has no fighters in the arena.
translation: 如果队伍在竞技场内没有战斗人员，则该队伍将输掉战斗。

english: A team will lose the battle if it has 5 fighters or fewer in the arena.
translation: 如果队伍在竞技场内只有5名或更少的战斗人员，则该队伍将输掉战斗。

english: Wasteland - a dead land filled with lava, dead trees and rocks.
translation: 荒原——一片死寂之地，遍布熔岩、枯树和岩石。

english: Plateau - a platform of rock amidst a sea of lava with very few obstacles.
translation: 高原——熔岩海中的岩石平台，障碍物极少。

english: Sylvan Glade - an arena filled with trees that block line-of-sight.
translation: 森林空地——遍布树木的竞技场，会阻挡视线。

english: Forsaken Quarry - an arena filled with small rocks that do not block line-of-sight.
translation: 遗弃采石场——布满小岩石的竞技场，不会阻挡视线。

english: Turrets - rangers and mages may like to ascend the many turrets in this arena to fire down at targets below.
translation: 炮塔——弓箭手和法师可能会喜欢爬上竞技场中的众多炮塔，向下方的目标射击。

english: Soggy Swamp - a waterlogged marshland filled with roots and rotten trees.
translation: 湿漉沼泽——一片水浸的沼泽地，遍布树根和腐烂的树木。

english: Ghastly Swamp - like the soggy swamp, but with aggressive ghasts to rot your food or steal your health.
translation: 恐怖沼泽——类似于湿漉沼泽，但还有攻击性的鬼魂会腐烂你的食物或偷取你的生命值。

english: Northleach Quell - a snowy area filled with sunken boats and broken bits of wood.
translation: 北利奇镇压地——一个雪地区域，遍布沉船和破碎的木片。

english: Clan Cup Arena - adapted from the arena used in the 2013 Clan Cup.
translation: 氏族杯竞技场——改编自2013年氏族杯使用的竞技场。

english: Gridlock - a huge 4-way multi-mountain map suited for KoTH modes with rangers and mages.
translation: 网格封锁——一张巨大的四向多山地图，适合弓箭手和法师的占山为王模式。

english: Ethereal - A strange realm in the clouds, with teleports to use and destroy.
translation: 缥缈之境——云层中的奇异领域，有传送点可供使用和摧毁。

english: Classic -  The original Clan Wars Classic.
translation: 经典——原始的氏族战争经典模式。

english: Lumbridge Castle - the iconic castle and its courtyard.
translation: 仑桥镇城堡——标志性的城堡及其庭院。
法拉多公园——历史悠久的战场。

english: If freezing is ignored, spells such as Entangle and Ice Barrage will not prevent their targets from moving. Damage dealt by the spells will be applied normally.
translation: 如果忽略冰冻效果，缠绕术和冰之弹幕等法术将不会阻止目标移动。法术造成的伤害将正常生效。

english: In single-way combat areas, the PJ timer prevents players from being attacked for 10 secs after they have been attacking someone else.
translation: 在单向战斗区域中，PJ计时器会防止玩家在攻击他人后的10秒内被攻击。

english: If Single Spells is enabled, multi-target attacks (such as chinchompas) will hit only one target, even in multi-way combat areas.
translation: 如果启用了单体法术，即使是在多向战斗区域，多重目标攻击（例如龙猫炸弹）也只会击中一个目标。

english: Should Powered Staves and Wands be able to cast their spells on players? Normally they work only against monsters.
translation: 充能法杖和魔杖是否应该能够对玩家施放法术？通常它们只对怪物有效。

english: Should Vesta's Blighted Longsword be permitted in this battle? Normally it works only on specific worlds.
translation: 是否允许在此战斗中使用维斯塔的诅咒长剑？通常它只在特定世界有效。

english: This is a voucher. It's used to claim your path rewards from NPC's around Varrock. After claiming all the rewards, you will not get this voucher again.
translation: 这是一张凭证。用来向维洛克城周围的NPC领取你的路径奖励。领取完所有奖励后，你将不会再获得这张凭证。

english: You forgot to give this item a description in the item description enum.
translation: 你忘了在物品描述枚举中为此物品添加描述。

translation: 维洛克城宫殿花园的熊笼旁

Behind Miss Schism in Draynor Village

North of Prifddinas by several maple trees
translation: 普里夫迪纳斯城北边几棵枫树旁

english: South of the gates to Cam Torum
Outside Harry's Fishing Shop in Catherby

translation: 边陲镇邪恶戴夫家北边

english: North of the Shayzien combat ring
Where the River Ortus meets the Proudspire
translation: 奥图斯河与傲峰河交汇处
莫利塔尼亚海岸边的陵墓

South of the shrine in Tai Bwo Wannai Village

translation: 野蛮人前哨站障碍训练场
