translation: 阿多尼城训练营的食人魔笼子
仑桥镇的鲍勃精良斧头店

english: Retainer: Traps a vampyre juvenile or juvinate provided they have 50% or less hitpoints remaining.
translation: 束缚：困住一只新生吸血鬼或幼年吸血鬼，前提是它们剩余生命值不超过50%。

english: Power of Death: Reduce all melee damage you receive by 50% for the next minute while the staff remains equipped. Stacks with Protect from Melee.
translation: 死亡之力：装备此杖后，接下来一分钟内你受到的近战伤害减少50%。可与近战防护叠加。

english: Rampage: Drain your Attack, Defence, Ranged & Magic levels by 10%, while increasing your Strength by 10 levels, plus 25% of the drained levels.
translation: 狂暴：消耗你的攻击、防御、远程和魔法等级各10%，同时提升你的力量等级10级，外加所消耗等级总和的25%。

english: Lumber Up: Increase your Woodcutting level by 3.
translation: 伐木提升：提升你的伐木等级3级。

english: Rock Knocker: Increase your Mining level by 3.
translation: 采矿提升：提升你的采矿等级3级。

english: Puncture: Deal two quick slashes with 15% increased accuracy and 15% increased damage.
translation: 穿刺：快速挥出两刀，提升15%命中率和15%伤害。

english: Sanctuary: Temporarily increase your Defence level by 8.
translation: 庇护：暂时提升你的防御等级8级。

english: Cleave: Deal a powerful attack that inflicts 25% more damage.
translation: 裂斩：发动一次强力攻击，造成25%额外伤害。

english: Cleave: Deal a powerful attack that inflicts 25% more damage with 25% increased accuracy and increased speed.
translation: 裂斩：发动一次强力攻击，造成25%额外伤害，并提升25%命中率和攻击速度。

english: Sever: Deal a slash with increased accuracy that prevents your target from using protection prayers for 5 seconds if it successfully hits.
translation: 断筋：发动一次高命中率的斩击，若成功命中，可使目标在5秒内无法使用防护祈祷。

english: Weaken: Temporarily drain your target's Attack, Strength and Defence by 5%. Is twice as effective against demons.
translation: 虚弱术：暂时降低目标5%的攻击、力量和防御等级。对恶魔效果加倍。

english: Weaken: Temporarily drain your target's Attack, Strength and Defence by 5%. Is three times as effective against demons.
translation: 虚弱术：暂时降低目标5%的攻击、力量和防御等级。对恶魔效果变为三倍。

english: Liquify: Deal an attack with double the chance of hitting that boosts your Strength, Attack and Defence levels by 25% of the damage dealt. Can only be used underwater.
translation: 液化：发动一次命中率翻倍的攻击，并根据造成的伤害提升你的力量、攻击和防御等级，提升量为伤害值的25%。仅可在水下使用。

english: The Judgement: Deal an attack that inflicts 37.5% more damage with double accuracy.
translation: 审判：发动一次攻击，造成37.5%额外伤害，且命中率翻倍。

english: Warstrike: Deal an attack, with double accuracy, that inflicts 21% more damage and drains one of your target's combat stats by the damage dealt.
translation: 战争打击：发动一次命中率翻倍的攻击，造成21%额外伤害，并根据造成的伤害降低目标的一项战斗属性。

english: Healing Blade: Deal an attack that inflicts 10% more damage with double accuracy, while restoring your Hitpoints and Prayer by 50% and 25% of the damage dealt respectively.
translation: 治愈之刃：发动一次命中率翻倍的攻击，造成10%额外伤害，同时根据造成的伤害恢复你的生命值和祈祷值，恢复量分别为伤害的50%和25%。

english: Ice Cleave: Deal an attack that inflicts 10% more damage with double accuracy and freezes your target for 20 seconds if it successfully hits.
translation: 冰霜裂斩：发动一次命中率翻倍的攻击，造成10%额外伤害，若成功命中，将使目标冻结20秒。

english: Blood Sacrifice: Deal an attack that inflicts 10% more damage with double accuracy and marks your target for a blood sacrifice. Targets marked for a blood sacrifice will be hit for 25 damage after a short delay, unless they move away. If they are hit, you'll also be healed for the damage dealt. (Heal is capped at 15 in PvP)
translation: 血祭：发动一次命中率翻倍的攻击，造成10%额外伤害，并为目标打上血祭标记。被标记的目标在短暂延迟后若不移动，将受到25点伤害。若目标受到此伤害，你也会根据造成的伤害恢复生命值。（玩家对战中治疗上限为15点）

english: Saradomin's Lightning: Call upon Saradomin's power to perform an attack that inflicts 10% more melee damage and 1-16 extra magic damage.
translation: 萨拉多明的闪电：召唤萨拉多明的力量发动一次攻击，造成10%额外近战伤害和1-16点额外魔法伤害。

english: Saradomin's Lightning: Call upon Saradomin's power to perform an attack with 25% higher max hit.
translation: 萨拉多明的闪电：召唤萨拉多明的力量发动一次攻击，最大伤害提升25%。

english: Shatter: Increase damage by 50% and accuracy by 25% for one hit.
translation: 粉碎：单次攻击提升50%伤害和25%命中率。

english: Shatter: Increase damage by 50% and accuracy by 25% for one hit, treats your target's defence as if it was reduced to 60%.
translation: 粉碎：单次攻击提升50%伤害和25%命中率，并将目标的防御视为降低至60%。

english: Sunder: Deal an attack with double accuracy and 10% higher max hit. Lowers your target's Attack, Defence, Ranged or Magic level by 10% of the damage dealt.
translation: 撕裂：发动一次命中率翻倍的攻击，最大伤害提升10%。并根据造成的伤害降低目标10%的攻击、防御、远程或魔法等级。

english: Sunder: Deal an attack with double accuracy and 25% higher max hit. Lowers your target's Attack, Defence, Ranged or Magic level by 10% of the damage dealt. Reduces the next attack delay by 1.2 seconds.
translation: 撕裂：发动一次命中率翻倍的攻击，最大伤害提升25%。并根据造成的伤害降低目标10%的攻击、防御、远程或魔法等级。减少下一次攻击的延迟1.2秒。

english: Impale: Deal an attack with 10% increased Attack and Strength, but with a slower speed.
translation: 穿刺：发动一次攻击，提升10%攻击和力量，但攻击速度较慢。

english: Energy Drain: Deal an attack with 25% increased accuracy that siphons 10% of your target's run energy.
translation: 能量吸取：发动一次命中率提升25%的攻击，吸取目标10%的奔跑能量。

english: Binding Tentacle: Bind your target for 5 seconds and increase the chance of them being poisoned.
translation: 束缚触手：束缚目标5秒，并增加其中毒的概率。

english: Penance: Deal an attack that inflicts 0.5% more damage per prayer point that you have used.
translation: 忏悔：发动一次攻击，根据你已消耗的祈祷点数，每点提升0.5%伤害。

english: Abyssal Puncture: Deal an attack that hits twice with 25% increased accuracy, but inflicts 15% less damage per hit. The second hit is guaranteed if the first deals damage.
translation: 深渊穿刺：发动一次攻击，命中率提升25%，但每次命中伤害降低15%。若第一次命中造成伤害，则第二次命中必定成功。

english: Shove: Push your target back and stun them for 3 seconds. This attack deals no damage.
translation: 推击：将目标向后推开并眩晕3秒。此攻击不造成伤害。

english: Sweep: If your target is small, adjacent targets may be hit too. Otherwise, your target may be hit a second time, with 25% decreased accuracy. Damage in all cases is increased by 10% of your max hit.
translation: 横扫：若目标体型较小，可能同时击中相邻目标。否则，可能以降低25%命中率再次击中目标。所有情况下伤害提升你最大伤害的10%。

english: Descent of Darkness: Deal a double attack that inflicts up to 30% more damage (minimum damage of 5 per hit).
translation: 黑暗降临：发动一次双重攻击，每次命中最多造成30%额外伤害（每次命中最低伤害为5点）。

english: Chainhit: Throw an axe which hits your target and then chains to hit further nearby targets, costing 10% additional special attack per extra target.
translation: 连锁投掷：投掷一把斧头击中目标，然后连锁击中附近的其他目标，每额外击中一个目标消耗10%额外战技值。

english: Toxic Siphon: Deal an attack with 100% increased accuracy that inflicts 50% more damage and heals you for 50% of the damage dealt.
translation: 剧毒虹吸：发动一次命中率提升100%的攻击，造成50%额外伤害，并为你恢复造成伤害50%的生命值。

english: Smash: Deal an attack that inflicts 50% more damage and lowers your target's Defence level by 30%.
translation: 猛击：发动一次造成50%额外伤害的攻击，并降低目标30%的防御等级。

english: Slice and Dice: Hit 4 times in quick succession, with great accuracy.
translation: 切碎：以极高的命中率快速连续攻击4次。

english: Concentrated Shot: Deal an attack with 25% increased accuracy and damage, but takes an additional 2.4 seconds to fire.
translation: 聚精射击：发动一次攻击，提升25%命中率和伤害，但需要额外2.4秒的蓄力时间。

english: Wild Stab: Deal an attack which hits through Protect from Melee with 25% increased accuracy and damage.
translation: 狂野突刺：发动一次攻击，可穿透近战防护，并提升25%命中率和伤害。

english: Momentum Throw: Deal a fast attack with 25% improved accuracy.
translation: 动量投掷：发动一次快速攻击，提升25%命中率。

english: Fishstabber: Increase your Fishing level by 3.
translation: 钓鱼穿刺：提升你的钓鱼等级3级。

english: Sever: Deal a slash with increased accuracy that can prevent your target from using protection prayers for 5 seconds.
translation: 断筋：发动一次高命中率的斩击，可使目标在5秒内无法使用防护祈祷。

english: Hammer Blow: Deal an attack with 50% more accuracy and a guaranteed +5 damage.
translation: 锤击：发动一次攻击，提升50%命中率，并保证额外造成5点伤害。

english: Annihilate: Hit your target with 20% extra damage and in multicombat zones, hit all adjacent targets by 20% less damage.
translation: 湮灭：对目标造成20%额外伤害；在多战斗区域中，对周围所有相邻目标造成20%较少伤害。

english: Hamstring: Deal a minimum of 20% extra damage and hamstring player targets, causing them to lose run energy 6x faster for 1 minute. A successful hit reduces your next attack delay by 1.
translation: 断筋：至少造成20%额外伤害，并使玩家目标腿筋受伤，导致其在1分钟内奔跑能量消耗速度加快6倍。成功命中可减少你下一次攻击的延迟1次。

english: Hamstring: Deal a minimum of 50% extra damage with 150% accuracy and hamstring player targets, causing them to lose run energy 6x faster for 1 minute.
translation: 断筋：以150%命中率至少造成50%额外伤害，并使玩家目标腿筋受伤，导致其在1分钟内奔跑能量消耗速度加快6倍。

english: Phantom Strike: This does nothing vs non-player targets. As well as dealing a regular attack with 150% accuracy, your target will suffer 75% damage again over time.
translation: 幻影打击：对非玩家目标无效。除了以150%命中率发动一次普通攻击外，你的目标还会在一段时间内再次受到75%的伤害。

english: Smash: Deal an attack which deals a minimum of 25% extra damage and lowers your target's Defence level by 30%.
translation: 猛击：发动一次至少造成25%额外伤害的攻击，并降低目标30%的防御等级。

english: Feint: Deal an attack which treats your target's defence as if it was reduced by 75%. It will deal a minimum of 20% extra damage.
translation: 佯攻：发动一次攻击，将目标的防御视为降低75%。此攻击至少造成20%额外伤害。

english: Spear Wall: All damage dealt by this attack is reduced by 50%, but will damage up to sixteen targets surrounding you. After using this attack, you will be immune from melee and ranged attacks for 5 seconds.
translation: 矛墙：此攻击造成的所有伤害降低50%，但最多可伤害你周围的十六个目标。使用此攻击后，你将在5秒内免疫近战和远程攻击。

english: Spear Wall: Will hit twice with second hit deals a damage between 50% - 75% of the first hit damage. After using this attack, you will be immune from melee and ranged attacks for 5 seconds and the next attack delay is reduced by 0.6 seconds.
translation: 矛墙：将攻击两次，第二次攻击造成第一次攻击伤害的50%至75%。使用此攻击后，你将在5秒内免疫近战和远程攻击，并且下一次攻击的延迟减少0.6秒。

english: Unleash: Deal an attack which has 5% increased accuracy and 2.5% increased strength per 5% of the special attack bar used.
translation: 释放：发动一次攻击，每使用5%的战技值，提升5%命中率和2.5%力量。

english: Immolate: Fire a powerful spell with 50% improved accuracy. Damage scales based upon magic level and can be increased with magic damage boosting equipment. Costs no runes to use.
translation: 献祭：发射一道强力法术，提升50%命中率。伤害根据魔法等级计算，并可通过提升魔法伤害的装备增强。使用时不消耗任何符文。

english: Invocate: Fire a powerful spell that restores your prayer points by 50% of the damage dealt. Damage scales based upon magic level and can be increased with magic damage boosting equipment. Your prayer points can go above your level, to a maximum of 120. Costs no runes to use.
translation: 祈唤：施放一道强力法术，恢复相当于造成伤害50%的祈祷点数。伤害基于魔法等级计算，并可通过魔法伤害加成装备提升。你的祈祷点数可超过当前等级，最高至120点。使用不消耗任何符石。

english: Eviscerate: Perform an attack with your true maximum hit and a 50% accuracy bonus.
translation: 开膛：发动一次攻击，造成你的真实最高伤害，并获得50%的命中加成。

english: Wrath of Amascut: Perform an attack with 100% increased accuracy and 25% increased damage, but with halved attack speed. If hit, the opponent will take 25% increased damage for the next 6 seconds. This special attack can only be used within the Tombs of Amascut.
translation: 阿玛斯库特之怒：发动一次攻击，命中率提升100%，伤害提升25%，但攻击速度减半。若命中，目标在接下来6秒内受到的伤害增加25%。此战技仅能在阿玛斯库特之墓中使用。

english: Tumeken's Light: Sacrifice 50 prayer points to restore your hitpoints to 20% above their maximum, cure all poison, restore all drained stats (except prayer) and fully restore your run energy. This special attack can only be used within the Tombs of Amascut.
translation: 图梅肯之光：牺牲50点祈祷点数，将生命值恢复至上限的120%，治愈所有中毒状态，恢复所有被降低的属性（祈祷除外），并完全恢复奔跑能量。此战技仅能在阿玛斯库特之墓中使用。

english: Swarm: Fire 4 times in quick succession, dealing reduced damage and inflicting poison.
translation: 虫群：快速连续射击4次，造成降低的伤害并附加中毒效果。

english: Condemn: Fire a powerful spell with increased accuracy and damage, lowering your target's magic and defence levels by up to 15%.
translation: 谴责：施放一道强力的法术，提升命中与伤害，并降低目标最多15%的魔法与防御等级。

english: Behead: Consume all Soul Stacks, attacking with increased damage and accuracy per stack, and healing for 8 health per stack.
translation: 斩首：消耗所有灵魂层数，每层提升攻击的伤害与命中，并每层恢复8点生命值。

english: Blood infusion: Sacrifice 25% of your current hp to deal an attack with 25% increased accuracy and damage, with a guaranteed set effect activation on hit. This special attack requires the full Bloodrager set to be worn.
translation: 血之灌注：牺牲当前生命值的25%，发动一次命中与伤害提升25%的攻击，命中后必定触发套装效果。此战技需要穿戴完整的血怒者套装。

english: Break Shackles: Attack with increased accuracy and damage based on the duration of any binding spells affecting them and ending said effect. This special attack requires the full Blue Moon set to be worn.
translation: 破枷：根据作用于自身的束缚法术剩余时间，提升攻击的命中与伤害，并结束该效果。此战技需要穿戴完整的蓝月套装。

english: Eclipse: Attack with 50% increased accuracy, consuming all remaining burn damage affecting the target and raising the max hit by that amount. This special attack requires the full Eclipse set to be worn.
translation: 日蚀：发动一次命中提升50%的攻击，消耗目标身上所有剩余的灼烧伤害，并将最高伤害提升等量数值。此战技需要穿戴完整的日蚀套装。

english: Division: Fire a powerful piercing blade that reduces the targets Defence by 10% of their Magic Level.
translation: 分裂：发射一道强力的穿刺刀锋，降低目标相当于其魔法等级10%的防御。

english: Pulverize: A crushing blow with 25% bonus accuracy that will reduce your target's defence by 35%.
translation: 粉碎：一记带有25%额外命中的重击，降低目标35%的防御。

english: Scorching shackles: A scorching shot with 30% bonus accuracy that will bind and burn enemy demons for 12 seconds.)
translation: 灼热枷锁：一记带有30%额外命中的灼热射击，将束缚并灼烧恶魔敌人12秒。

english: Burning barrage: Attacks 3 times in quick succession, with a chance to burn the enemy on each hit.
translation: 燃烧弹幕：快速连续攻击3次，每次攻击有几率灼烧敌人。

english: Echo slash: Launch an attack that applies each of the other godswords' effects.
translation: 回响斩：发动一次攻击，附加其他所有神剑的效果。

english: Sol Slam: Immediately deal an AoE attack around you in a 7x7 radius, increases damage based on your prayer bonus.
translation: 索尔猛击：立即对自身周围7x7范围发动一次范围攻击，伤害基于你的祈祷加成提升。

english: Lingering Lightning: Attack the target twice, if either attack hits spawn additional lightning wherever the npc was standing, dealing damage to targets around it.
translation: 余电：攻击目标两次，若任意一次命中，则在NPC站立位置生成额外的闪电，对周围目标造成伤害。

english: Crystalline Severance: Launch a powerful attack the pierces the Crystalline Hunllef's prayers and disables them briefly.
translation: 水晶切断：发动一次强力攻击，穿透水晶胡勒夫的祈祷并短暂使其失效。

english: Entice: Buffs yours and your allies next melee accuracy roll. Costs additional energy per ally affected.
translation: 引诱：提升你及盟友下一次近战命中的判定。每影响一名盟友，额外消耗能量。

english: Flames of Ralos: Perform a devastating blow to your enemy with 50% increased accuracy and damage. If your attack successfully hits, the target will burn for 10 damage over 24 seconds.
translation: 拉洛斯之焰：对敌人发动一次毁灭性打击，命中与伤害提升50%。若成功命中，目标将在24秒内受到10点灼烧伤害。

english: Soul Rend: Deliver a strike with doubled accuracy and 30% higher max hit, draining Magic Defence equal to the damage dealt.
translation: 灵魂撕裂：发动一次攻击，命中翻倍，最高伤害提升30%，并吸取等同于造成伤害的魔法防御。

english: Lightning Strike: Against monsters, attacks twice. If either attack is successful an additional lightning bolt is summoned rolling up to 100% of the original attacks max hit. Against players, increases damage by 30% and summons a barrage of lightning. Each lightning bolt hits between 30% and 45% of your original damage.
translation: 闪电打击：对怪物时攻击两次。若任意一次命中，则召唤一道额外的闪电，造成最高相当于原始攻击100%的伤害。对玩家时，伤害提升30%，并召唤一阵闪电弹幕。每道闪电造成原始伤害的30%至45%。

english: Ferocity: Unleash an instant attack on your target.
translation: 凶暴：对目标发动一次即时攻击。

english: Explosive Shatter: Consume 5 shatter stacks to instantly deal 150% of your max hit as magic damage and up to 75% as typeless damage to 12 enemies within 3 tiles
translation: 爆裂粉碎：消耗5层粉碎层数，立即对3格内的12名敌人造成相当于你最高伤害150%的魔法伤害，以及最多75%的无类型伤害。

english: Seeking Lunge: Always deals 70% of your maximum damage on a successful hit. If a monster has less health than this attack would deal, the attack always rolls exactly 70% of its maximum accuracy roll.
translation: 追踪突刺：成功命中时，总是造成你最高伤害的70%。若怪物生命值低于此伤害，则此次攻击的命中判定总是取最高命中判定的70%。

english: Brutal Swing: Rolls accuracy 4 times. If any hit, the attacks deals 70-110% of your maximum hit. Each additional successful hit increases both the minimum and maximum hit by 20%
translation: 野蛮挥击：进行4次命中判定。若任意一次命中，则造成你最高伤害的70%至110%。每多一次成功命中，最低与最高伤害均提升20%。

english: If a player leaves the chat-channel during the fight, the game will attempt to count it as a kill by the opposing team.
translation: 如果玩家在战斗期间离开聊天频道，游戏会尝试将其视为被对方队伍击杀。

english: Players may leave the chat-channel during the fight without a penalty.
translation: 玩家可以在战斗期间离开聊天频道，不会受到惩罚。

english: Players may rejoin the fight without a delay.
translation: 玩家可以立即重新加入战斗。

english: Players must wait 60 seconds before returning to a fight.
translation: 玩家必须等待60秒才能返回战斗。

english: Leagues are time-limited game modes in which you can experience Old School RuneScape like never before!|Complete Tasks to earn League Points that can be used to unlock powerful Relics which enhance your gameplay!|Each League is different - figure out the best strategy to pull ahead of the competition. Or alternatively, just have fun!|Big thanks to the Gridmaster Competition winners who assisted with Relic design this league: InsaneWolfy, Jam & Viallinen.
translation: 联赛是限时游戏模式，让你以前所未有的方式体验 Old School RuneScape！|完成任务可获得联赛积分，用来解锁强大的遗物，强化你的游戏体验！|每届联赛都不同——找出最佳策略，在竞争中脱颖而出。或者，纯粹享受乐趣也行！|衷心感谢 Gridmaster 竞赛的优胜者 InsaneWolfy、Jam 和 Viallinen 协助设计了本届联赛的遗物。

english: In Leagues, League Points can be earned by completing various Tasks. These can then be used to unlock powerful Relics.|League Points are also transferred to your main game profile where they can be used to buy Rewards in the Leagues Reward Shop. This can be accessed from the Leagues Tutor in Lumbridge.
translation: 在联赛中，完成各种任务可以获得联赛积分。这些积分可以用来解锁强大的遗物。|联赛积分也会转移到你的主游戏档案中，用于在联赛奖励商店购买奖励。你可以通过仑桥镇的联赛导师进入该商店。

english: Relics are powerful buffs which affect your gameplay for the entire League. Choose carefully, because choices cannot be changed later!
translation: 遗物是强大的增益效果，会影响你在整个联赛中的游戏体验。请谨慎选择，因为一旦选定就无法更改！

english: Your performance in the League is measured by how many League Points you earn. And the more you score compared to your rivals, the higher League Rank you'll achieve!
translation: 你在联赛中的表现取决于获得的联赛积分数量。与对手相比，你的积分越多，获得的联赛排名就越高！

english:
As well as letting you unlock Relics, League Points are transferred to your main game profile.|Points can be used to buy rewards in the Leagues Reward Shop.|Performance in one League will also contribute to the next, with rewards such as:|- League Starter Outfits
- League Icons
- Pet Transfers
translation:
除了用于解锁遗物，联赛积分还会转移到你的主游戏档案中。|积分可用于在联赛奖励商店购买奖励。|在一届联赛中的表现也会影响下一届联赛，奖励包括：|- 联赛初始套装
- 联赛图标
- 宠物转移

english: Your account starts outside Kourend Castle.|Your account is restricted to the Kingdom of Great Kourend and the Kebos Lowlands.|All experience gained will be multiplied by 5.|Leagues I - Twisted will run from 14th November 2019 until the game update on the 16th January 2020.
translation: 你的账号从库兰德城堡外开始。|你的账号活动范围限制在大库兰德王国和凯博斯低地。|所有获得的经验值将乘以5倍。|联赛 I - 扭曲将从2019年11月14日开始，持续到2020年1月16日的游戏更新。

english: Your account is an Ironman, this means you cannot trade with other players.|The following quests/miniquests have been auto-completed:|- Druidic Ritual|- Dragon Slayer I|- Eagle's Peak|- Rune Mysteries|- Barbarian Fishing & Hasta Training|You will start with the following stat increases:|- 3 Herblore|- 15 Agility
translation: 你的账号是钢铁侠模式，这意味着你不能与其他玩家交易。|以下任务/迷你任务已自动完成：|- 德鲁伊仪式|- 屠龙者 I|- 鹰之峰|- 符石奥秘|- 野蛮人钓鱼与刺矛训练|你将拥有以下初始属性提升：|- 3级草药学|- 15级敏捷

english: Your respawn location and home teleport destinations have been set to Kourend Castle.|Konar will assign slayer tasks from a Leagues I - Twisted specific task list. This is unlocked at level 5 combat.|Teleports to locations outside of Great Kourend and the Kebos Lowlands are blocked.|All clue scrolls will only assign steps within Great Kourend and the Kebos Lowlands.|The following items are now obtainable from Watson to aid with completing clues:|- Sextant, Watch and Chart|- Strange Device (Hot and Cold Clues)|Player Owned Houses can only be located in Hosidius.|Some tasks have been completed for you in the Kourend & Kebos Achievement Diary.|The following drops have been changed: |- The Kodai Insignia drop from the Chambers of Xeric has been replaced with a Kodai Wand.|- The Hydra Leather drop from the Alchemical Hydra has been replaced with Ferocious Gloves.|- The Hydra Claw drop from the Alchemical Hydra has been replaced with a Dragon Hunter Lance.|- The Broken Dragon Hasta from the Brimstone Chest has been replaced with a Dragon Hasta.|Some shop items will restock at an accelerated rate.|The following items have been added to various shops or pubs in Great Kourend and the Kebos Lowlands:|- Barbarian Rod|- Anti-Dragon Shield|- Pestle and Mortar|- Stew
translation: 你的重生地点和家园传送目的地已设置为库兰德城堡。|科纳尔将根据联赛 I - 扭曲的专属任务列表分配杀戮任务。这将在战斗等级5时解锁。|传送到大库兰德王国和凯博斯低地以外的地点将被阻止。|所有线索卷轴只会分配在大库兰德王国和凯博斯低地内的步骤。|现在可以从沃森处获得以下物品以帮助完成线索：|- 六分仪、手表和海图|- 奇怪的装置（热冷线索）|玩家的房屋只能位于霍西迪乌斯城。|库兰德王国与凯博斯成就日记中的部分任务已为你完成。|以下掉落物已更改：|- 泽里克圣所掉落的科代法师徽章已替换为科代法杖。|- 炼金九头蛇掉落的九头蛇皮已替换为狂暴手套。|- 炼金九头蛇掉落的九头蛇爪已替换为猎龙长矛。|- 硫磺宝箱掉落的破损的龙金刺矛已替换为龙金刺矛。|部分商店物品将以更快的速度补货。|以下物品已添加到大库兰德王国和凯博斯低地的各个商店或酒馆中：|- 野蛮人鱼竿|- 防龙盾|- 研钵和杵|- 炖菜

english: This is a lamp that will grant 150 XP in either: Woodcutting, Fishing or Mining. Once the lamp has been used, you will not be able to claim another.
translation: 这是一盏灯，可以让你在伐木、钓鱼或采矿中选择一项获得150点经验。使用后便无法再领取另一盏。

english: The Steel Chainbody is a piece of armour that requires you to have level 5 defence to wear and is equipped in the chest slot. This piece of armour is great at protecting against low level arrows and weaker melee monsters. This armour also makes you more susceptible to magic attacks.
translation: 钢制链甲是一件需要5级防御才能穿戴的盔甲，装备在胸部位置。这件盔甲能有效抵御低级箭矢和较弱的近战怪物，但也会让你更容易受到魔法攻击。

english: The Steel Platelegs are a piece of armour that requires you to have level 5 defence to wear and is equipped in the legs slot. This piece of armour is great at protecting against low level arrows and weaker melee monsters. This armour also makes you more susceptible to magic attacks.
translation: 钢制腿甲是一件需要5级防御才能穿戴的盔甲，装备在腿部位置。这件盔甲能有效抵御低级箭矢和较弱的近战怪物，但也会让你更容易受到魔法攻击。

english: The Amulet of magic is an amulet that gives a Magic attack bonus when worn. This when worn will help improve your magic attack accuracy, meaning you will hit more often.
translation: 魔法护符是一件佩戴后能提供魔法攻击加成的护符。佩戴后能提升你的魔法攻击命中率，让你更频繁地击中目标。

english: The oak shortbow is a ranged weapon that requires level 5 Ranged to wear. Shortbows fire faster than longbows but are less accurate. Longbows also have the benefit of being able to fire at monsters from a longer range. You use arrows with bows. Most of the time, the better the metal used to make the arrow, the more damage you will hit when using the arrow with your bow. Not all arrows are compatible with each bow, check your Ranged skill guide to find out which arrows your bow can use.
translation: 橡木短弓是一种需要5级远程才能使用的远程武器。短弓射速比长弓快，但精准度较低。长弓还能从更远的距离攻击怪物。弓需要搭配箭矢使用。大多数情况下，制作箭矢的金属越好，用弓射出的伤害就越高。并非所有箭矢都适用于每把弓，请查阅你的远程技能指南，了解你的弓可以使用哪些箭矢。

english:
Ahrim The Blighted:

Blighted Aura:

Magic Attacks have a 25% chance of lowering the enemy's strength level by 5 on a successful hit.
translation:
被污染的阿赫姆：

污染光环：

魔法攻击成功命中时，有25%的几率降低敌人5点力量等级。

english:
Ahrim The Blighted:

Blighted Aura +:

Magic Attacks have a 25% chance of lowering the enemy's strength level by 5 on a successful hit.

The spell also gets a 30% damage bonus.
translation:
被污染的阿赫姆：

污染光环+：

魔法攻击成功命中时，有25%的几率降低敌人5点力量等级。

法术还会获得30%的伤害加成。

english:
Dharok the Wretched:

Wretched Strength:

Attacks do more damage as your hitpoints decrease. For every hitpoint lost from your maximum hitpoints, you deal 1% more damage.
translation:
可怜的达洛克：

悲惨之力：

随着生命值降低，攻击造成更多伤害。每从最大生命值中损失1点生命值，你便多造成1%的伤害。

english:
Dharok the Wretched:

Wretched Strength +:

Attacks do more damage as your hitpoints decrease. For every hitpoint lost from your maximum hitpoints, you deal 1% more damage.

When you take damage, you have a 1/4 chance of reflecting 15% of the damage to your opponent.
translation:
可怜的达洛克：

悲惨之力+：

随着生命值降低，攻击造成更多伤害。每从最大生命值中损失1点生命值，你便多造成1%的伤害。

当你受到伤害时，有1/4的几率将15%的伤害反弹给对手。

english:
Guthan the Infested:

Infestation:

Attacks have a 25% chance of replenishing your health equal to the damage you deal.
translation:
被寄生的古桑：

寄生：

攻击有25%的几率恢复等同于你所造成伤害的生命值。

english:
Guthan the Infested:

Infestation +:

Attacks have a 25% chance of replenishing your health equal to the damage you deal.

This can boost your hitpoints by up to 10.
translation:
被寄生的古桑：

寄生+：

攻击有25%的几率恢复等同于你所造成伤害的生命值。

这最多可以提升你10点生命值。

english:
Karil the Tainted:

Tainted Shot:

Successful range attacks have a 25% chance of lowering the enemy's agility stat by 20%.
translation:
被污染的卡里尔：

污染射击：

成功的远程攻击有25%的几率降低敌人20%的敏捷属性。

english:
Karil the Tainted:

Tainted Shot +:

Successful range attacks have a 25% chance of lowering the enemy's agility stat by 20%.

A second hitplat is applied in PvP, dealing half the damage of the first.
translation:
被污染的卡里尔：

污染射击+：

成功的远程攻击有25%的几率降低敌人20%的敏捷属性。

在玩家对战中，会额外造成一次伤害判定，数值为第一次伤害的一半。

english:
Torag the Corrupted:

Corruption:

Successful melee attacks have a 25% chance of lowering the victim's run energy by 20%.
translation:
堕落的托拉格：

堕落：

成功的近战攻击有25%的几率降低目标20%的奔跑能量。

english:
Torag the Corrupted:

Corruption +:

Successful melee attacks have a 25% chance of lowering the victim's run energy by 20%.

For every hitpoint lost from your maximum hitpoints, your Defence stat gets an invisible boost.
translation:
堕落的托拉格：

堕落+：

成功的近战攻击有25%的几率降低目标20%的奔跑能量。

每从最大生命值中损失1点生命值，你的防御属性便会获得一次隐形提升。

english:
Verac the Defiled:

Defiler:

Attacks have a 25% chance of ignoring any armour, Defence, and protection prayers.
translation:
被亵渎的维拉克：

亵渎者：

攻击有25%的几率无视任何盔甲、防御和防护祈祷。

english:
Verac the Defiled:

Defiler +:

Attacks have a 25% chance of ignoring any armour, Defence, and protection prayers.

Gives a +7 prayer bonus.
translation:
被亵渎的维拉克：

亵渎者+：

攻击有25%的几率无视任何盔甲、防御和防护祈祷。

提供+7祈祷加成。

english:
Inquisitor's armour:

Each individual piece of Inquisitor's armour boosts damage and accuracy by 0.5% when using the crush attack style. This is boosted to 2.5% if an Inquisitor's mace is equipped.

If all pieces of the Inquisitor's armour are worn, a set bonus of 2.5% is applied.
Using the Inquisitor's mace will triple the overall set bonus to 7.5%.
translation:
审判官盔甲：

每件审判官盔甲在使用粉碎攻击风格时，提升0.5%的伤害和命中率。如果装备了审判官钉锤，则提升至2.5%。

如果穿戴全套审判官盔甲，会额外获得2.5%的套装加成。
使用审判官钉锤会使总套装加成翻三倍，达到7.5%。

english:
Graceful Outfit:

Each individual piece of the Graceful Outfit increases your run restoration rate.

Wearing the full Graceful Outfit increases run energy restoration by 30%.
translation:
优雅套装：

每件优雅套装部件都会提升你的奔跑能量恢复速度。

穿戴全套优雅套装可使奔跑能量恢复速度提升30%。

english:
Obsidian armour:

All obsidian weaponry will be given a 10% boost in melee accuracy and melee strength.
translation:
黑曜石盔甲：

所有黑曜石武器将获得10%的近战命中率和近战力量加成。

english:
Void Knight Melee:

When wearing the Void Top, Robe, Gloves and Melee Helmet, you will receive +10% bonus to your melee damage and accuracy.
translation:
虚空骑士近战：

穿戴虚空上衣、长袍、手套和近战头盔时，你将获得+10%的近战伤害和命中率加成。

english:
Void Knight Range:

When wearing the Void Top, Robe, Gloves and Ranger Helmet, you will receive +10% bonus to your ranged damage and accuracy.
translation:
虚空骑士远程：

穿戴虚空上衣、长袍、手套和射手头盔时，你将获得+10%的远程伤害和命中率加成。

english:
Void Knight Elite Range:

When wearing the Elite Void Top, Elite Robe, Gloves and Ranger Helmet, you will receive +12.5% bonus to your ranged damage and 10% bonus to accuracy.
translation:
虚空骑士高级远程：

穿戴高级虚空上衣、高级长袍、手套和射手头盔时，你将获得+12.5%的远程伤害加成和10%的命中率加成。

english:
Void Knight Mage:

When wearing the Void Top, Robe, Gloves and Mage Helmet, you will receive +45% bonus to your magic accuracy.
translation:
虚空骑士魔法：

穿戴虚空上衣、长袍、手套和法师头盔时，你将获得+45%的魔法命中率加成。

english:
Void Knight Elite Mage:

When wearing the Elite Void Top, Elite Robe, Gloves and Mage Helmet, you will receive a +45% bonus to your magic accuracy and 5% to your magic damage.
translation:
虚空骑士高级魔法：

穿戴高级虚空上衣、高级长袍、手套和法师头盔时，你将获得+45%的魔法命中率加成和5%的魔法伤害加成。

english:
Justiciar:

PvM damage dealt to you is reduced according to your total armour protection in that style.
translation:
审判官：

你对怪物受到的伤害将根据你对该攻击类型的总盔甲防护值而减少。

english:
Angler outfit:

XP from training Fishing will be increased by 2.5% if the full set is worn. Incomplete sets give smaller bonuses.
translation:
垂钓者套装：

穿戴全套时，训练钓鱼获得的经验值将增加2.5%。不完整的套装提供较小的加成。

english:
Lumberjack outfit:

XP from training Woodcutting will be increased by 2.5% if the full set is worn. Incomplete sets give smaller bonuses.
translation:
伐木工套装：

穿戴全套时，训练伐木获得的经验值将增加2.5%。不完整的套装提供较小的加成。

english:
Prospector outfit:

XP from training Mining will be increased by 2.5% if the full set is worn. Incomplete sets give smaller bonuses.
translation:
探矿者套装：

穿戴全套时，训练采矿获得的经验值将增加2.5%。不完整的套装提供较小的加成。

english:
Farmer outfit:

XP from training Farming will be increased by 2.5% if the full set is worn. Incomplete sets give smaller bonuses.
translation:
农夫套装：

穿戴全套时，训练农业获得的经验值将增加2.5%。不完整的套装提供较小的加成。

english:
Pyromancer outfit:

XP from training Firemaking will be increased by 2.5% if the full set is worn. Incomplete sets give smaller bonuses.
translation:
火术士套装：

穿戴全套时，训练生火获得的经验值将增加2.5%。不完整的套装提供较小的加成。

english:
Shayzien armour:

Reduces the damage of the acid splash attack used by Lizardman Shamans.
translation:
谢兹恩城盔甲：

减少蜥蜴人萨满使用的酸液溅射攻击的伤害。

english:
Rogue kit:

The full set gives a 100% chance of double loot from standard pickpocketing. Incomplete sets give smaller chances.
translation:
盗贼套装：

全套提供100%的几率从标准扒窃中获得双倍战利品。不完整的套装提供较低的几率。

english:
Carpenter's outfit:

XP from training Construction will be increased by 2.5% if the full set is worn. Incomplete sets give smaller bonuses.
translation:
木匠套装：

穿戴全套时，训练建筑获得的经验值将增加2.5%。不完整的套装提供较小的加成。

english:
Crystal armour:

Each individual piece of Crystal Armour increases your accuracy and damage with crystal ranged weaponry.

Wearing the full set of Crystal Armour increases accuracy by 30% and damage by 15%.
translation:
水晶盔甲：

每件水晶盔甲部件都会提升你使用水晶远程武器时的命中率和伤害。

穿戴全套水晶盔甲可提升30%的命中率和15%的伤害。

english:
Swampbark Armour:

Wearing the helm, body, and legs increases the duration of Bind, Snare and Entangle spells by 3.6 seconds
translation:
沼泽树皮盔甲：

穿戴头盔、上衣和腿甲时，束缚术、陷阱术和缠绕术的持续时间增加3.6秒。

english:
Bloodbark Armour:

The full set increases the amount healed by Blood spells to 35.0%.
translation:
血树皮盔甲：

全套将血系法术的治疗量提升至35.0%。

english:
Zealot's prayer robes:

The full set grants a 5% chance of saving ensouled heads when reanimating them, bones when burying or offering them, and bonemeal & slime at the Ectofuntus. This stacks with the Wilderness altar's bone saving effect.
translation:
狂热者祈祷长袍：

全套提供5%的几率在复活注魂头颅时节省头颅，在埋葬或献祭骨头时节省骨头，以及在灵泉处节省骨粉和黏液。此效果与荒野祭坛的骨头节省效果叠加。

english:
Spirit Angler outfit:

XP from training Fishing will be increased by 2.5% if the full set is worn. Incomplete sets give smaller bonuses.

Full set acts as a tether rope when fighting Tempoross.
translation:
海灵垂钓者套装：

穿戴全套时，训练钓鱼获得的经验值将增加2.5%。不完整的套装提供较小的加成。

全套在与海灵战斗时充当系绳。

english:
Virtus Robes:

6% increased Magic damage and an additional 9% increased Magic damage with ancient spells.
translation:
维图斯长袍：

提升6%的魔法伤害，使用远古法术时额外提升9%的魔法伤害。

english:
Raiments of the Eye:

Runes crafted are increased by 60%.

This bonus stacks additively with other similar effects.
translation:
法眼法袍：

制作的符文数量增加60%。

此加成与其他类似效果相加叠加。

english:
Smith's Uniform:

The full set increases the rate you will smith items at an anvil by 1 tick.
translation:
铁匠制服：

全套使你在铁砧上锻造物品的速度加快1个游戏刻。

english:
Statius's Equipment:

Melee special attacks have 15% increased accuracy.
translation:
斯塔提乌斯的装备：

近战战技的命中率提升15%。

english:
Vesta's Equipment:

Melee special attacks have 15% increased accuracy.
translation:
维斯塔的装备：

近战战技的命中率提升15%。

english:
Morrigan's Equipment:

Ranged special attacks have 15% increased accuracy.
translation:
莫瑞根的装备：

远程战技的命中率提升15%。

english:
Zuriel's Equipment:

Magic special attacks have 25% increased accuracy.
translation:
祖瑞尔的装备：

魔法战技的命中率提升25%。

english:
Statius's Corrupt Equipment:

Melee special attacks have 15% increased accuracy.
translation:
斯塔提乌斯的堕落装备：

近战战技的命中率提升15%。

english:
Vesta's Corrupt Equipment:

Melee special attacks have 15% increased accuracy.
translation:
维斯塔的堕落装备：

近战战技的命中率提升15%。

english:
Morrigan's Corrupt Equipment:

Ranged special attacks have 15% increased accuracy.
translation:
莫瑞根的堕落装备：

远程战技的命中率提升15%。

english:
Zuriel's Corrupt Equipment:

Magic special attacks have 25% increased accuracy.
translation:
祖瑞尔的堕落装备：

魔法战技的命中率提升25%。

english:
Bloodrager Effect:

Successful hits with the Dual Macuahuitl have a 33% chance of reducing the delay of your next attack by 1 tick.

The Dual Macuahuitl gains the 'Blood Infusion' special attack.
translation:
血怒者效果：

使用成对黑曜石锯剑成功命中时，有33%的几率使你的下一次攻击延迟减少1个游戏刻。

成对黑曜石锯剑获得'鲜血灌注'战技。

english:
Frostweaver Effect:

Casting spells which bind the enemy has a 50% chance to allow the next attack with the Blue moon spear to bypass the action delay.

The Blue Moon Spear gains the 'Break Shackles' special attack.
translation:
霜织者效果：

施放束缚敌人的法术时，有50%的几率使下一次使用蓝月长矛的攻击无视动作延迟。

蓝月长矛获得'挣脱枷锁'战技。

english:
Frostweaver Effect Set:

Casting spells which bind the enemy has a 20% chance to allow the next attack with the Blue moon spear to bypass the action delay.

The Blue Moon Spear gains the 'Break Shackles' special attack.
translation:
霜织者效果套装：

施放束缚敌人的法术时，有20%的几率使下一次使用蓝月长矛的攻击无视动作延迟。

蓝月长矛获得'挣脱枷锁'战技。

english:
Eclipse Effect:

Successful hits with the Eclipse Atlatl have a 20% chance to apply a burn effect to the enemy.

The Eclipse Atlatl gains the 'Eclipse' special attack.
translation:
月蚀效果：

使用月蚀投矛器成功命中时，有20%的几率对敌人施加灼烧效果。

月蚀投矛器获得'月蚀'战技。

english:
Hunter's Armour:

Damage taken from hunter creatures is reduced by 60%.
translation:
猎人盔甲：

来自猎人生物的伤害减少60%。

english:
Guild Hunter Outfit:

Increases catch chance of hunter creatures by up to 2.5%, and increases rare creature part droprate when doing Hunters' Rumours by up to 5%.
translation:
公会猎人套装：

提升捕捉猎人生物的几率最多2.5%，并在执行猎人传闻时提升稀有生物部件的掉落率最多5%。

english:
Inquisitor's armour:

Each individual piece of Inquisitor's armour boosts damage and accuracy by 2.5% when using the crush attack style and having the Inquisitor's mace equipped.
translation:
审判官盔甲：

每件审判官盔甲的单件在装备审判官钉锤并使用粉碎攻击风格时，提升 2.5% 的伤害和准确度。

english: Your character starts outside Lumbridge Castle.|Your character begins restricted to the areas of Misthalin and Karamja. As you complete tasks, you can unlock more areas.|Full information about each of the areas can be found in the Area Selection Menu. This can be accessed from the Leagues Menu in the Journal Panel.|All experience gained will be multiplied by 5x, and this will increase as you unlock more Relics.|Content released during Leagues V will be reviewed and enabled for the League on a case-by-case basis.|Leagues V: Raging Echoes will run from November 27th 2024 until the game update on January 22nd 2025.
translation: 你的角色从仑桥镇城堡外开始。|你的角色一开始只能进入米斯塔林和卡拉姆詹岛的区域。完成任务后，可以解锁更多区域。|每个区域的详细信息可以在区域选择菜单中找到。该菜单可通过日志面板中的联赛菜单访问。|所有获得的经验值将乘以5倍，并且随着你解锁更多遗物，倍率还会增加。|联赛V期间发布的内容将根据具体情况审核并启用。|联赛V：狂怒回响将于2024年11月27日开始，持续至2025年1月22日的游戏更新。

english:
Your character is an Ironman, meaning you cannot trade with other players.|As you begin with Misthalin and Karamja unlocked, the following quests have been auto-completed:|- Dragon Slayer
- Druidic Ritual
- Elemental Workshop I
- Bone Voyage
- Dig Site
- Fairytale II - Cure a Queen
- Fairytale I - Growing Pains
- Lost City
- Nature Spirit
- Priest in Peril
- The Restless Ghost
- Shilo Village
- Jungle Potion|You will start with the following stat increases:|- 3 Herblore
- 5 Runecraft|A Dramen Staff will be added to your Inventory so that you can access Zanaris. If lost, you can reclaim it from the Sage in Lumbridge.

Any pets obtained in the previous league can be freely reclaimed from the Sage or Probita. Pet transmogs you may of obtained in the previous league will also be auto unlocked at the start of the league, though these will both no longer count towards your collection log total counter on a league world.
translation:
你的角色是钢铁人模式，意味着你不能与其他玩家交易。|由于你一开始就解锁了米斯塔林和卡拉姆詹岛，以下任务已自动完成：|- 屠龙者
- 德鲁伊仪式
- 元素工坊 I
- 骨头之旅
- 考古挖掘场
- 童话 II-治愈女王
- 童话 I-成长的烦恼
- 失落之城
- 自然之灵
- 危难中的祭司
- 不安的幽灵
- 希洛村
- 丛林药水|你将获得以下属性提升：|- 3级草药学
- 5级符石制作|一根德拉门法杖将添加到你的背包中，以便你进入扎纳里斯城。如果丢失，你可以从仑桥镇的智者那里重新领取。

在上一个联赛中获得的任何宠物都可以从智者或普罗比塔那里免费重新领取。你在上一个联赛中可能获得的宠物外观也会在联赛开始时自动解锁，不过这些在联赛世界中不再计入你的收藏日志总数。

english:
Slayer Masters will assign you the same tasks, taking into account the areas you have currently unlocked.|Teleports and transportation methods to locations outside of areas you have unlocked are restricted.|When purchasing your Player Owned House it will be accessible from Brimhaven. Your house can only be moved to areas you have unlocked.|Unlocking new areas will complete various quests and Achievement Diary tasks but will not award any quest completion XP. However, you may complete some quests on your own to gain their XP before unlocking the area which auto-completes it.|Some bosses will have the option to be fought in private areas without other players.|Some shop items will have infinite stock and let you buy items already noted.|The following shop stocks have been modified:|- Pestle and Mortars and Box Traps have been added to the Lumbridge General Store
- Black Platelegs have been added to Horvik's Armour Shop
- Elemental Shields have been added to all Slayer Equipment shops|Thessalia in Varrock will offer additional makeover services.|Impling spawn rates have been increased.|Rarity of rare implings has been increased.|Dragon implings drop reduced Dragon Bones.|All Soulreaper Axe pieces will drop from every Desert Treasure 2 Boss.
translation:
杀戮大师会根据你当前解锁的区域分配相同的任务。|前往未解锁区域的传送和交通方式将受到限制。|购买玩家拥有的房屋时，它将位于布尔哈文镇。你的房屋只能移动到已解锁的区域。|解锁新区域将完成各种任务和成就日记任务，但不会奖励任何任务完成经验值。不过，你可以在解锁区域之前自行完成某些任务以获得经验值。|某些Boss可以选择在私人区域中战斗，而不会受到其他玩家的干扰。|某些商店物品将拥有无限库存，并允许你购买已标注的物品。|以下商店库存已修改：|- 研钵和研杵以及箱式陷阱已添加到仑桥镇杂货店
- 黑铁腿甲已添加到霍维克的盔甲店
- 元素盾牌已添加到所有杀戮装备商店|维洛克城的塞萨利亚将提供额外的改妆服务。|小精灵的生成率已提高。|稀有精灵的稀有度已提高。|龙精灵掉落减少的龙骨。|所有猎魂斧碎片将从每个沙漠宝藏2的Boss身上掉落。

english: Welcome to Leagues V - Raging Echoes!
translation: 欢迎来到联赛V - 狂怒回响！

english:
In Leagues V, progression is key. To help you keep track of it, you have the Leagues Menu. This is an extra section to the Journal Panel whilst on a Leagues World.

Let's open the Leagues Menu now. To do so, look for the flashing quest icon on your screen.
translation:
在联赛V中，进度是关键。为了帮助你追踪进度，你拥有联赛菜单。这是在联赛世界中日志面板的一个额外部分。

现在让我们打开联赛菜单。为此，请寻找屏幕上闪烁的任务图标。

english: Now that you have your <col=ffffff>Journal Panel</col> open, you can open the <col=ffffff>Leagues Menu</col>. To do so, look for the flashing <col=ffffff>Leagues tab</col>.
translation: 既然你已经打开了<col=ffffff>日志面板</col>，你可以打开<col=ffffff>联赛菜单</col>。为此，请寻找闪烁的<col=ffffff>联赛标签</col>。

english:
In Leagues V, the world of Gielinor is split up into different areas. Most of these have been locked off, but you can unlock new ones by completing tasks.

Now that you've completed your first task, you can unlock a new area! To do so, look for the flashing areas button in the Leagues Menu.
translation:
在联赛V中，吉列诺世界被划分为不同的区域。大部分区域已被锁定，但你可以通过完成任务来解锁新区域。

既然你已经完成了第一个任务，你可以解锁一个新区域！为此，请寻找联赛菜单中闪烁的区域按钮。

english:
Completing tasks doesn't just give you access to new areas. The League Points you earn from completing them can be used to unlock powerful Relics!

Let's take a look at these Relics now. To do so, look for the flashing Relics button in the Leagues Menu.
translation:
完成任务不仅能让你进入新区域。你从完成任务中获得的联赛积分可以用来解锁强大的遗物！

现在让我们看看这些遗物。为此，请寻找联赛菜单中闪烁的遗物按钮。
多吉需坎城敏捷训练场

english: Timelessly fashionable. The helmet of a champion.
Not all who wander are lost.
translation: 并非所有流浪者都迷失了方向。

english: A good tool improves the way you work. A great tool improves the way you think.
translation: 好工具改善工作方式，伟大工具改善思维方式。

english: Ashes to ashes. Dust to dust. Bones to experience.
translation: 尘归尘，土归土，骨头变经验。

english: It is our choices that show us what we truly are. Far more than our abilities.
translation: 是我们的选择，而非能力，展现了真正的我们。

english: Go in peace in the name of Saradomin; may his glory shine upon you like the sun.
translation: 奉萨拉多明之名平安前行；愿他的荣耀如阳光般照耀你。

english: Give a noob a fish and they will leave you alone. Teach a noob to fish and they will deflate the fish market.
translation: 给新手一条鱼，他们就会不再烦你。教新手钓鱼，他们就会搞垮鱼市。

english: Life's biggest tragedy is that we get old too soon and wise too late.
translation: 人生最大的悲剧是我们老得太快，却聪明得太晚。

english: Rise and rise again, until lambs become lions.
translation: 一次次崛起，直到羔羊变成雄狮。

english: May your bloodthirst never be sated, and may all your battles be glorious. Zamorak bring you strength.
translation: 愿你的嗜血永不满足，愿你的战斗永远辉煌。扎莫拉克赐你力量。

english: Life is a garden. You reap what you sow.
translation: 人生如花园，种瓜得瓜，种豆得豆。

english: A day without laughter is a day wasted.
translation: 没有欢笑的一天是虚度的一天。

english: If by my life or death I can protect you, I will. You have my sword.
translation: 无论生死，我若护你，必尽全力。我的剑为你而挥。

english: Aim steady. Perfection is unattainable, but one should always strive for it.
translation: 瞄准要稳。完美虽不可及，但人应始终追求之。

english: May you walk the path, and never fall, for Guthix walks beside thee on thy journey. May Guthix bring you peace.
translation: 愿你行于正道，永不跌倒，因古斯与你同行。愿古斯赐你安宁。

english: Cats are easily as tough as sheep. Cats were the second thing Guthix brought here, after sheep of course.
translation: 猫的坚韧程度丝毫不亚于羊。猫是古斯带来的第二种生物，当然，仅次于羊。

english: The shield that guards the realms of men.
Brassica Prime. Thy Name be Vegetable, thy land be soil. Plant in us thy seeds of faith, that we may grow beyond allotments. Forever, your crops. Cabbage.
translation: 卷心菜主。汝名为蔬菜，汝土为土壤。请在我们心中播下信仰的种子，让我们超越菜畦生长。永远是你的作物。卷心菜。

english: You must really like your clan if you put a ring on it.
translation: 你肯定非常喜欢你的部落，才会给它套上戒指。

english: A risky life, to be marked by Him. Though a skulled adventurer need not fear when their clan is near.
translation: 被他标记，是危险的人生。不过，当部落成员在附近时，顶骷髅的冒险者无需恐惧。

english: The drop chance of a <col=ffffff>Clue Scroll (Easy)</col> from all sources (excl. implings) is increased by 5%
translation: 所有来源（不含精灵）的<col=ffffff>线索卷轴 (简单)</col>掉落几率提高 5%

english: The maximum quantity assigned from the <col=ffffff>Like a boss</col> slayer reward is increased by 5
translation: <col=ffffff>像Boss一样</col>杀戮奖励分配的最大数量增加 5

english: 100% bonus to tokens earned from <col=ffffff>Warrior Guild</col> activities
translation: 从<col=ffffff>战士公会</col>活动中获得的代币增加 100%

english: 1 additional commendation point from successful <col=ffffff>Pest Control</col> games
translation: 成功完成<col=ffffff>虫害治理</col>游戏后额外获得 1 点嘉奖点数
每日特罗尔海姆传送 - 3 次

english: The drop chance of a <col=ffffff>Clue Scroll (Medium)</col> from all sources (excl. implings) is increased by 5%
translation: 所有来源（不含精灵）的<col=ffffff>线索卷轴 (中等)</col>掉落几率提高 5%

english: 2 additional commendation points from successful <col=ffffff>Pest Control</col> games
translation: 成功完成<col=ffffff>虫害治理</col>游戏后额外获得 2 点嘉奖点数

translation: <col=ffffff>矮人大炮</col>可多容纳 5 发炮弹

english: The drop chance of a <col=ffffff>Clue Scroll (Hard)</col> from all sources (excl. implings) is increased by 5%
translation: 所有来源（不含精灵）的<col=ffffff>线索卷轴 (困难)</col>掉落几率提高 5%

english: The drop chance of an <col=ffffff>Ecumenical Key</col> is increased by 8%
The essence required to access a <col=ffffff>God Wars</col> boss is reduced to 35
translation: 进入<col=ffffff>神战</col>Boss所需的精华减少至 35

english: You can access a privately rented <col=ffffff>God Wars</col> boss instance for a fee of 150k coins
translation: 你可以花费 15 万金币租用私人<col=ffffff>神战</col>Boss副本

english: You can fight <col=ffffff>the Hueycoatl</col> privately for a reduced fee of 25k coins
translation: 你可以花费 2.5 万金币的优惠价格私人挑战<col=ffffff>休伊科特尔</col>

english: Item imbue rewards at <col=ffffff>Soul Wars</col> and the <col=ffffff>Nightmare Zone</col> are 50% cheaper
translation: 在<col=ffffff>灵魂战争</col>和<col=ffffff>噩梦地带</col>的物品强化奖励费用降低 50%

english: The drop chance of a <col=ffffff>Clue Scroll (Elite)</col> from all sources (excl. implings) is increased by 5%
translation: 所有来源（不含精灵）的<col=ffffff>线索卷轴 (精英)</col>掉落几率提高 5%

english: The <col=ffffff>Bracelet of slaughter</col> will have a 10% chance to fully recharge instead of breaking
translation: <col=ffffff>杀戮手镯</col>有 10% 的几率完全充能而非损坏

english: The <col=ffffff>Expeditious bracelet</col> has a 10% chance to fully recharge instead of breaking
translation: <col=ffffff>迅捷手镯</col>有 10% 的几率完全充能而非损坏

english: Superior slayer creatures are 25% more common
translation: 高级杀戮生物的出现几率提高 25%
每日莫尔乌尔雷克传送 - 3 次

english: When you are assigned a <col=ffffff>TzTok-Jad</col> or <col=ffffff>TzKal-Zuk</col> slayer task you will be assigned to kill 2
translation: 当你被分配<col=ffffff>特兹托克.贾德</col>或<col=ffffff>特兹卡尔.祖克</col>的杀戮任务时，你将需要击杀 2 个
你的奴仆持续时间延长 100%

english: The ability to combine an Avernic defender with Ghommal's hilt 5 to create <col=ffffff>Ghommal's Avernic Defender 5</col>
translation: 能够将阿弗尼克格挡匕首与戈马尔的剑柄 5 结合，制造出<col=ffffff>戈马尔的阿弗尼克格挡匕首 5</col>
普通模式：阿玛斯库特之墓
专家模式：阿玛斯库特之墓

english: Leagues are time-limited game modes in which you can experience Old School RuneScape like never before!|Complete tasks to earn League Points that can be used to unlock powerful Fragments which enhance your gameplay!|Each League is different - figure out the best strategy to pull ahead of the competition. Or alternatively, just have fun!
translation: 联赛是限时游戏模式，让你以前所未有的方式体验 Old School RuneScape！|完成任务赚取联赛点数，用于解锁强大的碎片，增强你的游戏体验！|每个联赛都不同——找出最佳策略，在竞争中脱颖而出。或者，也可以纯粹享受乐趣！

english: In Leagues, League Points can be earned by completing various tasks. They can then be used to unlock new Fragment Slots.|League Points are also transferred to your main game profile where they can be used to buy rewards in the Leagues Reward Shop.
translation: 在联赛中，可以通过完成各种任务来赚取联赛点数。然后可以用它们来解锁新的碎片槽位。|联赛点数也会转移到你的主游戏档案中，用于在联赛奖励商店购买奖励。

english: Fragments are useful buffs. You can mix and match different Fragments to create interesting combinations.|Each Fragment has two Set Effects. When you equip enough Fragments with the same Set Effect, it'll get more powerful!|Completing tasks also earns you Sage's Renown which can be used to unlock content like Skills and Bosses.
translation: 碎片是有用的增益效果。你可以混合搭配不同的碎片，创造出有趣的组合。|每个碎片都有两种套装效果。当你装备足够多具有相同套装效果的碎片时，效果会变得更强大！|完成任务还能获得智者声望，用于解锁技能和Boss等内容。

english:
Your performance in the League is measured by how many League Points you earn. And the more you score compared to your rivals, the higher League Rank you'll achieve!|The cut-offs for League Ranks are:|- Bronze: Earn 100 League Points
- Iron: Top 80%
- Steel: Top 60%
- Mithril: Top 40%
- Adamant: Top 20%
- Rune: Top 5%
- Dragon: Top 1%
translation:
你在联赛中的表现取决于你赚取的联赛点数。与对手相比得分越高，你获得的联赛排名就越高！|联赛排名的分界线如下：|- 青铜：赚取 100 联赛点数
- 铁：前 80%
- 钢：前 60%
- 秘银：前 40%
- 精金：前 20%
- 符文：前 5%
- 龙：前 1%

english:
As well as letting you unlock Fragments, League Points are transferred to your main game profile.|Points can be used to buy rewards in the Leagues Reward Shop.|Performance in one League will also contribute to the next, with rewards such as:|- League Starter Outfits
- League Icons
- Pet Transfers
translation:
除了让你解锁碎片外，联赛点数还会转移到你的主游戏档案中。|点数可用于在联赛奖励商店购买奖励。|在一个联赛中的表现也会为下一个联赛做出贡献，奖励包括：|- 联赛初始套装
- 联赛图标
- 宠物转移

english: Welcome to Leagues III: Shattered Relics!
translation: 欢迎来到联赛 III：破碎遗物！

english:
Leagues are time-limited game modes that let you experience the world of Gielinor in new ways.

The aim of each League is to complete tasks and earn
League Points. These points can be exchanged for rewards. You can also earn Sage's Renown, which is used to unlock content.

To begin your journey in Leagues III: Shattered Relics, use the Get Started button below. Otherwise, you can use the
Exit Leagues button to quit.
translation:
联赛是限时游戏模式，让你以全新方式体验吉列诺世界。

每个联赛的目标是完成任务并赚取
联赛点数。这些点数可以兑换奖励。你还可以赚取智者声望，用于解锁内容。

要开始你在联赛 III：破碎遗物的旅程，请使用下方的开始按钮。或者，你可以使用
退出联赛按钮退出。

english:
In Leagues III: Shattered Relics, progression is key. To help you keep track of it, you have the Leagues Menu. This is an extra section that appears on the Character Summary Panel while in a Leagues World.

Let's open the Leagues Menu now. To do so, look for the flashing character summary icon on your screen.
translation:
在联赛 III：破碎遗物中，进度是关键。为了帮助你追踪进度，你拥有联赛菜单。这是当你处于联赛世界时，出现在角色摘要面板上的一个额外部分。

现在让我们打开联赛菜单。为此，请寻找屏幕上闪烁的角色摘要图标。

english: Now that you have your <col=ffffff>Character Summary Panel</col> open, you can open the <col=ffffff>Leagues Menu</col>. To do so, look for the flashing <col=ffffff>Leagues tab</col>.
translation: 既然你已经打开了<col=ffffff>角色摘要面板</col>，就可以打开<col=ffffff>联赛菜单</col>了。为此，请寻找闪烁的<col=ffffff>联赛标签页</col>。

english:
In Leagues III: Shattered Relics, most of your skills have been locked off, but you can unlock new ones by completing tasks.

Now you've selected your Combat path, you can unlock your first skill! To do so, look for the flashing unlocks button in the Leagues Menu.
translation:
在联赛 III：破碎遗物中，你的大部分技能已被锁定，但你可以通过完成任务来解锁新技能。

既然你已经选择了战斗路线，就可以解锁你的第一个技能了！为此，请寻找联赛菜单中闪烁的解锁按钮。

english:
Throughout the League, you'll be able to earn Fragments.

Fragments are powerful items which can be used to imbue your character with powerful effects when equipped!

Let's take a look at these Fragments now. To do so, look for the flashing Fragments button in the Leagues Menu.
translation:
在整个联赛中，你将能够赚取碎片。

碎片是强大的物品，装备后可以为你的角色注入强大的效果！

现在让我们看看这些碎片。为此，请寻找联赛菜单中闪烁的碎片按钮。

english: Your character starts in the outskirts of Catherby, by The Sage.|Instead of earning Relics, in this League you will be collecting Fragments. You can obtain a wide variety of Fragments from killing monsters, earning experience and completing minigames. Once you have obtained and unlocked them, you can equip them via the Fragments menu, found in the Leagues Menu in the Character Summary Panel.|Fragments will gain experience and become more powerful as you use them. You can check your Fragments' progress from the Fragments menu as well.|Your character begins restricted to a few skills and bosses. While a skill is locked, you can use it as normal, but you will not be able to gain any experience from it. As you complete tasks, you gain Sage's Renown, which can be used to auto-complete quests and unlock skills and bosses.|Full information about each of the skills, bosses and quest auto-completions can be found in the Unlocks menu. This can be accessed from the Leagues Menu in the Character Summary Panel.|All experience gained will be multiplied by 5x, and this will increase as you advance through each Tier, which also unlocks more Fragment Slots, allowing you to equip more Fragments!|Any new content released during Leagues III - Shattered Relics will be reviewed on a case-by-case basis.|Leagues III - Shattered Relics will run from 19th January 2022 until the game update on 16th March 2022.
translation: 你的角色从凯瑟比镇郊外、智者身边开始。|在这个联赛中，你将收集碎片，而不是遗物。你可以通过击杀怪物、赚取经验和完成小游戏来获得各种各样的碎片。一旦你获得并解锁了它们，就可以通过角色摘要面板中联赛菜单里的碎片菜单来装备它们。|碎片会随着你的使用而获得经验并变得更强大。你也可以从碎片菜单中查看碎片的进度。|你的角色开始时只能使用少数技能和Boss。当技能被锁定时，你可以正常使用它，但无法从中获得任何经验。随着你完成任务，你会获得智者声望，可用于自动完成任务并解锁技能和Boss。|关于每个技能、Boss和任务自动完成的完整信息可以在解锁菜单中找到。可以通过角色摘要面板中的联赛菜单访问。|所有获得的经验都将乘以 5 倍，并且随着你提升每个等级，这个倍数还会增加，同时也会解锁更多碎片槽位，让你可以装备更多碎片！|在联赛 III - 破碎遗物期间发布的任何新内容都将根据具体情况进行评估。|联赛 III - 破碎遗物将从 2022 年 1 月 19 日持续到 2022 年 3 月 16 日的游戏更新。

english: Your character is an Ironman, meaning you cannot trade with other players.|As you begin with nothing unlocked, no quests will be automatically completed.|When you unlock Herblore, you will be granted enough experience in it to reach level 3. Beyond that, no additional levels will be rewarded.
translation: 你的角色是铁人，意味着你不能与其他玩家交易。|由于你开始时没有任何解锁，因此不会自动完成任何任务。|当你解锁草药学时，你将获得足够的经验以达到 3 级。除此之外，不会奖励额外的等级。

english: You're free to explore the entire map in Leagues III: Shattered Relics.|To aid in your exploration, you can activate Waystones in key locations across the map. The first can be found in Catherby.|Once a Waystone is activated, you can use it to teleport to other activated Waystones.
translation: 在联赛 III：破碎遗物中，你可以自由探索整个地图。|为了协助你的探索，你可以在地图上的关键位置激活路标石。第一个可以在凯瑟比镇找到。|一旦路标石被激活，你就可以使用它传送到其他已激活的路标石。

english: A Blighted Surge sack can be used instead of runes when casting any of the elemental Surge spells, in the Wilderness.
translation: 在荒野中施放任何元素浪潮法术时，可以使用被污染的浪潮袋代替符文。

english: A Scroll of Imbuing can be used on various rings and other items to imbue them with additional benefits.
translation: 强化卷轴可用于各种戒指和其他物品，为其注入额外增益。

english: Neither player will be allowed to wear items on their head.
translation: 双方玩家均不得佩戴头部装备。

english: Neither player will be allowed to wear items on their back.
translation: 双方玩家均不得穿戴背部装备。

english: Neither player will be allowed to wear items around their neck.
translation: 双方玩家均不得佩戴颈部装备。

english: Neither player will be allowed to hold items in their right hand, including 2-handed items.
translation: 双方玩家均不得在右手持有物品，包括双手物品。

english: Neither player will be allowed to wear items on their torso.
translation: 双方玩家均不得穿戴躯干装备。

english: Neither player will be allowed to hold items in their left hand, nor use 2-handed items.
translation: 双方玩家均不得在左手持有物品，也不得使用双手物品。

english: Neither player will be allowed to wear items on their legs.
translation: 双方玩家均不得穿戴腿部装备。

english: Neither player will be allowed to wear items on their hands.
translation: 双方玩家都不得佩戴手部装备。

english: Neither player will be allowed to wear items on their feet.
translation: 双方玩家都不得穿戴脚部装备。

english: Neither player will be allowed to wear items on their fingers.
translation: 双方玩家都不得佩戴戒指。

english: Neither player will be allowed to have items in their quiver.
translation: 双方玩家的箭袋中不得有任何物品。

english: Neither player may equip items to this slot.
translation: 双方玩家都无法装备物品到此栏位。
野蛮人突袭赌博 - 低级
野蛮人突袭赌博 - 中级
野蛮人突袭赌博 - 高级
鱼叉捕鱼 (腐化试炼之路)

english: History of the Goblin Race, A

translation: 普里夫迪纳斯城的创建

english: Exploration of the Eastern Realm, The
Book of the Big High War God, The

translation: 沙漠鳟鱼号 - 航海日志

english: Your character starts outside Lumbridge Castle.|Your character begins restricted to the areas of Misthalin and Karamja. As you complete tasks, you can unlock more areas.|Full information about each of the areas can be found in the Area Selection Menu. This can be accessed from the Leagues Menu in the Journal Panel.|All experience gained will be multiplied by 5x, and this will increase as you unlock more Relics.|Content released during Leagues V will be reviewed and enabled for the League on a case-by-case basis.|Leagues V: Raging Echoes will run from November 27th 2024 until the game update on January 22th 2025.
translation: 你的角色从仑桥镇城堡外开始。|你的角色初始限制在米斯塔林和卡拉姆詹地区。完成任务后，你可以解锁更多区域。|每个区域的完整信息可以在区域选择菜单中找到，该菜单可通过日志面板中的联赛菜单访问。|所有获得的经验值将乘以5倍，并且随着你解锁更多遗物，倍率还会增加。|联赛V期间发布的内容将逐案审查并决定是否在联赛中启用。|联赛V：狂怒回响将于2024年11月27日开始，持续到2025年1月22日的游戏更新。

english:
Your character is an Ironman, meaning you cannot trade with other players.|As you begin with Misthalin and Karamja unlocked, the following quests have been auto-completed:|- Dragon Slayer
- Druidic Ritual
- Elemental Workshop I
- Bone Voyage
- Dig Site
- Fairytale II - Cure a Queen
- Fairytale I - Growing Pains
- Lost City
- Nature Spirit
- Priest in Peril
- The Restless Ghost
- Shilo Village
- Jungle Potion|You will start with the following stat increases:|- 3 Herblore
- 5 Runecraft|A Dramen Staff will be added to your Inventory so that you can access Zanaris. If lost, you can reclaim it from the Sage in Lumbridge.
translation:
你的角色是铁人模式，意味着你不能与其他玩家交易。|由于你初始已解锁米斯塔林和卡拉姆詹，以下任务已自动完成：|- 屠龙者
- 德鲁伊仪式
- 元素工坊 I
- 骨头之旅
- 考古挖掘场
- 童话 II-治愈女王
- 童话 I-成长的烦恼
- 失落之城
- 自然之灵
- 危难中的祭司
- 不安的幽灵
- 希洛村
- 丛林药水|你将获得以下属性提升：|- 3 草药学
- 5 符石制作|一根德拉门法杖将被添加到你的背包中，以便你进入扎纳里斯城。如果丢失，你可以从仑桥镇的智者那里重新领取。

english:
Slayer Masters will assign you the same tasks, taking into account the areas you have currently unlocked.|Teleports and transportation methods to locations outside of areas you have unlocked are restricted.|When purchasing your Player Owned House it will be accessible from Brimhaven. Your house can only be moved to areas you have unlocked.|Unlocking new areas will complete various quests and Achievement Diary tasks but will not award any quest completion XP. However, you may complete some quests on your own to gain their XP before unlocking the area which auto-completes it.|Some bosses will have the option to be fought in private areas without other players.|Some shop items will have infinite stock and let you buy items already noted.|The following shop stocks have been modified:|- Pestle and Mortars and Box Traps have been added to the Lumbridge General Store
- Black Platelegs have been added to Horvik's Armour Shop
- Elemental Shields have been added to all Slayer Equipment shops|Thessalia in Varrock will offer additional makeover services.|Impling spawn rates have been increased.|Rarity of rare implings has been increased.|Dragon implings drop reduced Dragon Bones.|All Soulreaper Axe pieces will drop from every Desert Treasure 2 Boss.|Pets do not count towards the collection log tasks.
translation:
杀戮大师会根据你当前解锁的区域分配相同的任务。|传送到未解锁区域之外地点的传送和交通方式将受到限制。|购买玩家拥有的房屋时，它将可以从布尔哈文镇进入。你的房屋只能移动到已解锁的区域。|解锁新区域将完成各种任务和成就日记任务，但不会奖励任务完成经验值。不过，你可以在解锁自动完成该任务的区域之前，自行完成某些任务以获得经验值。|某些Boss可以选择在没有其他玩家的私人区域中战斗。|某些商店物品将拥有无限库存，并允许你购买已标注的物品。|以下商店库存已修改：|- 研钵和研杵以及箱式陷阱已添加到仑桥镇杂货店
- 黑铁腿甲已添加到霍维克的盔甲店
- 元素盾已添加到所有杀戮装备商店|维洛克城的塞萨利亚将提供额外的改妆服务。|小精灵的生成率已提高。|稀有精灵的稀有度已提高。|龙精灵掉落减少的龙骨。|所有猎魂斧碎片将从每个沙漠宝藏2的Boss身上掉落。|宠物不计入收藏日志任务。
福提斯草药种植地保护

english: An Ironman cannot trade, stake, receive PK loot, scavenge dropped items, nor play certain multiplayer minigames.
translation: 铁人玩家无法交易、参与赌注、拾取PK战利品、捡拾他人丢弃的物品，也无法游玩某些多人小游戏。

english: In addition to the standard Ironman rules, an Ultimate Ironman cannot use banks, nor protect items on death in dangerous areas.
translation: 除了标准铁人规则外，终极铁人玩家无法使用银行，也无法在危险区域死亡时保护物品。

english: In addition to the standard Ironman rules, a Hardcore Ironman only has one life. Outside of 'safe' situations, death results in being downgraded to a standard Ironman.
translation: 除了标准铁人规则外，硬核铁人玩家只有一条命。在非安全情况下死亡，会降级为标准铁人。

english: A Group Ironman cannot trade with anyone outside the group, nor stake, receive PK loot nor scavenge dropped items. Group members added to the group after its formation may be subject to temporary trade restrictions too.
translation: 组队铁人玩家无法与队伍外的任何人交易、参与赌注、拾取PK战利品或捡拾他人丢弃的物品。队伍成立后加入的新成员，可能也会暂时受到交易限制。

english: In addition to the standard Group Ironman rules, Hardcore Group Ironmen have a set number of lives. Outside of 'safe' situations, each death loses a life. When the group has no lives left, all its players downgrade to regular Group Ironmen.
translation: 除了标准组队铁人规则外，硬核组队铁人拥有固定数量的生命。在非安全情况下，每次死亡会失去一条命。当队伍生命耗尽时，所有队员将降级为普通组队铁人。

english: Unranked Group Ironmen play by the standard Group Ironman rules, but as they are not listed on the hiscores, there are fewer restrictions on forming such a group.
translation: 无排名组队铁人遵循标准组队铁人规则，但由于他们不会出现在排行榜上，因此组建此类队伍的限制较少。

english: No Ironman restrictions apply to this character.
translation: 此角色不受任何铁人限制。

english: Your character starts outside Lumbridge Castle.|Your character begins restricted to the areas of Misthalin and Karamja. As you complete tasks, you can unlock more areas.|Full information about each of the areas can be found in the Area Selection Menu. This can be accessed from the Leagues Menu in the Journal Panel.|All experience gained is heavily increased, and this will further increase as you unlock more Relics.|Content released during Leagues V will be reviewed and enabled for the League on a case-by-case basis.|Combat Masteries offer customizeable combat power, earnt via various milestone challenges.|Each area has an Echo Boss, these are enhanced bosses that pose a challenge and drop new unique rewards, you can kill the regular boss to get an Echo Orb that lets you access the Echo variant, more information can be found in the area interfaces.|Leagues V: Raging Echoes will run from November 27th 2024 until the game update on January 22th 2025.
translation: 你的角色从仑桥镇城堡外开始。|你的角色最初被限制在米斯萨林和卡拉姆詹岛区域。随着你完成任务，可以解锁更多区域。|关于每个区域的完整信息，可以在区域选择菜单中找到。你可以通过日志面板中的联赛菜单访问该菜单。|所有获得的经验值都会大幅增加，并且随着你解锁更多遗物，经验加成会进一步提升。|联赛 V 期间发布的内容将根据具体情况审核并启用。|战斗精通提供可自定义的战斗能力，通过完成各种里程碑挑战获得。|每个区域都有一个回音 Boss，这些是强化过的 Boss，会带来挑战并掉落新的独特奖励。你可以击杀普通 Boss 来获得回音宝珠，从而进入回音变体，更多信息可在区域界面中找到。|联赛 V：狂怒回音 将于 2024 年 11 月 27 日持续至 2025 年 1 月 22 日的游戏更新。

english:
Your character is an Ironman, meaning you cannot trade with other players.|You will start off with Misthalin and Karamja unlocked, with everything those areas provide you.|You will start with the following stat increases:|- 3 Herblore
- 5 Runecraft|A Dramen Staff will be added to your Inventory so that you can access Zanaris. If lost, you can reclaim it from the Sage in Lumbridge.
translation:
你的角色是铁人，这意味着你不能与其他玩家交易。|你将从解锁米斯萨林和卡拉姆詹岛开始，并获得这些区域提供的一切。|你将获得以下属性提升：|- 3 级草药学
- 5 级符石制作|一根德拉门法杖将被添加到你的背包中，以便你进入扎纳里斯城。如果丢失，你可以从仑桥镇的智者那里重新领取。

Slayer Masters will assign you the same tasks, taking into account the areas you have currently unlocked.|Teleports and transportation methods to locations outside of areas you have unlocked are restricted.|When purchasing your Player Owned House it will be accessible from Brimhaven. - 所有杀戮装备商店已添加元素盾牌|小精灵的生成率已提高。|稀有精灵的出现率已提高。|龙精灵掉落的龙骨数量减少。|所有猎魂斧碎片将从每个沙漠宝藏 2 Boss 身上掉落。|宠物和任何在联赛之间继承的宠物幻化物品不计入收藏日志任务。|扭曲弓、维图尔镰刀和图梅肯之影可从所有三个副本中获得。|掉落为组件、需要多个区域才能制作成可用物品的物品，将直接掉落为成品。|CoX: CM、ToB: HM 和 ToA 500+ 的掉落率和难度已显著提升，ToA 和 ToB 现在会在副本获得独特物品时，将其提供给副本中的所有玩家。|宠物幻化现在可以在联赛之间继承。|一旦你符合条件，智者可以出售最大披风。|奈克斯掉落的尼希尔碎片数量增加。|玩家无需完成 WGS 即可进入受折磨恶魔。|维图尔镰刀可以仅用血符石充能。|祖尔拉没有伤害上限或近战伤害免疫。|林业事件生成概率提高三倍。|无需完成荒野中级成就日志即可进入荒野 Boss。

english: Welcome to Leagues VI - Demonic Pacts!
translation: 欢迎来到联赛 VI - 恶魔契约！

english:
Leagues are time-limited game modes that give you new ways to experience the world of Gielinor.

The aim of each League is to complete tasks and earn
League Points. These points can then be exchanged for various unlocks and rewards.

To begin your journey in Leagues VI, use the
Get Started button below. Otherwise, you can use the
Exit Leagues button to quit.
translation:
联赛是限时的游戏模式，为你提供体验吉列诺世界的新方式。

每个联赛的目标是完成任务并赚取
联赛点数。这些点数可以兑换各种解锁和奖励。

要开始你在联赛 VI的旅程，请使用下方的
开始按钮。或者，你也可以使用
退出联赛按钮退出。

english:
In Leagues VI, progression is key. To help you keep track of it, you have the Leagues Menu. This is an extra section to the Journal Panel whilst on a Leagues World.

Let's open the Leagues Menu now. To do so, look for the flashing quest icon on your screen.
translation:
在联赛 VI中，进度是关键。为了帮助你追踪进度，你拥有联赛菜单。这是在联赛世界中日志面板的一个额外部分。

现在让我们打开联赛菜单。为此，请寻找屏幕上闪烁的任务图标。

english:
In Leagues VI, the world of Gielinor is split up into different areas. Most of these have been locked off, but you can unlock new ones by completing tasks.

Varlamore has already been unlocked for you. As a bonus, once you have progressed in the league, Karamja will be given to you as a free unlock!
translation:
在联赛 VI中，吉列诺世界被划分为不同的区域。大部分区域已被锁定，但你可以通过完成任务来解锁新区域。

瓦拉莫尔已经为你解锁。作为奖励，一旦你在联赛中取得进展，卡拉姆詹岛将作为免费解锁赠送给你！

english: Not only does completing <col=ffffff>tasks</col> unlock <col=ffffff>relics</col>, but certain tasks will also allow you to unlock <col=ffffff>Demonic Pacts</col>. These <col=ffffff>tasks</col> reward you with <col=ffffff>Demonic Pact points</col> which when spent, give you combat bonuses and new combat effects. Open the <col=ffffff>Demonic Pacts</col> menu with the <col=ffffff>Demonic Pacts button</col> in the <col=ffffff>Leagues Menu</col> to see what powers await!

english: Your character starts in Yama's Lair with an exit to Civitas illa Fortis.|Your character begins restricted to the area of Varlamore. As you complete tasks, you can unlock more areas. Karamja will be locked at the start of this league, but will be unlocked once you reach the first task milestone. Misthalin is completely inaccessible during this league.|Full information about each of the areas can be found in the Area Selection Menu. This can be accessed from the Leagues Menu in the Journal Panel.|All experience gained is heavily increased, and this will further increase as you unlock more Relics. Exact multipliers can be viewed in the Relics menu.|Content released during Leagues VI will be reviewed and enabled for the League on a case-by-case basis.|Demonic Pacts offer customisable boosts to your combat power, and are earned by completing specific league tasks. Additionally, completing some tasks will grant you a limited number of Pact resets</col>, which will allow you to reset your talent tree.|Each area has an Echo Boss, these are enhanced bosses that pose a higher challenge and drop new unique rewards. Killing the regular boss may drop an Echo orb that lets you access the Echo variant. More information can be found in the area interfaces.|Leagues VI: Demonic pacts will run from April 15th until the game update on 11th June.
translation: 你的角色从雅玛巢穴开始，有一个出口通往福蒂斯城。|你的角色最初被限制在瓦拉莫尔区域。随着你完成任务，可以解锁更多区域。卡拉姆詹岛在本联赛开始时将被锁定，但一旦你达到第一个任务里程碑，它就会被解锁。米斯萨林在本联赛期间完全无法进入。|关于每个区域的完整信息，可以在区域选择菜单中找到。你可以通过日志面板中的联赛菜单访问该菜单。|所有获得的经验值都会大幅增加，并且随着你解锁更多遗物，经验加成会进一步提升。具体倍数可以在遗物菜单中查看。|联赛 VI 期间发布的内容将根据具体情况审核并启用。|恶魔契约提供可自定义的战斗能力提升，通过完成特定的联赛任务获得。此外，完成某些任务将授予你有限数量的契约重置</col>，这允许你重置你的天赋树。|每个区域都有一个回音 Boss，这些是强化过的 Boss，会带来更高的挑战并掉落新的独特奖励。击杀普通 Boss 可能会掉落一个回音宝珠，让你进入回音变体。更多信息可在区域界面中找到。|联赛 VI：恶魔契约 将于 4 月 15 日持续至 6 月 11 日的游戏更新。

english:
Echo Boss Rewards are a guaranteed drop if you exceed 2x the drop rate.|Slayer Masters will assign you tasks taking into account the areas you have currently unlocked.|Teleports and transportation methods to locations outside of areas you have unlocked are restricted.|When purchasing your Player Owned House it will be accessible from Aldarin. Your house can only be moved to areas you have unlocked.|Unlocking new areas will complete various quests and Achievement Diary tasks but will not award any quest completion XP. However, you may complete some quests on your own to gain their XP before unlocking the area which auto-completes it.|Most shop stock will not deplete.|The following shop stocks have been modified:
- Elemental Shields have been added to all Slayer Equipment shops
- Box traps and Bird snares will be available to buy in the Civitas general stores|Impling spawn rates have been increased.|Rarity of rare implings has been increased.|Dragon implings drop reduced Dragon Bones.|All Soulreaper Axe pieces will drop from every Desert Treasure 2 Boss.|Pets and any pet transmog items that roll over between leagues do not count towards the collection log tasks.|The Twisted Bow, Scythe of Vitur, and Tumeken's Shadow are available from all three raids.|Items that drop as components that require multiple regions to create a usable item will drop as the finished item.|CoX: CM, ToB: HM and ToA 500+ have significantly buffed drop rates and difficulty, ToA and ToB will now provide uniques to all players in the raid if the raid obtains one.|Pet Transmogs will now roll over between leagues.|The Leagues tutor in Yama's lair can sell Max Capes once you are eligible.|Nihil Shards drop in increased quantity from Nex.|Scythe of Vitur can be charged with just blood runes.|Zulrah has no damage cap or melee damage immunity.|Forestry Events are three times as likely to spawn.|Wilderness Bosses can be accessed without the Wilderness Medium Diary.|The Abyss and Zanaris are now counted as general regions, meaning you can access them from anywhere via a fairy ring (This includes the cosmic altar).

如果你超过掉落率 2 倍，回音 Boss 奖励将保证掉落。|杀戮大师会根据你当前解锁的区域为你分配任务。|传送到或前往你未解锁区域的方式将受到限制。|购买你的玩家自有房屋时，它将位于阿尔达林岛。你的房屋只能移动到你已经解锁的区域。|解锁新区域将完成各种任务和成就日志任务，但不会奖励任何任务完成经验值。不过，你可以在解锁区域（自动完成任务）之前，自行完成某些任务以获得经验值。|大多数商店的库存不会减少。|以下商店库存已修改：

english:
Deadman is a time-limited game mode. Everyone starts with a fresh save which can only be used on a Deadman: Annihilation world. Beware of other players, for the majority of Gielinor is dangerous!

The aim of Deadman is to acquire Deadman Points which can be used to purchase rewards in the main game at the end of the event. You can find more detail on how to earn Deadman Points by clicking the Skull icon
under the Quest tab.

To begin your journey in Deadman, use the Get Started button below. Otherwise you can use the Exit button to logout.

死亡联赛的目标是获取死亡联赛点数，这些点数可在活动结束时用于购买主游戏中的奖励。你可以通过点击任务标签页下的头骨图标来查找关于如何赚取死亡联赛点数

要开始你的死亡联赛之旅，请使用下方的开始按钮。或者，你也可以使用退出按钮登出。

english:
Experience gained in Deadman is significantly boosted. Drop rates of unique items are also significantly buffed. Some quests are completed automatically upon logging in.

In guarded areas, other players can't attack you. Guarded areas are indicated by a red circle over the skull icon.

Logging out outside of a guarded area will take 7 seconds. Teleporting when skulled will also take 7 seconds. You receive a 1 minute grace period when killing another player in a single combat zone. This is lost when logging out or teleporting.
translation:
在死亡联赛中获得的经验值会大幅提升。独特物品的掉落率也显著提高。登录后，部分任务会自动完成。

在安全区域内，其他玩家无法攻击你。安全区域由头骨图标上的红色圆圈标示。

在安全区域外登出需要7秒。处于头骨状态时传送也需要7秒。在单一战斗区域击杀另一名玩家后，你会获得1分钟的宽限期。登出或传送会失去此宽限期。

english:
The Deadman's skull can be used to purchase sigils and unlocks with Skull Points you earn. For every Deadman Point you earn, you'll also receive a Skull Point.

Sigils are powerful enhancements similar to League Relics. They provide XP boosts, combat boosts and other benefits. Some sigils are unlocked permanently, while others must be attuned to take effect. You can have up to three PvP combat sigils attuned at the same time.

You can view the state of all sigils through the unlocks view on the Deadman's Skull. You can also toggle those that allow it through the toggle section of the unlocks view.
translation:
死亡联赛头骨可用于使用你赚取的头骨点数来购买印记和解锁内容。每获得一个死亡联赛点数，你也会获得一个头骨点数。

印记是类似于联赛遗物的强大增强效果。它们提供经验值加成、战斗加成和其他好处。有些印记是永久解锁的，而另一些则必须调谐后才能生效。你最多可以同时调谐三个PvP战斗印记。

你可以通过死亡联赛头骨上的解锁视图查看所有印记的状态。你也可以通过解锁视图的开关部分切换允许这样做的印记。

english:
To help you get started, you'll receive 60 minutes of immunity before anyone can attack you. Speak to the Doomsayer in Lumbridge to waive your immunity and get on with the killing!

Once you reach combat levels 61, 81 and 96, you will need to move to a higher level bracket world. Each time you move up a bracket, you'll be granted a further 60 minutes of PvP immunity.

You'll receive a Deadman Starter Pack which holds some handy items for you.
translation:
为了帮助你起步，你会获得60分钟的免疫时间，在此期间任何人都无法攻击你。与仑桥镇的厄运预言者交谈可以放弃免疫，开始杀戮！

一旦你达到战斗等级61、81和96，你将需要转移到更高等级段的世界。每次提升等级段，你都会获得额外的60分钟PvP免疫时间。

你会收到一个死亡联赛新手包，里面有一些方便的物品。

english:
Beware, at 02:00, 10:00 and 19:00 UTC, a Breach will occur, where deadly monsters spawn. You can earn unique loot and Deadman Points by fighting these monsters. You can check the next breach time through the Breach Check option on the Deadman's Skull.

Speak to Nigel in the Lumbridge Graveyard if you seek further information.
translation:
注意，在世界协调时间02:00、10:00和19:00，会发生裂隙事件，届时会生成致命的怪物。通过战斗这些怪物，你可以获得独特战利品和死亡联赛点数。你可以通过死亡联赛头骨上的检查裂隙选项查看下一次裂隙的时间。

如需更多信息，请与仑桥镇墓地的奈杰尔交谈。

english: Grid Master is a time-limited game mode that gives you a new way to experience the world of Gielinor. While playing you'll be using a separate character to usual worlds and you'll only be able to play this character on a Grid Master world, in the same vein as other game modes such as Leagues and Deadman.
translation: 网格大师是一种限时游戏模式，让你以全新方式体验吉列诺世界。游玩时你将使用与常规世界不同的独立角色，且只能在网格大师世界中操控该角色，类似于联赛和死寂模式等其他游戏模式。

english: The aim of Grid Master is to complete <col=ffffff>Challenges</col> to earn <col=ffffff>Powerups</col>, <col=ffffff>Rewards</col> & <col=ffffff>Grid Points</col>. These Grid Points can then be exchanged for various unlocks and rewards in the main game. To begin your journey to becoming a Grid Master, use the Get Started button below. Otherwise you can use the Exit button to logout.
translation: 网格大师的目标是完成<col=ffffff>挑战</col>以获取<col=ffffff>强化道具</col>、<col=ffffff>奖励</col>和<col=ffffff>网格点数</col>。这些网格点数可在主游戏中兑换各种解锁和奖励。要开始你的网格大师之旅，请点击下方的“开始”按钮。否则，你可以使用“退出”按钮登出。
